| **Rep. Jamie Raskin just CALLED OUT Supreme Court Justice Clarence Thomas!🔥** **Here’s the bad news:** Justice Thomas is biased and should absolutely recuse himself from the case that could determine Trump’s eligibility to run in 2024\.

**__But here’s the worst news:__** If he doesn’t recuse himself, he could let Trump off SCOT-FREE. We CAN’T let that happen! [**So here’s what you can do: Sign our petition to demand that Justice Clarence Thomas recuses himself from Trump’s case »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thomas-recuse-24?source=FFR_20240112_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=7&akid=20633%2E4449941%2ElqF_kr) | [ADD YOUR NAME BEFORE OUR PETITION CLOSES AT MIDNIGHT: DEMAND JUSTICE CLARENCE THOMAS RECUSE HIMSELF »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/thomas-recuse-24?source=FFR_20240112_EMPET_E3_T0_AC_RS&t=8&akid=20633%2E4449941%2ElqF_kr)

subject: He's TANKING!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY MAHER FOR CONGRESS
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/maherforcongress/opening-day-12780773?e=1722d05e10)
---
| | [ ](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=adf8392ed1&e=1722d05e10)
---
| |
Dear Friend,

He's TANKING!!! The latest polls have been released, and one thing is clear. Biden's approval numbers continue to go down; Americans are dissatisfied with how he is leading our nation. Biden's numbers are the lowest of any modern president, **below 40%.**
---
| [See The Report Here](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=811716c8f6&e=1722d05e10 "See The Report Here")
---
| Frankly, this doesn't come as a surprise, and it has benefits. Biden's low approval numbers will help us here in the Central Valley as more and more independent AND Democrat voters are willing to make a change--not only in their vote for President but also for sending a Republican to Congress.

We are 1 month away from March Primary Ballots hitting your mailbox. Help send a veteran to Congress who wants to lower the exploding cost of living for our local families! Will you pitch in on "[$5 Fridays](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=df05d6455e&e=1722d05e10)" and help send me to Congress?
---
| [$5 FRIDAY](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=b4de595050&e=1722d05e10 "$5 FRIDAY")
---
| [Each contribution](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=503b319ee7&e=1722d05e10) makes a daily difference in reaching out to our friends and neighbors and sharing our message of lower costs at the gas pump and lower grocery bills. Please help me get to Congress and fight for our community!

Thank you in advance for your support.

Sincerely,
---
|
---
| **Michael Maher**
Businessman | Veteran | Republican for Congress
---
| [JOIN THE TEAM](https://michaelmaher.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=6239b7d9cb3ad9388556be8be&id=1eeb5f62c1&e=1722d05e10 "JOIN THE TEAM")
---
|
---
| _**Background** : Michael Maher is a former FBI Special Agent and US Navy Veteran who was raised in the Central Valley. Michael and his wife, Ann, are raising their young family in Fresno County, and he owns and operates an aviation business. Michael was the 2022 nominee for California's 21st Congressional District._

| Hi Peter, we wanted to make sure you saw Ami’s message. Trump’s plans to continue attacks on our democracy, health, and environment are things we can't ignore.

**_[24 hours is all we have left to get the 750 signatures we need to show we’re serious about stopping MAGA extremism. Sign on now→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76996423/449048989/-880501429?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240111_PT_1.2_1MO_team_NA_NA_ira&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjA4MWE0Yy1hOGIxLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=snJ0mykB_4rm7o97T-eW5GCaD76N2OaH01Gk-QXWs7o=&emci=e5f03beb-64b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=df081a4c-a8b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=32394541)_**
**[SIGN ON](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76996424/449048990/-880501429?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240111_PT_1.2_1MO_team_NA_NA_ira&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjA4MWE0Yy1hOGIxLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=snJ0mykB_4rm7o97T-eW5GCaD76N2OaH01Gk-QXWs7o=&emci=e5f03beb-64b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=df081a4c-a8b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=32394541)**
* * *
**_Begin forwarded message:_**

Peter, it’s been three years since the violent insurrection incited by then-president Donald Trump on the U.S. Capitol in an attempt to stop the peaceful transfer of power.

**Three years later, MAGA Republicans are continuing their attacks on our democracy and freedoms.**

**_[That’s why I’m asking you to join me in showing, right at the start of 2024’s election season, that we’re not backing down: I need 1,000 activists to sign on and say that they’re taking a stand for our democracy no matter what Trump and his allies throw at us this year.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76996425/449048991/-880501429?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240111_PT_1.2_1MO_team_NA_NA_ira&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjA4MWE0Yy1hOGIxLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=snJ0mykB_4rm7o97T-eW5GCaD76N2OaH01Gk-QXWs7o=&emci=e5f03beb-64b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=df081a4c-a8b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=32394541)_**
**[Sign On](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76996426/449048992/-880501429?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240111_PT_1.2_1MO_team_NA_NA_ira&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjA4MWE0Yy1hOGIxLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=snJ0mykB_4rm7o97T-eW5GCaD76N2OaH01Gk-QXWs7o=&emci=e5f03beb-64b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=df081a4c-a8b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=32394541)**
Here’s what the extremists don’t get: The people are not with them on the climate crisis or their attempts to undercut our health care access.

Trump has said he has a few big goals if he wins in November: Gut the Inflation Reduction Act (IRA), which is Democrats’ landmark climate mitigating and prescription price lowering law, and undercut the Affordable Care Act (ACA), which makes health care affordable and accessible to millions of Americans.

Trump gave his Party strict orders to attack climate science, affordable and accessible health care, reproductive rights, and more. **_We need to send a clear message to Trump and his allies that we will not let these plans be enacted._**

As a doctor and representative in Congress, I know that our country can’t afford the repercussions of life without affordable and accessible health care and effective climate action.

**_[Stand up against MAGA extremists by signing my first 2024 election year petition in the next 72 hours→](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76996427/449048993/-880501429?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240111_PT_1.2_1MO_team_NA_NA_ira&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkZjA4MWE0Yy1hOGIxLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=snJ0mykB_4rm7o97T-eW5GCaD76N2OaH01Gk-QXWs7o=&emci=e5f03beb-64b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=df081a4c-a8b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=32394541)_**

Dr. Ami Bera

Hello,
After the 2022 election, my husband Adam Frisch and I went to Washington for “freshman orientation” for new members of Congress.
We still didn’t know whether or not Adam had defeated Lauren Boebert. We were in the middle of a recount – and Adam was down by only a few hundred votes.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76996516/449053235/1610638071?refcode=em20240112pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=62207485-a9b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjIwNzQ4NS1hOWIxLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6LHLvpvPNeD91zyur-DF0gDJGZexe41-ImfpVdBT0yw=)
Ultimately, though, after all the votes were counted, Adam came up short. We lost to Boebert by just 546 votes. It was the closest race in the entire country.
Now, Adam’s running again in 2024 – and this time, I know he can win. But first, we have to fix the reason he so narrowly lost in 2022.
**During the last campaign, we got out-spent by Lauren Boebert and her Super PACs – by millions and millions of dollars.** It wasn’t that we didn’t put in the work (we did). It wasn’t that Adam didn’t have a positive vision for the district (he does). We were just drowned out in millions of dollars of lie-filled attack ads.
**If Adam’s going to be able to finish the job and replace Lauren Boebert in Congress, we cannot afford to get out-spent again – and we’re counting on your help now.**
**We’ve set a goal to raise another $50,000 before our first fundraising deadline of the year, but right now, we still have a few thousand dollars left to raise.**
[**Please, can my husband Adam Frisch count on you to chip in $5 or more right now to his campaign – every dollar you can afford before our first deadline of 2024 – and help him replace Lauren Boebert in Congress?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/76996517/449053236/1610638071?refcode=em20240112pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=62207485-a9b1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjIwNzQ4NS1hOWIxLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=6LHLvpvPNeD91zyur-DF0gDJGZexe41-ImfpVdBT0yw=)

If you'd like to change your subscription status [follow this link.](https://email.win.donaldjtrump.com/c/eJw8kD9vgzAQRz_NsQWZ8z8YPCRF7kBUVV2a1dimcWSIhSFRvn1FlHb93dPT05kxxTA8FMgDIJ6Dy4AIdA-IHTucPkT33bW747GLu1Zwdt-u-AaIyyP5f_RlKf1oQtxW2RZOoa3R2sKrShJeEc4pFmdluJBD3chacNpQxvpKDKK26ITxtK-bIigkyEhVUUKQY1OSqpE4-IE72Xg0BBi5h6l018lEd1nmdUylvY5FVOdlSfmZpAF1NjdvRj8Ha8pptdGv-Rm4wYD6Fb2Ba5_tHNISrlMG1Ov0WnoPVD-fQtvT-2Wvb1-fbTErl-4hxpCFBEZ-_py_AQAA__-vqWVu)

subject: Bumping this request up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=6e4a4002600048de9ba18b4051a3c41d&_t=UmaLr_kBqOj4ikov7oxNyJ-MGyPFVrtjEh6EhOAehnZyM0KXerK7zPWdwvnTsj_JcWwBmXc9EsNrpgeFjR_f4gNko_Cohv4ZCoSgJR8Dfaw%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=6e4a4002600048de9ba18b4051a3c41d&_t=UmaLr_kBqOj4ikov7oxNyJ-MGyPFVrtjEh6EhOAehnZyM0KXerK7zPWdwvnTsj_JcWwBmXc9EsNrpgeFjR_f4gNko_Cohv4ZCoSgJR8Dfaw%3D)
---
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e4a4002600048de9ba18b4051a3c41d&_e=rS4sytM91_quKbiQejBnDAittwMjOvBLwe1ZuRJQ-bq3bzv2wIg1Fw2NkbEKfO5FNuq38rMnX9SoFRXXjQMuXSs6_hsy5vRVnTybTCOFg3v83Ss8kXxdE2QQFP396n1iPTeQsa8o99OfYqCQ1IxGkZbtwZ_cx4_ciIrNmB93ISCX7eIBk90TbgBRl8tyrTeuGdb4vSMlGZIWIT5_cQbJVlpMrIl8prs5ZpaiTZE8Zz9XbzQehxRdA0XZ_rnk5JmjHrQ_ckjVsaBwpa8xbWvNv9TZh_JuKys4UbGlRxKhXjy9DH3kdebWG_u8HMSWVGD76yMsNxiGO1PAGBD81EWyKpLfeN4c8HW4C21GfTutvI44dNoeU9NvIZOAdWJiDzNy_RBpYpUAbHvHdmTuBBvirX6EPVZsWmqj1Z0veKyBltg%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e4a4002600048de9ba18b4051a3c41d&_e=rS4sytM91_quKbiQejBnDAittwMjOvBLwe1ZuRJQ-bq3bzv2wIg1Fw2NkbEKfO5FNuq38rMnX9SoFRXXjQMuXSs6_hsy5vRVnTybTCOFg3v83Ss8kXxdE2QQFP396n1iPTeQsa8o99OfYqCQ1IxGkZbtwZ_cx4_ciIrNmB93ISCX7eIBk90TbgBRl8tyrTeuGdb4vSMlGZIWIT5_cQbJVlpMrIl8prs5ZpaiTZE8Zz9XbzQehxRdA0XZ_rnk5Jmj2S_FJhDd5EoFjWExQkxg8AkOB-Bnb1gwoYOWmuJgNv7q7ge5ZQ_RcQv56ewxqcM70AFbsyGBojR9F-83O8r37Y2AkTm2HAct43u05kLY8eNCYWip5gI5yJgphVj2DHHkJk_oyr4XxszljeKBkTliv8KRuP-3g3I4wxE2gXL_2NU%3D)**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e4a4002600048de9ba18b4051a3c41d&_e=rS4sytM91_quKbiQejBnDAittwMjOvBLwe1ZuRJQ-bq3bzv2wIg1Fw2NkbEKfO5FNuq38rMnX9SoFRXXjQMuXSs6_hsy5vRVnTybTCOFg3v83Ss8kXxdE2QQFP396n1iPTeQsa8o99OfYqCQ1IxGkZbtwZ_cx4_ciIrNmB93ISCX7eIBk90TbgBRl8tyrTeuGdb4vSMlGZIWIT5_cQbJVlpMrIl8prs5ZpaiTZE8Zz9XbzQehxRdA0XZ_rnk5JmjE6OBQmNTsTRv4J4lDJAeieXWvYbKCtvugByqKFByOZnFFYjf_BNjd9hgOypsoTYIqhEhdoiX3C97rgAI3GFVV9s37xrh61Un7bEqnZiC97ltlm5hjhKrG-G_GAakPlV3-OdZ9m0eGYA2pcQ6zgj_n1SDqFMGpuXXLRwu1RgpY9g%3D)
In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

**[Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e4a4002600048de9ba18b4051a3c41d&_e=rS4sytM91_quKbiQejBnDAittwMjOvBLwe1ZuRJQ-bq3bzv2wIg1Fw2NkbEKfO5FNuq38rMnX9SoFRXXjQMuXSs6_hsy5vRVnTybTCOFg3v83Ss8kXxdE2QQFP396n1iPTeQsa8o99OfYqCQ1IxGkZbtwZ_cx4_ciIrNmB93ISCX7eIBk90TbgBRl8tyrTeuGdb4vSMlGZIWIT5_cQbJVlpMrIl8prs5ZpaiTZE8Zz9XbzQehxRdA0XZ_rnk5JmjO1VY96pp7_lLgz7QmjSuKMQoCkkA7Zk0FlniclLiEMVMBczET9PHDwCquqY8fwbIK1xGjJ_hPbGOA-fLl3Jf2XqQy8nyFuFYwovTD6Cs33XjJrYC6npBlNhPvnRZGjpdx59mvMf2-oUq-TWeo-2IdkHUCezTzRYnLVhhJMf244A%3D)**

_**Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. **_

Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e4a4002600048de9ba18b4051a3c41d&_e=rS4sytM91_quKbiQejBnDAittwMjOvBLwe1ZuRJQ-bq3bzv2wIg1Fw2NkbEKfO5FNuq38rMnX9SoFRXXjQMuXSs6_hsy5vRVnTybTCOFg3v83Ss8kXxdE2QQFP396n1iPTeQsa8o99OfYqCQ1IxGkZbtwZ_cx4_ciIrNmB93ISCX7eIBk90TbgBRl8tyrTeuGdb4vSMlGZIWIT5_cQbJVlpMrIl8prs5ZpaiTZE8Zz9XbzQehxRdA0XZ_rnk5JmjiFEuD0vShStMTWwmIGtDPi7vSo-EztnPbe02ZEFIU7qHouAV5sFP6u8WzxHlkHf1VSe7g853ER39eYSd-_CKdyEjjNTSsrM5rnQrz6nE9q3nj_aNqK5nFAJq-3TU-kdtWo97mWBz4B2El50SAi5Ddsf3kL0qyncrxd8lsOvobyM%3D)
[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e4a4002600048de9ba18b4051a3c41d&_e=rS4sytM91_quKbiQejBnDAittwMjOvBLwe1ZuRJQ-bq3bzv2wIg1Fw2NkbEKfO5FNuq38rMnX9SoFRXXjQMuXSs6_hsy5vRVnTybTCOFg3v83Ss8kXxdE2QQFP396n1iPTeQsa8o99OfYqCQ1IxGkZbtwZ_cx4_ciIrNmB93ISCX7eIBk90TbgBRl8tyrTeuGdb4vSMlGZIWIT5_cQbJVlpMrIl8prs5ZpaiTZE8Zz9XbzQehxRdA0XZ_rnk5JmjMCBxfHAVKCj3OMeiyOmYBocbkX5BFuJRTp1L7iVrWla2qrAHxpF5Vi22ZxiNqJ3rWOgbQGSlPZkCYMarpa_g0SPQXltru5ZmMNRpSjiP2h5OlIR9uzgRMzr_Ko6_KSZHo7xws9tIg0LinHsEcdHtjpHFXtOfUOIpWjX2QQGMgbE%3D)

Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. **When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you.**

I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. _And believe me, there are some tales._

**I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism.** I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why [**I am determined to take on the anti-American, radical Left in Washington as Montana’s next U.S. Senator.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e4a4002600048de9ba18b4051a3c41d&_e=rS4sytM91_quKbiQejBnDAittwMjOvBLwe1ZuRJQ-bq3bzv2wIg1Fw2NkbEKfO5FNuq38rMnX9SoFRXXjQMuXSs6_hsy5vRVnTybTCOFg3v83Ss8kXxdE2QQFP396n1iPTeQsa8o99OfYqCQ1IxGkZbtwZ_cx4_ciIrNmB93ISCX7eIBk90TbgBRl8tyrTeuGdb4vSMlGZIWIT5_cQbJVlpMrIl8prs5ZpaiTZE8Zz9XbzQehxRdA0XZ_rnk5JmjzPc--78nwjg9Zt_QflurfnV7MOefO7p2S-PRpqRCiBoRn72O2BylF607cYKsxspxadCkZ0_sAWw6eYnweAxbc12jETeBejXsbMls7vGM6nrIkgZlaayqGHqVK6ZC4pIEH9oI1pU4NCNm4v7uDbR_rKK0n91VSTkbGmeDTjORlWI%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e4a4002600048de9ba18b4051a3c41d&_e=rS4sytM91_quKbiQejBnDAittwMjOvBLwe1ZuRJQ-bq3bzv2wIg1Fw2NkbEKfO5FNuq38rMnX9SoFRXXjQMuXSs6_hsy5vRVnTybTCOFg3v83Ss8kXxdE2QQFP396n1iPTeQsa8o99OfYqCQ1IxGkZbtwZ_cx4_ciIrNmB93ISCX7eIBk90TbgBRl8tyrTeuGdb4vSMlGZIWIT5_cQbJVlpMrIl8prs5ZpaiTZE8Zz9XbzQehxRdA0XZ_rnk5Jmj7RCtmtvFlJNQowuFYlmJt1wtMPoo9hsPzPLo4DYTeDJ3NB-UZu3yQz9lMTsJsVAluj-Dt6jjvjoiNj5gPqWlu9NAsc8I887jd8X8wFK3HcbThyVno5c0Eq3gkHecp0bVn5xm_CG_JF0dDIJyeIG02itT2xT1dTe6QWSOM5wgk6s%3D)

Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream.

**The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security.**

**The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in 2024.**

[**We need a proven warrior to take back this Senate seat and take on the Democrats in Washington. I hope hearing my story proves I am the man for the job.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e4a4002600048de9ba18b4051a3c41d&_e=rS4sytM91_quKbiQejBnDAittwMjOvBLwe1ZuRJQ-bq3bzv2wIg1Fw2NkbEKfO5FNuq38rMnX9SoFRXXjQMuXSs6_hsy5vRVnTybTCOFg3v83Ss8kXxdE2QQFP396n1iPTeQsa8o99OfYqCQ1IxGkZbtwZ_cx4_ciIrNmB93ISCX7eIBk90TbgBRl8tyrTeuGdb4vSMlGZIWIT5_cQbJVlpMrIl8prs5ZpaiTZE8Zz9XbzQehxRdA0XZ_rnk5JmjZ638xpksdI1p6kwcUu474S6Nj4Ng1R9N-u3fZws1ZGBA83Iiz8j0weQhyYQurOpkQ37YGANoQSc9efDd-yryLowaIgKseq_NZNwlxp9FLQ-4QDc6xDbOojc4E6uN28cwaNAsgDxVvB6b7kWlsYWi2y-ESothc_OUbFjIMVm6bug%3D)

[**ENDORSE FMR. SEAL TIM SHEEHY TODAY** ](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e4a4002600048de9ba18b4051a3c41d&_e=rS4sytM91_quKbiQejBnDAittwMjOvBLwe1ZuRJQ-bq3bzv2wIg1Fw2NkbEKfO5FNuq38rMnX9SoFRXXjQMuXSs6_hsy5vRVnTybTCOFg3v83Ss8kXxdE2QQFP396n1iPTeQsa8o99OfYqCQ1IxGkZbtwZ_cx4_ciIrNmB93ISCX7eIBk90TbgBRl8tyrTeuGdb4vSMlGZIWIT5_cQbJVlpMrIl8prs5ZpaiTZE8Zz9XbzQehxRdA0XZ_rnk5Jmj04uPEv5SXY40Izif66X0o49j7A4uwZT6zCrR4yVtHviZOlgWARwk0-SGDhnRmk5g45M7nMwDlZuUajO8W6T_zcNLr96eAFCAfYpW2W__SmgRJV96GurgN7Xz55sUk4siRERwwzXsjIp77JJ_oQRYmeAZy2KZEaiAXzkQNyJS7hM%3D)

Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, **I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list.** The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election.

_***If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play.***_

This is my most critical mission to date, and [**I am counting on you to enlist in the fight.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=6e4a4002600048de9ba18b4051a3c41d&_e=rS4sytM91_quKbiQejBnDAittwMjOvBLwe1ZuRJQ-bq3bzv2wIg1Fw2NkbEKfO5FNuq38rMnX9SoFRXXjQMuXSs6_hsy5vRVnTybTCOFg3v83Ss8kXxdE2QQFP396n1iPTeQsa8o99OfYqCQ1IxGkZbtwZ_cx4_ciIrNmB93ISCX7eIBk90TbgBRl8tyrTeuGdb4vSMlGZIWIT5_cQbJVlpMrIl8prs5ZpaiTZE8Zz9XbzQehxRdA0XZ_rnk5JmjIVZlJ5nSMBxhJTNgj9Q6lDnZO_GZtRhtXB9pNCAcapAbBmN19HnLVr3sJLmaF15DY_K8RRATMSm_7nuN6y8S451vglv2NCX4khNoUS0PlSf2IH40OsGTck5BbAxvfLqw-6YFVLnnygUm-oPFRNSAhFp1orpgqrDaa1Hm2CmGz9c%3D)

Thank you,

Tim Sheehy
Former Navy SEAL

clean_body: Our homeland is in danger. Not from overseas terrorists but Washington’s radical Democrats who want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. | | Fellow Conservative, As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle. Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority. . In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. Fellow Conservative, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it. I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read. In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis. Being a SEAL isn’t a one-man job; it takes teamwork, problem-solving, and coming to a consensus. When you’re on missions in the harshest environments known to man, you must act as a unit and recognize you’re only as strong as the weakest among you. I’ve deployed to Iraq, Afghanistan, South America, and the Pacific during my time as a SEAL, and I have been involved in dozens of engagements with enemy forces and survived to tell the tales. And believe me, there are some tales. I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right – which is why Our homeland is in danger. Radical Democrats in Washington want to fundamentally alter the fabric of this GREAT nation. This FAR-LEFT liberal agenda is assaulting our society, communities, and the American Dream. The Democrats’ grip on power is seriously undermining our freedom, prosperity, and security. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong conservative candidate who can defeat my liberal Democrat opponent in 2024. Over the days and weeks ahead, you’ll receive emails from me and my team as we build our campaign. While I don’t want you to feel obligated to interact with each piece of content you receive in your inbox, I kindly ask you to refrain from unsubscribing from our contact list. The only way to flip the Senate next year is to nominate a strong Republican candidate who can defeat a Democrat in the General Election. *If we fail to flip this Montana seat RED next November, we lose our best chance at a Senate Majority for the next DECADE due to the election map at play. This is my most critical mission to date, and Thank you, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican Candidate for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. subject: that sweet congressional pension
body:
I’m just going to be upfront: she is desperate to bank a lifetime pension on the taxpayers’ dime. | | [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJpCeUWak4qP-kzszHfzhNecmz0RIzhQ5znxIUgyDx0MKejFBwUgZ9pPtpTz1n50ZXhnvcThwVfk_rDko41JgKalvYTLhpBauEUkZ95q6lcIyxeszsbFwr_G3TxVvNN2n6pTwDywuAfa31Z2Ni8h4uaXJmmfSroN11O03FMGNTSaQB1ntG9IY4bz8Ucew7Zrm5lg3wRg-tgZqB2A9tdqVlAaOL3dI0DpbQ_2-ExPTp4ax2PvNOpPRZekwItXCBDUWgWcp43u7l4LAwmEHATINnSf5tnoSfVaw5lQW-wPtgRME/42y/3KAl9ewaRL-jplcqT4afDA/h0/s_RT1pOFxqYucFe2dEUXi7ArLQZ8MkrcB1dBuWiHFso)
---
Friend, We have no time to be coy about any of this, so I’ll be straight with you: we’re in the position of having to unexpectedly run against Lauren Boebert simply because she is desperate to bank a lifetime pension on the taxpayers’ dime. If Boebert is sent back to Congress just one more time, she will then be eligible for a congressional pension that will pay her out for the rest of her life—all courtesy of the American taxpayer. Think about it: Boebert has no other compelling reason to want to be a member of Congress than lining her own pockets. Boebert has no interest in serving the public. She clearly doesn’t care about the voters that sent her to Congress in the first place. She dropped them like a sack of potatoes when they demanded accountability from her about her chaotic and lewd public conduct. Boebert definitely doesn’t care about governing. She is one of the least polished, least prepared members of Congress. _Marjorie Taylor Greene looks like a learned scholar compared to what Lauren Boebert brings to the job._ It really is as simple as it looks: ** _She wants the pension._** She wants the glory. And she wants to flex whatever power she can acquire on anyone who disagrees with her mean-spirited outlook on life.
---
| [ ](https://url1005.email.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w89kKB5u2yVtf13KRofeKJpCeUWak4qP-kzszHfzhNeTcBHVCJJWzMnbOjsNy0_ptzeapBVlSvUNvWeNN8bmURF7TUJUeczUo499mhbLl4j6NV0Cnj51-CGlHQy7Jfajwcb_QNaJf669pojdxNxVw5QZs_GTZu7mQmpgg6j-t5WMoXZL0tNbFWCwanc548bC9vOt56zYorSevrrbbzFDBbRfQk_SVza7bTkV9LLoVPt6mIsNYdR887sshapokw7xtUsNWEPVfa7g8-q7g0YU7Wdh66FGupx2mJLW8zeF0ImCbqnke0uSoTuRNUi08P14g/42y/3KAl9ewaRL-jplcqT4afDA/h1/REI3srtATE7_vqnen_302cYqO7_9nj4T4hmkyG8OkJk)
---
**If Boebert wins, we will all pay. But if Boebert loses, right here and right now, she will fall short of the lifetime pension she so desperately wants.**
But we can only thwart Boebert’s cynical and self-serving plan to stay in Congress if we stand together and fight. **That means scaling up—and fast—to match Boebert and the GOP dark money that will boost her carpetbagging.** [Can I count on you to chip in $25 or more right now to stop Boebert from banking a lifetime pension? name: Team Cornel West 2024
subject: Every one of us can make a difference
body:
With the support of volunteers like Brother Charles, we will get on the Ballot in all 50 States

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=charles&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, **Today we honor Brother Charles of Arizona for his victory over an unjust Duopoly**
Our movement marches onward. Brother Charles of Arizona has kickstarted our Arizona operations in a major way, and reduced the number of signatures we require by 2/3rds, showing that each one of us can make a difference by speaking up for what we believe in. Brother Charles is a volunteer who stepped up. He sent an email to the Secretary of State requesting information about how many signatures were required to get Brother West on the ballot, and followed up with calls every day for three days. The Secretary of State provided information in their Handbook of a number of 3% of registered voters in the state, over 120,000 signatures. Brother Charles argued it was closer to 45,000 based on a number of 3% of registered independents, interpreting the language of the appropriate Arizona Elections Statute correctly.
Today the Arizona Secretary of State pulled the handbook off their website, and he heard back from the Secretary of State’s office via email. **They confirmed****that we only need 3% of the number of registered independents signatures to get on the ballot. This totals around 45,000 signatures.**
Because of Brother Charles we are that much closer to getting Brother West on the Ballot, and we can start today! **That’s why we need your help, to lead Ballot Access operations, become an Elector in the electoral college, or donate today. Even before the votes are counted, every single one of us still counts!**
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/volunteer?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=charles&n=2 "Sign up to volunteer with the CW2024 team!") [Sign up to volunteer with the CW2024 team!](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/volunteer?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=charles&n=2)
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=charles&n=3 "Donate") [Donate](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/donate?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=charles&n=3)
---
Thank you for considering this opportunity. We appreciate your continued support and look forward to the possibility of working together on this vital effort. Best regards, Team Cornel West 2024
---
Cornel West for President · 420 N McKinley St, Ste 111-512, Corona, CA 92879, United States

Brother Charles is a volunteer who stepped up. He sent an email to the Secretary of State requesting information about how many signatures were required to get Brother West on the ballot, and followed up with calls every day for three days. The Secretary of State provided information in their Handbook of a number of 3% of registered voters in the state, over 120,000 signatures. Brother Charles argued it was closer to 45,000 based on a number of 3% of registered independents, interpreting the language of the appropriate Arizona Elections Statute correctly. Today the Arizona Secretary of State pulled the handbook off their website, and he heard back from the Secretary of State’s office via email. They confirmedthat we only need 3% of the number of registered independents signatures to get on the ballot. This totals around 45,000 signatures. Because of Brother Charles we are that much closer to getting Brother West on the Ballot, and we can start today! That’s why we need your help, to lead Ballot Access operations, become an Elector in the electoral college, or donate today. Even before the votes are counted, every single one of us still counts! | "Sign up to volunteer with the CW2024 team!" | "Donate" Thank you for considering this opportunity. We appreciate your continued support and look forward to the possibility of working together on this vital effort. Best regards, Team Cornel West 2024 Cornel West for President · 420 N McKinley St, Ste 111-512, Corona, CA 92879, United States

name: Jon Tester
subject: I’m proud of this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| Hello,

[**I’d like to ask you to split a contribution between my campaign and the Voter Protection Project ahead of Monday’s fundraising deadline,**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59615?t=6&akid=12429%2E878179%2Eg4SFlt) but first, I think it’s important to give you an update on the race and explain why your support makes such a difference, especially right now.

**I’m very proud of the campaign we’re running.** Every day, I’m connecting with folks across Montana—on family farms or in high schools or with Montana’s veterans. I always keep those conversations in mind when fighting for Montana’s priorities in the Senate. All of that work is powered by folks like you, and I’m deeply appreciative of your support.

But while I’m focused on defending Montana’s values and fighting to keep our state the Last Best Place, you better believe that out-of-state super PACs are gearing up to spread lies and attack my record.

This is just the beginning, folks. We’ll only face more attacks from here on out as my opponents pour more money into this race. The bottom line is that we’ve got to be ready to take them on.

**Mitch McConnell is trying to buy this Senate seat—and we can’t let him.**

[**That’s why I’d really appreciate anything you can pitch in a split donation ahead of Monday’s fundraising deadline. We’ve got a strong grassroots team, and we’re building a campaign operation that can weather the attacks, but we can’t win without your help.**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59615?t=7&akid=12429%2E878179%2Eg4SFlt) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Jon Tester and VPP will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59616?t=8&akid=12429%2E878179%2Eg4SFlt)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59617?t=9&akid=12429%2E878179%2Eg4SFlt)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59618?t=10&akid=12429%2E878179%2Eg4SFlt)

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59620?t=12&akid=12429%2E878179%2Eg4SFlt)
Thank you for your support.

—Jon
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12429%2E878179%2Eg4SFlt). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12429%2E878179%2Eg4SFlt).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12429%2E878179%2Eg4SFlt) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=12429%2E878179%2Eg4SFlt). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=12429%2E878179%2Eg4SFlt)

name: JoeBiden.com
subject: Your early support is critical:
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
41.88. That’s the average donation that grassroots supporters have given to support President Biden and Vice President Harris’s 2024 reelection campaign. | | |
---
Peter -- $41.88. That’s the average donation that grassroots supporters have given to support President Biden and Vice President Harris’s 2024 reelection campaign. Your early support is critical to creating a solid campaign foundation where we can invest in:
* Getting folks registered to vote;
* Scaling up organizing efforts across the nation;
* Countering misleading Republican attacks;
* And more

While we’ve seen some incredible momentum since our campaign launched, _our work is not done yet_. We’re counting on every single dollar to keep building on the campaign’s success and make an impact. **Not only did they raise more per donation, but they also had more total contributions!**

name: Lacey (Katie Porter Campaign Manager)
subject: Updated LA Times polling
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
A new LA Times poll release today shows us four points behind another candidate, and four points ahead our Republican rival.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36366%2E3422442%2EL85ExO)
Derek,
**A new LA Times poll released today shows us four points behind another candidate, and four points ahead our Republican rival. Bottom line: This is an incredibly close race.**
Remember, in California’s March 5th primary, the top two vote-getters, regardless of party, move on to the general election. We can’t let Republican Steve Garvey push Katie out of the top two. This poll shows about 20% of voters remain undecided—[**can you chip in right now so we have the resources to reach the folks who will decide this election?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240112-2?refcode=em20240112-36366&refcode2=36366_3422442_L85ExO&akid=36366%2E3422442%2EL85ExO)**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240112-2?refcode=em20240112-36366&refcode2=36366_3422442_L85ExO&akid=36366%2E3422442%2EL85ExO)
Republican baseball player Steve Garvey’s recent rise with voters is really changing the dynamic of this race. One strategist was quoted in the LA Times saying, “the Democratic campaigns are obsessed with Garvey. That’s not because they care about [Garvey winning in] November. If he comes in second, Schiff just won the lottery.”
We know Katie has an incredibly strong chance of winning the general election and becoming California’s next U.S. Senator if we just make it past the primary. **We can’t let Steve Garvey’s personal wealth and fame be the reason we lose Katie’s voice in Congress for good.**
With less than a month until ballots arrive in mailboxes across California, I’m asking if there’s anything you can give today to help us reach voters and introduce them to Katie. **Just $15 has the ability to help us reach 500(!) people.**
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240112-2?refcode=em20240112-36366&refcode2=36366_3422442_L85ExO&akid=36366%2E3422442%2EL85ExO)
Thanks SO much. We can’t win this without you!
Lacey M.
Campaign Manager
Katie Porter for Senate

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em&t=2&refcode2=36366_3422442_L85ExO&akid=36366%2E3422442%2EL85ExO)**
---
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a critical way we communicate with grassroots supporters like you. However, if you would like to change your subscription preferences, here are some options:
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/receive-fewer-kp4s-emails/?t=3&akid=36366%2E3422442%2EL85ExO)
* [Update Your Information](https://act.katieporter.com/signup/kp4s-em-update-info-footer)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.katieporter.com/unsubscribe/kp4s-unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=36366%2E3422442%2EL85ExO)

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616
Email us: [info@katieporter.com](mailto:info@katieporter.com)

name: Trump 2024 via Team Scott
subject: We have bad news
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rick Scott for Florida
body:
| | | Peter, we have some bad news.

**Liberals want to get President Trump off of the ballot in every single state!**

We hate to deliver this news, but we are terrified that they’ll succeed and make it **illegal to vote for President Trump.**

name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: I'm running to defend democracy, just like I did on January 6
disclaimer_text: paid for and provided in kind by End Citizens United Nonfederal, P
body:
| [ ](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/26910?t=1&akid=20632%2E4449941%2E-KNjUO)
---
[](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/35917?t=7&akid=20632%2E4449941%2E-KNjUO) Hey, it's Harry Dunn here, one of the Capitol police officers who defended the U.S. Capitol against MAGA insurrectionists just three years ago and testified in front of the January 6th Committee.

I've got an important announcement: **I'm hoping to make my return to DC – but not as a Capitol police officer. I'm officially running to serve Maryland's 3rd Congressional district in the U.S. House.** [**I’m counting on your support to get there. Can you rush $10 or more to me and Fight for Reform become a Founding Donor of my campaign?**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/35917?t=8&akid=20632%2E4449941%2E-KNjUO) | [BECOME A FOUNDING DONOR: CHIP IN $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/35917?t=9&akid=20632%2E4449941%2E-KNjUO)
---
Here’s the thing, I _never_ thought I would run for office. Growing up, I wanted to be just like my dad, who was an athlete and a U.S. Air Force Veteran. I played football and earned an athletic scholarship that sent me to college. (_I was pretty good, but being 6-foot-7 sure didn’t hurt!_)

But wearing a football uniform taught me something special: it gave me purpose and made me feel a part of something bigger than myself.

So when I put on my Capitol police uniform for the first time over 15 years ago to protect our nation’s Capitol, _it felt right_.

But I never thought I’d see the day that our democracy would be attacked by Donald Trump and an army of insurrectionists that HE directed to the Capitol.

I couldn't have been any closer to the chaos of January 6. I put my life on the line during the violence and destruction that Trump encouraged. So trust and believe when I tell you: **_we cannot allow our democracy to be in the hands of these MAGA-extremists._**

I fought for our democracy and our Capitol once as Officer Dunn, and I'll do it again as Congressman Dunn.
[**Please, can you chip in $10 or $25 to my team and Fight for Reform to become a Founding Donor of my campaign? I seriously appreciate any help you can give today »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/35917?t=10&akid=20632%2E4449941%2E-KNjUO)
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Fight for Reform and Harry Dunn will go through immediately:
[CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/35918?t=11&akid=20632%2E4449941%2E-KNjUO)
---
[CONTRIBUTE $25 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/35919?t=12&akid=20632%2E4449941%2E-KNjUO)
[CONTRIBUTE $50 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/35920?t=13&akid=20632%2E4449941%2E-KNjUO)
[CONTRIBUTE $100 »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/35921?t=14&akid=20632%2E4449941%2E-KNjUO)
[Or a custom donation »](https://act.fightforreform.org/go/35917?t=15&akid=20632%2E4449941%2E-KNjUO)
Let's do it,

Harry Dunn
Harry Dunn is only asking for contributions of up to $5,000 from individuals, federal PACs, and other federally permissible sources for End Citizens United-Nonfederal. Harry Dunn is not asking for contributions in excess of that amount or any contributions from corporations, unions, or other federally prohibited sources.

pages

of records from the National Archives and Records Administration
(NARA) that show then-Vice President Joe Biden using an email alias to
correspond with family members, including son Hunter and brother
James.

These alias emails show Joe Biden and his family had a close working
relationship on government matters. No wonder the Biden administration
had been hiding these emails from Congress and the American people!

Of course, we had to go to court to get these records (_Judicial
Watch, Inc. v. National Archives_
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66567&L=29587&F=T&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9jdW1lbnRzL2p3LXYtbmF0aW9uYWwtYXJjaGl2ZXMtYmlkZW4tZmFtaWx5LWNvbXBsYWludC0wMTQzMi8/dXRtX3NvdXJjZT1kZXBsb3llciZ1dG1fbWVkaXVtPWVtYWlsJnV0bV9jb250ZW50PUFNamN3T0RrNU5UUSUzRCZ1dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249d2Vla2x5K3VwZGF0ZSZ1dG1fdGVybT1tZW1iZXJz&hash=804670007417aaa30f3a612bee5601c40e5041b71fe0feb0d88fefe7d6eb8ad6]
(No. 1:23-cv-01432)).

The emails we received also show that Joe Biden signed off on the
cessation of Secret Service protection for Hunter Biden and Beau
Biden’s daughter Natalie during an

trip to Kosovo.

These emails include messages to Jim and Hunter Biden regarding the
then-vice president’s schedule and meetings. Some emails show Biden
using the alias: robinware456@gmail.com.

The emails also show that Hunter and James Biden accompanied Joe Biden
on taxpayer-funded trips. Moreover, they show that then-Vice President
Biden in December 2009 emailing an aide after he forgot the password
to his West Wing computer.

The records show that Hunter Biden used an email address
(hbiden@rosemontseneca.com) from his now-dissolved firm Rosemont
Seneca Partners.

The records also show that James Biden used an email address
(jbiden@lionhallgp.com) tied to his consulting firm Lion Hall, which
had been the
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66567&L=31083&F=T&&hash=126b09768b6287b04bd67400504f569e27d9fa636b2e132f3d42c6cfdfb059f4
[https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=66567&L=31050&F=T&&hash=d5e23005c6581930c6477fb78f1895c7d873974c812a34a66d650f521ade4cd5]
of an FBI bribery investigation in the 1990s.

Most of the 210 Biden vice presidential email messages we received
were redacted due to Presidential Records Act (PRA) restrictions and
applicable FOIA exemptions, which specify what material may be
released to the public.

of records that show
then-Vice President Joe Biden and his son Hunter received a May 26,

call with Pres Poroshenko,” who was the president of Ukraine. Joe
Biden’s email address is the alias robert.l.peters@pci.gov, Hunter
Biden’s email account is disclosed as hbiden@rosemontseneca.com.
(Hunter Biden was on the board of the controversial Ukrainian firm
Burisma at the time.)

from his Rosemont Seneca email address to Secret Service Assistant
Director of the Office of Investigations Jeremy Sherida, Hunter Biden
writes: “Thank you. Both the Vice President and I sign off on the
agreed upon requested interruption in protection for Natalie and
Hunter.” The interruption in protection was from August 18 to August
22, 2016, during their trip to Kosovo and was to resume up their
return to Washington, D.C., on August 22, 2016. The Biden family was
in Kosovo where the country erected a statue of and named a highway
after Beau Biden. It is not known where Hunter Biden and Natalie Biden
went without their Secret Service detail.

from Michele Smith, executive assistant to the vice president, dated

to attending the Special Olympic Games.

Michah Morrison, our chief investigative reporter, rounds up

the
evidence in Judicial Watch’s _Investigative Bulletin_ on the
Left’s “censorship industrial complex”:

> An unprecedented assault on free speech is underway in America. The
> White House and government agencies play central roles. But because
> this new war largely takes place in the shadows of cyberspace,
> unfolding in back offices of social media giants like Facebook,
> YouTube, Google, TikTok and Twitter, the public has been slow to
> catch on to the threat.
>
> In recent months, however, the House Judiciary Committee, the U.S.
> Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit, and Judicial Watch have each
> issued findings that break new ground. Taken together, they go a
> long way to dragging the war on the First Amendment into the
> sunlight. The main target of the new censorship efforts?
> Conservative speech, speakers, and viewpoints.
>
> “The Weaponization of ‘Disinformation,’” a November report
> of the Judiciary Committee, concludes that the “world’s largest
> social media platforms...intentionally suppressed”
> constitutionally protected speech “as a consequence of the federal
> government’s direct coordination.”
>
> The Fifth Circuit Court agrees. In _State of Missouri v. Biden et
> al_—an eye-opening October ruling that did not get the attention
> it deserved—the Court found that “the White House likely (1)
> coerced [social media] platforms to make their moderation decisions
> by way of intimidating messages and threats of adverse consequences,
> and (2) significantly encouraged the platforms’ decisions by
> commandeering their decision-making processes, both in violation of
> the First Amendment.”
>
> Also in October, Judicial Watch released a groundbreaking four-part
> documentary “Censored and Controlled,” detailing the coordinated
> effort by Big Tech and the government to suppress debate on
> elections, Covid-19 information, and news of the Hunter Biden
> laptop. The documentary details efforts by Big Tech to censor
> content, exposing collusion between the government and social media
> to suppress what Americans can see and hear.
>
> The House report demonstrates, step by step, how the Department of
> Homeland Security worked with other government entities, Stanford
> University, and Big Tech to create an elaborate system to suppress
> speech. These efforts were centered in a group with a name straight
> out of Orwell: the Election Integrity Partnership.
>
> The EIP was a consortium of academics led by Stanford University
> that worked “directly” with Homeland Security and the State
> Department “to monitor and censor American’s online speech,”
> the House report noted. “The EIP’s operation was
> straightforward: ‘external stakeholders,’ including federal
> agencies and organizations funded by the federal government,
> submitted [alleged] misinformation reports directly to the EIP. The
> EIP’s misinformation ‘analysts’ next scoured the internet for
> additional examples for censorship. If the submitted report flagged
> a Facebook post, for example, the EIP analysts searched for similar
> content on Twitter, YouTube, TikTok, Reddit, and other major social
> media platforms. Once all of the offending links were compiled, the
> EIP sent the most significant ones directly to Big Tech with
> _specific _recommendations on how the social media platforms should
> censor the posts....”
>
> The pressure from Big Tech “was largely directed in a way that
> benefitted one side of the political aisle: true information posted
> by Republicans and conservatives was labeled as ‘misinformation’
> while false information posted by Democrats and liberals was largely
> unreported and untouched by the censors.” The EIP targeted
> “candidates and commentators with conservative viewpoints.” The

> that vein, the officials asked for—and received—frequent updates

> ‘sensational’ content, what ‘interventions’ were being

> fact, make our nation stronger.
>
> The new CIS report shows that the Biden administration is flat out
> lying to the American public when it claims it prioritizes arresting
> and deporting criminal aliens who may pose a threat to national
> security or public safety. The group’s researchers examined data
> from fiscal years 2017, 2018 and 2019 then compared it to fiscal
> years 2021, 2022 and 2023 and found that “criminal aliens have
> been top beneficiaries of the Biden administration’s agenda.”
> The study clarifies that a criminal alien is a foreigner who most
> likely entered the U.S. illegally and has a criminal conviction or
> pending criminal charges. Under Biden there has been a 67% decrease
> in deportations of criminal aliens, a 57% reduction in arrests of
> criminal aliens, a 55% decline in immigration-related criminal
> convictions and a 44% decrease in detainer requests issued by
> federal authorities on criminal aliens in the custody of local law
> enforcement agencies nationwide.
>
> The records show that in the first three years under Trump, ICE
> removed 485,930 illegal immigrants with criminal convictions or
> pending criminal charges. By contrast, the agency deported only
> 158,931 aliens with criminal convictions or pending criminal charges
> in the first three years of the Biden administration. In Trump’s
> first three years as president, ICE made 389,237 administrative
> arrests of undocumented aliens with criminal convictions or pending
> criminal charges. In Biden’s first three years ICE only arrested
> 165,650 illegal immigrants with criminal convictions or pending
> criminal charges. In the first three fiscal years under the Trump
> administration, ICE recorded 19,978 immigration-related criminal
> arrests, 18,340 indictments, and 17,784 convictions. In Biden’s
> first three years, ICE registered 7,523 immigration-related criminal
> arrests, 7,529 indictments, and 8,090 convictions.
>
> Detainers for criminal aliens in local custody also dropped
> significantly with 484,990 ICE detainer requests in the first three
> years of Trump’s tenure and 270,127 in Biden’s first three
> years. Offenses committed by the illegal immigrants are broken down
> and include thousands arrested for driving under the influence,
> sexual assault, robbery, homicide, weapons crimes, possession of
> dangerous drugs, kidnapping, larceny, and a multitude of other
> serious crimes. The Biden administration’s policy of arresting
> fewer criminal aliens clearly resulted in fewer deportations of that
> demographic and “increased threat to public safety and national
> security,” CIS writes in its report. “The dramatic decrease in
> removals has also sent a strong message to people overseas that
> unlawful entry into the United States comes with a decreased risk of
> deportation, undoubtedly contributing to the unprecedented mass
> illegal immigration that is occurring under the Biden
> administration,” according to CIS.
>

BIG TECH, BIG GOVERNMENT, BIG BROTHER: WASHINGTON’S WAR ON FREE SPEECH Michah Morrison, our chief investigative reporter, rounds up [] the evidence in Judicial Watch’s Investigative Bulletin on the Left’s “censorship industrial complex”: An unprecedented assault on free speech is underway in America. The White House and government agencies play central roles. But because this new war largely takes place in the shadows of cyberspace, unfolding in back offices of social media giants like Facebook, YouTube, Google, TikTok and Twitter, the public has been slow to catch on to the threat. In recent months, however, the House Judiciary Committee, the U.S. Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit, and Judicial Watch have each issued findings that break new ground. Taken together, they go a long way to dragging the war on the First Amendment into the sunlight. The main target of the new censorship efforts? Conservative speech, speakers, and viewpoints. “The Weaponization of ‘Disinformation,’” a November report of the Judiciary Committee, concludes that the “world’s largest social media platforms...intentionally suppressed” constitutionally protected speech “as a consequence of the federal government’s direct coordination.” The Fifth Circuit Court agrees. In State of Missouri v. Biden et al—an eye-opening October ruling that did not get the attention it deserved—the Court found that “the White House likely (1) coerced [social media] platforms to make their moderation decisions by way of intimidating messages and threats of adverse consequences, and (2) significantly encouraged the platforms’ decisions by commandeering their decision-making processes, both in violation of the First Amendment.” Also in October, Judicial Watch released a groundbreaking four-part documentary “Censored and Controlled,” detailing the coordinated effort by Big Tech and the government to suppress debate on elections, Covid-19 information, and news of the Hunter Biden laptop. The documentary details efforts by Big Tech to censor content, exposing collusion between the government and social media to suppress what Americans can see and hear. The House report demonstrates, step by step, how the Department of Homeland Security worked with other government entities, Stanford University, and Big Tech to create an elaborate system to suppress speech. These efforts were centered in a group with a name straight out of Orwell: the Election Integrity Partnership. The EIP was a consortium of academics led by Stanford University that worked “directly” with Homeland Security and the State Department “to monitor and censor American’s online speech,” the House report noted. “The EIP’s operation was straightforward: ‘external stakeholders,’ including federal agencies and organizations funded by the federal government, submitted [alleged] misinformation reports directly to the EIP. The EIP’s misinformation ‘analysts’ next scoured the internet for additional examples for censorship. If the submitted report flagged a Facebook post, for example, the EIP analysts searched for similar content on Twitter, YouTube, TikTok, Reddit, and other major social media platforms. Once all of the offending links were compiled, the EIP sent the most significant ones directly to Big Tech with specific recommendations on how the social media platforms should censor the posts....” The pressure from Big Tech “was largely directed in a way that benefitted one side of the political aisle: true information posted by Republicans and conservatives was labeled as ‘misinformation’ while false information posted by Democrats and liberals was largely unreported and untouched by the censors.” The EIP targeted “candidates and commentators with conservative viewpoints.” The report lists the targeted figures, which included Donald Trump, Newt Gingrich, Sean Hannity, and Judicial Watch’s own Tom Fitton []. Last week, Judicial Watch sued the Department of Homeland Security [] for failing to respond to a Freedom of Information Act request for all its records regarding JW and Tom. “Judicial Watch and I have been censored again and again by government and Big Tech,” Tom said in a statement. “That we had to file a federal lawsuit to get basic information about this targeting is another sure sign that [Homeland Security’s Cybersecurity & Infrastructure Agency] has been up to no good.” The Fifth Circuit ruling also puts on the record many facts about the new censorship efforts. The court ruled in favor of the secretaries of state of Missouri and Louisiana and five social media users who alleged “that numerous federal officials coerced social-media platforms into censoring certain social- media content, in violation of the First Amendment.” The ruling details pressure on Big Tech from the White House, the FBI, the Surgeon General’s Office, the Centers for Disease Control, and the Department of Homeland Security. Each office, the ruling finds, “violated the First Amendment.” The Court noted, for example, that in one email “a White House official told a platform to take a post down ‘ASAP,’ and instructed it to ‘keep an eye out for tweets that fall in this same genre’ so that they could be removed, too. In another, an official told a platform to ‘remove [an] account immediately’—he could not ‘stress the degree to which this needs to be resolved immediately.’ Often, those requests for removal were met.” The White House stepped up the pressure in 2021, the court noted. It “started monitoring the platforms’ moderation activities.... In that vein, the officials asked for—and received—frequent updates from the platforms. Those updates revealed, however, that the platforms’ policies were not clear-cut and did not always lead to content being demoted. So, the White House pressed the platforms. For example, one White House official demanded more details and data on Facebook’s internal policies at least twelve times, including to ask what was being done to curtail ‘dubious’ or ‘sensational’ content, what ‘interventions’ were being taken, what ‘measurable impact’ the platforms’ moderation policies had, ‘how much content [was] being demoted,’ and what ‘misinformation’ was not being downgraded.” Judicial Watch has been fighting the freedom of speech battle with major lawsuits []. And in October, JW premiered “Censored and Controlled,” a four-part documentary that takes the viewer deep inside government censorship efforts, detailing controversies over free speech suppression on the site then known as Twitter, election interference, Covid-19, and the Hunter Biden laptop. Clearly, Big Tech is “censoring content,” Tom Fitton told the filmmakers. It is “not following a set of rules but following government dictates and their own ideological predilections and political biases.” The war over free speech and Big Tech is sure to grow more heated in 2024 with a presidential election, a crisis on the southern border, and wars in Ukraine and Israel. The stakes could not be higher. We’ll be watching closely. View the Judicial Watch documentary, Censored and Controlled, here []. Read “The Weaponization of Disinformation,” Interim Report of the House Judiciary Committee, here []. Read United States Court of Appeals for the Fifth Circuit, State of Missouri et al v. Joseph R. Biden et al, here []. IRS INVESTIGATORS SUBJECT TO WOKE TRAINING FEATURING BLACK TRANS PROF., DALAI LAMA Law enforcement agents at the IRS are being abused and distracted with outrageous racialist DEI traine, as our Corruption Chronicles blog exclusively details []. Federal agents charged with investigating money laundering, public corruption, counterterrorism, and narcotics trafficking at the Internal Revenue Service (IRS) were pulled from their critical duties to endure woke training that directs them to operate in a culturally inclusive environment and speak up for multiple social identities. The drills focused on equity, diversity, inclusion and justice and instructed agents from the specialized IRS Criminal Investigation (IRSCI) unit to question how much they know about different cultural norms and mores and challenged them with the following inquiries: “Are you prepared adequately to accommodate different cultural expectations and practices?” and “Can you deliver cultural inclusion behaviorally?” The course’s introduction, titled “Cultural Inclusion is About Justice,” was provided by a black transgender professor who asserts in an academic article that the high impact of “whiteness” [ trans college students. Judicial Watch obtained and reviewed material from the controversial special training presented to IRSCI agents as part of mandatory continuing professional education for all staff. A source connected to the Washington D.C. field office provided slides from the specific presentation in that division, which has dozens of agents that investigate crimes throughout the capitol area, including Maryland, Virginia, and West Virginia. Federal agents—as well as the special agent in charge of the D.C. office—working on high-profile probes involving bribery, embezzlement, illegal kickbacks and dismantling the country’s major drug and money laundering organizations were reluctant to be yanked from their important work to participate in the woke training. “They want us to consider people’s race,” said a veteran investigator whose identity cannot be disclosed. “Criminals don’t discriminate. White collar criminals are mostly what IRSCI goes after.” And they are a diverse bunch, according to government sources interviewed by Judicial Watch. Nevertheless, in this heated environment of political correctness many government agencies are implementing official woke initiatives under a Biden executive order [] to advance racial equity and support for underserved communities through the federal government. That includes subjecting government workers to similar equity, diversity, inclusion, and justice training as well as establishing special programs to help the targeted audience. The Department of Justice (DOJ) has formulated a strategy to “advance equity for marginalized and underserved communities” that, among other things, directs federal prosecutors to ignore maximum sentencing under the law to “avoid unwarranted disparities.” The Department of Labor has dedicated $260 million to promote “equitable access” to government unemployment benefits by addressing disparities in the administration and delivery of money by race, ethnicity and language proficiency. The Treasury Department named its first ever racial equity chief, a veteran La Raza official who spent a decade at the nation’s most influential open borders group. The list goes on and on. The IRSCI training is part of that expansive woke agenda. Criminal investigators at the nation’s tax agency were taught about cross-cultural competence in a section that questioned their cultural behaviors, values, biases, preconceived notions, and personal limitations. “Do you understand the worldview of your culturally different customers/colleagues without negative judgements?” one slide asks. “Can you develop relevant and sensitive intervention strategies and skills with your culturally different customers/colleagues?” Keep in mind these are federal law enforcement agents investigating the perpetrators of serious crimes, not public relations, or human resources representatives. It is difficult to understand how they benefit from this type of training, which also featured a “cultural perceptions” discussion that covered how Mexicans and Taiwanese describe people in the U.S. Answers include rushed, reserved, hard-headed, unemotional, independent, and self-indulgent. A slide focusing on projection bias includes a quote from the Dalai Lama, the infamous Buddhist monk and Tibetan spiritual leader who recently ignited global outrage after kissing a child on the lips [] [ an event in northern India then asking the boy to suck his tongue. Adjacent to the Dalai Lama’s banner is a deep quote from a diversity, equity and inclusion strategist [] who claims to be an expert on cultural, racial, religious, gender, generational and sexual orientation. Her message to IRS criminal investigators is “I am not culturally different from you. I am culturally different like you.” Cultural exclusions are discussed in a slide featuring a photo of a black woman who claims wearing her hair naturally was the only thing that defined her in the office and another black woman who refrains from conversations in the office about famous black people to avoid a negative affiliation. A Latina woman says that she tries “not to be regularly seen with other Latinx employees on staff” to avoid a negative association. ICE DATA SHOW MAJOR DROP IN ARRESTS, REMOVALS OF CRIMINAL ILLEGAL IMMIGRANTS You won’t be surprised to learn that the public safety is being put at risk by the Biden border invasion. Our Corruption Chronicles blog has the frightening details []. Besides welcoming record amounts of illegal immigrants into the United States, the Biden administration further compromises national security by arresting and deporting “significantly fewer criminal aliens than the Trump administration,” according to government records obtained by the Center for Immigration Studies (CIS). In a troubling report [] published this week the nonpartisan research organization analyzes Immigration and Customs Enforcement (ICE) criminal data from the first three years of the Trump administration and the first three years of Biden’s presidency and the results are incredibly worrisome. The records were obtained through the federal law known as the Freedom of Information Act (FOIA) and public stats disclosed by ICE. The Washington D.C. think tank points out that the statistics contradict Biden administration claims that its disastrous immigration policies are designed to focus on criminal aliens. In fact, back in the fall of 2021 Department of Homeland (DHS) Secretary Alejandro Mayorkas issued a memo [] saying that new guidelines for the enforcement of civil immigration law better focus resources on the apprehension and removal of noncitizens who are a threat to national security and public safety. Taking a jab at the Trump administration, the beleaguered DHS leader asserted that “for the first time, our guidelines will, in the pursuit of public safety, require an assessment of the individual and take into account the totality of the facts and circumstances.” In the document Mayorkas asserts that the majority of the more than 11 million undocumented or otherwise removable noncitizens in the United States have been contributing members of our communities across the country for years. As the administration strives to provide them with a path to status, the DHS Secretary writes in the directive, it will not work in conflict by spending resources seeking to remove those who do not pose a threat and, in fact, make our nation stronger. The new CIS report shows that the Biden administration is flat out lying to the American public when it claims it prioritizes arresting and deporting criminal aliens who may pose a threat to national security or public safety. The group’s researchers examined data from fiscal years 2017, 2018 and 2019 then compared it to fiscal years 2021, 2022 and 2023 and found that “criminal aliens have been top beneficiaries of the Biden administration’s agenda.” The study clarifies that a criminal alien is a foreigner who most likely entered the U.S. illegally and has a criminal conviction or pending criminal charges. Under Biden there has been a 67% decrease in deportations of criminal aliens, a 57% reduction in arrests of criminal aliens, a 55% decline in immigration-related criminal convictions and a 44% decrease in detainer requests issued by federal authorities on criminal aliens in the custody of local law enforcement agencies nationwide. The records show that in the first three years under Trump, ICE removed 485,930 illegal immigrants with criminal convictions or pending criminal charges. By contrast, the agency deported only 158,931 aliens with criminal convictions or pending criminal charges in the first three years of the Biden administration. In Trump’s first three years as president, ICE made 389,237 administrative arrests of undocumented aliens with criminal convictions or pending criminal charges. In Biden’s first three years ICE only arrested 165,650 illegal immigrants with criminal convictions or pending criminal charges. In the first three fiscal years under the Trump administration, ICE recorded 19,978 immigration-related criminal arrests, 18,340 indictments, and 17,784 convictions. In Biden’s first three years, ICE registered 7,523 immigration-related criminal arrests, 7,529 indictments, and 8,090 convictions. Detainers for criminal aliens in local custody also dropped significantly with 484,990 ICE detainer requests in the first three years of Trump’s tenure and 270,127 in Biden’s first three years. Offenses committed by the illegal immigrants are broken down and include thousands arrested for driving under the influence, sexual assault, robbery, homicide, weapons crimes, possession of dangerous drugs, kidnapping, larceny, and a multitude of other serious crimes. The Biden administration’s policy of arresting fewer criminal aliens clearly resulted in fewer deportations of that demographic and “increased threat to public safety and national security,” CIS writes in its report. “The dramatic decrease in removals has also sent a strong message to people overseas that unlawful entry into the United States comes with a decreased risk of deportation, undoubtedly contributing to the unprecedented mass illegal immigration that is occurring under the Biden administration,” according to CIS. name: =?utf-8?Q?Jesse=20James=20Mullen?=
subject: This is an uphill fight
body:
The GOP machine is pouring money into Jacobsen's reelection campaign | | | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mullenformontana/this-is-an-uphill-fight?e=805e709ff8)
---
[](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=14355a58d9&e=805e709ff8)
Hey team, it’s Jesse James Mullen, Candidate for Secretary of State.
The campaign contribution reports are in, and Christi Jacobsen has a big head start, with an almost five-to-one lead as an incumbent candidate with party support.
**That’s a luxury we don’t have.**
**The Montana GOP and Oil and Gas lobbies** are donating thousands to their far-right MAGA Secretary of State, who undermines elections.
Although we don’t have a primary opponent, the _**Montana Democratic Party won’t support us financially until June**_. That gives the far-right a gigantic head start.
Check the GOP candidate’s donations; maximum donation after maximum donation. We have more donors than them, but we’re grassroots and receive support from **Real Montanans** and people who want to protect our elections. We don’t get handouts from special interest groups, like an election-denying Secretary of State can.
Our donations are from individual donors and average less than $50 per donation.
Less than 10 percent of Christi’s donations are under $100; _she received more donations of $700 or higher than donations under $200_.
**We don’t need Christi’s lobbyist backers.** We’re running a small, smart campaign with on-the-ground support. We’re getting more earned media than an elected Secretary of State, ranking higher in Google searches and doing it for a tenth of the price.
[**Imagine what we can do if we have even half of her resources.**](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=1b612ea48f&e=805e709ff8)
[**Will you help me start off strong by chipping in a few bucks now?**](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=5f3d646529&e=805e709ff8)
– Jesse James Mullen

| [DONATE HERE](https://jessejamesmullen.us21.list-manage.com/track/click?u=ead1108518cb8f41430a7b0b3&id=df0b714d65&e=805e709ff8)
---
|
---

clean_body: | | | | Did you see Lori’s invitation? Hi Peter, this is Shawn DeRemer, Lori Chavez-DeRemer’s husband. I wanted to tell you about our Foundation Members Program. I’ll be honest - Lori is fully supported by donors just like you. You are the foundation of her success in Congress. To join the program all you have to do is donate $5 a month (or more)! This small amount will have a HUGE impact on us claiming another victory in November. Don’t skip this opportunity! Sent from my iPhone | | | | Even as a Congresswoman, Lori’s most important title is mom. That’s how she knows the issues your family faces, and that’s why she fights everyday to make life better for every Oregon family, and every American. Aside from that, all you need to know are the issues she’s fighting for in Congress: If that sounds like the kind of agenda you can get behind, If you’d prefer to give by check, please use the below address: Lori Chavez-DeRemer for Congress 13203 SE 172nd Ave Suite 166 #399 Happy Valley, OR 97086 Forward This message to FIVE FRIENDS AND FAMILY to spread the word on how to achieve a better future for Oregon and America → ** Also text “LORI” to 71800 or click here to receive all of Lori’s messages | | | | Shawn’s iPhone 13203 SE 172nd Ave, Suite 166 #399, Happy Valley, OR 97086 = \- ==
