name: Kash Patel
subject: Government Gangsters all lied about January 6
body:
The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public

[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zas1gd00g5pe1tnpj9ektanadud1rt4g44tglp7o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgm8o76clh2bs "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

The media lied about January 6th.

The Deep State lied about January 6th.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6th.

The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public, showing an entirely different story from the lies they told.

Now, it's time to hold them accountable. Here's how:

**STEP ONE** \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here's how you can help:

[Can you send an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to the Kash Foundation to support our mission to defeat the Deep State? Click here to donate >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zjgke0tem0ols7k4qtdl66ec1vb53fetr8spqk38_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgm8o76clh2bs "Donate")

Here's why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government...

I've been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage our country. My investigation discovered the FBI's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th.

[Please donate any $250, $100, or any amount today to support our efforts >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zteqn7ho7pg9lip03jgtd0u754pp0n089ba5v0to_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgm8o76clh2bs)

[Donate >>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zp6ih73grl70i92h13ik5opkt826hfkcrs83sv58_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgm8o76clh2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no "deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

This is the battle against the "Lawfare" used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots.

It's time to fight back.

**Help me raise $20,000 this month by contributing any amount you can generously afford today. **

[Donate $10 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zu5jr0gv22kknvsvckpadf4o4gl94ro7d4ilpjio_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgm8o76clh2bs)

[Donate $35 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zmdn0d11u7qupatdvo5ccteech493o2ub0va38bo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgm8o76clh2bs)

[Donate $50 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zhnrjbi8tdfhmne7s4vpcafiss447gqpspad0oag_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgm8o76clh2bs)

[Donate $100 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zm4e3umbnkc0b191lqa4k5po34dtismthr67sva8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgm8o76clh2bs)

[Donate $250 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zn2i102pet4h1to51lrhvg07fojo9lnnt094alo8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgm8o76clh2bs)

[Donate $500 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zre2as477b1sdl2qkaoe0crguj0c8ffsa105ach8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgm8o76clh2bs)

[Donate $1,000 ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr640tiid8p10im9g56r3u39qqce3ugrn26jdt08_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgm8o76clh2bs)

[Donate Any Amount ](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zoogro0lc257iq0bgt0iuerfppborlao3l08c0u0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgm8o76clh2bs)

Thank you for your continued support!

We will take our country back.

Thank you,

Kash Patel

body:

| |
---
| | | I can't hold on much longer, Friend.

Soros, Zuckerberg, Gates and the rest of the globalist billionaires want to watch America burn - and they're trying to take out Republicans like me who stand in their way.
**This is Ryan Zinke, Trump 's former Secretary of the Interior and 20+ year Navy SEAL. I'm defending the most critical Republican seat in the House.**
In 2022, I commanded the team of Navy SEALs who took the House majority by force. Now, Biden's billionaire puppet masters know that if they can demolish my campaign, no other conservative will stand a chance. _**That 's why they've listed me among their top targets in 2024.**_

---

---

I'll be upfront with you, Friend - I don't have the backing of billionaires donors. My campaign relies on the support of regular, everyday Americans like yourself. But I can promise you that if you chip in just $5 right now, we'll crush this month's fundraising goal and thwart Biden's plan to destroy America.

name: Emily Hall
subject: Join us in declaring your support
body:
For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38092%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=bIT879PADjVaWdUc4pj25g&sysid=1)
---
Dear Friend,

For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope in a world where so many have yet to hear the gospel. Right now, around the globe, 3,500 missionaries share the transforming gospel message of Jesus. They do this because individuals like you provide the support they need.

We are called by Scripture to play our part in bringing His teachings to all nations, tribes, people, and languages. As we live out this mission in our everyday lives, it's crucial we also show support for our missionaries with financial support and encouragement.

Will you encourage global missionaries today by committing to support their work? By signing this declaration, you're stating:

**“I am committed to helping solve the world's greatest problem -- spiritual lostness -- by supporting global missionaries, which ensures that the International Mission Board can send and sustain a growing missionary presence among unengaged and unreached people groups.”**

Your validation of this commitment not only empowers our missionary teams but also gives support for global missionaries and their worldwide reach with the love of Christ.

[**Pledge your support today by signing our declaration.**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38093%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pSeuIcNS92%2blxMXKC5d9lQ&sysid=1)

Together, let's bring the gospel message of Jesus to those who have yet to hear it.

In His service,
Emily Hall
Prayer Content Specialist
IMB Prayer Office

name: Bill Gray
subject: A tough question
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

| | | This sponsored message from Trump Train News is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zkgg4mmli58hkubdds059vftj8nb8rtqa7miod48_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcor4clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z69vugse6ktpggebc3mu1jdg81uku223vm9ca01o_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcor4clh2bs)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Trump Train News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zsf5b19cvl582uit7kqt7lskhohq7un9046fjaro_rp2ash2s8gb2sbgebjqf9tge5rrasbjk5p7atdge5p78d5jmeqjetjjkorrbdt5eer7ashmeop79chl6ujuadf161rn9cdhmir76pr02sqr8d5hmej3fddj4iqu8oj2c3g68p7246h22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcor4clh2bs)_ | _[manage data preferences](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z7anpqus4cgcsb5pdfrog3leanf2gu3p44nr7ap0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcor4clh2bs)_

name: American Defense News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from American Defense News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zsuoi88u5a153pds3fdk7ddlr39gs7n4e3utc428_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcpr1clh2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2z3u71uej52uqc7rqp851qd273ls0s6r14mn4idtg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcpr1clh2bs) [NO](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zncrlco8v00b8o9jm168shf969q931sv56pjhuf0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcpr1clh2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zn311u49t41do1buhb0o1oi5fvhb7a5bk99p7b3g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcpr1clh2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://e.americandefensenews.com/rd/9z2zl22792mf8dmg97qnv5205uuigqcaa0ev6d8u0p8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcpr1clh2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

American Defense News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Kash Patel
subject: Truth about January 6
body:
The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public

[](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680131%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=WsOmOC0oBUux3%2fITCueKmA&sysid=1 "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

The media lied about January 6th.

The Deep State lied about January 6th.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6th.

The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public, showing an entirely different story from the lies they told.

Now, it’s time to hold them accountable. Here’s how:

**STEP ONE** \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here’s how you can help:

[Can you send an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to the Kash Foundation to support our mission to defeat the Deep State? Click here to donate >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680132%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=zfn3tKBAhSfyjkzS%2bzlvRw&sysid=1 "Donate")

Here’s why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government...

I’ve been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage our country. My investigation discovered the FBI’s unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It’s why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that’s when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th.

[Please donate any $250, $100, or any amount today to support our efforts >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680133%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tq%2b7YSJE5RPJsE9%2b6D5HZg&sysid=1)

[Donate >>](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680134%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k8loffibQdQDgQs8HqSKeA&sysid=1)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no “deadly insurrection.” The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

This is the battle against the “Lawfare” used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots.

It’s time to fight back.

**Help me raise $20,000 this month by contributing any amount you can generously afford today. **

[Donate $10 ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680145%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Puzp4PJpmI7gAYTOUlOrQQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $35 ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680146%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=sVUBbw5ZPH%2baVEZbGsr4oQ&sysid=1)

[Donate $50 ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680147%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=mS2G2%2fEJQr0EHF0xm2KCuA&sysid=1)

[Donate $100 ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680148%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=wij5zh7zRIPPyzlRQAa%2bCg&sysid=1)

[Donate $250 ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680149%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=LgC%2ban03%2bR5DQemrR5N8nw&sysid=1)

[Donate $500 ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680140%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=PutvEpFhwNnPxZYV%2fNIGQw&sysid=1)

[Donate $1,000 ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680141%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=A1%2fSZo3OwIISZbZ5azLUHw&sysid=1)

[Donate Any Amount ](https://click.americanupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=01%7c680142%7c210334%7c805%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kRehC6Fsu9nmmV28%2b5HM4Q&sysid=1)

Thank you for your continued support!

We will take our country back.

Thank you,

Kash Patel

_The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible._

Thank you, Kash Patel The Kash Foundation is a 501(c)(3) nonprofit. All donations are tax-deductible. American Update 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Bill Gray
subject: A tough question
body:
It’s a question mankind has asked since ancient times—since creation itself.

| | | This sponsored message from Pro Life Update is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zsv1mupodof873tf30b5s83sdn647ijhguinptqo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcpr7cdh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

[](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2zeul1qq4gfa037p45oo5irpris2hmka0453ssoo0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcpr7cdh2bs) Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://e.prolifeupdate.com/rd/9z2z6tjp2p9m735ngbk59f7fhihrs1voi3eft9godn8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcpr7cdh2bs)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Pro Life Update
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: American Action News
subject: This Tiny Hearing Aid Has Gone Viral Across The U.S.
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zbp993c794cd29oqitsq3bntlnnnmfpdfntvqp38_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcpr0c5h2bs)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zi63k4mtvavt9r0huk3t51nqgsq4vmio6un573m0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcpr0c5h2bs)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z8h7v2scmd4v32vbi83gj1sr98448sucrb0h2cp0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcpr0c5h2bs)
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zn2keiuddr2j1q1lge7loeg6mvu4o9c3caau8qr8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcpr0c5h2bs)
What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

In other words: **with double the power comes double the clarity—and all that in a virtually invisible design!**

Limited no-risk trials now available

Click below to check if you qualify for a 45-day no-risk trial. As the Germans always say: "there's never been a better time." So do yourself a favor and don’t wait. **Get started today.**
[Check if you qualify](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z1aj2up2bboo71h5r4nqoaitf6qmtqmlgkdo78fg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcpr0c5h2bs)

name: Bill Gray
subject: A tough question
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

| | | This sponsored message from 1600 Daily is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2z8u5if6f2sr5qso8a7vqhoop28ov0pmtd9b7gdj0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcor4clh2bs)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://e.1600daily.com/rd/9z2zcm0keplfsjntdsr3dcb8nns2kg1bob6ia4qcrr8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmcor4clh2bs)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

1600 Daily
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: ICYMI News
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from ICYMI News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0qda24dt2tn969dgnqmj6npqcrjbbe6186mphq8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmaob3c1h2bs)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zl7l1664a164s1egr96fp5nqf343ba8v7fq444go_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmaob3c1h2bs) [NO](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zdp3k0teq1ikose881pdap932p7t9h2nj0c4ss98_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmaob3c1h2bs) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z3h57j80ipflfo0gsam5qei2jebg06kl8j5bv6f8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmaob3c1h2bs)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zhea2p9jvv8hnkr2c7a04h838gljca9rm0re2fjo_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmaob3c1h2bs)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

ICYMI News
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

subject: The Doug Collins Podcast Update – Saturday, January 13, 2024
body:
| [Having trouble viewing this email? Click here to see it in your browser.](http://click1.srnemail.com/ViewMessage.do?m=qdfsvdmfg&r=msyddttytqyp&s=qnvdgfjjgcvccrjvvbmhcygpfyycwfbrywv&q=1705150800&a=view)

###
---
| | [ Look Who's Walking Now ](http://click1.srnemail.com/gymmrtjjrfkdffpjdkkhcdnfsrdltssfythpsykgkymmcg_phvllyyjyqjvbhcfmhmfdff.html)
### _Friday, January 12, 2024_
Bill Belichick and the Patriots part ways, Nick Saban Retires, and Pete Carroll steps back from the sidelines to take on a front office roll with the Seahwaks. Wild Card weekend approaches and its sure to be a good one. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/mqspndzznjtljjvzlttkclsjmnlbdmmjqdkvmqtytqppct_phvllyyjyqjvbhcfmhmfdff.html)
---|---
| [ Sec of Defense went AWOL ](http://click1.srnemail.com/blczgqssgnjynnmsyjjtpybnvgycqvvnlqtmvljfjlzzpg_phvllyyjyqjvbhcfmhmfdff.html)
### _Wednesday, January 10, 2024_
It is hard to hide in Washington but the Sec of Defense did it, even from the President of the United States! We discuss the ramifications of this and the other news you need to know! [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/blqzgqssgnjynnmsyjjtpybnvgycqvvnlqtmvljfjlzzpq_phvllyyjyqjvbhcfmhmfdff.html)
| [ The President and the House ](http://click1.srnemail.com/xvrcrbnnryptyyqntppmdtsykrtjbkkyvbmqkvphpvccdj_phvllyyjyqjvbhcfmhmfdff.html)
### _Monday, January 8, 2024_
Election discussion rolls on. We take a look at what is shaping up to be Biden/Trump 2 and how that will effect the always volatile House races. The fun is just beginning. [ ](http://click1.srnemail.com/mqtpndzznjtljjvzlttkclsjmnlbdmmjqdkvmqtytqppcs_phvllyyjyqjvbhcfmhmfdff.html)

name: Your America
subject: Your Supreme Court survey
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College’s National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Your America News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38009%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=st7tx%2fOgqzuizBXK0Mtipg&sysid=1)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38000%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=UmLhKyBU9VmEDIOtI98qzg&sysid=1) [NO](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38001%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=k7wFHnzV%2bPI8tZB4BIdHdQ&sysid=1) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to “pack” the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: “To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats.”

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court’s role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38002%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=FPG3LHQczwfmsJ124GupfA&sysid=1)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America’s schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I’m sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That’s why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as “Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution” and “The U.S. Supreme Court.”

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale’s free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America’s founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America’s great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College’s **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38003%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=f%2bC3LjSirmD%2bfPTdpvgrwg&sysid=1)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Your America News
---
_Your America News • 625 First Street #183 • Alexandria, VA 22314_

name: Emily Hall
subject: Commit your support
body:
For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope

| | | [](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2zighuojsh9agvmaltik4v2evc7kqu8e1kqr7br6g_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmeoj0sph2bs)
---
Dear Friend,

For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope in a world where so many have yet to hear the gospel. Right now, around the globe, 3,500 missionaries share the transforming gospel message of Jesus. They do this because individuals like you provide the support they need.

We are called by Scripture to play our part in bringing His teachings to all nations, tribes, people, and languages. As we live out this mission in our everyday lives, it's crucial we also show support for our missionaries with financial support and encouragement.

Will you encourage global missionaries today by committing to support their work? By signing this declaration, you're stating:

**" I am committed to helping solve the world's greatest problem -- spiritual lostness -- by supporting global missionaries, which ensures that the International Mission Board can send and sustain a growing missionary presence among unengaged and unreached people groups."**

Your validation of this commitment not only empowers our missionary teams but also gives support for global missionaries and their worldwide reach with the love of Christ.

[**Pledge your support today by signing our declaration.**](http://e.icyminews.com/rd/9z2z0oka5u0vhq413bpt4is1j6bp8bi7v4ogt8ivfbg_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chgmeoj0sph2bs)

Together, let's bring the gospel message of Jesus to those who have yet to hear it.

In His service,
Emily Hall
Prayer Content Specialist
IMB Prayer Office
---

---
| |

---

name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: They say we don’t have a prayer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
But I have other plans.

| | | [](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38010%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tWA2iAmIjK1V31lbjumaRA&sysid=1)
---
Friend, I was raised to never cower down to a bully. To never let someone else define who you are. And to never, _EVER_ give up.

Growing up the kid of a firefighter, you learn pretty quickly that you are only as good as the team around you.

And when you are running into a burning building, you have to be able to count on the men and women by your side to know that they have your back, and are just as invested in getting the job done as you are.

That’s the same mentality that I am bringing to the House of Representatives. And as the newly-elected Speaker, **[I am working overtime to ensure that I have a team of reliable, steadfast conservatives who will push forward and fight with all that they have to maintain and grow our Republican House majority.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38011%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=b%2f47eERFKfIU3hcv0yY0vQ&sysid=1)**

Let me lay the groundwork: Right now, Republicans have the thinnest of majorities in the House. And the Democrat Machine smells blood in the water.

They think we are weak. That we are vulnerable. That we are ineffective.

**But they’ve got it all wrong.**

While they are spending their time pointing fingers and poking fun, House Republican leadership is putting our heads down and getting to work for the American people -- to ensure that our conservative majority stays intact. **[And we’d love to have you on our team, Friend.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38012%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tLwUtuFN6IWGpyqdhcMF2A&sysid=1)**

Look, I’m not the kind of leader to scream into the void and use scare tactics to try and force a donation from you. I know times are tough.

But I am the kind of leader to tell you the truth -- **the whole truth. ** [And the truth is, if we as conservatives don’t start putting up serious fundraising numbers, you’ll be referring to a radical leftist as Speaker this time next year.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38013%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=kZF3SKgNP0IQKVRore1I3A&sysid=1)
So, as I said at the beginning. I’ve never been one to cower to a bully, allow others to define me, or back down from a fight.

And I'm not going to start now.

**[Serving as Speaker of the House is the honor of a lifetime-- and it would be an honor to know that I have earned your support as well.](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38014%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=nP4eSPQxNH9M8Wn0jqystg&sysid=1)**
---
[**JOIN TEAM JOHNSON TODAY**](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38025%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=6QOGq5Xmrm4NSS2DR4Libw&sysid=1)
---
Thank you for your time,
---
[](https://click.youramerica.news/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=653%7c38010%7c920805%7c0%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=tWA2iAmIjK1V31lbjumaRA&sysid=1)
---
Mike Johnson Speaker of the House
---

name: Bill Gray
subject: A tough question
body:
There’s a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Broadcast is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/obkNSRqdANIwbNdlY6zPCA~~/AARclAA~)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive a beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/obkNSRqdANIwbNdlY6zPCA~~/AARclAA~)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Conservative Broadcast
---

name: Kash Patel
subject: Truth about January 6
body:
The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public

[](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zhjuaksgoulf8lnfa53std1gr4lsld6nmn40hkt0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chim2o75c9h2bs "Kash Foundation")

Friend,

The media lied about January 6th.

The Deep State lied about January 6th.

FBI Director Wray lied about January 6th.

The entire January 6 commission withheld information from the public, showing an entirely different story from the lies they told.

Now, it's time to hold them accountable. Here's how:

**STEP ONE** \- The Kash Foundation will continue our work with whistleblowers in the Deep State to expose corruption and bias as we head into 2024. We cannot let the Deep State interfere with our elections.

**STEP TWO** \- The Kash Foundation will continue to financially support some of the families of January 6th prisoners and those being unfairly prosecuted by the Deep State.

**_So far, we have awarded grants to over 15 individuals with January 6th cases_.**

Here's how you can help:

[Can you send an urgent donation of $35, $50, $100, $250, or even $1,000 to the Kash Foundation to support our mission to defeat the Deep State? Click here to donate >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zss4l2adrhbokethj7oovptn61o3aq9rroqih0ag_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chim2o75c9h2bs "Donate")

Here's why I am uniquely qualified to fight against the government gangsters in charge of our federal government...

I've been unlawfully surveilled by the government gangsters in the Department of Justice myself.

I led the Russiagate investigation for the House Committee and uncovered that the FBI was actively trying to sabotage our country. My investigation discovered the FBI's unlawful investigation. And what I found makes me believe that they did it intentionally to get rid of President Trump.

It's why I refer to the Russia Gate FBI cabal as government gangsters. They are thugs who abuse their power to extort our elected officials. Their deep connections with the media enable a manufacturing machine of fake news.

And once I found the truth, that's when the spying began...

Since then, I knew I had to do everything to help the America-First movement by offering legal protection to whistleblowers, veterans, and the Jan 6 detainees and their families from these government gangsters.

I founded Kash Foundation to defeat the Deep State by offering financial and legal assistance to America-first patriots, veterans, and some families affected by January 6th.

[Please donate any $250, $100, or any amount today to support our efforts >>](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z6vg544qk1pbom83n44j8odaf2f3r4nlb9ov8sko_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chim2o75c9h2bs)

We all know the plight of the Jan 6th detainees and their families. Due process has been destroyed for so many of them under our two-tiered system of justice.

But, with your help, I know we will get justice for them.

Instead of violence, we saw many patriots standing around, talking to police officers, and taking photos of the Capitol grounds. There was no "deadly insurrection." The video evidence proves it for many! This is evidence they and their families could have used last year or the year before.

This is the battle against the "Lawfare" used by radical leftists in control of the government to hunt down America-first patriots.

It's time to fight back.

name: Lucy McBath
subject: this is disastrous for Georgia voters
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blue Amp Action PAC
body:
I refuse to let Republicans remove me from Congress
| | | | |
---
| | |
---
| | | You're getting this message because you’ve supported good causes and Democratic candidates. We need your support to continue fighting for our democracy. We love having you in our network, but if you no longer wish to hear from us, you can[ unsubscribe here](https://default.salsalabs.org/T9cd81d53-49ae-4671-80f4-a59c9141f58a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) _._
---
|
---
| |
---
| | | | | [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T80770c3c-99fc-4d0a-b64c-0ef9cd79be89/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) **Peter, a federal judge just ruled in favor of the new Georgia Congressional maps moving the district I represent over 20 points to Trump.** _This will be a longer email as I explain how we got here and what this means._ [**If you don’t feel like reading the whole thing, you can click here to support my campaign and Blue Amp Action as I’ll need all the help I can get to return to Congress.**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T357a3e73-715a-4efb-bea9-539145eed5b3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Earlier in December, the Republican-controlled Georgia state legislature redrew our Congressional maps. _In a blatant attempt to force me out of my seat, they gerrymandered the district I represent to favor the GOP by +20 points._ Alongside many voting rights organizations and activists, I vowed to fight against these new maps passing. **But on 12/28, the federal court made its ruling in favor of these maps.** I won’t sugarcoat it, Peter: this is a disastrous outcome for voting rights and democracy. However – I refuse to sit back quietly and let Republicans get their way. _I made a promise that I won’t stop fighting in Congress until my communities are kept safe and protected._ I won’t let the GOP decide when my time in Congress is over. Let’s recall that this is the _**second time**_ Georgia Republicans have drawn a district I represent over 20 points to Donald Trump. **I’m fully prepared to return to Congress in 2024.** [**But Peter, I’d be lying if I told you it’s an easy path ahead of me. I only have a few months before this next election, and we need to put my campaign into overdrive. Can you rush a donation ASAP to Blue Amp Action and myself before the end-of-year deadline on Sunday to help make sure I can continue leading the gun safety movement in Congress?**](https://default.salsalabs.org/T545a0024-be7b-45c2-8bcc-46f2097604d6/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|
---
| | | | | | [DONATE NOW](https://default.salsalabs.org/T11cdb232-1808-425c-accd-b3ce02aec01a/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
| Now more than ever, I need my grassroots movement behind me. The stakes are high and I hope I can count on your support.
---
| | |
---
|
---
| | | | | Let's do this, Lucy McBath [](https://default.salsalabs.org/T71687bc2-0a82-4de1-9e43-98515733ddf3/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)
---
|

| | | | Cliff Schecter President, Blue Amp Action Amplify Good
---|---
| | | About BlueAmp Action: We cannot sugarcoat the current situation. Right-wing authoritarianism, defeated by a worldwide coalition during WWII, was only in hibernation. Over the past decade it has infected democratic societies--including ours. It is as simple as it is terrifying: What we do now will define the future of our country and world. We at Blue Amp Action are dedicated to liberal, open societies, where reason and science are applied to solve our problems; where civil rights--including voting rights!--are protected for all. We fight for these values every day. Speaking up on our platforms, raising the voices and the political prospects of liberal pols and pundits. So we ask that you support our work, so we can continue to engage in this fight every moment of every day. So our kids grow up in democracy, not dystopia. Thank you for your support for all we do! Please follow Cliff Schecter on Twitter @cliffschecter, or subscribe to The Takedown with Cliff Schecter on YouTube, to keep up to date with this battle for the heart and soul of our country.

name: Dr. Robert Jeffress
subject: Are you ready for the end times?
body:
Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?
188d92cdddd40f90da47bc74ea2ba8fb
| | | [](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QN-9HFXCiwl78fIBHt-UaA~~/AARclAA~~~)
---
Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative.
[](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QN-9HFXCiwl78fIBHt-UaA~~/AARclAA~~~)I would like to send you my brand-new book _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ and my brand-new resource "The Major Characters of the End Times" as a thank you for your generous support of $10 or more to the ministry of _Pathway to Victory_.
Make your generous gift here: [https://secure.ptv.org/mysteries-of-the-end-times-generous-gift-1-dr-robert-jeffress](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/QN-9HFXCiwl78fIBHt-UaA~~/AARclAA~~~)

_Pathway to Victory_ is committed to equipping believers with biblical teaching and reaching the unsaved by spreading the Good News of Jesus Christ through the most effective means available: radio, television, digital, and print. Your gifts fuel that important work and enable people worldwide to experience an intimate walk with Christ. Thank you for your faithful support.

May our study of Revelation prepare, strengthen, and inspire you. Come quickly, Lord Jesus.

Sharing the Truth of God's Word, ____
---
| | Dr. Robert Jeffress Senior Pastor, First Baptist Dallas
---

Restore Our Nation
---
_PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522_
_[**unsubscribe**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/lIQ7uB4OWnxiE24GXOPPCw~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhRmQP0RpaHR0cHM6Ly9vcHRvdXQucmVzdG9yZS1vdXItbmF0aW9uLmNvbS91bnN1YnNjcmliZS8_Yj1SZXN0b3JlLU91ci1OYXRpb24tT2ZmZXJzJmU9ZHB3aWxsaXM2NyUyNTQwZ21haWwuY29tVwNzcGNCCmWi2mqiZSTffa5SFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)_ | _[manage data preferences](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/EFY9OgyiEaQWWbbf-PVMrg~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhRmQP0QraHR0cHM6Ly9yZXN0b3JlLW91ci1uYXRpb24uY29tL3ByaXZhY3kuaHRtbFcDc3BjQgplotpqomUk332uUhRkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbVgEAAAAAA~~)_

name: (1) Alerts
subject: Peter, do you have Pres. Trump’s back?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tuberville for Senate, Inc
body:
An important question for you. Links to answer inside >>>
| | | [](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/cf3b1efc25a14bb43947229f28c3afba/468b6e66afcdab0dc3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Peter, Democrats love to give us lectures about ‘Our Democracy,’ but they have spent years trying to disqualify the most popular politician in America from getting reelected. The Colorado Supreme Court’s recent ruling to remove Donald Trump from the ballot is an OUTRAGE and goes far beyond the text of the Constitution or any other law. Make no mistake – this insane decision will be overturned on appeal, and this attack on democracy will fail. I have no doubt the American people will make their voices heard in November – and we will reelect President Trump for four more years that will make America great again. **Will you commit to voting for Donald Trump for President?**
---
[**YES**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/cf3b1efc25a14bb43947229f28c3afba/f94b852d97b3259ec3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
[**NO**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/cf3b1efc25a14bb43947229f28c3afba/48144142d323e929c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
[**UNDECIDED**](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/c8e2774da8d4d6d3c3d6b838967d376c/33013/cf3b1efc25a14bb43947229f28c3afba/62c38ba92461e177c3d6b838967d376c/33013)
---
Thanks for taking a stand today! -Coach

name: The Flyover
subject: Wild Winter Weather, NFL Playoffs Begin, and the King of Tetris
body:
Most regions of America are dealing with extreme weather this weekend. Wind chills will drop to -35 (possibly -55) from Washington to North Dakota, and down to Nebraska and Kansas.

# Saturday, January 13th, 2024
---|---
**Happy Saturday! **On this day in 1968, Johnny Cash recorded his legendary live album at Fulsom State Prison in California. Johnny played two back-to-back concerts, opening both with _Folsom Prison Blues,_ and all but two songs on the recording came from the first performance. No video was recorded, but we do have video of Cash playing _Folsom Prison Blues_ at San Quentin State Prison a year later. ## Dangerous Weather Across America
Most regions of America are dealing with extreme weather this weekend. Wind chills will drop to -35 (possibly -55) from Washington to North Dakota, and down to Nebraska and Kansas. Hail, strong winds, [and even tornadoes](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxs0Luu2zAQBNCvobo1-NKjUZFG3U2bUliJK2sTijTItRX76wOlvvUZDDDz62v-Qo6c7j_xoFG2POMq_KLZgHFg_eybMG5EllxDo-l1a1o_DK7ZxxZ7g3ZZQxeWDZ3unQ7tMtCqzeKRXMOj1dZrY5zRbev6m7Pkhy5Y6pbQokflNQWWXG6_MyfZaYvv_KJyW_PRxHEXeVTlfig7KTul9yNXuUjZ6SpWdtJG2cnYS-msyk6UhAvBmpNwoiQY4Vlhzc8YYCHYWeBk2YH-SqGD4CSUnQrIzhVOoj-UAnBa4zNwusMS-fPBEipILglDpgqYAmwx5yug7NSUMTxOjpFr1yuv7wdy_D9Avr3zXwAAAP__Zjl5aw) are likely near the intersection of Texas, Louisiana, and Arkansas, and state officials are warning of hypothermia and frostbite in Texas, where wind chills may hit -25. ## Defense Sec. Launches Attacks from Hospital
America's Secretary of Defense, Llyod Austin, has been coordinating military action [from his hospital room](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskL1uwyAYAJ_G3oj4Mz8DQ5ds6drRwvARfxUGC2iivH2Vzh1Pt5zu67bePGYs909_gBuprj4MfMDKCBOEy1XO0SUADmIGxzRd2CKNEfPurDRcRKF11BJshGRStEkKY2jSTG4zOk65pIwJRpdF6IvgII2KHNQWFy_9JClEHLVdviuWsUPKr_qAdgn1mLPbxzj7JD4mfp341Z8Fnv2t3tAGhgwTv0ZIUDqQDqHB8O1Fgi8BGtlrP3H4TF5wQCF7_Rk7drJhhEJCkmazSijDrTY6pGQVCG_UZrVngs3NxfOJOWNXepL0fnjMf1nj30m_AQAA__9XGGgq), including Thursday's retaliatory strike on Houthi rebels. He was taken to Walter Reed in an ambulance on January 1st due to complications from prostate cancer. He's turned his room into a secure communications center and used the space to monitor Houthi attacks, plan a response, and watch the results in real-time. Austin [failed to inform](http://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJxskD2vozAQAH-N6YzwB5gULq6hy7VXosVewp6MjfAmXO7XP-XVrxxNM5o_9_kOlCg_fsOOntcyQ2B64aykMlLb2TbRr4gaTYNeua5XvR1H02zeuVE5N6xwu4XRwhLieFu1tjYs_aLV0JDXnbadUkZ1fW9cazTacYgahyX2YEHYDiNxOdu_hTJvuKZ3eeHZhrI3yW_MRxXml9CT0NN1Xe1a_mW86scLPR0lEVOoQk8plXeU8KxMWW6lHsSQ6D8wlQ8_K8oTj-eSKECuMuIOOcq9nCgjMlCq8sDM8Ci5OX08LkqJ6uCE7R47UPou4h__fAUAAP__d89q5g) the chain of command that he had cancer--or that he was undergoing anesthesia on the same day that Houthis launched an aggressive attack in the Red Sea.

clean_body: Most regions of America are dealing with extreme weather this weekend. Wind chills will drop to -35 (possibly -55) from Washington to North Dakota, and down to Nebraska and Kansas. | | | | | | Saturday, January 13th, 2024 ---|--- Happy Saturday! On this day in 1968, Johnny Cash recorded his legendary live album at Fulsom State Prison in California. Johnny played two back-to-back concerts, opening both with Folsom Prison Blues, and all but two songs on the recording came from the first performance. No video was recorded, but we do have video of Cash playing Folsom Prison Blues at San Quentin State Prison a year later. () It's freezing out there, folks. The Editor will be leaving the house as little as possible this weekend and watching the NFL playoffs, and I hope you stay warm as well! Drop us a line if we haven't heard from you in a while. We love to get your feedback--just click reply. Have you signed up for The Flyover yet? If not, you can fix that . Today's edition is brought to you by . | Dangerous Weather Across America Most regions of America are dealing with extreme weather this weekend. Wind chills will drop to -35 (possibly -55) from Washington to North Dakota, and down to Nebraska and Kansas. Hail, strong winds, are likely near the intersection of Texas, Louisiana, and Arkansas, and state officials are warning of hypothermia and frostbite in Texas, where wind chills may hit -25. Chicago and Milwaukee are being blasted with snow and high winds, and both cities may soon be under blizzard warnings. In Iowa, the home stretch before the Iowa caucuses by heavy snow and wind chills in the negative 20s. Defense Sec. Launches Attacks from Hospital America's Secretary of Defense, Llyod Austin, has been coordinating military action , including Thursday's retaliatory strike on Houthi rebels. He was taken to Walter Reed in an ambulance on January 1st due to complications from prostate cancer. He's turned his room into a secure communications center and used the space to monitor Houthi attacks, plan a response, and watch the results in real-time. Austin the chain of command that he had cancer--or that he was undergoing anesthesia on the same day that Houthis launched an aggressive attack in the Red Sea. Streaming this Weekend This might be a good time to batten down the hatches, wrap yourself in a blanket, and hide on your couch until the weather clears. Here are some new streaming options to watch this weekend (assuming your power isn't knocked out 🙏). is a light-hearted heist film starring Kevin Hart, and it's directed by F. Gary Gray, who made The Italian Job. (Netflix) Season four of drops on Sunday. Jodie Foster plays a detective trying to solve the disappearance of eight men in a small Alaskan town. Need something for the kids? Ten new episodes of Bluey are available on Disney Plus. body:
| | | [](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=710ef31e35394a549ca6cc9cea450c9d&_e=Op6S-VKk9dzcSZY7-X9q7wGq83n5TTeNGiRBkjsHycRv2pRBuiOkblSXTZvxT0rh6nac2OQS3OXiAznJKcvOqt51-70POTitgE0G-XKdlcZ3q_0ecJSG7Iovb4z43qjT3Del8z84-JkU0uLqUa-dz46aaBadjR17a8MepKGPWKz_yqbXqpEcdWivY1h29blsL8I9rahj_zM8Xjm6aMUgfb1lnqYNYx9YwOH8jcRjlbDzQP-sF2R-82ZR5ly0Auojf-yldYV1Da-LvPIcPuXm_jSDHN8pfKt-RXCwkLrnvYM8_XqBImudfY9d3cV-NCsrXs__-zflYuOiGdAiTfF2JwEpFGTBhP3-jjkWBPDq9gO1M_kVBpyw5JnF-WK7G70PaJYT1S5ko6vm-1ypJXqcz46kkKWmc2G06ijD4l-WhpzLK8u-VPivsoTJxKUCSbkz)

Hello Friend,

Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator.

Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan?

I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return.

That's the heart of Revelation.

Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness.

Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead.

It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near.

This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey.

Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ.

When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence.

As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King.

In my brand-new book, _Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans_ , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into:

1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist?
2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event?
3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture?
4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance?
5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem?

Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure.

In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. This full-color, large print booklet introduces key players during the rapture, tribulation, second coming, and final judgment - vital for understanding the grand narrative. clean_body: | | | Hello Friend, Take a moment to look around. It's like we're living out Romans 1:25 - trading the truth of God for a lie and focusing on earthly things rather than our Creator. Have you ever wondered if things could return to God's original plan? I want to remind you, Friend, that this chaotic time is fleeting. The shadows will fade, and a new day will dawn. The King of Kings, our Savior, will return. That's the heart of Revelation. Each day on this earth shapes us for what's to come - a grand finale. Amidst today's messiness and uncertainty, remember the promise that our story's end is already secured, regardless of the present turmoil or future darkness. Revelation intricately unveils where our stories lead. It's a captivating book filled with symbols, creatures, and events yet to unfold. But remember Revelation 1:3 - there's a blessing for those who read, listen, and follow its words because the time is near. This isn't just a prophecy; it's a blessing-filled journey. Revelation isn't just about revealing future events; it's about revealing Jesus Christ. When Jesus came as a man, His divine brilliance was veiled by humanity. It's like dimming a lamp's light. But when He returns, that veil will lift, and we'll see His true glory. That's Revelation's essence. As the great reveal approaches, I'm here to guide you and your loved ones through the remarkable events preceding the revelation of our King. In my brand-new book, Mysteries of the End Times: 5 Truths About God's Future Plans , I tackle five common questions about the end times. We'll delve into: 1\. America's Fate: Will America stand for Christ or fall for the Antichrist? 2\. The Day of the Lord: How should we live in anticipation of this apocalyptic event? 3\. The Marriage of the Lamb: What unfolds before and after the rapture? 4\. Gog and Magog: How can we honor God in our lives amid their appearance? 5\. The Tree of Life: What's the significance of this tree in the New Jerusalem? Understanding these mysteries will anchor you in hope, bolster your trust in God's promises, and equip you to share with the unsure. In addition to this new book, I would like to share with you "The Major Characters of the End Times," as a token of my gratitude for your support. name: Emily Hall
subject: These missionaries need your support
body:
For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope

| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=742f02a0ba6e4ec4896dab90141485cf&_e=T8ItYeP3d8o3cUW9wwbF8oyFaW_NCH8goA-DSW0TrbM-5VLEm2TcRm744Qy0JyRXXwl_JflU6ABVUG4AEZH05zbAyawCAYP_53r0WapQV3ta2_BuJCf-Qi9j2Tb-f2GglqbLF9Rc6oOD5VgwWINOt5Okka5AjIUUxg-hQcoBWXt27AKrZ9y0HMrIeiB57KLL_9eyrbRcX1PjEgtIpH2dxvmwvs0lKfDinJ4w8CsLpUhrlm8eVeEN-TepSTTP7oHUbbTtNABSU8uDl5xk8bFxLUcmBOyu1YgnQxnwllj3VcQN2ncrWZXfdDsaZYQCDaX4UepjaTrrA1KFqMCD0PEvTS4TgRRc77k4ZtLH4sAhbTkMTDJz-n3AQMlfhH1ldAAx)
---
Dear Friend,

For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope in a world where so many have yet to hear the gospel. Right now, around the globe, 3,500 missionaries share the transforming gospel message of Jesus. They do this because individuals like you provide the support they need.

We are called by Scripture to play our part in bringing His teachings to all nations, tribes, people, and languages. As we live out this mission in our everyday lives, it's crucial we also show support for our missionaries with financial support and encouragement.

Will you encourage global missionaries today by committing to support their work? By signing this declaration, you're stating:

**" I am committed to helping solve the world's greatest problem -- spiritual lostness -- by supporting global missionaries, which ensures that the International Mission Board can send and sustain a growing missionary presence among unengaged and unreached people groups."**

Your validation of this commitment not only empowers our missionary teams but also gives support for global missionaries and their worldwide reach with the love of Christ.

[**Pledge your support today by signing our declaration.**](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=742f02a0ba6e4ec4896dab90141485cf&_e=T8ItYeP3d8o3cUW9wwbF8oyFaW_NCH8goA-DSW0TrbM-5VLEm2TcRm744Qy0JyRXXwl_JflU6ABVUG4AEZH05zbAyawCAYP_53r0WapQV3ta2_BuJCf-Qi9j2Tb-f2GglqbLF9Rc6oOD5VgwWINOt5Okka5AjIUUxg-hQcoBWXt27AKrZ9y0HMrIeiB57KLL_9eyrbRcX1PjEgtIpH2dxvmwvs0lKfDinJ4w8CsLpUhxJxw1mFKxF1vq55uQRRvkY1gEHJyEQimpdZhkbRP2DQkDxoouCj6_g_jx1aAksdIlzHQiWum4riUWw_uYKUpzheXYi_Kniw3fJvRTR1rey9IaN4Dq0LSaC9SXwRAwNez8q-ub2J6QslXG9PhU-AL0)

Together, let's bring the gospel message of Jesus to those who have yet to hear it.

In His service,
Emily Hall
Prayer Content Specialist
IMB Prayer Office
---
---
---
| |

International Mission Board | 3806 Monument Ave. Richmond, VA 23230 | (804) 353-0515
