name: Full Mag News
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Full Mag News is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8ac9bf801d646b4b860da53571a1b25&_e=58rXE6x3iQmkKz4hjEazFgKf5-ysx-lymcJE_7FaShq8JCQpUTNXhW2Yb4uUm_FyZunc5idBOuWD7TXxk9VTXSdfZBxRA9C6_r5VwyAJPerx4frYQijk6emg6uYmiZ0cPvL1Xc_bpaqWGUeJWNbJHi6UWGfAbKkC7vuujfgwG6L9jH0ooYCf53KrKY_0DRxLK1bH4OxFPoGKc9ILBcgInA-Y809CS3suxSnHbo2c_dNiAxJXVF8sVBs45YRmhF5TpuRsib3wSFKuUmneWXT_S9jMcWKgovN5uOS_n3nZii0Rf0_TK8i7TqB_0vbktRUm_F_cFxn2yd2O8DbzOTKi3oF8GqmJ44TS8nHHX4AWjiN3fP-aBh5iGogumeH2MFaQdEpYQbpbsvM5Ic8VAEug7A%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8ac9bf801d646b4b860da53571a1b25&_e=58rXE6x3iQmkKz4hjEazFgKf5-ysx-lymcJE_7FaShq8JCQpUTNXhW2Yb4uUm_FyZunc5idBOuWD7TXxk9VTXSdfZBxRA9C6_r5VwyAJPerx4frYQijk6emg6uYmiZ0cPvL1Xc_bpaqWGUeJWNbJHi6UWGfAbKkC7vuujfgwG6L9jH0ooYCf53KrKY_0DRxLK1bH4OxFPoGKc9ILBcgInA-Y809CS3suxSnHbo2c_dNiAxJXVF8sVBs45YRmhF5TTyPwJetCiDJt0eoZ1fpoh5YH4ht-bpnzkl7_qg5mB1Wu_B-APaHxyxixdcFZ0xFO1UG6-gL252G7v5GtEeo-ARrIMx6Vhw5pJrnGKzdvurg0exldb0oYA-I-rEfiA6E1gwIEwCTZvAF9C1dRV1XFaw%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8ac9bf801d646b4b860da53571a1b25&_e=58rXE6x3iQmkKz4hjEazFgKf5-ysx-lymcJE_7FaShq8JCQpUTNXhW2Yb4uUm_FyZunc5idBOuWD7TXxk9VTXSdfZBxRA9C6_r5VwyAJPerx4frYQijk6emg6uYmiZ0cPvL1Xc_bpaqWGUeJWNbJHi6UWGfAbKkC7vuujfgwG6L9jH0ooYCf53KrKY_0DRxLK1bH4OxFPoGKc9ILBcgInA-Y809CS3suxSnHbo2c_dNiAxJXVF8sVBs45YRmhF5TuvcSXcXeXssoiDMjc-tQNgZvu-KjxgEo8s5E96egzhj4kAUCnMixrfYi07Aof87FZFu7EoB_a-yWEAC6FsA5Fxzl8rd4RqJlMrNu4SHaxQyAexcSX_jZN6lAKlHJ8IbE-bSd16ODaMvMqaizXnTHKw%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8ac9bf801d646b4b860da53571a1b25&_e=58rXE6x3iQmkKz4hjEazFgKf5-ysx-lymcJE_7FaShq8JCQpUTNXhW2Yb4uUm_FyZunc5idBOuWD7TXxk9VTXSdfZBxRA9C6_r5VwyAJPerx4frYQijk6emg6uYmiZ0cPvL1Xc_bpaqWGUeJWNbJHi6UWGfAbKkC7vuujfgwG6L9jH0ooYCf53KrKY_0DRxLK1bH4OxFPoGKc9ILBcgInA-Y809CS3suxSnHbo2c_dNiAxJXVF8sVBs45YRmhF5TU9rrOpHWVF-8FL7PzyN3kWTU7xBMoLdyHd_wO8GpV5iERRQsGv4reRajDQSlZ5ChZKV7JdBT3CdoGUZHEcIbpAa1lrXW4It42rRAcwHIZvudLGbsxkDxyCkXzz45fIR1u5s6rdrtYa89pd3kynIcrg%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.fullmagnews.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=c8ac9bf801d646b4b860da53571a1b25&_e=58rXE6x3iQmkKz4hjEazFgKf5-ysx-lymcJE_7FaShq8JCQpUTNXhW2Yb4uUm_FyZunc5idBOuWD7TXxk9VTXSdfZBxRA9C6_r5VwyAJPerx4frYQijk6emg6uYmiZ0cPvL1Xc_bpaqWGUeJWNbJHi6UWGfAbKkC7vuujfgwG6L9jH0ooYCf53KrKY_0DRxLK1bH4OxFPoGKc9ILBcgInA-Y809CS3suxSnHbo2c_dNiAxJXVF8sVBs45YRmhF5TVszLucw9v655tmmfJzQ67aON3_L103cQAV8oxjFVyXG1pmHJKzvgN_925tAdGe4nJYpGylvFdMNHhVOlB5ZWRTrUz2oUKuNUGg1BjhMvkMx4-84JzxYNsuZWpfkmLggV2Hv_Y_xJKiY83oOgdZ7XlQ%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844
---
| | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA

---

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench. You can easily complete your National Survey on the United States Supreme Court using this secure link: And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift. The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to undermine the separation of powers at the heart of limited government. I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order. That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly reaching and teaching millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours! These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America. Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including: Teaching millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court." Reaching over six million households and businesses nationwide with Imprimis , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty. Sending millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America. Restoring excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum. We undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans. That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty. Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court right away--the link is below. Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education. Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty. Warm regards, Larry P. Arnn President, Hillsdale College Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844 | | Hillsdale College 33 East College St Hillsdale, MI 49242 USA Full Mag News 625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314 |

name: Bill Gray
subject: A tough question
body:
It’s a question mankind has asked since ancient times—since creation itself.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservative Liberty Wire is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=45a017c321a44740b1ad46cb8428b3b2&_e=AdOvt1Eg3UjcvSkDmZLrAUHyOmx8urrQ4c0Y3uSHOMjY7OojV0rzoeXflHXYmmpmcV-f5DA4hDME7yemnR0_tH2mjs14JDtwsGNmCWhfviKIGxO8NwbL0u7XijtVmvEycRf_ANes1hXbTqOPAmGFUvNX_it1p7HkU_jtnXHl7sH9W3owisJFIdLFIxG1V-NoJ51YYgBhBJkccOtp6suzdt3SScSyH7q9WZPGyioDhevG3n7_n8B5lWwbayKb5RgDpShbxQ2zEcY-CBu-6w5d5moxrtYKgZFIJMItJE2gg3GKr9RVVWtgB6itYmS5W3i_m62wTKvElEq6tbrNNhQaJkX-zBjkcI-o9_Ny0Ei3DL0Pz0BL3hCVM1-KoChFf7oRR1Z0Quei5A_o4BenxiYo8vLzzKJQ_yA8SJwkIs1Y2y8%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

[](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=45a017c321a44740b1ad46cb8428b3b2&_e=AdOvt1Eg3UjcvSkDmZLrAUHyOmx8urrQ4c0Y3uSHOMjY7OojV0rzoeXflHXYmmpmcV-f5DA4hDME7yemnR0_tH2mjs14JDtwsGNmCWhfviKIGxO8NwbL0u7XijtVmvEycRf_ANes1hXbTqOPAmGFUvNX_it1p7HkU_jtnXHl7sH9W3owisJFIdLFIxG1V-NoJ51YYgBhBJkccOtp6suzdt3SScSyH7q9WZPGyioDhevG3n7_n8B5lWwbayKb5RgDpShbxQ2zEcY-CBu-6w5d5twY8ADGc5GwxQVgHmWnWkOgvo4WxIxVdh0UGxhtU6WPCGaRP-6DFWqw-DtX_38kZQI-iWcwuBNTmuW66PBGohlCzVr8Va15QipR_8bVAg42bN-1QdoK7o4JT5crlJkydxr-axZ9Um5yDtY_sH-udTs%3D) Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=45a017c321a44740b1ad46cb8428b3b2&_e=AdOvt1Eg3UjcvSkDmZLrAUHyOmx8urrQ4c0Y3uSHOMjY7OojV0rzoeXflHXYmmpmcV-f5DA4hDME7yemnR0_tH2mjs14JDtwsGNmCWhfviKIGxO8NwbL0u7XijtVmvEycRf_ANes1hXbTqOPAmGFUvNX_it1p7HkU_jtnXHl7sH9W3owisJFIdLFIxG1V-NoJ51YYgBhBJkccOtp6suzdt3SScSyH7q9WZPGyioDhevG3n7_n8B5lWwbayKb5RgDpShbxQ2zEcY-CBu-6w5d5hCok3M_0iEKtLS6tS9PEWxCgMby3WipjokxhZ5nnTnAm-HE0bz_RBTpjGmYjJRkaAQzH_EcaTjs4cIMw-kW5wtMA2tH1mMHgB70cv3Tt64kuhu__LpOmaO5BY3fNyKejxzXycTkFrKx4kM8Z0pnFHs%3D)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College

**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.

What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

name: Emily Hall
subject: These missionaries need your support
body:
For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope

| | | [](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2z9gqkp3nk5tv5117n366pi8a6erig90eej65a8ao_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chhm8or6clh2bs)
---
Dear Friend,

For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope in a world where so many have yet to hear the gospel. Right now, around the globe, 3,500 missionaries share the transforming gospel message of Jesus. They do this because individuals like you provide the support they need.

We are called by Scripture to play our part in bringing His teachings to all nations, tribes, people, and languages. As we live out this mission in our everyday lives, it's crucial we also show support for our missionaries with financial support and encouragement.

Will you encourage global missionaries today by committing to support their work? By signing this declaration, you're stating:

**" I am committed to helping solve the world's greatest problem -- spiritual lostness -- by supporting global missionaries, which ensures that the International Mission Board can send and sustain a growing missionary presence among unengaged and unreached people groups."**

Your validation of this commitment not only empowers our missionary teams but also gives support for global missionaries and their worldwide reach with the love of Christ.

[**Pledge your support today by signing our declaration.**](https://e.trumptrainnews.com/rd/9z2zqp0vk212of9ce39h8s934p4485i3et354k1lar8_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chhm8or6clh2bs)

Together, let's bring the gospel message of Jesus to those who have yet to hear it.

In His service,
Emily Hall
Prayer Content Specialist
IMB Prayer Office

name: Bill Gray
subject: A tough question
body:
It’s a question mankind has asked since ancient times—since creation itself.

| | | This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0522c6469a2c4fba94beca10938a824a&_e=rYpOosqh8nzX6zZo3STlnUzhgIN-Macvn2P0h6Wn1qh4lxzX3yc6Ad1R3AzZpmvlqtgkP2m23GfZkQsZfv5DvixBzMqj_YO0UlDP4JYMkMdPRdJj85uqjgacRsIFax7cfAvsX4aHX2RcUZIWfJxM04m3cCCgVhscwSZmd4ltz8LbxbGIZ-hoQxcYsGmsh5gwBhJ6MVNTTk6zrY3g2Ogcx9Lzt2vHS0bYw1IlajY4v1-CJHMHiHVmKfYWWITD-1Wksy1bTRfw9QVmwve0AEX4SKRZ4LYKx1VInugtfWKbgaMTuob1VdnXYje9cetkshUzkt2-QJr88Ha3Tjo0BRWICq6wD-cl0BOU6CpzltdMZ4H9n0ZiEdl3QBy8OnlBO2uTfqMVQf8DHIbq61Zm-PFZhxOo7y32t-SWHEM7L7GFVWM%3D)
---
| | Dear Friend,

There's a tough question that I have to ask you on this fine day.

Here it is...What is true about the world?

Tough, right?

It's a question mankind has asked since ancient times--since creation itself. So, if you don't know the answer, that's fine (if you do, email me because I would love to know more!).

This question is especially pressing today because of the growing power modern humans have to change and manipulate the material world.

That's one of the reasons we released our free online course, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Why chemistry?

For one, this course brings a core subject studied at Hillsdale College to millions of Americans, including you.

More fundamentally, we study chemistry as part of our liberal arts education at Hillsdale because the sciences help us understand important aspects of reality. It helps us think about our role as humans in the world around us and reveals the framework, implications, and potential for human life.

[](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0522c6469a2c4fba94beca10938a824a&_e=rYpOosqh8nzX6zZo3STlnUzhgIN-Macvn2P0h6Wn1qh4lxzX3yc6Ad1R3AzZpmvlqtgkP2m23GfZkQsZfv5DvixBzMqj_YO0UlDP4JYMkMdPRdJj85uqjgacRsIFax7cfAvsX4aHX2RcUZIWfJxM04m3cCCgVhscwSZmd4ltz8LbxbGIZ-hoQxcYsGmsh5gwBhJ6MVNTTk6zrY3g2Ogcx9Lzt2vHS0bYw1IlajY4v1-CJHMHiHVmKfYWWITD-1Wksy1bTRfw9QVmwve0AEX4SKnK9awYbAu6Adu7UYpOEIpC1VvFDGYNUojRpKPLb3qqE2x7GapAWG2hJa7jLyIgTcN8K0RZjq8rWqD7siJWGzceQ8_Q09uU9ozXwLZPh5tM7PgLGxKz-M_1M3JGfip0J0W92i-eWhNLFEO_qGGZEYk%3D) Like all our courses, **" The Great Principles of Chemistry"** contains stunning visuals, study guides, quizzes, and in this case, hands-on experiments. This content is especially well-suited for science teachers, homeschool parents, or lifelong learners.

And our online courses are free. That's why we depend on the generosity of people like you to help us share the course with as many people as possible.

Would you consider making a tax-deductible donation to help promote this course?

**For any donation of $100 or more, you will receive this beautiful DVD box set for "The Great Principles of Chemistry," by clicking the link below:

**[https://secured.hillsdale.edu/hillsdale/principles-of-chemistry](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=0522c6469a2c4fba94beca10938a824a&_e=rYpOosqh8nzX6zZo3STlnUzhgIN-Macvn2P0h6Wn1qh4lxzX3yc6Ad1R3AzZpmvlqtgkP2m23GfZkQsZfv5DvixBzMqj_YO0UlDP4JYMkMdPRdJj85uqjgacRsIFax7cfAvsX4aHX2RcUZIWfJxM04m3cCCgVhscwSZmd4ltz8LbxbGIZ-hoQxcYsGmsh5gwBhJ6MVNTTk6zrY3g2Ogcx9Lzt2vHS0bYw1IlajY4v1-CJHMHiHVmKfYWWITD-1Wksy1bTRfw9QVmwve0AEX4SOO-sXpJlOUKlz-rwwhFh7Mc72I4qqDrYu2-rviMkJ_Aizlrla56U1NMkcTB7RgAq2PUAVXLJiMa1kEh7mv3PsFvyN-LO926SEPifW5m_DOypqlkE_gkQGua-vt5J73hyvINN_SU90fEckF8X3e7YYA%3D)

The proper study of chemistry helps us understand the world and inspires wonder and awe at the beauty of creation and its Creator.

For these reasons, please join us in helping others gain a greater appreciation for the world around us with **" The Great Principles of Chemistry."**

Let's promote what's true about our world together.

Warm Regards,

Bill Gray, '01
Vice President
National Donor Outreach
Hillsdale College
---
| |
---

Conservatives Give
---
_625 First Street #183, Alexandria, VA 22314_

body:
for more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope

---
Dear Friend,

For more than 100 years, missionaries have provided a beacon of hope in a world where so many have yet to hear the gospel. Right now, around the globe, 3,500 missionaries share the transforming gospel message of Jesus. They do this because individuals like you provide the support they need.

We are called by Scripture to play our part in bringing His teachings to all nations, tribes, people, and languages. As we live out this mission in our everyday lives, it's crucial we also show support for our missionaries with financial support and encouragement.

Will you encourage global missionaries today by committing to support their work? By signing this declaration, you're stating:

**" I am committed to helping solve the world's greatest problem -- spiritual lostness -- by supporting global missionaries, which ensures that the International Mission Board can send and sustain a growing missionary presence among unengaged and unreached people groups."**

Your validation of this commitment not only empowers our missionary teams but also gives support for global missionaries and their worldwide reach with the love of Christ.

[**Pledge your support today by signing our declaration.**](http://post.spmailtechnol.com/f/a/UkDdUnGftPNcyb5GBBIp_g~~/AARclAA~/RgRnhSeCP0SlaHR0cHM6Ly93ZWxjb21lLmltYi5vcmcvaS1zdXBwb3J0LWdsb2JhbC1taXNzaW9ucy1wbGVkZ2UuaHRtbD91dG1fY2FtcGFpZ249Z2xvYmFsbWlzc2lvbnNfcGxlZGdlJnV0bV9zb3VyY2U9cHJvc3BlY3RpbmcmdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1QQS1ST04zLTIwMjQwMTEzVwNzcGNCCmWibXiiZSOtbtZSFGRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tWAQAAAAA)

Together, let's bring the gospel message of Jesus to those who have yet to hear it.

In His service,
Emily Hall
Prayer Content Specialist
IMB Prayer Office

subject: This Tiny Hearing Aid Has Gone Viral Across The U.S.
body:
Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts

| [ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a15b51a86c04e77b615299dded26573&_e=GDh9hir2xdRB4HytW8BxUVfp-LmWn2LU0Gm9kC2gbn8AfGoE-O3AviFkcptmCknAN2TgXDOofeXGlsf8OFeUUGByvJYiTJ9WwCjFZ5GKkeyBHkR1jesOjVhbhpxuuxAG27GlQLotnX2rFh5EsdDYt3ZQIbTyschHHzCVTUv4uMyoDIX_b2d-ph01t_CKbXfLCJRuRgeGxNarLPKFk8-vCyjAsmos3GLSlL6EfdOzDXmanaLLwdr01xFaJxhuM9uxhMoSzDD_Xk3PQn-MAPax_MFbDauxMhLipw2Y6xtJSmwL4N9GcZOraBrmFgZVZB6h2ZXr9Rdo-iQxE6KLqonjgCzUelhzQPbN_dOq7J8HVcf___YGTE3R1k_OvX5ZV_7FrtpaaUE8uc0lGht-ORPhkLGCbYvHNwmSQzxdDi5zkoWZsaQ0k97ZDfWw-8-BmQICwUuOCyyW2CK2Muoe8noHlyBjUj5izgtqQnuLjoq7ekQ%3D)
---
| Why this tiny German hearing aid is taking the U.S. by storm, according to the experts
---
[ ](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=9a15b51a86c04e77b615299dded26573&_e=GDh9hir2xdRB4HytW8BxUVfp-LmWn2LU0Gm9kC2gbn8AfGoE-O3AviFkcptmCknAN2TgXDOofeXGlsf8OFeUUGByvJYiTJ9WwCjFZ5GKkeyBHkR1jesOjVhbhpxuuxAG27GlQLotnX2rFh5EsdDYt3ZQIbTyschHHzCVTUv4uMyoDIX_b2d-ph01t_CKbXfLCJRuRgeGxNarLPKFk8-vCyjAsmos3GLSlL6EfdOzDXmanaLLwdr01xFaJxhuM9uxhMoSzDD_Xk3PQn-MAPax_MFbDauxMhLipw2Y6xtJSmwL4N9GcZOraBrmFgZVZB6h2ZXr9Rdo-iQxE6KLqonjgNZfCtD70gQVFlSTyiPtkxzuJVWgDPPyHCXkfqVS463bpG3ZbnQ2k5AnCNTTdEgsEKkyK58RzUb8oEbV6NpuiU92-pC48O2o3OMIIz6HQHrApJNmNdL9FSe351_ivgIefqYE9zRD4pcubeptdhEarFQ%3D)
**Alarming fact: More than 48 million Americans hear so poorly that their quality of life significantly suffers as a result.**

The problem: Most wait too long to act, hoping their hearing will improve on its own. Sadly, it never does.

But now, **a game-changing device is revolutionizing the hearing aid industry,** and experts say it's the biggest breakthrough they've seen in over a decade.

It's hear.com's **new IX hearing aid.**

And it’s the perfect solution at the perfect time—when more and more people are eager to maintain their quality of life and overcome these limitations.

It’s no wonder **hear.com's IX hearing aid has taken the U.S. by storm since its release earlier this year** offering hope and unprecedented clarity to thousands across America.

What makes hear.com’s IX hearing aid so special?

It’s one of **the world’s first hearing aids with dual processing.**

This is special because it’s the first time engineers have been able to pack not one, but two state-of-the-art computer chips into a device this small.

The result? **An unprecedented amount of power and clarity.**

This means that hear.com’s IX hearing aids offer all of the usual benefits of modern hearing aids—from smartphone connectivity to Bluetooth streaming—with the added bonus of something completely new: they can process speech and background noise independently, then recombine them for **unparalleled, crystal clear sound.**

“It's not just about volume,” explains hear.com founder Paul Crusius. “It's about speech clarity. And that's precisely what IX is designed to optimize.”

If you’re tired of politicians lying to you, **[I hope you’ll join my team today](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=7d39a7101b474babac74548d83a6332d&_e=A26IbCQJn5Qkt9O-IJtTlwFomNUDBtlDAY2VQuVECFWGZOvnOVGce_bCTWpAO-quIG6TSI7miFqsmwS41LW0l3lA-dA_ZLp1Fy9D0xztuscTe9yZovM_sB2lj6UgQA4GeP70Uwzma_AtQ_XfFDFKASWiqDhUSFCQMJ72c1MgoYQv7B56RKZLYg6GuQXyS5u_Xc6EHw1aVgrtQF0EyRMW715qxcRaUeOcI8wre_ihJtRLAtLGy1TCwxYUKda3zTPWlmmuraDs-1XjDlD5tAJRUJ3RygNTksyYyO1ks9K7kS_GFn-c2UpJLjHqYy8x7gkJvMHXfwhI3z-ErF-SEKM8s2BpVNhf_HpQs4bbga8qYNJdpT1zBhlq76aTR_WRZFWqpGHG4REOBiK4JewaSeM_1Q%3D%3D)**.

Tim Sheehy

clean_body: Chuck Schumer just announced a $10M+ investment benefiting my opponent in the Montana Senate race. This is BIG. | | Peter, It’s former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. I need your attention for a few minutes today – please let me tell you why. DC Democrats purchased an additional Chuck Schumer and his liberal allies are spending $700,000+ in one week trying to convince voters that I’m weak on China. This couldn’t be further from the truth. As a Navy SEAL , I led covert operations around the world to defend our freedoms and keep America safe. Then I built a Montana manufacturing business with zero supply chain dependence on China. While their claims are downright laughable, what’s not is the fact that to date, I’m the only Republican Chuck Schumer and his allies have spent money to attack. In fact, they’ve already spent $2.6 million against me, in addition to the $3.9 million Tester has spent himself. Jon Tester has been in the United States Senate since January 2007 and has done nothing to stop the rise of the Chinese Communist Party. Washington Democrats know I pose a direct threat to their majority, so they’re trying to paint me as someone I’m not. The worst part about American politics is that elected officials often believe they can lie to voters and get away with it. It’s worked for my opponent and his Party before, but Whether you live in Montana or elsewhere, the fact of the matter is that this race will determine control of the United States Senate. Do you feel comfortable sitting on the sidelines when you could and help elect a Navy SEAL who will stand up to China and put America First? to ensure Montana voters know Jon Tester is a two-faced professional politician. Jon Tester is a career politician who said the Chinese Spy Balloon did not “put our national security at risk” and then went and let President Biden and Chairman Xi off the hook after it flew over Montana and across the country, collecting valuable intelligence from sensitive U.S. military sites. Help me boot soft-on-China Jon Tester from the U.S. Senate. [[Join My Team Today]]() Jon Tester is a career politician whose open border agenda is allowing Chinese fentanyl to enter our country, killing over 70,000 Americans a year and becoming the leading cause of death in adults. Help me boot soft-on-crime Jon Tester from the U.S. Senate. [[Join My Team Today]]() On Tester’s watch, “Chinese ownership of U.S. farmland has increased fivefold over the past decade, according to U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) data, from 69,000 acres in 2011 to almost 384,000 acres in 2021.” Despite this disturbing trend, Tester waited until 2023, just before his reelection campaign kicked off, to introduce a bill to block China from buying American farmland. Weak on China, career politicians like Two-Faced Tester are all talk, no leadership. We need leaders willing to fight back, break our dependence on China, and put America First! I’ve told you since June that this race will be the most expensive race in Montana’s history, perhaps the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history. If you’re tired of politicians lying to you, . But I have other plans.

Friend, I was raised to never cower down to a bully. To never let someone else define who you are. And to never, _EVER_ give up.

Growing up the kid of a firefighter, you learn pretty quickly that you are only as good as the team around you.

And when you are running into a burning building, you have to be able to count on the men and women by your side to know that they have your back, and are just as invested in getting the job done as you are.

That’s the same mentality that I am bringing to the House of Representatives. And as the newly-elected Speaker, **[I am working overtime to ensure that I have a team of reliable, steadfast conservatives who will push forward and fight with all that they have to maintain and grow our Republican House majority.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4b0846d29bc4913a48ab2fc74d9cc41&_e=23thBg3Fmvr_DqsOTR3sq6qZa3kiLL08i_jrg4BJ07tLd9xAE7X4ipncGDSW3-bImnsuO8WmOKA90KOdP8bAj8ohwDS0sXspbQ-3gv0EeH_IcKtEQKcOC0F8sthojw9iSsxZ4-BXkB-fBhdXhVqac1jUDxirSiJMZwVqvzgFtaNDq3Mss9VPsL2SzTsnmssVqDv9j5Ba71NZrR8x-AoSQjDUETubEiYXVRYr3qfWbm3a64_zBhsa5buGLya0Q1J5l30y1MHho_DYzIUeL12QUQfBt4SBLZDcEMU1sacwOIKL43LKPO-RxRNRF5WFD6MzQ2O_ZJIg2CjUU66Cb6N-29c64r9-wasmcoqyO_gCz-eKBHxD2fZuo2iRH4TgjN4ByHzOLaFvMm9_QJWFtPohBZJi-PHbDqEaSNajtPIdsTgY3soT06AduSZmdJdiBzEb)**

Let me lay the groundwork: Right now, Republicans have the thinnest of majorities in the House. And the Democrat Machine smells blood in the water.

They think we are weak. That we are vulnerable. That we are ineffective.

**But they’ve got it all wrong.**

While they are spending their time pointing fingers and poking fun, House Republican leadership is putting our heads down and getting to work for the American people — to ensure that our conservative majority stays intact. **[And we’d love to have you on our team, Friend.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4b0846d29bc4913a48ab2fc74d9cc41&_e=23thBg3Fmvr_DqsOTR3sq6qZa3kiLL08i_jrg4BJ07tLd9xAE7X4ipncGDSW3-bImnsuO8WmOKA90KOdP8bAj8ohwDS0sXspbQ-3gv0EeH_IcKtEQKcOC0F8sthojw9iSsxZ4-BXkB-fBhdXhVqac1jUDxirSiJMZwVqvzgFtaNDq3Mss9VPsL2SzTsnmssVqDv9j5Ba71NZrR8x-AoSQjDUETubEiYXVRYr3qfWbm3a64_zBhsa5buGLya0Q1J5l30y1MHho_DYzIUeL12QUQfBt4SBLZDcEMU1sacwOII314HqgqYAIR4PancOpWCnE5fUnyEoBsGAXgCmiELlrJI4utSw8dLIzJkZ4GZmeelurYVPILrkJH0gACXNSLDMAczTmGBaG5Dheoh81GoE1VRay9XGBCYktf4aiL4-i9ZCWaiKTiCkBkbBxmKrI6ho)**

Look, I’m not the kind of leader to scream into the void and use scare tactics to try and force a donation from you. I know times are tough.

But I am the kind of leader to tell you the truth — **the whole truth. ** [And the truth is, if we as conservatives don’t start putting up serious fundraising numbers, you’ll be referring to a radical leftist as Speaker this time next year.](Friend)
So, as I said at the beginning. I’ve never been one to cower to a bully, allow others to define me, or back down from a fight.

And I'm not going to start now.

**[Serving as Speaker of the House is the honor of a lifetime — and it would be an honor to know that I have earned your support as well.](https://links.conservativelibertywire.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=a4b0846d29bc4913a48ab2fc74d9cc41&_e=23thBg3Fmvr_DqsOTR3sq6qZa3kiLL08i_jrg4BJ07tLd9xAE7X4ipncGDSW3-bImnsuO8WmOKA90KOdP8bAj8ohwDS0sXspbQ-3gv0EeH_IcKtEQKcOC0F8sthojw9iSsxZ4-BXkB-fBhdXhVqac1jUDxirSiJMZwVqvzgFtaNDq3Mss9VPsL2SzTsnmssVqDv9j5Ba71NZrR8x-AoSQjDUETubEiYXVRYr3qfWbm3a64_zBhsa5buGLya0Q1J5l30y1MHho_DYzIUeL12QUQfBt4SBLZDcEMU1sacwOIJI-kD3uVmTIXE5m8UEhURUQANIGZYGHG7ZFPdI_M8xGuJNRqayQDLVo7O6tUDPcfogiu0b4kU4Ki-kbYBausQfMMKEvS4KXX9Q9D_8powFl_ZVb3aUImofcDsFMKfXLTyHY9EeWGUyrEMU3F4-fE07)**
---

Thank you for your time,

While they are spending their time pointing fingers and poking fun, House Republican leadership is putting our heads down and getting to work for the American people — to ensure that our conservative majority stays intact. **[And we’d love to have you on our team, Friend.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff6556034ef345fcaa22e7a9ec76d2ba&_e=stBxrRIBjN8fPQnbGAktgU7E6XKwu_8-hTtOzEynYZV6Omv6w2e8l5sk0ejyVsU1SGpYg0JsY3a7GnyAUaFH3xjN1NZCVt1hBfnk6rxcEzZTZxUklALkc4yRLbj1BpinXHE9qr537a_ZZB6T1Ck6Zf8XhfrI13zmxq7PuABq8WRtjzqf6T8mHn1gDKoxZThADwJdxexegyZPRDh8zFuIMPHn7lcFwCoSUIWKHaPwjNPzLJWVknN5G1O7e3fytYdkxtP7ES_FE34ZgM-v3bemmTm4CpNoIL3ms9uE-T8ji9e4jBIheHfG-1YYl-3vgc-AAYuGCQQ2kWBlk8oKZXLte-riLo4BEvnS187NM_XSY6FwlmTNMULsOlU4oV_BMIqKm5SvsF4324-tNNt_Exfj95ZG3WAb1F3e5C6OA0ahKdjZE2bFln2khb7QU9Jue6Lh)**

Look, I’m not the kind of leader to scream into the void and use scare tactics to try and force a donation from you. I know times are tough.

But I am the kind of leader to tell you the truth — **the whole truth. ** [And the truth is, if we as conservatives don’t start putting up serious fundraising numbers, you’ll be referring to a radical leftist as Speaker this time next year.](Friend)
So, as I said at the beginning. I’ve never been one to cower to a bully, allow others to define me, or back down from a fight.

And I'm not going to start now.

**[Serving as Speaker of the House is the honor of a lifetime — and it would be an honor to know that I have earned your support as well.](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=ff6556034ef345fcaa22e7a9ec76d2ba&_e=stBxrRIBjN8fPQnbGAktgU7E6XKwu_8-hTtOzEynYZV6Omv6w2e8l5sk0ejyVsU1SGpYg0JsY3a7GnyAUaFH3xjN1NZCVt1hBfnk6rxcEzZTZxUklALkc4yRLbj1BpinXHE9qr537a_ZZB6T1Ck6Zf8XhfrI13zmxq7PuABq8WRtjzqf6T8mHn1gDKoxZThADwJdxexegyZPRDh8zFuIMPHn7lcFwCoSUIWKHaPwjNPzLJWVknN5G1O7e3fytYdkxtP7ES_FE34ZgM-v3bemmTm4CpNoIL3ms9uE-T8ji9fD7OdTHaaEhOqcCmm7hvPqN7eUGg-zJkcXZM04jqat-guWvBnCVYhSo5uOqoxj1cenxgOwi0es5jz8JLdI4kIWDnnRUs0wp5NIsuqUxZ3CSbCXNZIbGyOMSjYrgfNf9xiSmu5VyCRRet00-hhoVsmF)**

clean_body: But I have other plans. %recipient.md5hash% | | | Friend, I was raised to never cower down to a bully. To never let someone else define who you are. And to never, EVER give up. Growing up the kid of a firefighter, you learn pretty quickly that you are only as good as the team around you. And when you are running into a burning building, you have to be able to count on the men and women by your side to know that they have your back, and are just as invested in getting the job done as you are. That’s the same mentality that I am bringing to the House of Representatives. And as the newly-elected Speaker, Let me lay the groundwork: Right now, Republicans have the thinnest of majorities in the House. And the Democrat Machine smells blood in the water. They think we are weak. That we are vulnerable. That we are ineffective. But they’ve got it all wrong. While they are spending their time pointing fingers and poking fun, House Republican leadership is putting our heads down and getting to work for the American people — to ensure that our conservative majority stays intact. Look, I’m not the kind of leader to scream into the void and use scare tactics to try and force a donation from you. I know times are tough. But I am the kind of leader to tell you the truth — the whole truth. Friend So, as I said at the beginning. I’ve never been one to cower to a bully, allow others to define me, or back down from a fight. And I'm not going to start now. name: Conservatives Give
subject: How do you see the Supreme Court?
body:
Your participation in Hillsdale College's National Survey on the United States Supreme Court is requested.

| | |
---
| This sponsored message from Conservatives Give is on behalf of Hillsdale College | [](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=895e11cda86a43f7b0be8aead0f86bc9&_e=wDCJIJlM_mWdld1oTuPC2QIzvr3Mnnk-7bafdYlgrOlDS10A67Qn9lytm8klWOr2-2Q5AlX9g3gHlIUuIlxIkZjei20OhYUgXLafpA9nEr-Fdn7Jp3eEybDi9SZ7GqS9gokANviSuUtahpW8DzUdMMlZPA18KSB4GArqMkoQq1Mc_V9CbKqbGTQYIs7LWVCAsYnGtko9K1NKK_dgayOaa-JQoBTWGvddbWiXMy-pAXxn1xYPvYceOlyiMm4Xa6k2XReJpHJEeTOzf4waSHfWGfpL0YtXwdMcTaKOl_n1s8_2C2DsTOuyQe8IN9p1qSSuJdj1g6NvLSoxY14KVk4YkT8ZuP3SA5nvqg5qBpPINV5IdayS29V4Vx5GK8ERhBxhvT-st21TSpeN4z73YmSCGA%3D%3D)
---
| | | Dear Friend, Your participation in Hillsdale College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** is requested.

Your response will only take a few minutes, but the subject is crucial to the future of liberty and the separation of powers in America.

The American Founders thought that the proper role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution.

But progressives see the Court differently. They want activist judges to legislate from the bench.
## Do you agree that the role of the Supreme Court is to apply the Constitution as it is written and NOT to make laws or advance a particular policy agenda?
[YES](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=895e11cda86a43f7b0be8aead0f86bc9&_e=wDCJIJlM_mWdld1oTuPC2QIzvr3Mnnk-7bafdYlgrOlDS10A67Qn9lytm8klWOr2-2Q5AlX9g3gHlIUuIlxIkZjei20OhYUgXLafpA9nEr-Fdn7Jp3eEybDi9SZ7GqS9gokANviSuUtahpW8DzUdMMlZPA18KSB4GArqMkoQq1Mc_V9CbKqbGTQYIs7LWVCAsYnGtko9K1NKK_dgayOaa-JQoBTWGvddbWiXMy-pAXxn1xYPvYceOlyiMm4Xa6k2ZQyKKCsQ8oerJCQ0ibMi9Nh_z_YBq6B5iTImyH2-_W_k-vaJVyyVyPe_DuBeMPi7IS9kWK9OsxW9it51ay_hH6kSlGU5BhfTnWG8Po6H3J1oc2H4baQHlu_aAs--tYO616sB5PHUaPjJXakMvwpglg%3D%3D) [NO](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=895e11cda86a43f7b0be8aead0f86bc9&_e=wDCJIJlM_mWdld1oTuPC2QIzvr3Mnnk-7bafdYlgrOlDS10A67Qn9lytm8klWOr2-2Q5AlX9g3gHlIUuIlxIkZjei20OhYUgXLafpA9nEr-Fdn7Jp3eEybDi9SZ7GqS9gokANviSuUtahpW8DzUdMMlZPA18KSB4GArqMkoQq1Mc_V9CbKqbGTQYIs7LWVCAsYnGtko9K1NKK_dgayOaa-JQoBTWGvddbWiXMy-pAXxn1xYPvYceOlyiMm4Xa6k2YCoqeesUG3ahbsxmHmKAZ5ME7MyBRzZsi_u57SGLOQ2rUJq4xusb0dD9ztgcU9e2cbZnCarJemMgIjo80MAv45v9YKbIc8JADpE9vf4MLC5OKDAtcJYOtFkE8saEbNtn0MpIHzj9q8xZyORel_ySrQ%3D%3D) Even worse, progressives dismayed by recent Supreme Court decisions want to "pack" the bench with additional justices to advance a preferred policy agenda.

As Sen. Elizabeth Warren (D-Mass.) put it in a _Boston Globe_ op-ed: "To restore balance and integrity to a broken institution, Congress must expand the Supreme Court by four or more seats."

What is your opinion about the Supreme Court's role in our constitutional republic?

Please share your thoughts with me using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** right away.

Your response will help Hillsdale form effective strategies to educate millions of Americans about the importance of the Constitution to liberty--including the proper role of an independent judiciary that applies the Constitution instead of legislating from the bench.

You can easily complete your **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court** using this secure link: **[https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=895e11cda86a43f7b0be8aead0f86bc9&_e=wDCJIJlM_mWdld1oTuPC2QIzvr3Mnnk-7bafdYlgrOlDS10A67Qn9lytm8klWOr2-2Q5AlX9g3gHlIUuIlxIkZjei20OhYUgXLafpA9nEr-Fdn7Jp3eEybDi9SZ7GqS9gokANviSuUtahpW8DzUdMMlZPA18KSB4GArqMkoQq1Mc_V9CbKqbGTQYIs7LWVCAsYnGtko9K1NKK_dgayOaa-JQoBTWGvddbWiXMy-pAXxn1xYPvYceOlyiMm4Xa6k2wUpjcWsQNgDCL8o0JNKTVdYA-B_d5h9am3XlyKmLsrVvMOMEURT1JAp6FBvosXUwAyO48FNOc4aqEigG50lJHnt3cWTdDp929HJVzYdfIoiebagV3kuMzsQhfAiTNAVEQZ_bX2MIKFviQ2iMOhVnWQ%3D%3D)**

And after you give your views, I hope you will consider supporting Hillsdale College with a tax-deductible gift.

The failure of too many of America's schools to provide young people with a proper education in American history and government makes it easier for progressives to **undermine** the separation of powers at the heart of limited government.

I'm sure you agree that too many Americans do not understand the role of an independent judiciary in preserving our constitutional order.

That's why Hillsdale College has expanded its educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty nationwide, directly **reaching** and **teaching** millions of Americans in all 50 states--including yours!

These efforts counter the influence of anti-American ideology being taught in classrooms all across America.

Your support will help us to expand our educational outreach, including:
* **Teaching** millions of citizens nationwide through free online courses, such as "Constitution 101: The Meaning and History of the Constitution" and "The U.S. Supreme Court."

* **Reaching** over six million households and businesses nationwide with _Imprimis_ , Hillsdale's free digest of liberty.

* **Sending** millions of pocket-size copies of America's founding documents to citizens, teachers, and students in K-12 schools across America.

* **Restoring** excellence to K-12 education by launching and providing ongoing guidance to over 70 classical K-12 charter schools nationwide that offer a strong American history and civics curriculum.

We **undertake our educational outreach efforts on behalf of liberty** --as we do all of our work--without accepting a penny of government funding, not even indirectly in the form of federal or state student grants or loans.

That means all of our work--including reaching and teaching millions about America's great heritage of liberty--depends entirely on the support of Americans like you, who understand the importance of education to liberty.

Please share your thoughts with Hillsdale using the College's **National Survey on the United States Supreme Court **right away--the link is below.

[**https://lp.hillsdale.edu/supreme-court-survey**](https://links.conservativesgive.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=895e11cda86a43f7b0be8aead0f86bc9&_e=wDCJIJlM_mWdld1oTuPC2QIzvr3Mnnk-7bafdYlgrOlDS10A67Qn9lytm8klWOr2-2Q5AlX9g3gHlIUuIlxIkZjei20OhYUgXLafpA9nEr-Fdn7Jp3eEybDi9SZ7GqS9gokANviSuUtahpW8DzUdMMlZPA18KSB4GArqMkoQq1Mc_V9CbKqbGTQYIs7LWVCAsYnGtko9K1NKK_dgayOaa-JQoBTWGvddbWiXMy-pAXxn1xYPvYceOlyiMm4Xa6k2z43Xk5S31gL7EBPehcl9rxHEbKz9Y326fpxyi_p1xhQdr3pafNVOsm-gj1-rrX_C1XhWpqvhJBUR7B6GD_CpbiYT46ZoavAMFzPfBoHsYXLheOWXk-iUf3ZabCFLhBYN4aXMBJ3fZt_O4o8zGNTGOg%3D%3D)

Then please consider giving a generous tax-deductible gift to preserve liberty for future generations through education.

Thank you for your time and attention--and for your support of liberty.

Warm regards,

Larry P. Arnn
President, Hillsdale College
Pursuing Truth - Defending Liberty since 1844

We're counting on you. We need your support.

"I will not let you down." — Ron DeSantis

That's a promise, friend. Together, we will shock the nation, prove the media wrong, terrify the Left, and fire Joe Biden in November. But how well we come together NOW will make the difference.

Sign up here!

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2b5fdf01b8cccd7e039e3f6933a984f571b6185e3cd5be3f2fc3d0d33092fe4ec73e0cb96b63c5d9d83a4e299635a81edbce741bbd6f44d1d9a4f8481584ef5c

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=2b5fdf01b8cccd7e039e3f6933a984f571b6185e3cd5be3f2fc3d0d33092fe4ec73e0cb96b63c5d9d83a4e299635a81edbce741bbd6f44d1d9a4f8481584ef5c

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Douglas=20Carswell?=
subject: A solution to Mississippi’s healthcare crisis is staring us in the face.
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/mspolicy/successsequence-11571576?e=5703353baa)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

**Often in politics, it is easier to define a problem than it is to solve it.**

**Remember Barack Obama’s eloquent speech about the need to unite America beyond red states Vs blue states?** When Obama left office, America was more politically polarized than before.

**Who could forget Al Gore’s theatrics as he talked about the need to save the planet?** I doubt a Gore-run administration would be able to control the country’s borders, let alone global sea levels or the climate.
---
|
---
_Al Gore - saving the world one speech at a time_
| **Remember how during last year’s gubernatorial race here in Mississippi, Brandon Presley, the Democrat candidate, waxed lyrically about saving rural hospitals?** Hosing federal funds around is unlikely to change the fact that hospitals that are underused will remain underused.

**Politicians can certainly make problems worse.** Obama, I would argue, exacerbated America’s divisions. Gore & co have advocated an energy policy that does nothing to control the climate but has made people poorer. Subsidizing an underused health service is unlikely to make it magically sustainable.

Occasionally, however, politicians have it in their gift to do something that really would improve things.

**In a report we published this week, MCPP shows that there is a solution to Mississippi’s healthcare crisis staring us in the face: our leaders could abolish the anticompetitive laws that intentionally limit the number of healthcare providers in our state. **This would improve access to healthcare and lower costs for everyone.
READ OUR REPORT BY CLICKING ON THE LINK BELOW:
---
| [ ](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=0251f0089d&e=5703353baa)
---
| **For years, if a healthcare provider has wanted to offer new services or expand existing services in 19 key areas of health care, they have been required by law to get a permit.** These Soviet-style permits, known as Certificates of Need (CON), are also required for a provider wanting to spend more than $1.5 million on new medical equipment, relocate services from one part of the state to another, or change ownership.

Unlike other sensible licensing requirements, CON requirements are not designed primarily to assess a provider’s qualifications, safety record, or fitness. They are about central planning to decide if each new applicant’s services are “needed” by the community. **I believe that it should be up to patients and practioners to decide what is needed, not bureaucrats.**
---
|
---
_CON laws are about economic planning._
| **CON laws in Mississippi limit the provision of long-term care, despite demographic change that has seen the number of elderly people needing care increase dramatically.** Ambulatory services, key diagnostic services, psychiatric services and many other services are all limited by CON laws.

**If the case for change is so overwhelming, why has it not already been done? **In any market, when there are restrictions imposed to keep out the competition, there will be various vested interests that lobby for their retention. So, too, with CON laws.

Defenders of CON restrictions suggest that CON repeal would be risky and dangerous. They like to imply that any reform would reduce access and quality would suffer.

Such concerns are unfounded. **Over 100 million****Americans—nearly a third of the population—live in states without CON laws in health care.** Four in ten Americans live in states with limited CON regimes that apply to only one or two services, such as ambulance services or nursing homes.

If our lawmakers are serious about improving healthcare in Mississippi, I hope they read our report, which sets out not only what needs to be done but provides a roadmap explaining how to do it.

**High flying rhetoric won’t improve our state. Getting down to work and removing CON laws will.**

Have an awesome weekend!
---
| [Forward this email to a friend!](https://mspolicy.us18.list-manage.com/track/click?u=60d4052c66b6745831ccdf7c8&id=fb81bd8574&e=5703353baa "Forward this email to a friend!")

Warm regards,

Douglas Carswell

clean_body: Chuck Schumer and his liberal allies are spending $700,000+ in one week trying to convince voters that I’m weak on China. | | Peter, It’s former Navy SEAL and current U.S. Senate candidate Tim Sheehy. I need your attention for a few minutes today – please let me tell you why. DC Democrats purchased an additional Chuck Schumer and his liberal allies are spending $700,000+ in one week trying to convince voters that I’m weak on China. This couldn’t be further from the truth. As a Navy SEAL , I led covert operations around the world to defend our freedoms and keep America safe. Then I built a Montana manufacturing business with zero supply chain dependence on China. While their claims are downright laughable, what’s not is the fact that to date, I’m the only Republican Chuck Schumer and his allies have spent money to attack. In fact, they’ve already spent $2.6 million against me, in addition to the $3.9 million Tester has spent himself. Jon Tester has been in the United States Senate since January 2007 and has done nothing to stop the rise of the Chinese Communist Party. Washington Democrats know I pose a direct threat to their majority, so they’re trying to paint me as someone I’m not. The worst part about American politics is that elected officials often believe they can lie to voters and get away with it. It’s worked for my opponent and his Party before, but Whether you live in Montana or elsewhere, the fact of the matter is that this race will determine control of the United States Senate. Do you feel comfortable sitting on the sidelines when you could and help elect a Navy SEAL who will stand up to China and put America First? to ensure Montana voters know Jon Tester is a two-faced professional politician. Jon Tester is a career politician who said the Chinese Spy Balloon did not “put our national security at risk” and then went and let President Biden and Chairman Xi off the hook after it flew over Montana and across the country, collecting valuable intelligence from sensitive U.S. military sites. Help me boot soft-on-China Jon Tester from the U.S. Senate. [[Join My Team Today]]() Jon Tester is a career politician whose open border agenda is allowing Chinese fentanyl to enter our country, killing over 70,000 Americans a year and becoming the leading cause of death in adults. Help me boot soft-on-crime Jon Tester from the U.S. Senate. [[Join My Team Today]]() On Tester’s watch, “Chinese ownership of U.S. farmland has increased fivefold over the past decade, according to U.S. Department of Agriculture (USDA) data, from 69,000 acres in 2011 to almost 384,000 acres in 2021.” Despite this disturbing trend, Tester waited until 2023, just before his reelection campaign kicked off, to introduce a bill to block China from buying American farmland. Weak on China, career politicians like Two-Faced Tester are all talk, no leadership. We need leaders willing to fight back, break our dependence on China, and put America First! I’ve told you since June that this race will be the most expensive race in Montana’s history, perhaps the most expensive Senate race in U.S. history. If you’re tired of politicians lying to you, . For America's Future, Tim Sheehy Former Navy SEAL Republican for U.S. Senate | " "I SERVED AS A NAVY SEAL, BUILT ONE OF THE LARGEST AERIAL FIREFIGHTING COMPANIES IN AMERICA CREATING OVER 200 MONTANA JOBS, AND STARTED A VETERAN-LED CATTLE RANCHING AND FEEDING OPERATION. WHETHER IT WAS IN WAR OR BUSINESS, I SEE PROBLEMS AND SOLVE THEM. AMERICA NEEDS CONSERVATIVE LEADERS WHO LOVE OUR COUNTRY. I'M RUNNING FOR THE U.S. SENATE BECAUSE OUR CAMPAIGN IS ABOUT SERVICE, DUTY, AND COUNTRY -- NOT POLITICS AS USUAL." | PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA Tim Sheehy is a former Navy SEAL. name: Speaker Mike Johnson
subject: They say we don’t have a prayer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mike Johnson for Louisiana
body:
But I have other plans.
%recipient.md5_hash%
| | | [](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=690a278583c74e45a495c67aa8184cb4&_e=OwgLGMNK6H2iAYLTkkBU9KgycxoZl4BngIKiux4Zt48ficri6Uutt_3Jmm7vxdUy5A_1RnxpA-yMJlktWADfvC0JxJivfrLZImayWVyZKmtP-PoQZWO--dSKznvgZNcx_1H_tQuIrKuRf11clURrxK59YoWB2_MBTf_ai-pr1m7FTP93MHHY65vAi2VaV0Ke9NY36ZSOljjgw-O5qFgfRLQalPUb__xPPfWa2ols7J2R1ANsQqdOnwbfEqT22G2JGx_9hSSPduscOhpuaZVIyfZis8IO8hh_vH_v9R8Xp40-b0mhTSXY2g-u_QLGUU-yt_TBf1PSktf7cK46v4_ViRURH9nfy7qkZB8RcKDF4bBmHiD73GdkBu9ojOwH11bQB1FsRbctc8CZevcFYV4w21u59vnRbDHS_XJMk_XV9Xmy8gwSNaCevTADskfVOoLe)
---
Friend, I was raised to never cower down to a bully. To never let someone else define who you are. And to never, _EVER_ give up.

Growing up the kid of a firefighter, you learn pretty quickly that you are only as good as the team around you.

And when you are running into a burning building, you have to be able to count on the men and women by your side to know that they have your back, and are just as invested in getting the job done as you are.

That’s the same mentality that I am bringing to the House of Representatives. And as the newly-elected Speaker, **[I am working overtime to ensure that I have a team of reliable, steadfast conservatives who will push forward and fight with all that they have to maintain and grow our Republican House majority.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=690a278583c74e45a495c67aa8184cb4&_e=OwgLGMNK6H2iAYLTkkBU9KgycxoZl4BngIKiux4Zt48ficri6Uutt_3Jmm7vxdUy5A_1RnxpA-yMJlktWADfvC0JxJivfrLZImayWVyZKmtP-PoQZWO--dSKznvgZNcx_1H_tQuIrKuRf11clURrxK59YoWB2_MBTf_ai-pr1m7FTP93MHHY65vAi2VaV0Ke9NY36ZSOljjgw-O5qFgfRLQalPUb__xPPfWa2ols7J2R1ANsQqdOnwbfEqT22G2JGx_9hSSPduscOhpuaZVIyfZis8IO8hh_vH_v9R8Xp42mLASw_DkP4JhcHAe9c_PZGNiC-JTaxDmR7Ryh17mCfZu8JDAwgjt4xRpMog6YWYEYnsIsktfX8FwZEMvfJHRCHqThyK8d_43DQs4d686dKeQndWa5qkKqeb9ocLEu1vOpjn8IGnE1z64YHv4L2fue)**

Let me lay the groundwork: Right now, Republicans have the thinnest of majorities in the House. And the Democrat Machine smells blood in the water.

They think we are weak. That we are vulnerable. That we are ineffective.

**But they’ve got it all wrong.**

While they are spending their time pointing fingers and poking fun, House Republican leadership is putting our heads down and getting to work for the American people — to ensure that our conservative majority stays intact. **[And we’d love to have you on our team, Friend.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=690a278583c74e45a495c67aa8184cb4&_e=OwgLGMNK6H2iAYLTkkBU9KgycxoZl4BngIKiux4Zt48ficri6Uutt_3Jmm7vxdUy5A_1RnxpA-yMJlktWADfvC0JxJivfrLZImayWVyZKmtP-PoQZWO--dSKznvgZNcx_1H_tQuIrKuRf11clURrxK59YoWB2_MBTf_ai-pr1m7FTP93MHHY65vAi2VaV0Ke9NY36ZSOljjgw-O5qFgfRLQalPUb__xPPfWa2ols7J2R1ANsQqdOnwbfEqT22G2JGx_9hSSPduscOhpuaZVIyfZis8IO8hh_vH_v9R8Xp41hcT3xj9s7svho5BUJeNqVkbfhX-zd-Wcp7n8IuF0w6_GHvXcpq_i70wNmJpZxlShuoLwg6LPYBCJoYcKJ1XpoKtNham_BIX9biWirVqhXSkhJ8OLyzs7Q5lTrzFkeFitaN6eYmfCFr6q6keJTCFro)**

Look, I’m not the kind of leader to scream into the void and use scare tactics to try and force a donation from you. I know times are tough.

But I am the kind of leader to tell you the truth — **the whole truth. ** [And the truth is, if we as conservatives don’t start putting up serious fundraising numbers, you’ll be referring to a radical leftist as Speaker this time next year.](Friend)
So, as I said at the beginning. I’ve never been one to cower to a bully, allow others to define me, or back down from a fight.

And I'm not going to start now.

**[Serving as Speaker of the House is the honor of a lifetime — and it would be an honor to know that I have earned your support as well.](https://links.defend-the-constitution.org/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=690a278583c74e45a495c67aa8184cb4&_e=OwgLGMNK6H2iAYLTkkBU9KgycxoZl4BngIKiux4Zt48ficri6Uutt_3Jmm7vxdUy5A_1RnxpA-yMJlktWADfvC0JxJivfrLZImayWVyZKmtP-PoQZWO--dSKznvgZNcx_1H_tQuIrKuRf11clURrxK59YoWB2_MBTf_ai-pr1m7FTP93MHHY65vAi2VaV0Ke9NY36ZSOljjgw-O5qFgfRLQalPUb__xPPfWa2ols7J2R1ANsQqdOnwbfEqT22G2JGx_9hSSPduscOhpuaZVIyfZis8IO8hh_vH_v9R8Xp42mcS_osSCShuL0sfTXCuVm8_aK3-J6w6qyJW6vDqFYNxD6pTgoP2i6FZWO3djx6uqQrSYBNJquUe4fPm6DES7f-f8fYve-0Iej_WeBlg1vn1WDf7OsvXyxYE4CNeiJILnK_feguCQkzBYLLFyeb2My)**
---

| | | Hey - I'm Byron Donalds.

The Republican National Committee named me the Co-Chairman of their most important initiative for the next election.

_**[I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024- here's the gist:](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ad46757473040b880761dd20ab649ec&_e=dmuEMxUQPNWMWZMACJfrrbOPhllcMzO2K4K6DWHv76VNIb26MGNMEvpbn_rvh8BGI0G9AKwHXNh5I1aIFiMZ0PvDf-dO6Su0IwNxzHSZg_-L8aEQ1qfSeqOOYUkt08gAl30tR0gfJhT_ueQ8Pxf0TPy2SP5Ni3PQpUDSPqw7QTZkTAjHSK2IvN9itLSe7Z7r5rX4FKZPnVXyqN0U5NlqnkILcJaJi4FytpteHUh2ZsBk2p7pTx9qrveOhtQqy93v9dQbU5eY8tWEbTJrbMmQNWunV7ILKZL1RsntAutoLVWDq2lv3y9zF-EUCCisu5OgDkt1r3sLStbrtqeaz8uiQzMugmLgIKKtjMEyT18JqIkusMmGG8UcOp03rFjf-JedMj2BvbRcPzanEV2upMp3mRs3Lx7EsoZrC807ebuDLLr9oSgnRsHgMFzq7EO-NSR0oFFa4qRdcTSH04eDEv477g%3D%3D "I have a plan for a CONSERVATIVE LANDSLIDE in 2024 – here’s the gist:")**_
* If the Democrats vote early, we should push early voting too
* If they can ballot harvest, we should ballot harvest even better
* Invest in an 80,000-person team to ensure your vote is protected
* Mobilize GOP voters through neighbor-to-neighbor contact
* Expand voter contact efforts to connect with young Conservatives
* **Fight BAD ballot harvesting laws - let's make it easy to vote but hard to cheat**

I am proud to lead these efforts and help Conservatives WIN BIG up and down the ballot. These efforts will not only allow us to confront bad actors and stop cheating but will help our Party appeal to younger voters and swing-state independents.

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts.

_**[That's why I'm coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?](https://links.freedomnationtoday.com/u/click?_t=959d0fa54cad47baa4213176314ae733&_m=2ad46757473040b880761dd20ab649ec&_e=dmuEMxUQPNWMWZMACJfrrbOPhllcMzO2K4K6DWHv76VNIb26MGNMEvpbn_rvh8BGI0G9AKwHXNh5I1aIFiMZ0PvDf-dO6Su0IwNxzHSZg_-L8aEQ1qfSeqOOYUkt08gAl30tR0gfJhT_ueQ8Pxf0TPy2SP5Ni3PQpUDSPqw7QTZkTAjHSK2IvN9itLSe7Z7r5rX4FKZPnVXyqN0U5NlqnkILcJaJi4FytpteHUh2ZsBk2p7pTx9qrveOhtQqy93v9dQbU5eY8tWEbTJrbMmQNWunV7ILKZL1RsntAutoLVWDq2lv3y9zF-EUCCisu5Ogqq60offwgG9_y3ZNiOMKDKcQ8Gss4WKRaYufh2V-VHGSwg8k1pC5K0PZCmdzNv-cxK8vhyE8mwYt_zXlcX1proVPzftVBwA7V6Wczlv0Ase_FLgULcyY5wUWdDqdvZORx184zZ7gpvM0YzaDhjlR-Q%3D%3D "That’s why I’m coming to you with an important request. Will you pitch in a few bucks to help jumpstart these efforts?")**_ I know it's a lot to ask but I can promise you this: it'll be worth it when we have **1)** a Conservative House Majority, **2)** a Conservative Senate, and **3)** a Conservative in the White House.

_If that doesn 't convince you to want to help, I don't know what will! Are you in?_

There's just one problem: campaign operations like these are EXPENSIVE. It's not cheap running ads, printing flyers, recruiting volunteers, and expanding voter contact efforts. subject: I can't hold on much longer
disclaimer_text: Paid for by ZINKE FOR CONGRESS
body:
This is Ryan Zinke, Trump’s former Secretary of the Interior and 20+ year Navy SEAL

| |
---
| | | I can't hold on much longer, Friend.

Soros, Zuckerberg, Gates and the rest of the globalist billionaires want to watch America burn - and they're trying to take out Republicans like me who stand in their way.
**This is Ryan Zinke, Trump 's former Secretary of the Interior and 20+ year Navy SEAL. I'm defending the most critical Republican seat in the House.**
In 2022, I commanded the team of Navy SEALs who took the House majority by force. Now, Biden's billionaire puppet masters know that if they can demolish my campaign, no other conservative will stand a chance. _**That 's why they've listed me among their top targets in 2024.**_

---
| | [HELP RYAN ZINKE - CHIP IN NOW](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zrot8fohc06hrgdqhqrodjaqurck8h6iem3hbvv0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chhm1o72c9h2bs)
---

I'll be upfront with you, Friend - I don't have the backing of billionaires donors. My campaign relies on the support of regular, everyday Americans like yourself. But I can promise you that if you chip in just $5 right now, we'll crush this month's fundraising goal and thwart Biden's plan to destroy America.
**[As a patriot who's spent his life defending this nation, I'm humbly asking - will you help me out?](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zk1ma0274i2e1h2h5se52ha533s39hlg0u92kfi0_rp22sh2s8i6eo35chhm1o72c9h2bs "As a patriot who’s spent his life defending this nation, I’m humbly asking - will you help me out? ---

I'll continue bringing the fight to Washington D.C. for as long as I can - you have my word.

Thank you for your support,
Ryan Zinke

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Grassroots Army Growing
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:

|

|

Dear Peter,
**In a historic show of strength, RFK Jr. is now on the ballot in Utah.**
Through our ballot access drive, we are building a massive grassroots army of activists—bigger than Biden’s or Trump’s—who will campaign, canvas, volunteer, drop literature, make phone calls, and spread the message of Independence, Freedom, Unity and Healing to thousands of their friends.
The Kennedy 24 campaign may well be the single largest grassroots effort put forth in modern history.
And you are making it happen.
| | **"This process is forcing us to build our army now. And we’re going to have a better army on the street and in the trenches in November 2024."**
---
—Robert F. Kennedy, Jr.
Please give today to continue the momentum going. Garnering ballot access in all 50 states is going to take all hands on deck — and it’s going to take contributions to keep our campaign moving as we do this.
[So please, Declare Your Independence and help us get RFK Jr. on the ballot in all fifty states!](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=utah_1_13_24_email_2rs_1_nd&n=2)

If we wait until this fall to ramp up these crucial campaign operations, it will be TOO LATE. body:
It's time to start winning for the American people again and I will fight for 8 straight years to get this country again. YOU are who I am fighting for.

Hey Peter, it's Ron DeSantis. At a time like this, when we're up against the most critical battle we've faced yet, I believe it's up to me to remind you who I'm fighting for and why it's so important to me to earn your support in time for the first nominating contest. I have a personal stake in this race, Peter. I'm running to leave a greater America to the generation that comes after us--_the generation of my three young children._ It matters to me that they grow up in a nation as free as the one promised to us by way of the Constitution of the United States. And it is critical that this happen **now. 2028 is too long to wait for a leader to take action, shut our border down, bring back the American Dream, and keep the woke insanity from driving our country into the ground.** We are just DAYS away from the first contest for the Republican presidential nomination.
---

I am running because I cannot sit idly by while the decline of our country continues. WE CAN PUT AN END TO IT. But to get this done, I am counting on every Republican to ********[**stand up and fight with me**](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b778af3c45564fc2a410020b55ff88a9&_e=T4p25beRmHy-2ql2u9HrAm3s5uE33OXWWW3b2xvhiOmVYWaMbnqcDkA-ndFbi2ptrB4EZihvrBKie-mvqlGo5wlhpt45XywsI98ngXvZJ_fSrFkzEud7RwmTTnj4CMN00kBdkzJ44PsWOMLTxtfTIbYgFYynhXYLJkd6C2l-a6f1hLUYmn5wDH8ofv9sF3_o7FJG-jrA0gKoI6S8JA9ENpx6Ey_ilaMknUMXCc-wi-wUHWlAohuk3D6JGu1OjI91qSx2zEyPcl58P66YmyW3qP1gPbrJI7BBoy-sfm2nMhj2MYrcR2oSYXrI0so-BAty0HDz1tH4g4FwsqfLVtLNZIHPL2UIL981UxAPv6-9DPtYpSE1oHsGcseGH9WSQ83ioRh8TLuWvMUHxlGl0Tq8npA-had3mlXXd9cawvW5z5SF7e4fpDEIJksXpHijO-KU)******** to cause a ripple effect across this country. _This starts in Iowa on Monday._ The fact is this: the Iowa voters are facing a choice to nominate... 1) Someone who puts his own issues at the forefront of his campaign and presidency, OR 2) Someone who puts her million-dollar donors at the forefront of her campaign for presidency, OR 3) Me, a candidate in this race to fight for you, win for America, and lead us to our Great American Comeback. This is why I humbly ask for your support before we miss our shot. We don't have time to wait around and hope the Left comes to their senses and stops shoving nonsense down the throats of kids and consumers across the country. America will be too far gone if we don't choose now to fight.
---

---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=b778af3c45564fc2a410020b55ff88a9&_e=T4p25beRmHy-2ql2u9HrAm3s5uE33OXWWW3b2xvhiOmVYWaMbnqcDkA-ndFbi2ptrB4EZihvrBKie-mvqlGo5wlhpt45XywsI98ngXvZJ_fSrFkzEud7RwmTTnj4CMN00kBdkzJ44PsWOMLTxtfTIbYgFYynhXYLJkd6C2l-a6f1hLUYmn5wDH8ofv9sF3_o7FJG-jrA0gKoI6S8JA9ENpx6Ey_ilaMknUMXCc-wi-wUHWlAohuk3D6JGu1OjI91qSx2zEyPcl58P66YmyW3qOJlE8ck_k-2NGevBcl_WuefJm4q_n5i2v7F761qm2ZT1Idu5sX7rdQQeYA7B7V0G9V8w4JmqmEtg7o-SmKb9ZWSzFvO2AT6liHbN58c47U9OIsGxNMFIPEANLP9pBiKtiKoV7_QBCU-MsDXKEim_bLbHIyekzF4-IwJJK7wbSfJ)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

---
|

* This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose of making this contribution.

* I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization, national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

clean_body: | Friend, I apologize for asking you so many times. I absolutely can't ignore this anymore. We're in for the fight of our lives in 2024. We're OFFICIALLY in the election year, and we've got to do everything we can to FIGHT and WIN. Here's what's happening: The left will be more nasty and more well-funded than ever before. They will do EVERYTHING and ANYTHING to take out our campaign. I need everyone's support if we're going to win in 2024 and SAVE AMERICA. | We must stand together, united we stand, and divided we fall. This is THE most competitive Senate race in the nation. Control of the Senate and, by extension, the future of our nation is hanging in the balance. Thank you -Kari Paid for by Kari Lake for Senate If you'd like to donate by mail, .

name: Officer Harry Dunn (ret.)
subject: January 6 trauma
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC
body:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77009280/449094945/-749972717?amount=3&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240113_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxMGExNzY0LTFjYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YXN9AYSOFh59QHWKrxRv1r-ffNQ46bC1AycakIR-eZ4=)
This is going to be a long email about our January 6th trauma.
[_**If you’re not ready to talk about it or don’t have time to read the whole email, I understand. But if you could still chip in a split donation between my campaign and Upset the Setup to help me jumpstart this race, I’d appreciate it >>**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77009281/449094946/-749972717?amount=10&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240113_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxMGExNzY0LTFjYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YXN9AYSOFh59QHWKrxRv1r-ffNQ46bC1AycakIR-eZ4=)
If you’re still reading this, I’m assuming you’re ready. Let’s talk about our trauma. You and me.
Ask yourself, what has our nation been arguing about for the last 3 years? What conversation has been dominating the media, the government, occupying our courts, and our daily conversations? And even separating friends and families?
**January 6, 2021.**
The ripples from that day still threaten our democracy. The lives of election workers – the backbone of our electoral systems – are being threatened online via hundreds of messages on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram by those who would disrupt our elections:
_**“Watch your back.” “I know where you sleep.” “Be afraid.”**_
Because I speak out about these challenges to our democracy, I get the same threatening messages. “We know where you live.”
_Yet MAGA representatives in Congress continue to claim our elections are being rigged. _
The only difference between your January 6th trauma and mine is where we were when we experienced it.
I was at the Capitol immersed in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, fear, blood, death, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, bigotry, and heroism.
Capitol and Washington Police officers fought for our lives, the lives of fellow police officers, and the nation's elected leaders – it didn’t matter if they were a Republican, Democrat or an Independent. They were the men and women we sent to Washington to govern our nation.
**It was our duty to protect them. And our democracy.**
While Donald Trump, then our nation’s Commander in Chief, did nothing to help us for three hours after inciting the violence himself – we were beaten bloody. And some of us died.
Even though my experience looks different from yours, _I am first an American citizen. A girl dad. A football lover. A voter. This is my country – our country._
That day was a stain on our nation. And we need to fight like hell to make sure we NEVER repeat a day like that. I’ll continue to use my voice to protect this country. I’ll stand up to the lies, hate, and bigotry. I will always stand my ground to make sure democracy exists.
[_**So I’m asking you to stand with me. We will get through this trauma – we will get through this nightmare – but only if we stand together. Can I count on you to contribute a split donation between Upset the Setup and my campaign today?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77009282/449094947/-749972717?amount=10&refcode=UTS_FR_90DO_240113_1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjUxMGExNzY0LTFjYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=YXN9AYSOFh59QHWKrxRv1r-ffNQ46bC1AycakIR-eZ4=)

clean_body: = This is going to be a long email about our January 6th trauma. = If you’re still reading this, I’m assuming you’re ready. Let’s talk about our trauma. You and me. Ask yourself, what has our nation been arguing about for the last 3 years? What conversation has been dominating the media, the government, occupying our courts, and our daily conversations? And even separating friends and families? January 6, 2021. The ripples from that day still threaten our democracy. The lives of election workers – the backbone of our electoral systems – are being threatened online via hundreds of messages on Facebook, Twitter and Instagram by those who would disrupt our elections: “Watch your back.” “I know where you sleep.” “Be afraid.” Because I speak out about these challenges to our democracy, I get the same threatening messages. “We know where you live.” Yet MAGA representatives in Congress continue to claim our elections are being rigged. The only difference between your January 6th trauma and mine is where we were when we experienced it. I was at the Capitol immersed in a profane mix of sweat, screams, shrieks, anger, fear, blood, death, broken limbs, spit, hatred, horror, racism, bigotry, and heroism. Capitol and Washington Police officers fought for our lives, the lives of fellow police officers, and the nation's elected leaders – it didn’t matter if they were a Republican, Democrat or an Independent. They were the men and women we sent to Washington to govern our nation. It was our duty to protect them. And our democracy. While Donald Trump, then our nation’s Commander in Chief, did nothing to help us for three hours after inciting the violence himself – we were beaten bloody. And some of us died. Even though my experience looks different from yours, I am first an American citizen. A girl dad. A football lover. A voter. This is my country – our country. That day was a stain on our nation. And we need to fight like hell to make sure we NEVER repeat a day like that. I’ll continue to use my voice to protect this country. I’ll stand up to the lies, hate, and bigotry. I will always stand my ground to make sure democracy exists. = If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: = = = = = = Together, Harry 💙 | | Paid for by Upset The Setup PAC (www.upsetsetup.org) Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 600 Pennsylvania Ave. SE #15180, Washington, DC 20003 Upset The Setup is working everyday to elect young, diverse, progressive Democrats to critical local offices so we can build up our communities, increase opportunity, and eliminate poverty.
