name: ElissaSlotkin.org
subject: Michigan is a pure TOSS-UP
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ELISSA SLOTKIN FOR MICHIGAN
body:
# [](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/188?t=1&akid=1022%2E135344%2Ez7ZW6u)

Did you see the news? Nonpartisan political forecasters at an organization called Split Ticket are reporting that, in the current political environment, the pure fundamentals of our race make the Michigan Senate race a TOSS-UP.
This comes just a few weeks after Cook Political Report downgraded the presidential race in Michigan from “Lean D” to “Toss-Up.”
**Add it all up, and it becomes clear that the path to controlling the Senate and the White House runs right through Michigan.**
Why is this important? Well, it confirms something Michiganders know, which is, Michigan is NOT a solidly blue state. Despite the great success Democrats have had up and down the ticket the last few years, Michigan is a pendulum that constantly swings back and forth under the right conditions (just look back at 2016 when Donald Trump won Michigan by 10,704 votes.)
This means that the second people sleep on Michigan and ride on previous successes, Democrats lose the state. We need to be doing everything we can right now to set us up for success on Election Day so we can protect the White House and defend the Senate. In addition, we know that millions of dollars from conservative megadonors and Super PACs are on the way to prop up our eventual opponent – setting up a battle royale here in Michigan, with control of both the White House and the Senate on the line.
This is why we reach out to you with the frequency that we do: we’re focused on ensuring our campaign has the resources necessary to fight back against the attack ads and outside spending that are quickly coming our way. And your support now, as we’re outlining our key strategies across the state, is especially helpful. Early support helps us be strategic and intentional about how we’re reaching voters. And in a race that will be as competitive as ours, we need to allocate our resources as efficiently as possible.
We’ve said it before and we’ll say it again: [**the path to keeping the White House blue and protecting the Senate majority runs through Michigan, and your early support will help us build the kind of campaign we need to win in November. Your support now would be a huge help.](https://act.elissaslotkin.org/go/9?c0=ebs-em-jan24.--Kpen&refcode=em240113-1-30&t=2&akid=1022%2E135344%2Ez7ZW6u)**

name: Gavin Newsom
subject: Republicans don’t give a damn about protecting kids and they are certainly not “pro-life.”
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CAMPAIGN FOR DEMOCRACY PAC
body:
If they were interested in life, they wouldn’t cut child hunger programs.

Friends —
Republicans don’t give a damn about protecting kids and they are certainly not “pro-life.”
If they were interested in life, they wouldn’t cut child hunger programs.
If they were interested in life, they wouldn’t allow guns, of all things, to be the leading cause of death for our kids.
If they were interested in life, they wouldn’t be attempting to take away people’s health care through the Affordable Care Act.
[](https://act.gavinnewsom.com/go/3107?t=1&akid=1769%2E4767699%2E3bDCkn)
Here's a refresher on what a “pro-life” agenda ACTUALLY looks like:
gun safety laws
healthcare for all
expanding pre-natal care
expanding mental healthcare
expanding childcare
universal preschool
Sing it from the rooftops.
Gavin Newsom
* * *
🛟 Hi. Please don’t click away just yet. 🇺🇸
All across the country, rights are being rolled-back in real-time by Republicans with a zest for demonization. We are going to go on the road and on offense — in red states too — and take the fight to statehouses, local communities, and electoral battlegrounds to save our democracy.
If everyone reading this donated just $20, we could support every “Red State” party across the country and give Democrats a chance to win EVERYWHERE. [**If that sounds worth it and important to you, please donate $20 to the Campaign for Democracy today. Thank you.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/cfd-c-em-jan24?refcode=em240113-1-f&refcode2=1769_4767699_3bDCkn&akid=1769%2E4767699%2E3bDCkn)

name: =?utf-8?Q?April=20Newland?=
subject: Why
disclaimer_text: Paid for and authorized by April Newland for National Committeewoman
body:
I'm running to get real results. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/bc98ebf5f3bf/re-hey-9340401?e=d30db4cde8)
---
| |
---
| | Friend,

The big day is almost here.

Iowa votes Monday followed by New Hampshire a week later. Then February 8 is our turn — our one and only opportunity to vote for president.

It doesn’t matter whether you’re for Trump, Haley, DeSantis, Ramaswamy, or even none of the above. This is truly an exciting time to be a Virgin Islander.

Beyond the vote for president the caucus is also an election for Republican party offices. In that election, I’m running to be your national committeewoman.

You deserve a national committeewoman committed to growing the party — a national committeewoman who will work _with_ (not against!) Chairman Ackley to keep the party moving forward.

**I’m a Virgin Islands Republican because I believe in freedom, prosperity, and equal opportunity for all Virgin Islanders. I’m committed to our party’s local platform of more jobs, bigger pay checks, safe streets, and better schools.**

Nationally, I have been honored to be your voice as a delegate at past Republican conventions.

At the conventions, I have never been just a voice _from_ the Virgin Islands. Rather, I have always been a voice _fo_ r the Virgin Islands.

I have led on the platform committee, ensuring the national platform is inclusive of the Virgin Islands and the other territories.

As national committeewoman, I will fight to ensure the national platform is strengthened to include equal citizenship for all Americans, regardless of whether they live in a state or territory.

As a second-generation Virgin Islander, an active member of the real estate and business communities, and a proven conservative with a record of leading at the highest levels of our national party, you can count on me to continue getting real results.

Friend, I’m asking for your vote in the caucus on February 8.

Respectfully,

April Newland
Candidate for National Committeewoman
340-643-4347
---
| | **FEBRUARY 8 CAUCUS VOTING INFORMATION**
In-person voting. No absentee ballots
St. Croix: 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. at La Reine Chicken Shack, Christiansted
St. John: 10 a.m. to 4 p.m. at Lovango Rum Bar, Cruz Bay
St. Thomas: 7 a.m. to 6 p.m. at Bluebeard's Castle, Estate Taarneberg
[Pre-register to skip the registration ](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=5c7803776a&e=d30db4cde8)[line on caucus day](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4e77ba4f26&e=d30db4cde8)
---
| | **_Paid for and authorized by April Newland for National Committeewoman._**
Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/profile?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=96330b2a18) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://protonmail.us14.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=9e6c445a9ccf2aeca06760698&id=4a1e7eb3fa&e=d30db4cde8&c=96330b2a18).

name: Emily Hall
subject: Join us in declaring your support
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWpWezViNK

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWpWezViNK

Dear
Friend,

For more
than 100 years, missionaries funded through the Lottie Moon
Christmas Offering have provided a beacon of hope in a world
where so many have yet to hear the gospel. Right now, around the
globe, you support more than 3,500 missionaries who share the
transforming gospel message of Jesus. They do this because
individuals like you provide the support they need.

We are
called by Scripture to play our part in bringing His teachings to
all nations, tribes, people, and languages. As we live out this
mission in our everyday lives, it's crucial we also show support
for our missionaries with the necessary financial support and
encouragement.

Will you
encourage IMB missionaries today by committing your support for
the Lottie Moon Christmas Offering? By signing this declaration,
you're stating:

"I am
committed to helping solve the world's greatest problem -
spirtual lostness - by supporting the Lottie Moon Christmas
Offering, which ensures that the International Mission Board can
send and sustain a growing missionary presence among the
unengaged and unreached people groups."

Your
validation of this commitment not only empowers our missionary
teams but also gives voice to the significance of the Lottie Moon
Christmas Offering within our community.

Pledge
your support today by signing our declaration.

Together,
let's bring the gospel message of Jesus to those who have yet to
hear it.

In His
service,

Emily
Hall
Prayer
Content Specialist
IMB
Prayer Office

International Mission Board | 3806 Monument Ave. Richmond, VA
23230 | (804) 353-0515

name: Maria Montero
subject: Montero Campaign Updates January 13
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF MARIA MONTERO
body:
ICYMI
| | | |

| Maria's Community Champions
---

---
| What's an entrepreneur to do when Bidenomics is in town?
On Friday, January 12, Joe Biden and his failed economic policy tour caused major traffic jams in Pennsylvania's 7th Congressional District. It seems a path of disarray ensues wherever his policies go. So, what's a pro-small business advocate to do? WE RALLY! Maria met with and was endorsed by a strong contingency of small business owners through PA-7 who are at end of their rope because of the devastating effects of Bidenomics. In speaking with everyday business owners it is clear:

1. Costs of doing business have risen over 40%
2. Crime is rampant
3. Filling job openings is a pervasive challenge

These entrepreneurs and small business owners are supporting Maria because she has been working in private sector over 20 years, has been an advocate of small businesses her entire career, and they understand we must elect more small business people and advocates who know first-hand the challenges that must overcome to be prosperous.
Small businesses play a vital role in Pennsylvania's economy accounting for 99.6% of businesses in the Commonwealth, employing over 2.5 million individuals. Everyday people are struggling and Bidenomcs is not the answer to our economic woes. Maria believes lowering taxes, eliminating overregulation, and maintaining safe environments where businesses can thrive is the jump start needed to create a fertile environment for small businesses to thrive and grow.
"The American dream of human progress through freedom and equality of opportunity in competitive enterprise is still the most revolutionary idea in the world today. It's also the most successful." -Ronald Reagan

name: April Cao
subject: He fought for all of us
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hung Cao for Virginia
body:
| | | Peter, My husband Hung may have just announced his run for U.S. Senate last year, but his journey to this moment started over 25 years ago.

He served as a U.S. Navy Captain in some of the most dangerous corners of the world fighting for our freedom after immigrating to the United States from Vietnam.

Hung came to our country when he was just four years old, but by the time he grew up, he knew he owed his life to our country’s freedoms - and that’s why he dedicated it to defending them.

Now that Hung has retired his Navy uniform, he’s taking on a new mission: fighting tyrannical socialism here at home.

I’ve never met anyone more dedicated to defending the American Dream than my husband, and I’ll do whatever it takes to fight by his side.

**[Can you do me a huge favor and endorse Hung’s campaign for U.S. Senate in Virginia today?](http://links.hungcaoforva.com/u/click?_t=c514f30bd6cd4b1bb0e09a0456675c53&_m=955e4007b73441249f9fb06bf93007fc&_e=vJ5nIAT5AvpC0x0ed029BcAoQ8aeFsVRzKmiIBqXDPY1L6LTbjz0Aja7lrCQJzxMLfwZXhNZFUW1GbWBFmpgmLIlAQ0l0oJZDtARySTaXXtEE-eICuiu-zOVk773_oeTtXPTfaJefQ5vvl0YLx1YnjYp3PN14FlFm3g0P42iicDtvM7sufovami4QMhso7Jc9NV4bGefynYC0rXbRvUKYqMnHL2Dm2OfRT9p7-fyHxAnsTEQFlZp2a8w2WaXfHjLrStv5U3gF6fryUR61xcnbjSFhVwYLEA588bDAQYANYogpApsPsjgmySFzkLEni3MZp1APb6rcRqh3rrecTpCYe_Rttcr3H7J-_InvTW5TSwVDAwguZn1HE_5-PIv0CS6)**

clean_body: | | | Peter, My husband Hung may have just announced his run for U.S. Senate last year, but his journey to this moment started over 25 years ago. He served as a U.S. Navy Captain in some of the most dangerous corners of the world fighting for our freedom after immigrating to the United States from Vietnam. Hung came to our country when he was just four years old, but by the time he grew up, he knew he owed his life to our country’s freedoms - and that’s why he dedicated it to defending them. Now that Hung has retired his Navy uniform, he’s taking on a new mission: fighting tyrannical socialism here at home. I’ve never met anyone more dedicated to defending the American Dream than my husband, and I’ll do whatever it takes to fight by his side. He’s spent his life defending our freedom. Now, it’s time for us to stand by his side. Thank you, April Cao | TEXT HUNG TO 21412 | Hung knows the American Dream is worth saving - because he’s lived it. | More about Russell Prescott: A New Hampshire native of the Seacoast, Russell Prescott grew up in Exeter and currently lives in Kingston. For several decades, he was the co-owner and vice-president of R.E. Prescott Company, a wholesale distributor and manufacturer of water treatment systems. He purchased the business in 2020 and is now the president and sole owner.
Russell practiced Professional Engineering for 30 years and designs many of the products his company manufactures. As a result, he holds several patents for removing arsenic and radon from water. The company, founded in 1954 by his father, employs approximately 50 people and has operated in the same Exeter building since 1963.
Wanting to give back to his community, Prescott served five terms as a New Hampshire State Senator, being first elected in 2000 for two terms. He was re-elected in 2010, 2012, and again in 2014. As Senator, he represented Senate Districts 19 and 23, including towns from Newmarket to Plaistow and Derry to Seabrook.
Prescott was then twice elected to the Executive Council, once in 2016 and again in 2018. He decided to retire from the Executive Council in 2021 after purchasing his company.
Russell enjoys home restoration and recently finished a restoration of a 1737 colonial barn and grist mill in his town. His community service included Exeter Rotary Club, Kingston Lions Club, and the board of directors for the Exeter Area Chamber of Commerce.
He and his wife, Susan, have been married for 41 years, and they have five grown children and seven grandchildren. Following in their grandfather's and father's footsteps, his oldest three children are heavily involved with the daily operation and vision of the family business.

name: Team WisGOP
subject: WisGOP Update 1.12.24
body:
No images? [Click here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-e-xtkdtit-didthutlhu-jl/) [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtkdtit-didthutlhu-r/) **January 12, 2024** Friend -The New Year is in full swing, and we at the Republican Party of Wisconsin are excited to see what 2024 holds! Read our latest update below!-Team WisGOP | Despite efforts by the Democrat Party to bar Former President Donald Trump from appearing on the primary ballot, Wisconsin's Presidential Preference Selection Committee [voted unanimously ](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtkdtit-didthutlhu-y/)to approve both party candidate lists. Six candidates will appear on the Republican primary ballot: Former President Donald Trump, Florida Gov. Ron DeSantis, Former U.N. Ambassador and South Carolina Gov. Nikki Haley, Entrepreneur Vivek Ramaswamy, Former New Jersey Gov. Chris Christie, Former Arkansas Gov. Asa Hutchinson. Since the Committee met, Gov. Christie has suspended his campaign and may have his name removed from the ballot.Trump's inclusion on the primary ballot demonstrates a concerted effort by Republican leaders in Wisconsin to respect the United States Constitution. American citizens deserve the right to make their voices heard at election time, and the Republican Party worked to protect the democratic process from extremists on the left who would have kept him off the ballot.
---

[](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtkdtit-didthutlhu-j/) As the New Year kicks off, supporting and participating in the GOP's Bank Your Vote campaign is more important than ever! With skyrocketing inflation, out-of-control crime in our cities, and chaos at the Southern border it is more important than ever to elect a Republican into office. Click [here](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtkdtit-didthutlhu-t/) to listen to a message from Chairman Brian Schimming on how important it is to 'bank your vote' this election and what the Republican Party is doing to protect that vote. [](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtkdtit-didthutlhu-i/) In order to take back the White House, we are relying on loyal Republican voters to sign up for absentee ballots. With over 5,000 poll worker nominations, the Republican Party of Wisconsin has worked to ensure that your vote will be secure and counted in the upcoming election. We aren't done yet! Poll worker recruiting with virtual training is set to take place every Monday. More information is on the way! [BECOME A POLL OBSERVER](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtkdtit-didthutlhu-d/)
---

# **In Case You Missed It**
**[WisGOP Chair Schimming Named to Republican Mayors Association National Board](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtkdtit-didthutlhu-h/)**
The Republican Party of Wisconsin announced that Chairman Brian Schimming was appointed by the Republican Mayors Association to serve as an inaugural member of the RMA National Board.
**[ICYMI: Biden-Baldwin Border Crisis Hits Wisconsin](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtkdtit-didthutlhu-k/) **
In case you missed it, the Biden-Baldwin border crisis has hit Whitewater, Wisconsin, as the unchecked wave of migrants overwhelms communities far north of the Rio Grande.
**[Bidenflation is Still Biting American Wallets](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtkdtit-didthutlhu-u/) **
Despite absurd spin from the White House, costs are not going down. Prices are higher under Biden, and Americans know it.
**[The Republican Point: Secure the Border Instead of Closing Schools](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtkdtit-didthutlhu-o/) **
Democrats would rather kick military families out of hotel rooms and lock children out of schools than secure the border.
**[The Republican Point: 5 Takeaways From This Week](https://republicanpartyofwisconsin.cmail19.com/t/y-l-xtkdtit-didthutlhu-b/) **
"Gotta Do Something"
Biden Administration Caught Lying
The Debt is How Much?!
A Harvard Resignation
Bank Your Vote

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b1c33cca4423e926c157c47c339c5e3720005aed815de9ead99042dfa847c4f8817b72952079e13403d6a40fb8bf61617b51fff3619ff4a8

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=b1c33cca4423e926c157c47c339c5e3720005aed815de9ead99042dfa847c4f8817b72952079e13403d6a40fb8bf61617b51fff3619ff4a8

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

clean_body: To view this email as a web page, go to the link below, or copy and paste it into your browser's address window. Friend, Since the first day of this campaign, Ron DeSantis has hit back against the media hard to expose the lies they've peddled. Now, we have until Monday to take our one shot to show the nation that our team is willing to stand up and fight when it matters most. Show your support HERE before the Iowa Caucuses! We've been the target; It's time to be the champion. The media has been denying the fact that Ron DeSantis is the biggest threat to the Democratic party in this race, but with your help, we will shut down this lie for good when our team takes to the caucuses and shows our strength. We have until Monday to make sure Iowans that they won't be fighting alone. HELP GOVERNOR DESANTIS FIGHT BACK! CHIP IN $5 CHIP IN $15 CHIP IN $25 CHIP IN $50 We have to raise as much support as we can to prove once and for all that false narratives, baseless claims, and blatant lies cannot take down America's choice. name: JusticeDemocrats.com
subject: re: How AIPAC is buying support for genocide
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS
body:
[1]Justice Democrats

Peter,

A new FEC filing shows that anti-Palestinian, GOP-funded group AIPAC spent
a record amount of money last November, dropping MILLIONS in a single
month.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240113.82acg1&refcode=em20240113-32793&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1001&akid=32793%2E1203867%2E3bYXn8 ]Tweet by Sludge: AIPAC showered donations on House members in November
as Congress tussled over aid packages for Israel: - Ritchie Torres:
$202,000 - Hakeem Jeffries: $200,000 - Gregory Meeks: $151,000 - Debbie
Wasserman Schultz: $141,000 More on AIPAC’s record giving:

It’s obvious why: AIPAC made massive campaign contributions to their
biggest allies — like Democrats Ritchie Torres and Hakeem Jeffries — right
as Congress was voting on whether or not to send more military aid to
Israel while its army continues its all-out assault on Palestinians.

They’re buying votes to support genocide.

AIPAC has long bought loyalty and influence in Congress, resulting in our
government’s unconditional support and funding of Israel’s human rights
abuses.

Justice Democrats’ leaders like Cori Bush, Rashida Tlaib, Summer Lee,
Jamaal Bowman, and Ilhan Omar are leading the call for a permanent
ceasefire and the human rights of Palestinians, in spite of AIPAC’s plans
to spend $100 million to oust them this year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240113.82acg1&refcode=em20240113-32793&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1002&akid=32793%2E1203867%2E3bYXn8 ]Help us keep up the fight against AIPAC’s attacks and support our
progressive incumbents standing on the right side of history: pitch in
$3 or more to fuel our work to re-elect the Squad this
year.

[ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jdem-20240113.82acg1&refcode=em20240113-32793&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=3&t=1021&akid=32793%2E1203867%2E3bYXn8 ]Contribute $3

We can’t afford to lose these courageous leaders who are unafraid of
pushing back against AIPAC and challenging the status quo. Thanks for
anything you can give to support us in this critical moment.

— Justice Democrats

Do not worry if you cannot afford to make a contribution — we understand that
this is a difficult time.

There are other ways to make an impact in support of peace and equality in
Israel and Palestine: please urge your member of Congress to support a
ceasefire through [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139873?t=1022&akid=32793%2E1203867%2E3bYXn8 ]Adalah Justice Project’s petition or by calling them
using [ https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/139874?t=1023&akid=32793%2E1203867%2E3bYXn8 ]Jewish Voice for Peace’s dialer here. Your voice matters in this
critical moment.

Contribute to Justice Democrats: https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20240113-32793-footer&t=1024&refcode2=32793_1203867_3bYXn8&akid=32793%2E1203867%2E3bYXn8

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe: https://go.justicedemocrats.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=1025&akid=32793%2E1203867%2E3bYXn8

PAID FOR BY JUSTICE DEMOCRATS. Not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee.
Justice Democrats
1390 Columbia Ave #261
Lancaster PA 17603
Email us: us@justicedemocrats.com

name: Dr. Cornel West
subject: Watch Today's Livestream of Our March for Gaza!
body:
At 1pm ET, you can follow the live stream of this historic event.

| | | [ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=psQUkJGc26u6Wi0imicX-00jZnUVaZYVu06OFU-xtOc&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_on_dc_for_gaza_livestrea&n=1)
---
Dear Peter, Today marks a significant moment in our ongoing pursuit of truth and justice. [At 1pm EST, our march for Gaza begins in Washington, DC.](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=GQ96LxW7tJscudkL8mlwNzVEKXk7dMDJzwJlfbbiiRYkmzSW4_jsGsBpiB2AVAH-&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_on_dc_for_gaza_livestrea&n=2) This national rally, a collective call for an immediate, permanent ceasefire and an end to U.S. complicity in the tragedy, represents our shared commitment to these critical ideals. **If you cannot join us in person, we encourage you to stand with us in spirit by following the live stream of this historic event.**
---
| [](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=rnE9YhnYr4J_7Au8CsjhkBT_0nZMcRofm2lbqlJw05mUYxqGvwSnUQtYlzg59ZaDfPqDHi92U2ViryriSYItnQ&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_on_dc_for_gaza_livestrea&n=3 "CLICK HERE TO WATCH THE LIVESTREAM") [CLICK HERE TO WATCH THE LIVESTREAM](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=rnE9YhnYr4J_7Au8CsjhkBT_0nZMcRofm2lbqlJw05mUYxqGvwSnUQtYlzg59ZaDfPqDHi92U2ViryriSYItnQ&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_on_dc_for_gaza_livestrea&n=3)
---
Your participation, be it on the ground or online, will strengthen our collective effort. United, we raise a powerful voice for peace. In Solidarity and Hope, Team Cornel West 2024
---
[ ](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/r?u=rnE9YhnYr4J_7Au8CsjhkBT_0nZMcRofm2lbqlJw05mUYxqGvwSnUQtYlzg59ZaDfPqDHi92U2ViryriSYItnQ&e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_on_dc_for_gaza_livestrea&n=4)
---
Cornel West for President · 420 N McKinley St, Ste 111-512, Corona, CA 92879, United States
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com · [Unsubscribe](https://www.cornelwest2024.com/unsubscribe?e=2c4ab4fbefc09c0d9c12f8df438b31c5&utm_source=cornelwest&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=march_on_dc_for_gaza_livestrea&n=5)
---

name: GallegoForArizona.com
subject: If you knew $3 would defeat Donald Trump and Kari Lake in Arizona, wouldn’t you chip in?
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
I never thought that hundreds of thousands of people from all over the country would support me.
#

$3.
That’s what we’re asking for. Yes, just $3.
If you knew $3 would guarantee Ruben Gallego takes back Arizona’s seat from Kyrsten Sinema, wouldn’t you chip in?
If you knew $3 would help defeat both Kari Lake and Donald Trump in Arizona, and send them both to the dustbin of history, wouldn’t that be the best $3 you ever spent?
$3 might not seem like the amount of money that can do either of those things.
But a few people have already chipped in their $3 by the time you’ve read this far. They’re hoping you’ll do the same.
Because with your $3 and more from hundreds and thousands of others we can build a winning campaign. It can help us turn around the polls showing Ruben trailing Kari Lake.
And if we can beat Kari Lake, it’s all the more likely that we’ll beat Trump in Arizona, too.
So please, before our mid-month deadline in a few days, chip in. Help send a message to Kari Lake and Donald Trump: They will never, ever win in Arizona. Not while we’re around.
[**Please make that $3 contribution before our mid-month fundraising drive ends this Tuesday. Help us hit our goals. Help Ruben win.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240113-1-30&t=1&akid=1710%2E734936%2ExhiNRG)

name: Team NPP
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the New Pennsylvania Project__
body:
There’s hope to raise the minimum wage in PA.

[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77018501/449123789/-1739567893?refcode=EM_F_240113wage_N_TN_90DO_7_NG_N_LOGO&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmYmJkZjk0LTI2YjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SxRcZZx_cWs-XKumbKmcfLJK9YsVhO13hmTpDxwGsQg=)
| Team,

This month, 22 states boosted their minimum wages. Our neighbors, Maryland and New Jersey are going to $15 an hour. New York is increasing to $16, **_more than double Pennsylvania’s current minimum wage of $7.25._**

**_Despite_** President Biden stating that workers are the engines of our economy and that raising the minimum wage would uplift workers...

**_Despite_** Governor Shapiro arguing that $7.25 an hour is not a liveable wage...

**_Despite_** 73% of Pennsylvanians supporting a path to increase the minimum wage to $15 an hour, according to a poll from Keystone Research...

**Republicans in the PA State Senate have continually blocked attempts to raise the minimum wage in Pennsylvania.** However, we have hope:

This November, as HALF the PA State Senate and the ENTIRE PA House are on the ballot, **we have a unique opportunity to elect a majority that will pass legislation to raise our minimum wage** , defend abortion access, uplift voters, protect our democracy, and more.

[**We need to start registering voters NOW so they will head out to the polls in November. Raising the minimum wage is far overdue, and that can only happen if we work to elect representatives who will fight _for_ the people, not against them. Will you help us get started by rushing $20.24 to fund our work today?**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77018505/449123792/-1739567893?refcode=EM_F_240113wage_N_TN_90DO_7_NG_N_L1&amount=20.24&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmYmJkZjk0LTI2YjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SxRcZZx_cWs-XKumbKmcfLJK9YsVhO13hmTpDxwGsQg=) __If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately.__ | | [**$25 »**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77018511/449123796/-1739567893?refcode=EM_F_240113wage_N_TN_90DO_7_NG_N_EB25&express_lane=true&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9BVi9BVjAwMS8xLzkwOTIwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBmYmJkZjk0LTI2YjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=SxRcZZx_cWs-XKumbKmcfLJK9YsVhO13hmTpDxwGsQg=)

clean_body: There’s hope to raise the minimum wage in PA. = | Team, This month, 22 states boosted their minimum wages. Our neighbors, Maryland and New Jersey are going to $15 an hour. New York is increasing to $16, more than double Pennsylvania’s current minimum wage of $7.25. Despite President Biden stating that workers are the engines of our economy and that raising the minimum wage would uplift workers... Despite Governor Shapiro arguing that $7.25 an hour is not a liveable wage... Despite 73% of Pennsylvanians supporting a path to increase the minimum wage to $15 an hour, according to a poll from Keystone Research... Republicans in the PA State Senate have continually blocked attempts to raise the minimum wage in Pennsylvania. However, we have hope: This November, as HALF the PA State Senate and the ENTIRE PA House are on the ballot, we have a unique opportunity to elect a majority that will pass legislation to raise our minimum wage , defend abortion access, uplift voters, protect our democracy, and more. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately. | | = | | = | = | | = | = | | = Thank you, Team NPP The New Pennsylvania Project (NPP) is a voting rights organization with a year-round primary focus on voter registration, civic education, and mobilization. NPP centers historically disenfranchised and often neglected Black, Indigenous and other people of color, immigrant communities and the youth in our work. Through civic engagement, we ensure all eligible voters feel compelled to exercise their freedom to vote in the Commonwealth. = || || || New Pennsylvania Project PO Box 443 West Chester, PA 19381 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please. to receive fewer emails from us. to stop receiving any fundraising emails from us. name: Bob Casey
subject: Our Nation’s democracy is only as strong as those willing to defend it
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
# [](https://go.bobcasey.com/go/181?t=1&akid=1680%2E552475%2EPapkAQ)
Peter,
I’m going to be straightforward with you: The fate of our democracy is at risk.
Across the Nation, far-right Republicans are undermining our elections, embracing Trump’s Big Lie, and cozying up to insurrectionists – including my opponent, David McCormick.
McCormick has been endorsed by a number of election deniers and insurrectionists. He’s had President Trump’s fake electors on his campaign payroll, and one is even running his PAC.
Pennsylvania is the birthplace of American democracy. We simply cannot afford to lose this seat to those who will work to undermine it – but that’s the risk we face this November.
[**Our Nation’s democracy is only as strong as those willing to defend it, and David McCormick has made it clear that he won’t. Please, if you can, chip in $5 or more to defend this seat and our democracy.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240113-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240113-1&refcode2=1680_552475_PapkAQ&akid=1680%2E552475%2EPapkAQ)
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._
[Donate $15 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240113-1?recurring=1&amount=15&refcode=em20240113-1-el&refcode2=1680_552475_PapkAQ&akid=1680%2E552475%2EPapkAQ) [Donate $25 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240113-1?recurring=1&amount=25&refcode=em20240113-1-el&refcode2=1680_552475_PapkAQ&akid=1680%2E552475%2EPapkAQ) [Donate $50 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240113-1?recurring=1&amount=50&refcode=em20240113-1-el&refcode2=1680_552475_PapkAQ&akid=1680%2E552475%2EPapkAQ) [Donate $100 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240113-1?recurring=1&amount=100&refcode=em20240113-1-el&refcode2=1680_552475_PapkAQ&akid=1680%2E552475%2EPapkAQ) [Donate $250 ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240113-1?recurring=1&amount=250&refcode=em20240113-1-el&refcode2=1680_552475_PapkAQ&akid=1680%2E552475%2EPapkAQ) [Other amount ››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240113-1?recurring=1&refcode=em20240113-1&refcode2=1680_552475_PapkAQ&akid=1680%2E552475%2EPapkAQ)

With gratitude,
Bob Casey

Friend, President Biden is racking up victories for American families left and right:
* He passed **the Inflation Reduction Act** — a HISTORIC investment in our economy and the fight against climate change.

* He secured the most substantial **gun violence prevention reform** in decades, making our communities safer.

* He oversaw **unprecedented levels of job creation** and drove the unemployment rate down to a historic low.

**But with the GOP’s Iowa Caucus and debates this month, President Biden’s GOP rivals will be attacking his agenda at every chance they get. ****According to our records, you're an active Democrat in OH, so we're reaching out for your input. Please, respond before midnight to tell us:**

subject: A bit about me

body:
There has been a lot of noise around our race since Lauren Boebert jumped in. Although it’s important to remember that we have to do everything we can to ensure Boebert does not win this race to represent CD-4, it’s also important for me to remind you all who I am and why I’m even running for Congress in the first place.
__ | | | [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=b5d6b895dc3f480ab8df462ecb3bea62&_e=YDtzty_cII0OLRSAhoG1ESsHKEbAwXdunLTeTWToSQuBMMAWWKGFoYoG38r32zeynshW6qcmDKzzk90Mst76jABfbNNgs7b2XtwJJY7L8KPHYfnO0Dspd-jbXKz3E2pRItdjLKp67pgNmWGqj3z_OBkWT5b_XSyWtE7gEtPT3eija-lcs7ilB-xTpks3jlKNPb4Z6caBjPgsnrZ2ifgseC5MlZ5IsE8rsl1WgvJB9xRhP5AG4jzEmYnS8I_KPAoraYRG_z_RyuFZXE2u-SsdYcfM_wmsdDO0zT6GO-CcybyFImD72z2P5Hw3pK0r829PXRKz4AvJbMgBykuWK9_l23xeKijvqYR6O-MkeJ6s59vpTkNC25Z_0iSeTc2DkgMhnn2L33qFjelXAJNS1LZeepWKMNa7CLhwcyCKvexqtNk%3D) Friends, There has been a lot of noise around our race since Lauren Boebert jumped in. Although it’s important to remember that we have to do everything we can to ensure Boebert does not win this race to represent CD-4, it’s also important for me to remind you all who I am and why I’m even running for Congress in the first place. **I’m John, and I’m a father, husband, engineer, environmental scientist, and addiction/recovery advocate. ** [](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=b5d6b895dc3f480ab8df462ecb3bea62&_e=YDtzty_cII0OLRSAhoG1ESsHKEbAwXdunLTeTWToSQuBMMAWWKGFoYoG38r32zeynshW6qcmDKzzk90Mst76jABfbNNgs7b2XtwJJY7L8KPHYfnO0Dspd-jbXKz3E2pRItdjLKp67pgNmWGqj3z_OBkWT5b_XSyWtE7gEtPT3eija-lcs7ilB-xTpks3jlKNPb4Z6caBjPgsnrZ2ifgseC5MlZ5IsE8rsl1WgvJB9xRhP5AG4jzEmYnS8I_KPAorGwSvww-s5bebt-2mKuzsoqZEfCMlX0aRSAT_8wrlqCuVD11no638p65zKIKjpZR9eutkBC5EVwcAHPk0kmNa6rOWBvkQYNiHxkbi9Jvmi4pj1P792XnMUG3Vx7ADWJxVlx0TVFPTSW_uaqLHncKteoyfdXkpw0J4bKFB1OSevlk%3D) I’m running because I love this community, and I know we deserve more from our representatives in Congress. Our seniors deserve to grow old with dignity, our young people should be able to buy a home and build a family, and our kids deserve a future full of opportunities. And they should all be able to do so in Colorado’s 4th District. Washington is broken, and we all feel the impact of this dysfunction. We need better leadership, free from division and inaction. Our representatives should be working to deliver results, not to make headlines and line their pockets with dollars from special interest groups. I know we can win this race, and defeat the type of extremism that Lauren Boebert represents. _**But I can’t do it alone. **_ [**That’s why I’m reaching out to ask if you’ll chip in $10 to my campaign today.**](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=b5d6b895dc3f480ab8df462ecb3bea62&_e=YDtzty_cII0OLRSAhoG1ESsHKEbAwXdunLTeTWToSQuBMMAWWKGFoYoG38r32zeynshW6qcmDKzzk90Mst76jABfbNNgs7b2XtwJJY7L8KPHYfnO0Dspd-jbXKz3E2pRItdjLKp67pgNmWGqj3z_OBkWT5b_XSyWtE7gEtPT3eija-lcs7ilB-xTpks3jlKNPb4Z6caBjPgsnrZ2ifgseC5MlZ5IsE8rsl1WgvJB9xRhP5AG4jzEmYnS8I_KPAortkm6OMCMSGDcGeCqoW6lfYXY4Vese4YkLM0hFNgDpUFP3IwOEGAzIA9Ph9ZWkNEboJgtqFdZBkf7697REMICYkyy70kKz_3y3HzOyi0IpS18xuqYoKrMfZMmO_MjOL0uGk2SiQuWTjIKxO9YZVnGLqVcYillAtJOLw1Fid6L70s%3D) While $10 may not seem like much, every little bit goes a long way in a grassroots campaign like ours. Even since Boebert announced she was moving districts, we’ve been able to raise over $50k with the average donation at just $30.32. It’s remarkable what can be done when everyone chips in what they can. **[So, if you can, consider chipping into my campaign today to keep extremists like Lauren Boebert OUT of our district. ](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=b5d6b895dc3f480ab8df462ecb3bea62&_e=YDtzty_cII0OLRSAhoG1ESsHKEbAwXdunLTeTWToSQuBMMAWWKGFoYoG38r32zeynshW6qcmDKzzk90Mst76jABfbNNgs7b2XtwJJY7L8KPHYfnO0Dspd-jbXKz3E2pRItdjLKp67pgNmWGqj3z_OBkWT5b_XSyWtE7gEtPT3eija-lcs7ilB-xTpks3jlKNPb4Z6caBjPgsnrZ2ifgseC5MlZ5IsE8rsl1WgvJB9xRhP5AG4jzEmYnS8I_KPAorXQBm397xDPRYbsdM5nTuKjHhX8BgV_xbH8VmUg0EOaHs8gtN3_9pGfXKYLRajIluZgldh9P1X-EwIJYVwwv3j43EGIJaiSl_9hFkbURInHUplV7bkBnAE3UoxiZB8BMs5yx5StPsvTENb4PDxEdJWelslbxTFOQJTLQMQlxjw-E%3D)** I hope to make you proud. John I'm John Padora, a Democrat running for Congress in CO-04. Lauren Boebert recently jumped into my district in a desperate attempt to stay in DC. My campaign is powered by grassroots donations - donate anything you can monthly to keep Boebert OUT of this seat. [WEBSITE](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=b5d6b895dc3f480ab8df462ecb3bea62&_e=YDtzty_cII0OLRSAhoG1ER7J2bdnSFe2NjofUq3dXmoYUgevTX95d2iAhZakmVHE1Rr6GWP89_WunF4POUet-nSZGvvN0gX--q0j9cjpKlg8wI3bRE4A6W6GlfeDQ2zxCmaz9ZbOd4SKAueQY7Ycnh9UqaIY7DPcGBSvYKKJ7I8dSlIocb5s-7pmSdwvunHVdHu0CNceQ71AIPkeC_w8GA%3D%3D) [DONATE MONTHLY](http://links.padoraforcongress.com/u/click?_t=1632d2fd715245289db23a5b99e588cb&_m=b5d6b895dc3f480ab8df462ecb3bea62&_e=YDtzty_cII0OLRSAhoG1ESsHKEbAwXdunLTeTWToSQuBMMAWWKGFoYoG38r32zeynshW6qcmDKzzk90Mst76jABfbNNgs7b2XtwJJY7L8KPHYfnO0Dspd-jbXKz3E2pRItdjLKp67pgNmWGqj3z_OBkWT5b_XSyWtE7gEtPT3eija-lcs7ilB-xTpks3jlKNPb4Z6caBjPgsnrZ2ifgseC5MlZ5IsE8rsl1WgvJB9xRhP5AG4jzEmYnS8I_KPAorje7kkki4kYJphNl0-aVSnNnK8OOrTN6ATMkGfamUBI8q-YgLyExCnp1CW5kFW-fopCQ3L7dGYG8Da24xNT2pTZ8ikdQM5amkvgrOdpHyDjMKA_-isFUZ2-HURj_9PIW-4HOO8M2OPe9wGF4peXQrPIDGNHucfAmIaZK8QBO4Olnlh4JJYwg36KhOp6xFJkNa) Paid for by Padora for Colorado

name: Ilhan Omar HQ
subject: Seven months from today
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY ILHAN FOR CONGRESS
body:
Take a minute and imagine this in your head...
# [](https://act.ilhanomar.com/go/35?t=1&akid=855%2E791427%2EOl-nyn)

Take a minute and imagine this in your head — it's August 13, 2024.
Primary election day in Minnesota. Seven months from today.
The polls have been open for a few hours, and voters all across the district are lined up, ready to cast their ballots.
Grassroots volunteers from Team Ilhan are out knocking on doors, making phone calls, and talking to people about our movement's fight for justice.
Now... What if we told you that your $3 contribution _today_ would make the difference when polls close on that primary night?
We already know here in January that our campaign will be facing millions of dollars in outside super PAC money. We know that the right wing will do and spend whatever it takes to try and defeat us, and we know it's going to take a LOT of resources to fight back against it all.
But we _also_ know that if we all stand together, and do everything we can between now and August 13, we'll win. Plain and simple.
That's why we're asking:

The polls have been open for a few hours, and voters all across the district are lined up, ready to cast their ballots. Grassroots volunteers from Team Ilhan are out knocking on doors, making phone calls, and talking to people about our movement's fight for justice. Now... What if we told you that your $3 contribution today would make the difference when polls close on that primary night? body:

**_Chuck Schumer_** emailed you.
**_Elizabeth Warren_** emailed you.
And now **_I've_** emailed you, too!

All of us have emailed _YOU_ because far-right Republican wackos are racking up _millions_ from BIG money donors to take back the Senate this year. There are simply no ifs, ands, or buts about it: **If we lose the Senate, we’re toast!**

But even after _all_ of these Democrats warned you just how freakin’ HUGE the stakes are, we’re still scary short of our fundraising goal ahead of our critical mid-month deadline to save the Senate.

**Trust me, I’ve seen more than enough elections to tell you: We need grassroots supporters like you to step up _RIGHT NOW_ or the consequences could be disastrous!**

clean_body: | | | I don’t know what else to tell you, team: President Biden emailed you. Vice President Harris emailed you. Chuck Schumer emailed you. Elizabeth Warren emailed you. And now I've emailed you, too! All of us have emailed YOU because far-right Republican wackos are racking up millions from BIG money donors to take back the Senate this year. There are simply no ifs, ands, or buts about it: If we lose the Senate, we’re toast! But even after all of these Democrats warned you just how freakin’ HUGE the stakes are, we’re still scary short of our fundraising goal ahead of our critical mid-month deadline to save the Senate. Trust me, I’ve seen more than enough elections to tell you: We need grassroots supporters like you to step up RIGHT NOW or the consequences could be disastrous! If you've saved payment info with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. The first $10,000 received from this email will be TRIPLED: | | | | | Your support couldn’t be more important. Thank you! \- James Derivative of by JD Lasica. . [](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=ffd4fdb4201d424cb800bd37427c2381&_e=Lw4Yq1DE6dhiSrdaf6TcwMBo9JpUVRV-b1uMkwm87VmCKWfDjFjAVu2HAh_HqlNwvjxguFnHfWdiiaokA5fWOL3lTygHvGNGnEIx6illg_WDaiWnQ1OiwOEenwfZQUjvjFJ66FYoo0Zti8Ruw3oZ87jmJ0_pCwEN1vAS7pSJ7z2_JOi404i0gq8YpICUmpB_Ml5Eu8nv-YeRKWDHRNdCteTCxKCr0NxV-q1klxJA_dBF_LXNhKa3NKKz6bJVr0L8MrKJV53MZR-1pvAlkRyUQc__PsPKJraAafYmq7VidtSHObuzKom3cJudD2YDk2U2-UzWJD0ef22M128ZTsfMjX0TYDb5fQ0MKyfIag2FTH1hSNh5_Lz_7gHttsEatVjejYFwlaTJ8pOJ-D6Bm2a4iA%3D%3D)
We started this campaign in February, just under a year ago, with the promise to always speak the **TRUTH** and unify this country under one American identity. We quickly qualified for every debate and became the target of the Establishment. We declared this election our 1776 moment and grew our campaign with the most small-dollar donors and first-time supporters of a GOP candidate.

**In Iowa, I became the first Presidential candidate in history to visit all 99 counties – twice over. You have my word, Fellow American, that I will continue to rise to any challenge and always be a champion for the American dream.**

**In just 2 days, I hope you’re ready to shock the system and continue making history. I am ready to lead this country and restore American excellence.[Can I count on you to make a small first caucus pledge of $5 to my campaign and join the movement to revolutionize the way government works?](http://links.vivek2024.com/u/click?_t=07471d1165224e98aee1aca8cd71f6e2&_m=ffd4fdb4201d424cb800bd37427c2381&_e=Lw4Yq1DE6dhiSrdaf6TcwMBo9JpUVRV-b1uMkwm87VmCKWfDjFjAVu2HAh_HqlNwvjxguFnHfWdiiaokA5fWOL3lTygHvGNGnEIx6illg_WDaiWnQ1OiwOEenwfZQUjvjFJ66FYoo0Zti8Ruw3oZ87jmJ0_pCwEN1vAS7pSJ7z2_JOi404i0gq8YpICUmpB_Ml5Eu8nv-YeRKWDHRNdCteTCxKCr0NxV-q1klxJA_dCaHs60hI4-QO8D_92UGomG8piJ2O08KUufDefjDjA4SbZItlFY0GumfM9awMtKJs5suNeb_VohVZrkstrR76oJ2l-rTIu4RGXTz_g-u7FmeE4XwDd_v9yS50K3UeBLISS8i82Xoe802s7_-Szt04ZP4FQWVuAgdPRD48fs26HqEw%3D%3D)**

**GET TO KNOW VIVEK:** Vivek is an American entrepreneur, political and cultural thought leader, and New York Times bestselling author of **_Woke, Inc.: Inside Corporate America's Social Justice Scam_** , along with his second book, **_Nation of Victims: Identity Politics, the Death of Merit, and the Path Back to Excellence_**.

He has been a prominent and outspoken critic against ESG, discriminatory practices under the guise of critical race theory, and of what he calls "government-tech censorship," where the government colludes with big tech to do through the backdoor what it couldn't do through the front door under the Constitution.

Vivek is a first-generation American. Growing up in the Cincinnati area, he often recounts the sage advice he received from his father that "If you're going to stand out, then you might as well be outstanding." This advice set the course for his life: an accomplished pianist, a nationally ranked tennis player, and the valedictorian of his Jesuit high school. He went on to graduate summa cum laude in Biology from Harvard in 2007 and received his J.D. degree from Yale Law School in 2013, worked at a hedge fund, then started a pharmaceutical company, Roivant Sciences, where his team developed five drugs that went on to become FDA-approved.

In 2022, he founded Strive Asset Management, an Ohio-based firm, that takes direct aim at asset managers like BlackRock, State Street, Vanguard and others for their fiduciary breach of duty to maximize the wealth of their clients for Wokeism. Strive's mission is to restore the voices of everyday citizens in the American economy by leading companies to focus on excellence over politics.

[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77020346/449128114/-531765509?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDMxYjdhYS0yOGIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QM-xG1S4FBOZyvIQ4lBxV5YZEzuAQ-IRm48rG6NIHok=&emci=081e5f8c-38ae-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=3031b7aa-28b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=10203249) Team, In 2016, when I served as Pennsylvania Auditor General, I began an audit of Real Alternatives, a so-called “crisis pregnancy” organization that had received millions in PA taxpayer money for more than a decade. Not long after, Real Alternatives sued me — all in an attempt to block our office from exposing the organization’s history of waste, fraud and abuse of taxpayer money. But I didn’t let that court battle stop me. I uncovered Real Alternatives’ outrageous practice of using Pennsylvania tax dollars to fund activities in other states, I exposed the organization’s bogus fees, and I brought to light their fraudulent treatment of PA women and families. [_**You deserve an Attorney General who will fight day in and day out for your rights, no matter the obstacles. I’ve done it before, and I’ll continue as your Attorney General. After a lengthy battle, I’m proud to say: **Pennsylvania has now terminated its funding for Real Alternatives.**
I believe Pennsylvania taxpayers should always know where their money is going — and organizations or politicians who misuse taxpayer dollars need to face the consequences. That’s why I’m so proud of my record as Auditor General of Pennsylvania — and it’s why I’m prepared to take on more big fights as Pennsylvania’s next Attorney General.
I’m running for Attorney General to put the people of Pennsylvania first, not special interests or partisan agendas. And whether it’s defending the right to choose or standing up to corporate wrongdoing, I’m ready to tackle the important issues head-on.
[_**But I can’t win this toss-up election without the support of working Pennsylvanians across the commonwealth. If you believe we need an A.G. who will stand up and fight for _every_ Pennsylvanian, will you chip in to support this people-powered campaign?**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77020356/449128122/-1407611433?refcode=email_011324_Sued&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDcvMS83NTE3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDMxYjdhYS0yOGIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=QM-xG1S4FBOZyvIQ4lBxV5YZEzuAQ-IRm48rG6NIHok=)

MAGA Patriot,

_**It 's your MAGA Survey Team.**_

America is going downhill - **FAST**. The country we love is being destroyed because of Radical Leftists who are only concerned with pushing their far-left agendas and lining their own pockets with dark money donations.

It's time for America First leadership to be back in the White House. We know President Trump will be the nominee, and eventually, the President-Elect.

In fact, we're so confident that President Trump will win the election, we're opening an exclusive MAGA Patriot priorities survey for his first three months in office.

****We put together a list of top MAGA patriots across the country to respond to the survey. You 're on this list, so thank you for your dedication to the MAGA Movement! ** **

subject: Will you sign on and commit to helping Senator Tammy Baldwin win her seat in any way you can?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Defeat Republicans PAC (www
body:
Peter – we’ll cut to the chase. Senator Tammy Baldwin is up for re-election in the battleground state of Wisconsin, and she really needs our help.

Will you sign on and commit to helping Senator Tammy Baldwin win her seat in any way you can? We need 10,000 to step up and take this pledge before midnight tonight. [https://secure.everyaction.com/VyaLP-HWxE6JygmHisSqxA2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240113_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
SIGN ON NOW » [https://secure.everyaction.com/VyaLP-HWxE6JygmHisSqxA2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240113_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]

https://secure.everyaction.com/VyaLP-HWxE6JygmHisSqxA2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240113_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917 [https://secure.everyaction.com/VyaLP-HWxE6JygmHisSqxA2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240113_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Tammy Baldwin is a...
✓ Progressive force fighting for affordable health care. In fact, she helped pass the Affordable Care Act, a huge step in giving millions of people access to the care they need.
✓ Trailblazer as the first openly gay Senator to serve in the Senate, who led the charge to codify same-sex marriage into federal law late last year.
✓ Fierce advocate for reproductive rights. Time and time again, she steps up and votes to protect the right to an abortion at all costs, even co-sponsoring the Women’s Health Protection Act.
We need to keep her in the Senate to continue fighting for us, but she’s at risk of losing her seat with Wisconsin now being a top target for Republicans.
Sign on now and pledge to help Tammy Baldwin win re-election in any way you can and help Democrats maintain the Senate majority >> [https://secure.everyaction.com/VyaLP-HWxE6JygmHisSqxA2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240113_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
SIGN ON NOW » [https://secure.everyaction.com/VyaLP-HWxE6JygmHisSqxA2?refcode=DR_EM_EN_90DO_240113_2_1&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&emci=3f8f1286-1ce7-ea11-8b03-00155d0394bb&emdi=ea000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000001&ceid=15276917]
Thank you for supporting Democrats.
– Defeat Republicans

name: Jane Fonda
subject: You can’t have healthy people on a sick planet
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jane Fonda Climate PAC, not authorized by any candidate or candidate’s committee
body:
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77023465/449133962/2105508926?refcode=ea.c37e65c6-2ab2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.c37e65c6-2ab2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzN2U2NWM2LTJhYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uCQ9_w8_1vG0UQTgnCpoDcOyX4Jc6objn5Z-n9f8EL0=)
---
| Hello –

As we kickstart the long weekend, I invite you to join me in a moment of reflection and urgency. With a warm cup of ☕️ in hand, I’d love it if you considered reading my latest op-ed, where I delve into my personal battle with cancer and some lessons I’ve learned about our ongoing fight against the climate crisis.

**_[And if you feel moved, I encourage you to join our mission to save the planet with a contribution of any amount. Your support is not just a donation. It's a step towards real change.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77023467/449133966/2105508926?refcode=ea.c37e65c6-2ab2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.c37e65c6-2ab2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzN2U2NWM2LTJhYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uCQ9_w8_1vG0UQTgnCpoDcOyX4Jc6objn5Z-n9f8EL0=)_**
---
| [DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77023469/449133968/2105508926?refcode=ea.c37e65c6-2ab2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.c37e65c6-2ab2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzN2U2NWM2LTJhYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uCQ9_w8_1vG0UQTgnCpoDcOyX4Jc6objn5Z-n9f8EL0=)

Thank you for spending your Saturday morning with me,

Jane Fonda
* * *
| [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77023476/449133972/1502494710?refcode=ea.c37e65c6-2ab2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.c37e65c6-2ab2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzN2U2NWM2LTJhYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uCQ9_w8_1vG0UQTgnCpoDcOyX4Jc6objn5Z-n9f8EL0=&emci=c3b1cd72-8cb1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=c37e65c6-2ab2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4823105)
---
About a year ago, I was declared cancer-free after four months of chemotherapy at Providence St. John's Health Center in Santa Monica, Calif. I had been diagnosed with low-grade B cell non-Hodgkin Lymphoma. This was not my first encounter with cancer. I’d had breast cancer a number of years prior, which was treated with radiation and then a full mastectomy. I realize I’m lucky. I had caring, attentive doctors and nurses who saved my life. I also realize how much progress has been made in cancer research and I am deeply grateful.

Yet despite that, cancer has become epidemic. Approximately 40% of people in the U.S. will develop cancer and over 1.96 million new cases were expected to be diagnosed in 2023, according to the National Cancer Institute.

I’m a cancer survivor but also a climate activist and I’m very aware of the connection between the environment and health—especially cancer. The same fossil fuels that are driving the climate crisis are driving this health crisis. The Environmental Protection Agency keeps finding cancer-causing chemicals derived from fossil fuels—such as dioxins, benzene, and naphthalene—in the air, in our water, our food, our furniture, our clothing, the utensils we cook with.... They are also in our bodies. These poisons are even found in the umbilical cords of newborn children.

A Harvard Center for Public Health study found fossil fuel-related air pollution caused over 8 million deaths globally in 2018—that’s more in one year than died from COVID-19 in three years. It’s a crisis. Oil, gas, and coal are making the planet sick and making people and other animals sick.

Health care institutions have been heroic when it comes to curing people. But it’s time now for them to move upstream and help prevent the harm in the first place. After all, that’s the doctor’s creed: first do no harm.

So why, according to the environmental organization Stand.earth, have the four big healthcare pension funds in the U.S.—the Mayo Clinic, Kaiser Permanente, HCA Healthcare and Ascension Health—invested more than $4.5 billion dollars in fossil fuel companies?

Our health care system is responsible for almost 9% of the country’s greenhouse gas emissions because of the system’s reliance on fossil fuels to run its facilities and equipment, the petrochemical plastics used to make its devices, the anesthetic gases they use in the operating room, and the food and drugs it purchases.

Gary Cohen, co-founder of Health Care Without Harm, made me hopeful when he told me that the health care community—led usually by its nurses—has made big changes before. When they learned that medical waste incinerators were a leading contributor of cancer-causing dioxin emissions in the U.S., thousands of incinerators were closed and hospitals learned how to reduce their waste, reuse and recycle what they could, and use safer waste-treatment technologies to dispose of potentially toxic materials. When studies began to show that broken mercury thermometers were contributing to dangerous mercury levels in water and fish, the health sector phased out mercury thermometers and found safer alternatives, not only in our country but all around the world.

Health Care Without Harm has pushed hospitals and health care centers to commit to plans to achieve net zero emissions in the near future, and thousands more around the world are on the same path. More than 75 governments have committed to design low-carbon and climate-resilient health systems, including the U.S.

The health care community and hospitals in particular should lead the rest of society in addressing this intersectional health and climate crises, which the World Health Organization calls “one of the greatest health threats for humanity.”

There are some big steps that need to be taken. Hospitals need to embrace ensuring a healthy environment with the same heroism they embrace curing cancer. They can start to run hospitals on renewable energy and to buy supplies (including food) from local sources to reduce carbon from transportation emissions. That would also help communities by supporting local sustainable development. They can also reduce single-use plastics, eliminate polluting anesthetic gasses, electrify their vehicle fleets, move to more telemedicine, and waste less drugs and other supplies. Health care is 17% of the entire U.S. economy—think of the impact if the sector fully committed to these renovations.

Climate-smart health care is preventative medicine on a grand scale. Think about it: We can’t have healthy people on a sick planet. Thank you, health care institutions for helping me heal. And join me, health care institutions, in helping the planet heal.

_**_[To read the Op-Ed on Time, click here.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77023479/449133979/1502494710?refcode=ea.c37e65c6-2ab2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.c37e65c6-2ab2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNi8xLzk2NzgyIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImMzN2U2NWM2LTJhYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=uCQ9_w8_1vG0UQTgnCpoDcOyX4Jc6objn5Z-n9f8EL0=&emci=c3b1cd72-8cb1-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=c37e65c6-2ab2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=4823105)_**_

Peter \- it's no secret that being an educator is one of the most challenging and underpaid professions in our country.

Teachers are crucial to molding the minds of our future generations. They put in countless hours preparing lesson plans, grading assignments, maintaining a safe classroom environment, and providing support to their students.

Despite their selflessness, they are forced to grapple with large class sizes, low wages, a lack of classroom resources, and tense public scrutiny — leading to extreme levels of stress and burnout.

President Biden recognizes the critical role that teachers play and is determined to fight for higher wages. He knows that a strong public education system starts with supporting our teachers.
But we want to know where you stand: **Do you agree that it’s time to give our public school teachers a raise?**

Do you agree? | | ---|--- Peter \- it's no secret that being an educator is one of the most challenging and underpaid professions in our country. Teachers are crucial to molding the minds of our future generations. They put in countless hours preparing lesson plans, grading assignments, maintaining a safe classroom environment, and providing support to their students. Despite their selflessness, they are forced to grapple with large class sizes, low wages, a lack of classroom resources, and tense public scrutiny — leading to extreme levels of stress and burnout. President Biden recognizes the critical role that teachers play and is determined to fight for higher wages. He knows that a strong public education system starts with supporting our teachers. But we want to know where you stand: Do you agree that it’s time to give our public school teachers a raise? | ---|--- We appreciate your input, Unite the Country | Unite the Country was formed in 2019 to support Joe Biden’s candidacy for President. Peter,
**The mainstream media is failing.** By prioritizing profits and the illusion of “balance,” the public is losing trust in one of democracy’s most important institutions. To make matters worse, by chasing clicks and rushing to present “both sides of the story,” many media organizations consequently provide oxygen to right-wing bad actors and their efforts to spread misinformation.
It’s how Donald Trump became President. It’s how climate change denialism became mainstream. It’s how anti-vaccine propaganda spread to every corner of the Internet.
We could go on and on, but here’s the good news:
**Courier was founded as a bold response to these failures. We don’t chase profit and will never compromise our values in our reporting.**
**Our mission is to bring reliable, trustworthy news to the communities that need it most.** We call out misinformation in real time, by providing context and factual reporting in the spaces where misinformation thrives.
Currently, we’re operating in 10 states, but we want to keep expanding! By providing credible, fact-based coverage in battleground states like Arizona, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Michigan, Virginia, Florida, Iowa, New Hampshire, North Carolina, and Nevada, we can keep voters in these key states informed as they head to the ballot box this year.
**And we do it _without_ paywalls or subscription fees in order to make our reporting as accessible as possible.**
But running a growing network of newsrooms isn’t cheap, and without the revenue stream provided by subscription fees, we rely on contributions from donors like you to power our operations. In three days we’re approaching our first mid-month fundraising deadline of the year, so we’re reaching out to ask for your help.
[**If you want to support Courier's mission of providing accessible, reliable, honest journalism that's committed to combating misinformation, please consider pitching in anything you can to help us meet our goal of raising $13,000 by Tuesday night. We truly can't do it without you.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77024748/449137331/-480806172?refcode=em20240113&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDc4NzgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZmM5OTE1ZTAtMmNiMi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=ONYQjolBF99QH6yqnjZKzuVy4a0iWh1Wv8XVBXi4Niw=)

By prioritizing profits and the illusion of “balance,” the public is losing trust in one of democracy’s most important institutions. To make matters worse, by chasing clicks and rushing to present “both sides of the story,” many media organizations consequently provide oxygen to right-wing bad actors and their efforts to spread misinformation. It’s how Donald Trump became President. It’s how climate change denialism became mainstream. It’s how anti-vaccine propaganda spread to every corner of the Internet. We could go on and on, but here’s the good news: Courier was founded as a bold response to these failures. We don’t chase profit and will never compromise our values in our reporting. Our mission is to bring reliable, trustworthy news to the communities that need it most. We call out misinformation in real time, by providing context and factual reporting in the spaces where misinformation thrives. Currently, we’re operating in 10 states, but we want to keep expanding! By providing credible, fact-based coverage in battleground states like Arizona, Pennsylvania, Wisconsin, Michigan, Virginia, Florida, Iowa, New Hampshire, North Carolina, and Nevada, we can keep voters in these key states informed as they head to the ballot box this year. And we do it without paywalls or subscription fees in order to make our reporting as accessible as possible. But running a growing network of newsrooms isn’t cheap, and without the revenue stream provided by subscription fees, we rely on contributions from donors like you to power our operations. In three days we’re approaching our first mid-month fundraising deadline of the year, so we’re reaching out to ask for your help. = Express Donate: If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly: | = | = | = | = ---|---|---|--- Thank you, Peter! More to come, Courier Email us: mailto:info@couriernewsroom.com

**Peter, today millions of Americans are lining up at polling locations across the nation to cast their vote in local elections.** And while these elections are vital in their own right, this year's election will give Republicans the chance to test how far they can suppress the right to vote ahead of the 2024 election.
**Already, Republicans have suppressed the will of an alarming number of Americans. ****During last year's midterm elections, voter suppression laws blocked 4.6 million people from voting. And in 2023 so far, 14 states have enacted laws making it _harder_ to vote.**
Peter, this is only the beginning. Republicans know they can't win in 2024 unless they suppress the will of the people, and that's _exactly_ what they're trying to do.
We must fight back against these voter suppression attempts – and to do that as effectively as possible, we need to know how top Democrats like _you_ prefer to vote or how you just cast your vote this Election Day.
So please, we need 436 more responses before midnight to ensure statistically significant results.

name: Ron DeSantis (Urgent Message)
subject: Important: We need to talk
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President
body:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/vWJqenViNL

http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWJqenViNL

,

It's Ron DeSantis. I need you to know that what happens in Iowa
will directly affect the course of next year, so it's important
to me that we talk.

Rush in your support before midnight

Today, every campaign competing in this race will be counting on
their grassroots team to stand up, fight with whatever they can
give, and finish out 2024 on top. I believe we have the best
grassroots team backing this campaign-and the generosity I've
seen pour in at every critical point in this race has proven that
to me time and time again.

The
tens of thousands of caucusgoers we've gotten to know in Iowa are
FIRED UP to fight for our Great American Comeback on January
15th... but if they see that the rest of our team isn't joining
in this fight during this critical stretch, we run the risk of
losing their support.

This isn't a risk I'm willing to take. We have come too far to
let up now.

Send in
$10

Send in
$25

Send in
$50

Send in
$100

One
last time this year, I'm asking you to be the most important part
of this campaign. Without you, we would not be on course to
defeat the Left, save American kids from radical indoctrination,
restore our economy, and stomp the swamp into pieces.

With you, we will get this done. I need your help now.

Yours,

Ron
DeSantis

Get to Know Ron DeSantis

Ron DeSantis comes from
blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to
him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the
Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate
degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was
so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered
to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a
life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and
now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting
to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in
this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every
turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and
consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his
life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and
3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that
this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents
face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political
agenda down the throats of children.

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has
promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected
bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to
children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by
immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our
southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the
mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring
our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on
track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record
speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment,
politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the
legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his
leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has
stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next
President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill
for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for
President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the
decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for
another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act
is now.

Contributions to Ron DeSantis for President are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.
Contributions from corporations, foreign nationals (without
"green cards"), federal government contractors, and national
banks are prohibited. Federal law requires us to use our best
efforts to collect and report the name, mailing address,
occupation, and name of employer for each individual whose
aggregate contributions exceed $200 in an election cycle. The
maximum that an individual may contribute is $6,600
($3,300/primary & $3,300/general). The maximum that a couple
using a joint account may contribute is $13,200 ($6,600/primary &
$6,600/general). A federal multi-candidate PAC may contribute
$10,000 ($5,000/primary & $5,000/general).

Contribution rules

I am a U.S. citizen or lawfully admitted permanent resident
(i.e., green card holder).

This contribution is made from my own funds, and funds are not
being provided to me by another person or entity for the purpose
of making this contribution.

I am making this contribution with my own personal credit card
and not with a corporate or business credit card or a card issued
to another person.

I am at least eighteen years old. I am not, nor am I making this
contribution on behalf of, a corporation, labor organization,
national bank, foreign national without a green card, a federal
contractor, or any other federally impermissible source.

Ron
DeSantis was a member of the United States Navy. Use of his
military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not
imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or the Department
of Defense.

Paid for by Ron DeSantis for President

This email was sent by: Ron DeSantis for President

PO Box 3696

Tallahassee, FL 32315

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system April 25, 2023.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iWJqenViNL

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oWJqenViNL

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-73810238543-echo3-0A53F78A766279044BD1D4CCA52053B5@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.

name: Debra Messing
subject: I’m supporting Adam Schiff in California’s U.S. Senate race
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5055%2E5257348%2EnKCfvI ]Adam Schiff for Senate

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20240113_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=5055%2E5257348%2EnKCfvI ]Debra Messing speaking on a podium

Hello Derek —

Debra Messing here. If you still think of me as Grace from Will & Grace,
that’s fine too — so long as you hear me out on why I’m reaching out to
you today!

I’m not just a Democrat or an actress. I’m also a mom. In fact, that’s the
most important part of who I am. And I know that California needs a
fighter for our democracy as California’s next U.S. Senator to preserve
our precious democracy for future generations.

I’ve spent years organizing support to oppose Donald Trump and the MAGA
Republicans who have been working day and night to tear down our
democracy.

After everything we’ve fought for — LGBTQ+ equality, women’s rights,
reproductive freedom, and so much more — there’s been an ugly backlash
from MAGA Republicans that shows just how fragile the progress we’ve
fought for really is.

We need a Senator who can get things done. Who can pass crucial
legislation and oppose MAGA Republicans’ antidemocratic power grabs.

That’s why I’m proud to say that I’m supporting Adam Schiff for
California’s U.S. Senate race, and I hope you’ll join me.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2907?c0=jan2024_abs_em.jV4jRE&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20240113_AM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=5055%2E5257348%2EnKCfvI ]Derek,
make a contribution of any amount to Adam’s U.S. Senate campaign today so
that he can win this election and lead the fight for progress in the
Senate.

If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your
donation will go through immediately:

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/2142?c0=jan2024_abs_em.eamPKe&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_EGR_AC90_20240113_AM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1006&akid=5055%2E5257348%2EnKCfvI ]EXPRESS DONATE
