If you still think of me as Grace from Will & Grace, that’s fine too — so long as you hear me out on why I’m reaching out to you today! I’m not just a Democrat or an actress. I’m also a mom. In fact, that’s the most important part of who I am. And I know that California needs a fighter for our democracy as California’s next U.S. Senator to preserve our precious democracy for future generations. I’ve spent years organizing support to oppose Donald Trump and the MAGA Republicans who have been working day and night to tear down our democracy. After everything we’ve fought for — LGBTQ+ equality, women’s rights, reproductive freedom, and so much more — there’s been an ugly backlash from MAGA Republicans that shows just how fragile the progress we’ve fought for really is. We need a Senator who can get things done. Who can pass crucial legislation and oppose MAGA Republicans’ antidemocratic power grabs. That’s why I’m proud to say that I’m supporting Adam Schiff for California’s U.S. Senate race, and I hope you’ll join me. name: Shift WA
subject: Survey Results Are In!
body:
It may come as no surprise to you that lawmakers taking up the initiatives submitted by Let's Go Washington - then sending them on to the people - emerged as the clear frontrunners. | | [](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62687163:WrSRnVipN:m:1:2610672541:B22163F0F19D4132D72961FDACF5FF59:r "Shift Washington")
---
|
Friends,

Thank you for participating in our recent survey on the most critical issues facing our state during the 2024 legislative session. We were overwhelmed by the survey's response, with thousands of individuals like you sharing their opinion.

It may come as no surprise to you that the key issue for our readers was ensuring lawmakers take up the initiatives submitted by Let's Go Washington, and then send them on to the people, **gaining a significant 66% of the vote.** For a reminder, here are the initiative topics going before the legislature:

* Repealing the State's Carbon Tax
* Repealing the State Income Tax on Capital Gains
* Banning Future Local Incomes Taxes
* Allowing Police to Again Pursue Car Thieves
* Letting People Opt-Out of the State's Insolvent Long-Term Care Scheme
* Including Parental Rights in Our Public Education Approach

The clear concern for the fate of these initiatives - each submitted with over 400,000 signatures - highlights their significance in shifting the direction of our state. It's clear that these issues resonate strongly with communities across our state.

**That 's why, as we move forward, Shift WA is committed to keeping you informed about how the state legislature addresses these initiatives. **We believe in transparency and accountability, and your continued engagement is crucial in our delivering on those goals.

To sustain our efforts and provide timely updates on legislative developments, we are reaching out to you with a fundraising request in the new year. _**[A contribution of $100, $50, or $25 will go a long way in supporting our mission to report on the legislative process and keep you informed.
](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62687164:WrSRnVipN:m:1:2610672541:B22163F0F19D4132D72961FDACF5FF59:r)**_
Your support ensures that we can continue to be a voice for communities across our state, highlighting issues that matter most to you. Together, we can make a meaningful impact on the direction our state takes.

Thank you,

The Shift WA Team
| [ DONATE ](http://click.shiftwa.org/ct/62687165:WrSRnVipN:m:1:2610672541:B22163F0F19D4132D72961FDACF5FF59:r)
---
|
This message was intended for: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](mailto:dpwillis67@gmail.com) and sent from Shift Washington. If you would like to send this message to some of your friends, you can [click here](http://click.shiftwa.org/forwardthis/ft.php?mID=14392745&em=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&ch=49000b887de404a22f48ed48dd2d4356&schema=echo3) to do so.

You can also stay up to date on our efforts to shift the debate in Washington State by following us on [Facebook](https://www.facebook.com/shiftwa/) & [Twitter](https://twitter.com/ShiftWA). If you believe you received this message in error or no longer wish to receive emails from Shift Washington, [click to unsubscribe](http://click.shiftwa.org/p/oWrSRnVipN).

name: Madeleine Foote, LCV
subject: Tell the EPA: NO MORE LEAD PIPES
body:
Help us reach 5,000 signatures demanding clean, safe drinking water. |
---
| | **
Tell the EPA: It 's Time to Eliminate Lead Pipes**
The EPA has proposed a plan to replace lead pipes across the country. Permanently removing lead from our drinking water is long overdue. The EPA's proposal is a good start but would leave some communities exposed to this dangerous toxin for d _ecades to come_.

This is unacceptable -- no city should be allowed to delay protecting its residents from contaminated drinking water. [Help us reach 5,000 signatures telling the EPA to quickly eliminate lead pipes in every community.](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Zzb0MPm_) |
---
**[**TAKE ACTION NOW**](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Zzb0MPm_)**

** **
|
Peter -- the EPA has proposed updating its protections against lead in our drinking water. While the proposal is a great start, it could still leave some communities at risk of exposure to this potent neurotoxin for _decades_.

**Here 's the problem: the EPA's proposal includes a dangerous loophole.** Their current plan mandates the removal of lead pipes within a decade, but it would give some cities with lots of lead lines _up to 50 years_ to get the job done. **That 's unacceptable, Peter.**

There's still time to urge the EPA to finalize stronger protections and to move more quickly to eliminate lead pipes in all communities. Protecting the health of children and other vulnerable groups is critical, and we need as many LCV members as possible to join our campaign.

[It only takes a moment to help us reach 5,000 signatures demanding that the EPA move urgently to eliminate lead pipes that contaminate our drinking water. Please, add your name right now >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Zzb0MPm_)

Right now, up to 22 million people in the United States drink water delivered through lead pipes. Lead is a harmful neurotoxin, and communities of color and low-wealth communities are hit the hardest with higher rates of negative health impacts like cardiovascular disease, immunological deficiencies, developmental problems in children, lung cancer, and asthma.

The EPA's proposed rule to finally get the lead out of our drinking water is a critical step forward, especially the proposed requirement for most lead pipes to be replaced within 10 years. However, it also includes a loophole that could extend that deadline to _as long as 50 years_ in cities that have large numbers of lead pipes. **That means that the communities _most affected_ by lead contamination could be exposed to this toxin for decades to come.**

This would be a disaster for families who live in these communities, and would further delay environmental justice, Peter. **Everyone -- no matter their race, income, or zip code -- should have access to clean, safe water.** With this proposal, the EPA has an incredible opportunity to eliminate harmful lead pollution in our water once and for all. We must push them to finalize the strongest rule possible as quickly as possible to ensure every community has access to the clean, safe water they need to thrive.

Support from LCV members like you will be _crucial_ if we're going to reach our 5,000 signature goal. [Add your name _right now_ to demand that the EPA finalize strong safeguards against lead in drinking water and act quickly to eliminate lead pipes from our communities >>](https://links.messages.lcv.org/els/v2/Zzb0MPm_)

Thank you for joining our campaign for safe drinking water and healthier communities.

Onward,

Madeleine Foote
Deputy Legislative Director
League of Conservation Voters |

---

| This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. If this isn't the best email address at which to reach you, [update your contact information](https://www.pages08.net/leagueofconservationvoters/forms/ContactInformation?spMailingID=10458207&spUserID=NjA3MDU0MTAzNTc3S0&spJobID=MTkwMDI0MTAyNgS2&spReportId=MTkwMDI0MTAyNgS2). Send us any comments, criticisms, or feedback [here](mailto:feedback@lcv.org), or just reply to this email! Thanks for your support.

name: Mike Lee
subject: Fwd: Last chance - I still need your help to his team.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc
body:
re: January 6th

---

Fellow American,

This past weekend was January 6th, and I need your help.

After the tapes were released from J6, it became clear that Nancy Pelosi and the House Committee, led in part by Liz Cheney, SUPPRESSED evidence from the American people. The J6 committee’s actions are corrupt, wrong, and must be investigated ASAP! This was a hit job against President Trump and his allies, and it needs to be investigated — The J6 Committee deliberately withheld critical evidence from their “findings,” and I’m demanding action. I need support from 500 Patriots right away, who will rush in to DEMAND A FULL INVESTIGATION into the J6 Committee: I thank you, and America thanks you for your support. Respectfully, Mike Lee Paid for by Friends of Mike Lee, Inc. PO Box 1537 Salt Lake City, UT 84110

Spoiler: No whiteboards attended this week's hearing. However, I still hope you'll read about what went down in the Oversight Committee this week.
* * *
On Wednesday, the House Oversight Committee held a hearing about Hunter Biden. Republicans have spent much of their past year in power attempting to investigate various Democrats, including the President's son. **This particular hearing was about a resolution to hold him in contempt of Congress for refusing a subpoena to appear in front of the Oversight Committee in a closed-door setting. **
Hunter Biden's lawyers say they refused the subpoena because of concerns Republicans would twist his words and instead offered his attendance at a public hearing. Still, GOP leaders are insisting this should happen in private.
So, on Wednesday, Hunter Biden surprised the committee by showing up. Then it got chaotic.
There is one thing Republicans and Democrats alike had in common on Wednesday. **Everyone seemed willing to play the game**. At times, both sides were using this hearing to take shots at their favorite political nemeses. This was a game where nobody won. It was Washington at its worst.
Republicans _really_ were acting in an unacceptable manner here. **If Hunter Biden is willing to testify publicly, in front of the American people, then we should let him do that.** A public hearing provides much more accountability and oversight than a closed-door deposition. Republicans were simply pulling political stunts by insisting their interview occur behind closed doors.
There was no actual resolution on Wednesday, but I have been sad to see the Oversight Committee--a committee that I know can do so much good for the American people--be turned into this. Oversight is supposed to be about gathering information and sharing it with the public, or using that information to enact some sort of good. **After all, this is the committee where my questioning of a Trump Administration official led to free COVID testing for every American. **
With Republicans in the majority, they have control over our committee hearing agendas. But even at the beginning of 2023, we had some productive ones, including one about unemployment fraud. I'm disappointed to see the turn this committee has taken.
Onward,
Katie Porter

_" I lift my eyes to the mountains- where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord, the maker of heaven and earth." Psalm 121_

Peter,

When I arrived at West Point as a new cadet, I had no idea how much it would transform my life. During my first plebe summer, after a long day of training, a sermon on Psalm 121 made an imprint on my soul, strengthened my faith, and sustained me through difficult times.

I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and running in the #1 battleground race that WILL decide the Senate majority.

I believe in the power of grassroots support from patriots like you. [That's why I'm taking a risk to ask if you'll consider donating any amount to my campaign.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8a58f224f5b549a7b0f30d388a7d5589&_e=Fg2wr8crTaETSkIr7Jm8tC9jOg9DlO_gFx56hrnjkoPt-O3QtOQ8I1HfoA5S8E-v3wTymhvHb5wG1q02syiVQDJ2Zxl5iEz2jr1VpYpqE-9TfqTjKCUaQZnwqMXufhhzs-NlQE-PfdeR2YKQeDcyb7sho78EOULhmf-S7g8z75__LFwV6JwapKYLg9NHdxVEVlIAimySMwGuA5S0B2Zz_QMfcwKgzXCv5BpubqFCkC_2wjrrdTGao0S8Sxl_-x_iDo8WSukNaO6O4gq2v_qWMF_Cgwd11ybAwmm-Fgagx3AN7FcLl-GDvrb8VT4iIXk69SJD-UfahNGvrlmcDSDDlVmn5uJfpSkeVeGnVaAAJdE%3D)

We need leaders in DC with the strength, the will, and the moral clarity to meet the challenges we face. **So, if you 're looking to continue the status quo, I'm not your guy.**

But if you want to change the way things are done in DC, I need your support. Our average online donation is $17.78, and [I would be so grateful if you would generously give that amount today.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8a58f224f5b549a7b0f30d388a7d5589&_e=Fg2wr8crTaETSkIr7Jm8tC9jOg9DlO_gFx56hrnjkoPt-O3QtOQ8I1HfoA5S8E-v3wTymhvHb5wG1q02syiVQDJ2Zxl5iEz2jr1VpYpqE-9TfqTjKCUaQZnwqMXufhhzs-NlQE-PfdeR2YKQeDcyb7sho78EOULhmf-S7g8z75__LFwV6JwapKYLg9NHdxVEVlIAimySMwGuA5S0B2Zz_VZ5f0I-TLv1BepMg8sXjBS4S5n_O8C6OEmLcn9cQhWGujgx9lYp5WRFxqycAifhIl9gNmowFZIFl5HIVrkb1UFgTRWMlF3WmXogkNPVHFMNjvXylsn82Aj558Mqxp9YhBaXOda6l1rr-igJ1WyM8uk%3D)

[DONATE](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=8a58f224f5b549a7b0f30d388a7d5589&_e=Fg2wr8crTaETSkIr7Jm8tC9jOg9DlO_gFx56hrnjkoPt-O3QtOQ8I1HfoA5S8E-v3wTymhvHb5wG1q02syiVQDJ2Zxl5iEz2jr1VpYpqE-9TfqTjKCUaQZnwqMXufhhzs-NlQE-PfdeR2YKQeDcyb7sho78EOULhmf-S7g8z75__LFwV6JwapKYLg9NHdxVEVlIAimySMwGuA5S0B2Zz_ScgSqTfeiVgFIHrHGXdQGEHrkbdrc_iomhOTwCqCPwTQaZNcsFqR_pip3KribhqFuOxlAgY5tXETgrkzwKXkSSGDxkPjXG9yI0ASQDte6sgZupD-IGp2qVzd7LFGtSKDKEbDI49PSj6qNEfDvLj0Uk%3D)

**This race is winnable, but it will be difficult and test the strength and resolve of the simple virtues that make America exceptional: liberty, opportunity, and patriotism.**

Please, join me today to fix our broken government & save what makes America worth fighting for.

Dave McCormick
Army Veteran, USMA '87

body:
They want to shut it down in the blink of an eye
| | [ ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5fea9b5e834f48159f3f7404178ff40f&_e=A55NGzNTlC5TftK7PN28DHl5d3hY5CM8FrmPr0PlRl6KbzO0YMY3pwoD16acZzqhOMmlgehUPmSnWTO5mB6UWxV_QdgehcNw_gdqwV3cRDLJMhTIyTAYPUTlnnrvAbs5TNkk_KVr0IVkvnhoVPduwLSE_HZw_MgVWVOTScbw0ywZWE0pn_0TCnCQc25R_ovd1P8rPkidCq1eESXU9CrPyKkRc54DsUp_ABD9vM4EKMYJj6zLAfF4f4ETyEWjxeNChMWV5_5HSIFSfDDJrKxS67-cP5yzYPSjcc3PjiuTq3v-WKig6_31A8ynUo3UMJZP)

Fellow American, I received some concerning news, and I'm asking you to read this entire memo about the state of my re-election campaign. My Democrat opponent just filed to run against me in Kentucky's first congressional district and it is alarming.
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5fea9b5e834f48159f3f7404178ff40f&_e=A55NGzNTlC5TftK7PN28DHl5d3hY5CM8FrmPr0PlRl6KbzO0YMY3pwoD16acZzqhOMmlgehUPmSnWTO5mB6UWxV_QdgehcNw_gdqwV3cRDLJMhTIyTAYPUTlnnrvAbs5TNkk_KVr0IVkvnhoVPduwLSE_HZw_MgVWVOTScbw0yxkus_FA8wAsmZ9hlJMUdFo_g7yJvBxGpXMJGnK_95cnNWX1aIvDUnh5SS8E45P2aYK7Mv74LHBaXPQKCUa8p-U0afK_UvHUWPlG0kGed5iKDEfkx4AugZ9iau744bA65oqDD43fOmEeAImKF_ZXND7)
---
My opponent is a Far-Left activist who worked for the Hillary Clinton campaign, and she's already raising tons of money on ActBlue from liberal online donors around the country. She is determined to defeat me and end my investigation once and for all. **You and I both know we can 't let that happen.** But it's not only that. She's hired Amy McGrath's campaign manager. You may not remember Amy McGrath, but I sure do. McGrath raised $88 Million dollars in her 2020 campaign for Kentucky Senate. **$88,000,000!**
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5fea9b5e834f48159f3f7404178ff40f&_e=A55NGzNTlC5TftK7PN28DHl5d3hY5CM8FrmPr0PlRl6KbzO0YMY3pwoD16acZzqhOMmlgehUPmSnWTO5mB6UWxV_QdgehcNw_gdqwV3cRDLJMhTIyTAYPUTlnnrvAbs5TNkk_KVr0IVkvnhoVPduwLSE_HZw_MgVWVOTScbw0yzBcZdnyioYpLsAXUCmvnHFdvAQLSPvPsAiP75_FwyBMV2U9Mbz_w7ZufXyqVJhicKMNZ92HOLhadtL-CQn6cAslvz0_I5lzW7OVrRIWhYsGyPlblUXjTqUJ1Hk5u_spoFo8w0r7d8N3ySTG8pm1mfR)
---
That's an astounding amount of money, and her campaign manager's rolodex is stuffed to the brim with democrat mega-donors chomping at the bit to take me down. They know their investment in the Biden administration is at serious risk due to the findings of my investigation, and they will do whatever it takes to defeat me in November and end my inquiry into the Biden Family's corruption racket and cover-up. I'm asking everyone who reads this memo to stand with me today as my 2024 campaign kicks off in earnest. We must show national Democrats that our campaign is strong enough to weather anything... _or this campaign could get really rough for me in the fall._ If you're able, I'd love to have your renewed support. Thank you for everything, James Comer
| [ **RE-ELECT COMER** ](http://links.rightwaypress.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=5fea9b5e834f48159f3f7404178ff40f&_e=A55NGzNTlC5TftK7PN28DHl5d3hY5CM8FrmPr0PlRl6KbzO0YMY3pwoD16acZzqhOMmlgehUPmSnWTO5mB6UWxV_QdgehcNw_gdqwV3cRDLJMhTIyTAYPUTlnnrvAbs5TNkk_KVr0IVkvnhoVPduwLSE_HZw_MgVWVOTScbw0yzyv6nh-bfACZRiwa0-ggAh3ywADVXsZB-aZk3OJpwxg5fvCmFw46yEp4P2MzqcO2I8Z_YHsZyGwMisVPFf_3HxG95u9CZsav2EtB-jmn79sezHtULPhOUxrUluhnOxPb13jqzHLY3LNaC-lXxOMW9Q)

name: TN House Democrats
subject: Legislative Update | Jan 13 2024
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus | Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer
body:
https://tnhousedems.com/ [https://tnhousedems.com/]
January 13, 2024
BACK TO WORK (AND REPUBLICAN NONSENSE)
Rather than getting back to work on the issues facing Tennessee families, the Republican supermajority kicked off this legislative session by once again passing rules to silence Democratic voices and limit public access to the House chamber.
Breaking with tradition, House leadership amended [https://tnga.granicus.com/player/clip/29135?view_id=705&redirect=true&h=dfee7a10bdb45eb83dcea1b6cb98a122] the House rules mid-session to further limit debate on bills and silence members who are ruled out of order. The Speaker also unilaterally unveiled a new policy requiring tickets [https://www.tennessean.com/story/news/politics/2024/01/09/tennessee-general-assembly-new-public-restrictions-for-2024-session/72089438007/] for access to the west gallery of the House chamber, further limiting the public’s ability to observe their government at work. Democratic members were informed of this policy less than an hour before the first floor session on Tuesday. Members of the media who previously had access to the House floor were barred from the House while photographers were confined to a small, cramped corner of the gallery.
Our Democratic members, as usual, raised strong legal and constitutional arguments [https://tnga.granicus.com/player/clip/29110?view_id=740&redirect=true&h=e796f01973c5bb7311d1d4da0d4e6391] challenging the new rules and policies throughout the committee and floor debates. Unfortunately, we remain outnumbered and lost the votes on the proposed rules package. Until Tennesseans decide they have had enough of this nonsense and show up to vote for change, this type of undemocratic activity will continue.
“MY NAME IS JENNIE, AND I’M AFRAID TO TAKE OUT THE TRASH.”
This week two groups of Tennessee [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/68714/images/Jenni_DSC06030.jpg]
students came to the State Capitol to
speak about gun violence and call for
action. Rise and Shine, an advocacy
group, organized their press conferences.
The first group of students were aged five
to nine, and the second group consisted
of high school students. The courage of
these children was inspiring to all who
witnessed their statements. Legislators
who fail to heed their calls for action on
gun violence do so at their own peril and,
sadly, our children’s.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/68714/images/Children%20at%20gun%20presser_DSC05735.jpg] Several members of the Democratic
caucus attended both press conferences to show support for the children and their message.
If you missed the press coverage of these press events, Rise and Shine and several Democratic members who were in attendance have posted videos on their respective social media accounts.
Jennie is pictured above, and Rafi is
pictured left.
COMMITTEE (RE)ASSIGNMENTS
Speaker Sexton also announced a few new House Committee [https://wapp.capitol.tn.gov/apps/CommitteeInfo/AllHouse.aspx] assignments— and reassignments—this week. Several of the Speaker’s decisions appeared punitive in nature, or at the very least, designed to ensure passage of certain Republican bills through key committees.
While the House Rules give the Speaker wide, unilateral discretion to appoint committees, there is an express requirement for the Speaker to give consideration to political party representation in the House. Democrats comprise 24.2% of the House, but the membership of Democrats on several committees is as low as 11.1%. Eight subcommittees only have one
Democrat on the entire subcommittee, effectively eliminating the ability of Democrats to receive a second motion on many of our bills. Notably, one of those subcommittees is the K-12 subcommittee, the subcommittee that will first consider Gov. Bill Lee’s controversial voucher legislation. Caucus Chair John Ray Clemmons and Leader Karen Camper have raised their concerns with the Speaker, delivering a letter [https://twitter.com/THEChrisOB/status/1745845130442023096?s=20] to him outlining several formal requests to better ensure fair representation on committees.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/68714/images/DSC05928.jpg]
DEMOCRATS HONOR MEMPHIS
SANITATION STRIKER
Mr. Elmore Nickelberry [https://www.nytimes.com/2024/01/11/us/elmore-nickleberry-dead.html] , one of the sanitation workers who went on strike with Dr. Martin Luther King Jr. just before his assassination, passed this week at the age of 92. Nickelberry, along with 1,300 other sanitation workers, marched in Memphis carrying signs to protest racism, low pay, and terrible working conditions.
The workers were not allowed to shower. In 1968, two workers were killed in a horrific composter accident. Mr. Nickelberry and other Black workers were talked down to at work, and Jim Crow laws made finding other jobs difficult.
Although they marched for weeks, the Memphis mayor refused to budge and called the strikers criminals. The workers’ plight resulted in Dr. King traveling to Memphis as part of the Poor People’s Campaign. Tragically, Dr. King was assassinated during his visit to support the workers. Mr. Nickelberry credited their strike with a nearly ten percent raise, better working conditions and health benefits. However, pensions were removed in the labor agreement, and Mr. Nickelberry continued to work into his eighties to support his family.
He is survived by his wife Mary Lewis Ray, his six children, 18 grandchildren, and five great-grandchildren. Democratic Reps. G.A. Hardaway and Joe Towns honored Mr. Nickleberry on the House floor Tuesday morning.
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP03/1/68714/images/Elmore%20Nickelberry_NYT.jpg]
Paid for by Tennessee House Democratic Caucus | Ronnie Glynn, Treasurer
Tennessee House Democratic Caucus
P. O. Box 198082
Nashville, TN 37219
United States

clean_body: [] January 13, 2024 BACK TO WORK (AND REPUBLICAN NONSENSE) Rather than getting back to work on the issues facing Tennessee families, the Republican supermajority kicked off this legislative session by once again passing rules to silence Democratic voices and limit public access to the House chamber. Breaking with tradition, House leadership amended [] the House rules mid-session to further limit debate on bills and silence members who are ruled out of order. The Speaker also unilaterally unveiled a new policy requiring tickets [] for access to the west gallery of the House chamber, further limiting the public’s ability to observe their government at work. Democratic members were informed of this policy less than an hour before the first floor session on Tuesday. Members of the media who previously had access to the House floor were barred from the House while photographers were confined to a small, cramped corner of the gallery. Our Democratic members, as usual, raised strong legal and constitutional arguments [] challenging the new rules and policies throughout the committee and floor debates. Unfortunately, we remain outnumbered and lost the votes on the proposed rules package. Until Tennesseans decide they have had enough of this nonsense and show up to vote for change, this type of undemocratic activity will continue. “MY NAME IS JENNIE, AND I’M AFRAID TO TAKE OUT THE TRASH.” This week two groups of Tennessee [] students came to the State Capitol to speak about gun violence and call for action. Rise and Shine, an advocacy group, organized their press conferences. The first group of students were aged five to nine, and the second group consisted of high school students. The courage of these children was inspiring to all who witnessed their statements. Legislators who fail to heed their calls for action on gun violence do so at their own peril and, sadly, our children’s. [] Several members of the Democratic caucus attended both press conferences to show support for the children and their message. If you missed the press coverage of these press events, Rise and Shine and several Democratic members who were in attendance have posted videos on their respective social media accounts. Jennie is pictured above, and Rafi is pictured left. COMMITTEE (RE)ASSIGNMENTS Speaker Sexton also announced a few new House Committee [] assignments— and reassignments—this week. Several of the Speaker’s decisions appeared punitive in nature, or at the very least, designed to ensure passage of certain Republican bills through key committees. While the House Rules give the Speaker wide, unilateral discretion to appoint committees, there is an express requirement for the Speaker to give consideration to political party representation in the House. Democrats comprise 24.2% of the House, but the membership of Democrats on several committees is as low as 11.1%. Eight subcommittees only have one Democrat on the entire subcommittee, effectively eliminating the ability of Democrats to receive a second motion on many of our bills. Notably, one of those subcommittees is the K-12 subcommittee, the subcommittee that will first consider Gov. Bill Lee’s controversial voucher legislation. Caucus Chair John Ray Clemmons and Leader Karen Camper have raised their concerns with the Speaker, delivering a letter [] to him outlining several formal requests to better ensure fair representation on committees. However, pensions were removed in the labor agreement, and Mr. Nickelberry continued to work into his eighties to support his family. name: Katie Porter
subject: “Young lady, Wells Fargo doesn’t make mistakes”
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Katie Porter for Senate
body:
If banks don’t make mistakes, the next logical conclusion was that this was in fact a deliberate strategy to break the rules and cheat borrowers.
# [](https://act.katieporter.com/go/14558?t=1&akid=36299%2E3422442%2EzfzmDF)
_Young lady, Wells Fargo does not make mistakes._
Those were the words I heard in late 2007 after presenting my research showing 70% of lenders were trying to collect more money than homeowners believed they owed.
Back up for a second: In 2007 I was a law professor researching whether banks were taking advantage of homeowners by claiming Americans owed more than they really did. In a sample of 1,700 cases, I found banks were asking people to pay $6 million more than they expected. **Banks repeatedly didn’t have the documentation to back up their claims, and nobody in the system was willing or able to stop them.** For so many families that meant losing their home entirely.
It was a Wells Fargo lawyer who stood up after I presented my findings at a conference and lectured me on how the vast teams at Wells Fargo could afford to follow the law, and plenty of other Big Bank lawyers chimed in. The conventional wisdom was that banks were always right, and nobody needed to question it.
**If banks don’t make mistakes, the next logical conclusion was that this was in fact a deliberate strategy to break the rules and cheat borrowers.**
Because of this research, a few months later I was asked to testify before the Senate Subcommittee on Administrative Oversight and the Courts. Senator Chuck Schumer came prepared with a poster board, and pointed out how Wall Street boasted their strategy of foreclosure and late fees helped them become even more profitable. I left that hearing thinking punishment was coming for those lawbreaking banks, but for the most part they continued to collect every penny without following every rule.
As a professor, I could study and point out problems. But I wanted to do more to actually change our system. I’m running for the U.S. Senate to fight for the people who have been taken advantage of by big corporations and are struggling to get ahead.
**That’s the work I’ve always done, and with your support I can head _back_ to the Senate—this time with the power to hold Wall Street to account. [I'd be so appreciative of anything you can chip in to our campaign.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240113-1?refcode=em20240113-36299&refcode2=36299_3422442_zfzmDF&akid=36299%2E3422442%2EzfzmDF)
[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-20240113-1?refcode=em20240113-36299&refcode2=36299_3422442_zfzmDF&akid=36299%2E3422442%2EzfzmDF)
Katie Porter

Katie is running for the U.S. Senate because Californians deserve a warrior fighting for them in Washington. Our campaign is people-powered, we don’t take a dime from corporate PACs, federal lobbyists, or executives from Big Oil or Big Pharma. **[Donate ›››](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kp4s-em-footer?refcode=em&t=2&refcode2=36299_3422442_zfzmDF&akid=36299%2E3422442%2EzfzmDF)**
---

To give by check:
Katie Porter for Senate
PO Box 5176
Irvine, CA 92616

clean_body: We need allies not just in Congress, but in state houses across the country. | | | Friend, Our allies need our support. In Illinois, State Representative Abdelnasser Rashid―the first Palestinian American to serve in the Illinois Legislature―is under attack for demanding a ceasefire and speaking out for Palestinians’ human rights. His Democratic primary opponent is issuing attacks and anti-Palestinian group AIPAC is threatening to spend $100 million in an attempt to defeat me and allies in our ceasefire movement for peace. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Abdelnasser Rashid | | | | | | | | | | As our nation’s top leaders seek to maintain an unjust status quo of oppression and ethnic cleansing of the Palestinian people, we will not be silenced. Thank you for supporting human rights and our allies in Congress and in state houses across the country. In solidarity, Rashida \---------- Forwarded message --------- From: Rashida Tlaib** Date: Fri, Jan 12, 2024 Subject: Abdelnasser Rashid is the first Palestinian American to serve in the Illinois legislature and he needs our support To: dpwillis67@gmail.com Friend, A majority of Americans, including 80% of Democrats, support a ceasefire. Yet the Biden administration continues to send bombs to the Israeli military in its campaign to wipe out the Palestinian people. As U.S. officials contribute to dehumanization that’s hurting not just Palestinians in Gaza, but also Arab and Muslim Americans, we need allies in the federal government and in state houses across the country. Illinois State Representative Abdelnasser Rashid is the first Palestinian American to serve in the Illinois legislature. And he’s facing attacks by his Democratic primary opponent for demanding a ceasefire now. Last summer, while visiting family in the West Bank, Abdelnasser watched as, in his words, “a group of armed Israeli settlers invaded the village, torched an entire neighborhood, shot a bunch of people, killed a young man. All with the support of the Israel Defense Forces and the Israeli government that looked the other way even though these attacks had been advertised ahead of time.” Rep. Rashid is a leader for human rights and we need him in office. He needs our support now to win his March Democratic primary. Abdelnasser is running for re-election in the midst of a rise in anti-Arab, Muslim, and Palestinian attacks in the United States and across the globe. In October, 6-year-old Wadea Al-Fayoume was murdered in an anti-Palestinian hate crime in Abdelnasser’s community. Abdelnassar attended Wadea’s funeral, noting that “the politicians and many in the media cheering on Israel's march toward genocide [has] created an environment of hate right here in America” that “directly led to this brutal murder.” Abdelnasser is demanding that President Biden and members of Congress stop contributing to this hate, and instead recognize the humanity of Palestinians and join the vast majority of Americans in demanding an immediate and permanent ceasefire. Rep. Rashid’s courage in speaking out―for our shared humanity and against apartheid, genocide, and the blockade depriving Gaza’s residents of essential survival needs like water―has made him a target in his fast-approaching March primary election. If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your secure donation will go through immediately, split evenly between Rashida Tlaib and Abdelnasser Rashid | | | | | | | | | Whether in Congress or in State Houses across the country, let’s keep supporting our allies and demanding elected officials stop ignoring the humanity and the ethnic cleansing of the Palestinian people. In solidarity, Rashida * Rashida Tlaib for Congress PO Box 32777 Detroit, MI 48232 | Paid for by Rashida Tlaib for Congress | | Sent via . | | To: My loyal supporters From: President Donald J. TrumpRe: 2023 -- a dark year for America
---
Dear Patriot,

---
With the door officially shut on 2023 and the first vote of the 2024 election set to be cast in **just DAYS** , I thought it was time I sent you a personal letter on my reflections of this past year – _one of the darkest years in American history_.
---
All I ever wanted was to make this country that we all hold so dear and love so much _[_GREAT AGAIN!_](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=dea08bfcfd1b48bab0ad82002807198a&_e=DwWOy_XUi2UO0dDiBK3xO3bfar0izlyksxsDo-BNKYHsouzv55Sopfz8Hqcubf8WjXx35QS9dPhKwT0JOKqFn9DJ19BGZ8JyPT2wyWQkqlowTxCR5xawAQE_z_IH6CxNM2Fd30D4UyVDKnxB5iNLB4xhA5Pklb7drWWAPkJpbEZg64qSaAV0ZvvqN6ZzlP_QXYXH3mthX00Ss0JHnHHu6-kmvmFCdjZFNPl4_cHOHJ1Gue_2f2IZgf0gjfT7yi9psT_HyGKQTrVXZbrCrU9SLpo8YXLwPbhKVlWQFu5qWWLQkcV455JcH9k10b1-37qmPTW5BXNsK-BmM2-dGMFoHqZe6tRYufQGLU4UPp-mfZZtCM7fwsMRHEQsMR6cDQ0rwbmC1W2_YF8mC5LCDP4ofFLyuWIMYDSaNnQxDFn-HK-ohvPjsM_NpHX-b3jZCJW_kzLXRG-8y3r3jeX3EcwQIOHCZJird8NO3GEzgWsG8n6fFInJNmPn3MOJz9EDsKYnxeHq4ao3jq5X5qqbU7SOGd_zu6ArxNiqLM1DjCwni21aHNZitJcdTSixyvo1BC02ODNb9Natg_EGStUB3UUgV0g9zCgCiKzJRVKCio32SZ0%3D)_
---
But to the villainous forces in the Washington Swamp, to Crooked Joe and his accomplices, _that_ is the ultimate crime.
---
**In 2023, the Radical Democrats unlawfully ARRESTED the _leading_ 2024 presidential candidate (_yours truly_) four times, took a MUGSHOT of me, forced me off the campaign trail and into the courtroom for SHAM TRIALS, unlawfully REMOVED my name from the ballot, GAGGED and CENSORED me, are attempting to JAIL me for life as an innocent man, and are even seeking the _“corporate death penalty”_ against me and my family. **
---
It might be hard to believe given what you’ve witnessed ever since I first rode down the golden escalator, but there was a point in time when I lived a pretty nice life...
---
_...Even the media said nice things about me!_
---
But then, I did something they couldn’t possibly comprehend, something that undermined every globalist and radical left-wing instinct in their bones.
---
I chose _**YOU**_**** –[ the _PEOPLE!_](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=dea08bfcfd1b48bab0ad82002807198a&_e=DwWOy_XUi2UO0dDiBK3xO3bfar0izlyksxsDo-BNKYHsouzv55Sopfz8Hqcubf8WjXx35QS9dPhKwT0JOKqFn9DJ19BGZ8JyPT2wyWQkqlowTxCR5xawAQE_z_IH6CxNM2Fd30D4UyVDKnxB5iNLB4xhA5Pklb7drWWAPkJpbEZg64qSaAV0ZvvqN6ZzlP_QXYXH3mthX00Ss0JHnHHu6-kmvmFCdjZFNPl4_cHOHJ1Gue_2f2IZgf0gjfT7yi9psT_HyGKQTrVXZbrCrU9SLpo8YXLwPbhKVlWQFu5qWWLQkcV455JcH9k10b1-37qmPTW5BXNsK-BmM2-dGMFoHqZe6tRYufQGLU4UPp-mfZZtCM7fwsMRHEQsMR6cDQ0rwbmC1W2_YF8mC5LCDP4ofFLyuWIMYDSaNnQxDFn-HK-ohvPjsM_NpHX-b3jZCJW_kzLXRG-8y3r3jeX3EcwQINMs6PTMYUuDiZ0ASFTjVPXApkAsmSP3YretRGEvx-jNtRuJCR1Q_yDxyMzY2kDlxFxbB6WVludFBTckFbt4uGsOYQxq3pRLc0iHpLMmqAVccTrZR_nPZpmpBtwozyE6LTH-S_LOTbos1YV3dEmoBVQ%3D)__
---
I chose to put _AMERICA_ FIRST.
---
| [JOIN US! 🇺🇸 >>](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=dea08bfcfd1b48bab0ad82002807198a&_e=DwWOy_XUi2UO0dDiBK3xO3bfar0izlyksxsDo-BNKYHsouzv55Sopfz8Hqcubf8WjXx35QS9dPhKwT0JOKqFn9DJ19BGZ8JyPT2wyWQkqlowTxCR5xawAQE_z_IH6CxNM2Fd30D4UyVDKnxB5iNLB4xhA5Pklb7drWWAPkJpbEZg64qSaAV0ZvvqN6ZzlP_QXYXH3mthX00Ss0JHnHHu6-kmvmFCdjZFNPl4_cHOHJ1Gue_2f2IZgf0gjfT7yi9psT_HyGKQTrVXZbrCrU9SLpo8YXLwPbhKVlWQFu5qWWLQkcV455JcH9k10b1-37qmPTW5BXNsK-BmM2-dGMFoHqZe6tRYufQGLU4UPp-mfZZtCM7fwsMRHEQsMR6cDQ0rwbmC1W2_YF8mC5LCDP4ofFLyuWIMYDSaNnQxDFn-HK-ohvPjsM_NpHX-b3jZCJW_kzLXRG-8y3r3jeX3EcwQILgVJrL5SnQknSfDSTW0-u6EQUykypM-wM0BxUm_s_6ZJab6TbT1eObAyq68LCMAUlo-pmRALh5S5Oj0ZdXHbsp2eamO8jz8NiEX1m-STQjCDTSiwWloCRgjQ4S2BnY9glz_ORrFagsA-RFmfWTvqH4%3D)
---
I chose to give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, to fight back against the Washington ruling class that hates our country, to stop the warmongers, and to rout out the Deep State.
---
And if I could go back and do it all over again, _I wouldn’t have it any other way!_
---
**Remember, they’re not really coming after me, Patriot, they’re coming after** _**YOU**_**. I’m just standing in their way – ****_and I ALWAYS will, stand in their way._**
---
Which is why, in the most consequential election year of our lives, Crooked Joe and the Democrats will use every last bit of _**LEGAL**_****_**WARFARE**_ imaginable to try and stop us.
---
**But what these crooks, thugs, and fools fail to understand, just as they failed to understand all the way back in 2015, is that I will** _**NEVER**_**,**_**_EVER_**_****_**SURRENDER**_**our country to their tyranny!**
---
_And I know that patriots like YOU won’t either..._
---

Come November 5, __WE THE PEOPLE__ will PROVE that good and honest Americans had the courage to peacefully cast off the Radical Democrat _regime_ that is destroying our country from within, and replace it with a government that serves and protects __YOU__.
---
**[So please, with 2024 voting officially beginning in just DAYS, make a contribution of any amount to show that YOU too will NEVER SURRENDER – and _together_ , we will WIN BACK the White House and SAVE AMERICA once and for all.](https://link.donaldjtrump.com/u/click?_t=c26d591425684a3289b90149d613a03c&_m=dea08bfcfd1b48bab0ad82002807198a&_e=DwWOy_XUi2UO0dDiBK3xO3bfar0izlyksxsDo-BNKYHsouzv55Sopfz8Hqcubf8WjXx35QS9dPhKwT0JOKqFn9DJ19BGZ8JyPT2wyWQkqlowTxCR5xawAQE_z_IH6CxNM2Fd30D4UyVDKnxB5iNLB4xhA5Pklb7drWWAPkJpbEZg64qSaAV0ZvvqN6ZzlP_QXYXH3mthX00Ss0JHnHHu6-kmvmFCdjZFNPl4_cHOHJ1Gue_2f2IZgf0gjfT7yi9psT_HyGKQTrVXZbrCrU9SLpo8YXLwPbhKVlWQFu5qWWLQkcV455JcH9k10b1-37qmPTW5BXNsK-BmM2-dGMFoHqZe6tRYufQGLU4UPp-mfZZtCM7fwsMRHEQsMR6cDQ0rwbmC1W2_YF8mC5LCDP4ofFLyuWIMYDSaNnQxDFn-HK-ohvPjsM_NpHX-b3jZCJW_kzLXRG-8y3r3jeX3EcwQIEnKoP_4Q5mWqpZ4m5YGDOQutSycA8-MYpLUMBk5vr-9iItU-cS6zz4MgK_ClOdmIpVX-flldSIXB9mV3fX8pEx-oGF-LX7hhpbuvHwVtdTKSXhIDHADBskl_BB6IMroMI5WfboUxH41JGuZWManczQ%3D)**

But then, I did something they couldn’t possibly comprehend, something that undermined every globalist and radical left-wing instinct in their bones. I chose YOU** – I chose to put AMERICA FIRST. | I chose to give the forgotten, hardworking men and women of this country a voice, to fight back against the Washington ruling class that hates our country, to stop the warmongers, and to rout out the Deep State. And if I could go back and do it all over again, I wouldn’t have it any other way! Remember, they’re not really coming after me, Patriot, they’re coming after YOU. I’m just standing in their way – **and I ALWAYS will, stand in their way. Which is why, in the most consequential election year of our lives, Crooked Joe and the Democrats will use every last bit of LEGAL**WARFARE imaginable to try and stop us. But what these crooks, thugs, and fools fail to understand, just as they failed to understand all the way back in 2015, is that I will NEVER,EVER_SURRENDERour country to their tyranny! And I know that patriots like YOU won’t either... | Come November 5, WE THE PEOPLE will PROVE that good and honest Americans had the courage to peacefully cast off the Radical Democrat regime that is destroying our country from within, and replace it with a government that serves and protects YOU. Thank you and God bless you, Donald J. Trump | | Contributions to Trump Save America JFC are not deductible for federal income tax purposes. | Paid for by Trump Save America Joint Fundraising Committee, a joint fundraising committee composed of and authorized by Donald J. Trump for President 2024, Inc. and Save America.

Friend,

The Iowa caucuses are just 48 hours away, which means the race for the White House and Senate is fully underway. Are you prepared to caucus on **MONDAY**?

This is the most important election of our lifetimes. With your continued support, I know we will secure a strong Republican victory up and down the ballot. It is crucial that conservative values are represented in the White House and Senate. We are seeing the destruction happening without them now.

subject: Planning accordingly

body:

#
---
Hi folks, In just a few days, my team and I will sit down to look over our fundraising after Monday’s mid-month deadline expires. We’ll be looking to see how much we’ve raised so far this month, confirm our budget, and plan accordingly for the next couple of months as we bolster up our strategy ahead of the November election. Now that 2024 is in full swing, it’s absolutely critical we reach every single fundraising deadline to prove this incredible team can continue making history and protect this seat. That starts with hitting our very first deadline of the election year. You might be surprised to hear this, but small-dollar donations from emails just like this one make up a major part of our budget. It is $5 here or $10 there that powers our efforts to organize on the ground, fund our TV ads, and build the campaign we need to win. **[Can I count on you to help us reach our first mid-month goal of the year and build the campaign we need to win in November by chipping in today? clean_body: | Hi folks, In just a few days, my team and I will sit down to look over our fundraising after Monday’s mid-month deadline expires. We’ll be looking to see how much we’ve raised so far this month, confirm our budget, and plan accordingly for the next couple of months as we bolster up our strategy ahead of the November election. Now that 2024 is in full swing, it’s absolutely critical we reach every single fundraising deadline to prove this incredible team can continue making history and protect this seat. That starts with hitting our very first deadline of the election year. You might be surprised to hear this, but small-dollar donations from emails just like this one make up a major part of our budget. It is $5 here or $10 there that powers our efforts to organize on the ground, fund our TV ads, and build the campaign we need to win. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = ** = | = = | = = I appreciate you pitching in any amount that’s meaningful to you. — Nikki = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

| | We're always talking about boots on the ground – and this is what we mean. Our signature project, Contest Every Race, is marching across Georgia to challenge any Republican in our way and run up the totals in forgotten rural and "deep red" districts where every single vote we win will push Joe Biden over the top. Georgia is a slice of urban, suburban, and rural – home to battleground races not just for the White House, but for two Senate seats won in very tight runoffs. So, we're targeting nearly 3,000 races in almost every county across the state with a focus on hyper-local seats for county commissions, city councils, and school boards – the folks making everyday decisions about housing, zoning, and education. And for every Democrat we recruit to run for local office, we build the enthusiasm, momentum, and turnout that we need to cast Georgia's electoral votes for Joe Biden one more time. [**But, it takes a huge, sustained effort to track thousands of races and get the right folks ready to run – something we can only accomplish if you take a moment right now to become a sustaining, monthly contributor through Election Day.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77027982/449147330/-327605227?refcode=2024-01-13-recurring-3&recurring=9&amount=13&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=35c97330-31b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWM5NzMzMC0zMWIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ezMGVN-0Wou5zPzgc2-_6B7v7EBQC_z_LWjJb50d2gE=) By teaming up with like-minded folks like you, we've recruited over 7,000 candidates to run for local office from Georgia to Arizona and push races for the House, the Senate, and the presidency to victory, and we're just getting started. [**Your one-time contribution means one more candidate running, volunteer recruited, and door knocked to bring change to a neighborhood, a state, and the entire country.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77027985/449147335/-327605227?refcode=2024-01-13-recurring-3&recurring=&amount=13&amounts=10,30,50,100,200&refcode2=35c97330-31b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9UU00vVFNNTVAvMS85MjA2MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzNWM5NzMzMC0zMWIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=ezMGVN-0Wou5zPzgc2-_6B7v7EBQC_z_LWjJb50d2gE=) We're deeply grateful for your support, _Sarah_ Sarah Long

subject: Is Powerball Rigged? 7-Time Lotto Winner Reveals What to Watch Out For
body:
TheFederalistWire.com

Please read the following message
from our sponsor.

If statistics say you have a
better chance of becoming the president of the US than of winning
at the Lottery...
How come there are people out
there crushing the lottery CONSISTENTLY, every single month?
I'm not sure you're going to like
what this 7-time lotto winner has to say...
Because the TRUTH is...
You NEVER stood a chance of
winning the lottery... (They trick you into choosing the wrong
numbers every single time you buy a ticket...)
You'll see inside this leaked
video how...

But no matter how angry you get
while watching it...wait until minute 06:14...
That's when you get your sweet
revenge...
And find out the only thing you
need to know in order to win REPEATEDLY... and collect thousands
of dollars by the end of this month...
You simply can't afford not to
watch this short video right now!

Good luck,
Kenneth L.

subject: Did you see our message?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Their Future PAC
body:
| | | There are only a few hours left to become a digital member. We need just 58 more people to join to meet our goal before our deadline at midnight. Every dollar matters when we’re up against so much.

Here’s the best link to donate and claim your spot:

| | Can you believe it, Peter?

The first primary of 2024 is in _**TWO DAYS.**_

This is just the beginning of what’s sure to be one of the most important election years of our lifetime, and we need to be prepared.

**[We need to raise $10,000 in the next 48 hours to make sure we’re ready to fight back against MAGA extremists across the country and up and down the ballot this year. Peter, there’s so much at stake in 2024.

And with dangerous Republican extremists like Trump and Ron DeSantis fighting for the Republican presidential nomination, either outcome is a threat to our democracy.

We know Republicans are ready to flood the 2024 elections with dark money, so we have to fight back now.

**[Peter — can you rush a $10, $25, or even $50 donation in the next 48 hours to make sure we’re in a good place to defeat Republican extremists in this year?](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953wk3KbH6rdH1-Ipv8EScXsAmtAK34janLXkp6z5N1sKGmX03sZn_m4uTl6eFbcd8TIDyevE2oAmfUA9INc-R_rQ2-TRAbga42dAOCJmrTo4_oKRkmTLBQyezBMYG3RZ9_oblKHzSoI7pbJfKOBEiqgVJe52_86eo3eFJzp0ZcePfhPAcVn_gGEGHhNMD1SsbSNr7G9nId-ocsR_e2Zl6UJRJtmiV66JThka_oKX5u2HLR_b6v6ny-uvS8HPWKogG_-6CSUI_LIwZQfcdMMi66QHNuttLSvs5Y0x_urBDbfJvfZhZMCy6qYz_doJP3v3YdxX5UD4w0JO_reKGCn4xEGGsQwWUOjYRarHjOrefcC-mhom2V6i52jHg1v0cjxo0YhWw5-AFo99JO5Ah4bwJ0Er/42y/RxN8-J8gTfW8iUCc2p1uZQ/h8/5G155ULaakxTXgMMR15kr7gZWmx93Ajdcs3JJLI_AxQ)**

[](https://an.collectivepac.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953w5O3Wwmdygae0W-34efSvb_hfX51xtIkq_nCgr0tl8iRqUTOndcJRC4vm20WcsKLiPdSybIoA2sKQqZsRLZ5LCVYQVtB0aKdXE2steMUqTebouF2Gp9uaOLBXT8NY1x9r1XBp1aN9rex9QvoJJDmuFsAdnPEIyeWHTlv2rXGefZ6A72d_JSY2VrWJURG36tRZR9c3_LYY_xXr3o8WAtJFec_IqYpszvkKwPOh9h_9l57-1L8jJHGmzmro22NFnpNaLjKIts7nWw-BeDdKW_mS27Cfqt_52xBplqn9eUPekud0hpkDO_zcsy6igjVyvFqB1eagZ-AhUUFTj11lOuymqCsc7j1T7Za2AaSjrSm7lg2J5uZ-l4E1SU2kMQW0SthE/42y/RxN8-J8gTfW8iUCc2p1uZQ/h15/86iuE2uE_IJELJIZLDop2JmKP1aixQ4Hm7ROobAbpmI) The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. clean_body: | | If you want to help The Collective PAC build Black political power up and down the ballot, and across the country, then you’re in the right place. If you'd like to unsubscribe | | Can you believe it, Peter? The first primary of 2024 is in TWO DAYS. This is just the beginning of what’s sure to be one of the most important election years of our lifetime, and we need to be prepared. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Peter, there’s so much at stake in 2024. And with dangerous Republican extremists like Trump and Ron DeSantis fighting for the Republican presidential nomination, either outcome is a threat to our democracy. We know Republicans are ready to flood the 2024 elections with dark money, so we have to fight back now. If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | | | | | | Thank you for all your hard work, The Collective PAC The Collective PAC is strategically focused on creating a truly equitable democracy where our nation’s local, state and federal governments have diverse and talented elected leadership and Black people are fully represented in positions of power to create the policies necessary to progress our communities forward. Since our inception in 2016, we have helped 110 candidates win general elections at the local, state and federal levels. We strive to support the next wave of progressive and unapologetic Black candidates who will usher in a sea of change in our political system while helping America fulfill its promise of democracy by creating a government that will truly be for the people and of the people. name: Lucas Kunce for U.S. Senate
subject: January 6 wasn’t the first time Hawley ran away from his duty
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Lucas Kunce for Missouri
body:
[gif]
#
Peter,
**January 6 wasn't the first time we’ve seen Josh Hawley run away from his duty.**
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42608?refcode=em20240113-4599&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=4599%2E614464%2EiVWmRc)
**[CHIP IN TO BEAT HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42608?refcode=em20240113-4599&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=2&akid=4599%2E614464%2EiVWmRc)**
With the freedom to control our own lives and bodies under attack, Josh Hawley has turned his Senate office into a family business dedicated to criminalizing abortion.
When veterans like me who were exposed to toxic burn pits were counting on Hawley to vote for the healthcare we’ve earned, he turned his back on us.
And when Missouri’s working families and everyday communities were getting gutted by outsourcing and corporate consolidation, Josh helped Wall Street and Corporate America cut overtime pay for hundreds of thousands of Missouri workers.
**Now, Missourians are taking notice.** They don’t like what they’ve seen from Hawley. Even Donald Trump knows Josh is in trouble.
[](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42608?refcode=em20240113-4599&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=3&akid=4599%2E614464%2EiVWmRc)
**[CHIP IN TO BEAT HAWLEY →](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42608?refcode=em20240113-4599&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=4&akid=4599%2E614464%2EiVWmRc)**
**I’m Lucas Kunce, the 13-year Marine veteran, antitrust advocate, and Democrat on a mission to defeat Josh Hawley and take back power for working Missourians.** We’ve built a record-breaking grassroots movement, without a cent from corporate PACs, to flip Missouri’s U.S. Senate seat and put everyday people in charge of our country.
The GOP insiders supporting Hawley know we can win. So they spent all last year spending BIG to tear me and our movement down. Now that it’s officially election year, there’s no telling what else they’ll do to keep their grip on this seat. So I’m asking:
**[Will you rush your first donation to my campaign today so we can defeat Josh Hawley? Hawley has the lowest approval rating of any GOP Senator running for re-election this year, and with multiple recent polls confirming this race is in a statistical tie, we have a real opportunity to flip this Senate seat in November.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42608?refcode=em20240113-4599&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=5&akid=4599%2E614464%2EiVWmRc)**
If you've stored your info with ActBlue Express, we'll process your contribution instantly:
[Contribute $10](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42609?refcode=em20240113-4599&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=10&t=6&akid=4599%2E614464%2EiVWmRc) [Contribute $25](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42609?refcode=em20240113-4599&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=25&t=7&akid=4599%2E614464%2EiVWmRc) [Contribute $30](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42609?refcode=em20240113-4599&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=30&t=8&akid=4599%2E614464%2EiVWmRc) [Contribute $50](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42609?refcode=em20240113-4599&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=50&t=9&akid=4599%2E614464%2EiVWmRc) [Contribute $100](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42609?refcode=em20240113-4599&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=100&t=10&akid=4599%2E614464%2EiVWmRc) [Contribute $250](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42609?refcode=em20240113-4599&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amount=250&t=11&akid=4599%2E614464%2EiVWmRc) [Give another amount](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/42608?refcode=em20240113-4599&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=12&akid=4599%2E614464%2EiVWmRc)

Thanks for all your help,
Lucas Kunce

name: Jeff Merkley
subject: Our 2024 goals
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jeff Merkley for Oregon
body:
Our Senate Democratic Majority is on the line in November and we need to win 7 out of 7 competitive Senate races to hold it.
|
---
| | Our 2024 goals are clear:
* Flip the House
* Defend the Senate Democratic Majority
* Hold the White House

**It's time to organize to win. We'll have to take on right-wing dark money and disinformation, but our grassroots team is strong, and I know we can get it done.** Republicans have shown time and time again that they're not interested in governing. They want to use their majority in the House to slash the social safety net, give tax breaks to corporate polluters, and gut our civil rights. Not on our watch. With our Democratic majority in the Senate, we'll stop them in their tracks. But here's the situation: we can't stop them if we're not in the majority. Our Senate Democratic Majority is on the line in November, and we need to win 7 out of 7 competitive Senate races — including some incredibly difficult ones in states like Montana, Ohio, and Arizona and purple states like Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin — to hold the Democratic Majority and stand against the Republicans' out-of-touch agenda. [**Will you join us today by making a contribution towards The Blue Wave Project's goal of defending the Democratic Senate Majority? clean_body: Our Senate Democratic Majority is on the line in November and we need to win 7 out of 7 competitive Senate races to hold it. | | | Our 2024 goals are clear: Flip the House Defend the Senate Democratic Majority Hold the White House It's time to organize to win. We'll have to take on right-wing dark money and disinformation, but our grassroots team is strong, and I know we can get it done. Republicans have shown time and time again that they're not interested in governing. They want to use their majority in the House to slash the social safety net, give tax breaks to corporate polluters, and gut our civil rights. Not on our watch. With our Democratic majority in the Senate, we'll stop them in their tracks. But here's the situation: we can't stop them if we're not in the majority. Our Senate Democratic Majority is on the line in November, and we need to win 7 out of 7 competitive Senate races — including some incredibly difficult ones in states like Montana, Ohio, and Arizona and purple states like Michigan, Nevada, Pennsylvania, and Wisconsin — to hold the Democratic Majority and stand against the Republicans' out-of-touch agenda. = Onward! My name is Jon Tester.

I'm the Senate's only working dirt farmer. I lost three fingers in a meat grinding accident when I was younger. I get a $12 flattop haircut. Most of my shirts are stained with dirt.

**Montana values are in my bones. And I'm sure as hell going to win this race.**

But I’ll need your help to overcome the millions of dollars in attacks and win this toss-up race:

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: I’ve seen the world’s dangers and stood up for freedom
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
This is my most critical mission to date, and I am counting on you to enlist in the fight | [Unsubscribe](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=098387ea2d5c48a6a953600881d5155a&_t=SnHM5XCv5JeUFEQfnjHUaxFyDpFGqxAwUJwMltO8jfp-y1xI3Hy4wMjeoqc8K3nyqlElz2Y5KYYR-VpILNL_di2Zh0GRjai2-IEPEmfDsL0%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_s=098387ea2d5c48a6a953600881d5155a&_t=SnHM5XCv5JeUFEQfnjHUaxFyDpFGqxAwUJwMltO8jfp-y1xI3Hy4wMjeoqc8K3nyqlElz2Y5KYYR-VpILNL_di2Zh0GRjai2-IEPEmfDsL0%3D)
---
[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=098387ea2d5c48a6a953600881d5155a&_e=CMBUvlQRfxOhkfO9fXfQ4L0GfX3Qs3lVfNmL8lLXYwUPCX05n4x2TvSTezWTcJ4RO6t00sITQ1phTSvUH6FMhM2TqSt2VDbwew3kNd8Q5cD6VO1MjIqP8fKfD4r0BTuIaZLVsPXoaKa5eYnOWAK0BwN4HMMtm8qc8lqp_3H3HDjb9YcOQO1UsSk2e8As0dzlYjxtZOs5dL_q0wTRO6X7W8yomMSK0OyX3f_dbwUEx7UoadrTonKgriYiP0-rDpneKbhowlfQgdxo-D08aS46Aejcz02CCGr7HdTWffL8K7QxR2fGvbLP2QRH2PrGkp2nrpNqayhzZ4DYWiusW23lQ7I9bmWpv_M7qbUYVR-LtrkdvGR13Ota0kr4Fp8vChgIPHRJ5Q1B3bhlBkmpfVZNdYkYuDEjc36ePszJIr0-ZvQ%3D)

Peter,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=098387ea2d5c48a6a953600881d5155a&_e=CMBUvlQRfxOhkfO9fXfQ4L0GfX3Qs3lVfNmL8lLXYwUPCX05n4x2TvSTezWTcJ4RO6t00sITQ1phTSvUH6FMhM2TqSt2VDbwew3kNd8Q5cD6VO1MjIqP8fKfD4r0BTuIaZLVsPXoaKa5eYnOWAK0BwN4HMMtm8qc8lqp_3H3HDjb9YcOQO1UsSk2e8As0dzlYjxtZOs5dL_q0wTRO6X7W8yomMSK0OyX3f_dbwUEx7UoadrTonKgriYiP0-rDpneP5b7fzwKlAFVxIf-ftzhkdmU0a35jwQ4tpJKb_6iS3btWwvF_5J9K4V7Nkgd5lVf61bSaOTC_C9uUj5YVLHcXea4XzpRNsj5dn0B-C_gdDvh1ZYoVcD6qkhOt_V23JDlJv60G5-1HIjNhOuXuszHrsoM71rG7FuCH7PGLy16Wi8%3D)**.

[](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=098387ea2d5c48a6a953600881d5155a&_e=CMBUvlQRfxOhkfO9fXfQ4L0GfX3Qs3lVfNmL8lLXYwUPCX05n4x2TvSTezWTcJ4RO6t00sITQ1phTSvUH6FMhM2TqSt2VDbwew3kNd8Q5cD6VO1MjIqP8fKfD4r0BTuIaZLVsPXoaKa5eYnOWAK0BwN4HMMtm8qc8lqp_3H3HDjb9YcOQO1UsSk2e8As0dzlYjxtZOs5dL_q0wTRO6X7W8yomMSK0OyX3f_dbwUEx7UoadrTonKgriYiP0-rDpne2rZuM1ZvhofWmK83ZA1hdcm1lXQBGHiH8iw2VMOmjIkNn8K1PqwF760WjIXRoh05UJiuV6RDqMZGKniO3U0tz3Cwk-5Qqx9PGPZCFLMKdn1UIl6T9oFSpuS3XRFQoxtHNI6hpU8ZcWoPhSOuCJeRr-ROsf6ymwJRRmxNZXwY2vk%3D)
In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

**[Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.](http://links.itsourgreatamerica.com/u/click?_t=442fb7cf105f4725a8bda0b6bcffc1bd&_m=098387ea2d5c48a6a953600881d5155a&_e=CMBUvlQRfxOhkfO9fXfQ4L0GfX3Qs3lVfNmL8lLXYwUPCX05n4x2TvSTezWTcJ4RO6t00sITQ1phTSvUH6FMhM2TqSt2VDbwew3kNd8Q5cD6VO1MjIqP8fKfD4r0BTuIaZLVsPXoaKa5eYnOWAK0BwN4HMMtm8qc8lqp_3H3HDjb9YcOQO1UsSk2e8As0dzlYjxtZOs5dL_q0wTRO6X7W8yomMSK0OyX3f_dbwUEx7UoadrTonKgriYiP0-rDpneKAdeeOnS_Rd-1oyx4ft2quyBt0U-l7AQz-nhUc2ZlO6Lbyqa56ujDGYR6qqWdsP99WXejNAxwYXXOTMyh4F82qgv3CD47wlyN1Ajj8HgtXW8xtvW8eQFaPig29AR1h5QVs6r-2QrUmv1jKLofDWLUuERd6AUB4x-uPKzqdho-HA%3D)**

_**Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. **_

Peter, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

_**Are you sitting down?**_

We are currently on pace for _**MORE THAN 12 MILLION**_ people to have entered the United States illegally under Joe Biden’s watch.

**Fellow Conservative, that number is comparable to the population of the entire state of Ohio.**

Democrats immediately deride any border visit as a “field trip,” trying to distract from the most critical policy failure on their watch.

But think about it ... instead of passing any sort of meaningful legislation that secures the border, _**Democrats spend their time tweeting about why we Republicans shouldn’t draw attention to the problem**_. That’s how far the Democrats are from figuring out a solution.

**About Jim Jordan:** Leading the fight to hold Washington accountable.

**
In Washington, Jim Jordan is focused on his oversight role, helping lead investigations into federal agencies

In Congress, Jim Jordan continued to fight for fiscal responsibility,and he offered the only balanced budget of any member of the House or Senate.

As a state legislator, he took on the powerful special interests and the leaders from both political parties who wanted to put Ohio on an unsustainable path of higher taxes and spending.

He built a conservative, pro-family voting record, and authored an alternative state budget that balanced without raising taxes. He became the only legislator in state history to win both the Defender of Life award from Ohio Right to Life and the Pro-Life Legislator of the Year award from the United Conservatives of Ohio.

name: Bob Casey
subject: The greatest honor of my lifetime
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
The reality is, I’m facing the toughest re-election race of my career. |
#
Hi there, it’s Bob Casey. Some people call me “Senator,” my daughters call me “dad,” my two grandsons call me “Bomba,” but most just call me “Bob.” **[You may have already read emails from us and know what our campaign is all about. If you do, I hope you’ll take a second to split $10 between my campaign and Tina Smith.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77032441/449155469/-2111347600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20240113_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDc3YzNmYi0zNWIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9QCZHrX6kpooN6cKb6WcwhmHRphEvfs5bK_bVSzv70=)** If you haven’t, I hope you’ll take a second to read a little bit more about me, this race, and why I’m fighting so hard for Pennsylvania families in Washington. I have served the people of Pennsylvania as Auditor General, State Treasurer, and now U.S. Senator – but the greatest job of all has been being a husband to my wife Terese, a dad to Elyse, Caroline, Julia, and Marena, and a grandfather to Max and Aiden. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77032442/449155471/-2111347600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20240113_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDc3YzNmYi0zNWIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9QCZHrX6kpooN6cKb6WcwhmHRphEvfs5bK_bVSzv70=) _(Scranton, 2018)_ I’m blessed every day to have my family by my side as I fight for the priorities that matter most to Pennsylvanians. Issues like bringing jobs back to our Commonwealth, lowering costs for seniors and people with disabilities, making childcare more affordable, and protecting vital programs like Social Security, Medicare, and Medicaid. **The reality is, I’m facing the toughest re-election race of my career.** Mitch McConnell is prepared to funnel millions upon millions into PA to defeat me and flip this seat red, so we need the resources to fight back. **[That’s why I’m reaching out to you today, friend. Will you split any amount between my campaign and Tina Smith today so I can continue fighting for PA families like mine in the Senate?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77032443/449155472/-2111347600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20240113_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDc3YzNmYi0zNWIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9QCZHrX6kpooN6cKb6WcwhmHRphEvfs5bK_bVSzv70=)** | [CHIP IN](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77032444/449155475/-2111347600?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=AU_TSM_FR_TAN_GEN_AC60_20240113_AM1_V1_S3&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS83OTU1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiZDc3YzNmYi0zNWIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=i9QCZHrX6kpooN6cKb6WcwhmHRphEvfs5bK_bVSzv70=)
---
With gratitude,
Bob

Peter, Americans deserve representatives in Congress who defend democracy and the fundamental rights of all Americans. That’s what I spent my _career_ doing as a public servant within the U.S. State Department. While Tom Kean was passively sitting back and taking no action as chaos ran wild inside the House GOP, I’ve been telling New Jerseyans about my decades of work battling autocrats, terrorists, and drug dealers overseas. body:
I know it's easy to

| [](http://links.dolanforsenate.com/u/click?_t=879ec3883fbb432d91bdf6fa5c9b36c6&_m=a74ab392c36f4373be3d7a9e8932def3&_e=DH5gGiG5mHVkKZPeWq50WcuiVU-Fbl_Wy_WjvGx_gEjDt1bbjm29lCA3j_S3ZmeXh0SF0O5lvhT7m1DdQLWfgFyLDhkb1Vb-ws0EeYhv_FLnpF6r8NL4wt5NQf0TXhuC368OcRuerMG_UqEnhXq8j-VPbqtuKIOaVQbQZN6QKeZ2DDY0mI_XyoutuoFTGwx4cuCb321q7xjlmfNalb_8PqXXuqAMqfyvyTKmWm6eDFcZmTJC_6-g5wijOOAaUUuYsOrp_7H_S5Z3GjcSImz19MHeLdYW5vlWaMsUkscSW2JQHnfI0OWz9HzdiBnDEyEq)

name: Replace Sinema
subject: Another f*ck you to President Biden from Sinema
body:
Sinema will do anything for a buck | | | Peter – Earlier this week, Kyrsten Sinema sent another “f*ck you” message to Democrats and President Biden. Despite having voted for nearly 100 of Donald Trump’s judges, including anti-abortion and anti-LGBT extremists, Kyrsten Sinema decided to oppose a perfectly qualified Biden nominee to sit on the District Court in Colorado. The nominee was the first Black judge on his previous court, came recommended by Colorado’s Democratic Senators, and had a history as a labor rights attorney. The nominee, Judge Crews, was so strong that even some Republicans joined every Democrat to support him. But Sinema just wanted to stick it to President Biden and Democrats yet again. body:

Friend,
I'm reaching out to you today not just as a candidate, but as someone deeply concerned about the alarming direction our country is taking. The story of Brittany Watts from Ohio is not just a headline; it's a chilling reminder of the reality facing women in our country today.
Brittany's ordeal began with a miscarriage - a heartbreaking event experienced by 1 in 3 pregnant women. Yet, instead of compassion and support, she faced criminal charges. This isn't just an isolated incident: it's part of a larger, more disturbing trend where an extreme faction of the Republican Party is seeking to criminalize women's reproductive health.
Imagine the trauma of losing a pregnancy, then being thrust into a legal battle for your fundamental rights. This is happening right here, right now, in America.
Brittany's story ended with the charges being dropped, but the fact that she was charged at all is a stark warning of what's at stake. I refuse to stand by as women's rights are stripped away. It's time to fight back. But I can't do this alone. [Your support is crucial in this fight. clean_body: Thankfully, a grand jury of declined to go along but this is happening more and more. | | | | == Friend, I'm reaching out to you today not just as a candidate, but as someone deeply concerned about the alarming direction our country is taking. The story of Brittany Watts from Ohio is not just a headline; it's a chilling reminder of the reality facing women in our country today. Brittany's ordeal began with a miscarriage - a heartbreaking event experienced by 1 in 3 pregnant women. Yet, instead of compassion and support, she faced criminal charges. This isn't just an isolated incident: it's part of a larger, more disturbing trend where an extreme faction of the Republican Party is seeking to criminalize women's reproductive health. Imagine the trauma of losing a pregnancy, then being thrust into a legal battle for your fundamental rights. This is happening right here, right now, in America. Brittany's story ended with the charges being dropped, but the fact that she was charged at all is a stark warning of what's at stake. I refuse to stand by as women's rights are stripped away. It's time to fight back. But I can't do this alone. == | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | == | == | == | | == | == | == | Donate == | We are in a pivotal moment in history. name: Mario at United We Dream Action
subject: I didn’t understand my undocumented status until I tried to get my driver’s permit
body:
| | | Hi Peter, I didn’t know what my undocumented status meant until I was 16 years old and trying to get my driver’s permit, just like every other kid I went to school with. I was deemed different, though, because my family overstayed our visa after leaving Guatemala in 2001. As I got older, the challenges I faced because of my status only grew, until the DACA program started and my world opened up. Because I was protected by DACA, I was able to finish college, advance in my career, and even go back to school to get my MBA in 2019. I can live and work without the constant fear of deportation. I’ve traveled to 38 states and am working on visiting all 50 someday soon. The United States is my home, and it’s terrifying to think the DACA program that allowed me to build a life here could possibly be reversed by the Supreme Court this year. **That’s why United We Dream Action is gearing up for not only the DACA fights ahead, but ALSO to secure a pathway to citizenship for all 11 million undocumented people. DACA was never enough, and now is the time to use our momentum to fight for more. Will you join us with a donation today:** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | | [express donate: $10](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953y62hYNn9HaFt_zHKvI4OP8JbUkD225KGoMCb-FmBF-38SnKZIc3Bx6ndnMrIm7q3VWhlFtJR5XjzMlv5hWqN8x0NwKJPKFpFmqZm2AfKezNTcEZW0jJrJjcZxN731Svqsddl_xNKnnRVzmBqVpk_GJQom1xEY2Pj0PrM9ndnCb1umdjLokI87XS1hm7RkqwIc-ZQhYwCmSu2JtVXm1J5QCg8trgEHAC4LF3AGBGyakq2jVx3S74YYnkw_LMQuIf8QRgdvCco39gKrJN-8IGIUfRbRKDqW__CE5QPZTpKNKq84N8xb3PqYHGVvsCoovTh4wZPFHdHPfPJ-Ncav60MnMAgzDXr_jTXu3ku4KQa7GtCptqevxQ5EkuKinEjluRDwRRb6NStcwkehZzbr8hLYk2RCLAVCDysySCsL_FIKNBdNnoQSQuk-81c6sn5SqwtoGeTCNQQbh3Giz94YCtZv36bFjHaLGt9aIAWxEERdficDND8a1sMonDeuTn04EtKtyL8AI7lMRgujayFYj71kMm_LJcEySPFhwck2yazqeRQ/42y/p9Le-bF8RNiK2wUQqbcg1A/h0/dYCsDrBOprs5oV0fmLr_aT6iBqlXLZ3ugFcNEcEZTjE)

Mario, United We Dream Action
