clean_body: | | | Hi Peter, I didn’t know what my undocumented status meant until I was 16 years old and trying to get my driver’s permit, just like every other kid I went to school with. I was deemed different, though, because my family overstayed our visa after leaving Guatemala in 2001. As I got older, the challenges I faced because of my status only grew, until the DACA program started and my world opened up. Because I was protected by DACA, I was able to finish college, advance in my career, and even go back to school to get my MBA in 2019. I can live and work without the constant fear of deportation. I’ve traveled to 38 states and am working on visiting all 50 someday soon. The United States is my home, and it’s terrifying to think the DACA program that allowed me to build a life here could possibly be reversed by the Supreme Court this year. That’s why United We Dream Action is gearing up for not only the DACA fights ahead, but ALSO to secure a pathway to citizenship for all 11 million undocumented people. DACA was never enough, and now is the time to use our momentum to fight for more. Will you join us with a donation today: If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | | | | I’m involved in the UWDA community because I know this is a group of immigrants and allies that always work together to support each other even when all hope seems lost. We will continue to fight for immigrant rights until all of us can live in the country we call home without fear of deportation or losing our loved ones. Thanks for being on our team, Mario, United We Dream Action

name: Kamala Harris
subject: Tomorrow
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Biden for President
body:
A majority of Americans do not agree with the GOP’s hateful and dangerous agenda -- but we need to make sure voters are aware of this choice in 2024. | | |
---
Peter, I know you’re busy, so I’ll be direct. Monday is the Iowa Caucus, which means Joe and I will have an official Republican opponent in no time. (And we have a pretty good guess of who it may be.) Once Republicans have their nominee, we’ll face a new barrage of attacks, there will be an influx of dark money, and the GOP will throw their whole playbook at us. **_The only way Joe and I can fight back is with people like you by our side._** [Before Republicans caucus in Iowa, will you rush just $5 to our campaign to ensure whoever their nominee is loses in November?](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZRof5tOr_McSDl340cJ372Kxf_4Tv9lJOAKPf8Y0XBoI8LG0Xr3EDvqsIqQIJBf9WmHvSRqKaAY0U91SkJnJ7PHe76IcZrtf4dfUAyq1RQxjGyVyJgWeO78lrsv0mYZO0UO4VNzLnjg901LPO1LVgrrrq4IqypAdxKyLzyiRLjoz_uYWdrlRHzbO-aGoNeDU_bu_wgOQaWTscExw-qJbtQvy7lzaSANr5yMUI9gifEzkytUpGsQjZibCW5l6lfyVOzWX_s2c_OccQq9UrcqgI5mHMI8h2eM77CSZny4WO4_7QfZRAuNLHIb7gB1VhJfX_/42y/91gf3lfaShm8TGGHf5u3jg/h0/r6oDKLDH9Y3Rk0ePm4ZVD4uui8QKFFFGtaA1KeS_oGA) | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Peter, while the Republicans have been in a race to the bottom to see who can be the most extreme, Joe and I continue to be focused on delivering progress for the American people.
To make sure that we can protect our hard-fought freedoms and fundamental rights in 2025, we’re counting on this team to invest in our campaign to help ramp up our operations. _Keeping pace with the future Republican nominee will come down to if we are able to fund more ads, hire more staff, and set up more field offices. We’re counting on you, Peter._
[Will you contribute your first $5 today? I want you to know that your donation isn’t just a drop in the bucket -- it’s an investment in this campaign and in a future we can all be proud of.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/wehEm_vu1NBVXOKYSqOxTOi34aJoCJC1EivM7Ih953yEOQgSlkg29MQMFLkzVkhZRof5tOr_McSDl340cJ372Kxf_4Tv9lJOAKPf8Y0XBoI8LG0Xr3EDvqsIqQIJBf9WmHvSRqKaAY0U91SkJnJ7PHe76IcZrtf4dfUAyq1RQxi-W3GCuZmgQVMWul7P5txfKC4O7ng8pAyNkozVUyJuPNYZht-5qEyQP3pzAZ8pLnL3pzANvzq1AIjiqCNWNTJ1NeUpNfb3FKDjYua5n0jKjESkSlFjL2p7YiL-gRG7-mYjIipjHpXzGLSBsq-Ij055fdTq9ELDufVdxW7gP9-0_UwAs_cdAvVDk9UvuhHtgN_e4uxmKKbgxi0wgVUu6qZU/42y/91gf3lfaShm8TGGHf5u3jg/h7/GJNXO3vPWPpnCsTlKNT1YQVyZu-p9VbnaxFbisemoXM)
Thank you for your support today and every day,
Kamala

clean_body: A majority of Americans do not agree with the GOP’s hateful and dangerous agenda -- but we need to make sure voters are aware of this choice in 2024. | | | Peter, I know you’re busy, so I’ll be direct. Monday is the Iowa Caucus, which means Joe and I will have an official Republican opponent in no time. (And we have a pretty good guess of who it may be.) Once Republicans have their nominee, we’ll face a new barrage of attacks, there will be an influx of dark money, and the GOP will throw their whole playbook at us. The only way Joe and I can fight back is with people like you by our side. | If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | | | | | | Peter, while the Republicans have been in a race to the bottom to see who can be the most extreme, Joe and I continue to be focused on delivering progress for the American people. To make sure that we can protect our hard-fought freedoms and fundamental rights in 2025, we’re counting on this team to invest in our campaign to help ramp up our operations. Keeping pace with the future Republican nominee will come down to if we are able to fund more ads, hire more staff, and set up more field offices. We’re counting on you, Peter. Thank you for your support today and every day, Kamala Kamala Harris Vice President of the United States

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77036869/449164880/-2024045026?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmRlODE2MS0zY2IyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-E-MDVdwgcp4S8450kex-DY1nsVzrn-qE7bP2bBWRRE=&emci=af622381-17af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=62de8161-3cb2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=29359352)
---

| | Peter — We're facing a critical moment in the fight for reproductive freedom. The Supreme Court is deciding the fate of mifepristone — a crucial abortion medication. **More than**** _half_****of all abortions in this country depend on this drug.** If banned, it'll effectively block safe abortion options nationwide. The White House calls this an "extreme and dangerous abortion ban." **Despite being FDA-approved and safe, right-wing groups are relentlessly pushing to ban mifepristone, and it's finally made it's way onto the Supreme Court's docket.** The same Supreme Court that overturned _Roe._ [**Sign the petition and help make it abundantly clear that we won't stand by as our rights are eroded.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77036871/449164888/-191543940?source=direct_link&referrer=group-elect-lynn-peterson&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-lynn-peterson%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2024-01-mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmRlODE2MS0zY2IyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-E-MDVdwgcp4S8450kex-DY1nsVzrn-qE7bP2bBWRRE=&emci=af622381-17af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=62de8161-3cb2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=29359352) [SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77036872/449164898/-191543940?source=direct_link&referrer=group-elect-lynn-peterson&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-lynn-peterson%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2024-01-mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmRlODE2MS0zY2IyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-E-MDVdwgcp4S8450kex-DY1nsVzrn-qE7bP2bBWRRE=&emci=af622381-17af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=62de8161-3cb2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=29359352) This issue is beyond politics — it's about our autonomy, our freedom, and our right to make our own informed health care decisions. [**Join me today in calling for the Supreme Court to protect access to mifepristone and preserve our fundamental rights.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77036873/449164905/-191543940?source=direct_link&referrer=group-elect-lynn-peterson&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsecure.actblue.com%2Fdonate%2Fstand-with-lynn-peterson%3Frefcode%3Dpet-2024-01-mifepristone&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84MzU0NSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MmRlODE2MS0zY2IyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=-E-MDVdwgcp4S8450kex-DY1nsVzrn-qE7bP2bBWRRE=&emci=af622381-17af-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=62de8161-3cb2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=29359352) _Lynn _ |

name: Tim Sheehy, Navy SEAL
subject: Our homeland is in danger
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TIM SHEEHY FOR MONTANA
body:
I could never have imagined that perhaps the toughest mission of my life wouldn’t be as a Navy SEAL but rather as a combat veteran preparing to run for the United States Senate. | [Unsubscribe](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=4b994ecfd5fc47cd9e7adb454dae5083&_t=f704I8BquT6PULJZIe8OtWAl0_KIhlvBu4TaKcCzlmTeH_KIx2KteI6Nqk_EfLvEfOhN1OU8l7JCHGYcIJNGXVvlrUvMwGom0XSYb5NX9Jg%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.bestamericanow.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_s=4b994ecfd5fc47cd9e7adb454dae5083&_t=f704I8BquT6PULJZIe8OtWAl0_KIhlvBu4TaKcCzlmTeH_KIx2KteI6Nqk_EfLvEfOhN1OU8l7JCHGYcIJNGXVvlrUvMwGom0XSYb5NX9Jg%3D)
---
[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4b994ecfd5fc47cd9e7adb454dae5083&_e=736oHhEqkJCnT_6cXb66e1lmpEFdsQ14YHbA3WkDvEmCepz6ywjf3_JxUb28ZY6MR5cCxHl_jXu6B1bPwg533bebuai16ZXA66mGT6NVFcUpVBmRomUqxafMkkUX5kLwUb70WGqHTxtgPpdFW42xO9QrYjnRyvuxe_YXFUiGG2_Y8hnUuVkRtsjHmrs8dnyS2HAqAVhirtyplR85vEond_OyZYcuO_wdsoUS9R4KVvyt0rWPdpXydelLpwyM-q7HWhAW29JUedRaZ_ddiPXlFoitSWCaxAu6r6IH4moQClLY-qs-IYsy0tAN5sYLeKnpemCQtyatGgVGEu0qqtJwdsXQEEMOGcpbLYInFivQE-WqH7KhN3YmHtLZwoiMOH6DPIaA1zL_Qnnty8A8NMcwIstjWup7Z18BCSE1vNJgmIQ%3D)

Peter,

**As a former Navy SEAL and combat veteran, I’ve seen my fair share of battle.** Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams.

My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority.

**[I'm reaching out today to make the case that I'm worth your personal endorsement](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4b994ecfd5fc47cd9e7adb454dae5083&_e=736oHhEqkJCnT_6cXb66e1lmpEFdsQ14YHbA3WkDvEmCepz6ywjf3_JxUb28ZY6MR5cCxHl_jXu6B1bPwg533bebuai16ZXA66mGT6NVFcUpVBmRomUqxafMkkUX5kLwUb70WGqHTxtgPpdFW42xO9QrYjnRyvuxe_YXFUiGG2_Y8hnUuVkRtsjHmrs8dnyS2HAqAVhirtyplR85vEond_OyZYcuO_wdsoUS9R4KVvyt0rWPdpXydelLpwyM-q7HWhAW29JUedRaZ_ddiPXlFmKIUZKIc-ecMvR9GQAfwVISXa8k0ik09bdov3EayS0PowQlruKeBlt3FKXlhm1b5gjwBrL3t1vTuxw06OJU08eS5Aa8mz8w-yaUGAbR_OVcBsOZmCvVOLOZgxJ_dBwwXHDkz07i-AAAJrIQFAROrn0%3D)**.

[](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4b994ecfd5fc47cd9e7adb454dae5083&_e=736oHhEqkJCnT_6cXb66e1lmpEFdsQ14YHbA3WkDvEmCepz6ywjf3_JxUb28ZY6MR5cCxHl_jXu6B1bPwg533bebuai16ZXA66mGT6NVFcUpVBmRomUqxafMkkUX5kLwUb70WGqHTxtgPpdFW42xO9QrYjnRyvuxe_YXFUiGG2_Y8hnUuVkRtsjHmrs8dnyS2HAqAVhirtyplR85vEond_OyZYcuO_wdsoUS9R4KVvyt0rWPdpXydelLpwyM-q7HWhAW29JUedRaZ_ddiPXlFtvfWDScLOFMtK1O7jaJKfhsmi1d1CZRJTLyMhPBjyPQywyzf-UzVKtqJekyb2k-0oB5zJ4DAa8vm1UQ1h4Hz5LwTz_dv1EYxUmVTOSLhnizJjOGqhlYJ0d5QVb0WQEdHRB3HRf3uQeHlySfK9MR70A%3D)
In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [**many veterans like me**] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally **sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport** so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead.

Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. _**Not service in politics, but on the battlefield.**_ I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free.

**[Today, I’m reaching out to ask you to personally endorse my campaign to become the next U.S. Senator from Montana.](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=4b994ecfd5fc47cd9e7adb454dae5083&_e=736oHhEqkJCnT_6cXb66e1lmpEFdsQ14YHbA3WkDvEmCepz6ywjf3_JxUb28ZY6MR5cCxHl_jXu6B1bPwg533bebuai16ZXA66mGT6NVFcUpVBmRomUqxafMkkUX5kLwUb70WGqHTxtgPpdFW42xO9QrYjnRyvuxe_YXFUiGG2_Y8hnUuVkRtsjHmrs8dnyS2HAqAVhirtyplR85vEond_OyZYcuO_wdsoUS9R4KVvyt0rWPdpXydelLpwyM-q7HWhAW29JUedRaZ_ddiPXlFkdS0PnJe6v2tod2sRWb3QXqeegae8M2xuFVklYOu7Bd3olAJSZztrGAehfYbNGvD3rL05swLCq14ix919FAH3P0rguR9RHRCYL2VwhJN2fuJreLNut94o1LXx-Ry4VD0jqT6GJVk6R1TMXhcFYqdj4%3D)**

_**Chuck Schumer and Washington Democrats know that I pose a direct threat to their chances of holding on to power, and they'll do anything to stop me from winning this race - and spend $100M plus in the process. **_

Peter, I am under no illusions that you will support my campaign the first time you hear from me. But my life experiences have taught me that **anything worth having requires working tirelessly, breaking down walls, and moving mountains to get it.**

**I hope you will allow me to earn your support today by reading my entire message - I promise, it’s worth the read.**

In the Navy, finding yourself between a rock and a hard place is easy. This rings especially true for the individuals who have earned the honor of serving in the elite task force that is the Navy SEALs, a group of highly trained combat warriors – a brotherhood – in which I earned a spot following my graduation from the United States Naval Academy at Annapolis.

Between my and my wife’s service to our country, we’ve sacrificed years of our lives to make America a more safe and prosperous nation and to protect our God-given freedoms and liberties. We served so that our children and yours might grow up to realize their own American Dreams. My name is Tim Sheehy, Republican candidate for U.S. Senate from Montana. You probably don't know me, or if you do, likely from emails like this one. I’m a former U.S. Navy SEAL and a 2008 Naval Academy graduate. Right now, I'm the only person standing in the way of Chuck Schumer and his Senate majority. . In August 2021, I was putting out wildfires in California by day as part of the aerial firefighting company that I run; by night, my colleagues [many veterans like me] and I were working the phones trying to get our friends and allies out of Afghanistan before the takeover by the Taliban. I remember vividly that at one point I was trying to help an ally sneak through a tunnel to get him and his family to the airport so that they could be evacuated on a U.S. military aircraft. The Taliban wanted these high-value targets dead; they wanted their families dead. Unlike Joe Biden, I understand what it is to serve our country. Not service in politics, but on the battlefield. I’ve been wounded in service of our nation; I’ve lost mentors and friends who were willing to make the ultimate sacrifice so that future generations will be free. Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain.

After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom.

When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor.

Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide.

In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is personal and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

https://click.email.rondesantis.com/?qs=4761dd3ce245b13c0d8d7e6d16586501144a38eca19a5ffd04af673fbd1e47761f9fb0129ff846bdb4747559047e7ae204e9021a952a7bd667036deb8a392d2a

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has promised that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by immediately getting to work stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late.

In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He’s taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and won every single time. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon.

That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now.

Friend, For the first time in the 2024 presidential election cycle, voting will take place on Monday, January 15th. The special election is on February 13

**[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77038071/449168112/-1577754948?&refcode=E5963-20240112-TomSuozzi-Image-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjNmE2ODFlLTNlYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0OaqorlaN5WBEwrwVjJdQGHwv1a5hZ5puEDYbH5SXeE=)** Peter, My name is Tom Suozzi, and I’m running in the **toss-up special election on February 13 to replace the expelled George Santos.** If you want to know why I’m running for this must-win seat, it’s for my family. My parents taught my siblings and me to work hard, play by the rules, and help others. The hairstyles and patterns from back then may be a bit dated, but the values are timeless. My parents built the American Dream for us here on Long Island and I’m so thankful they did. **[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77038072/449168113/-1577754948?&refcode=E5963-20240112-TomSuozzi-Image-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjNmE2ODFlLTNlYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0OaqorlaN5WBEwrwVjJdQGHwv1a5hZ5puEDYbH5SXeE=)** Now as I look to my own kids, the American Dream is out of reach for so many. Endless bickering in Congress is preventing us from solving critical problems like climate change and the cost of living. We need to get back on track to build an America that the next generation can thrive in. [**That’s why I’m humbly asking if you’d split a donation between Future Forum PAC and me. Winning this toss-up special election in just a few weeks will be impossible without you by my side, and time is of the essence.**](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77038073/449168114/-1577754948?&refcode=E5963-20240112-TomSuozzi-SL-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjNmE2ODFlLTNlYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0OaqorlaN5WBEwrwVjJdQGHwv1a5hZ5puEDYbH5SXeE=) _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | [$5](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77038074/449168115/-1577754948?express_lane=true&&refcode=E5963-20240112-TomSuozzi-EG-Surrogate&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjNmE2ODFlLTNlYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0OaqorlaN5WBEwrwVjJdQGHwv1a5hZ5puEDYbH5SXeE=) | [$25](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77038075/449168116/-1577754948?express_lane=true&&refcode=E5963-20240112-TomSuozzi-EG-Surrogate&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzg1MzMzIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImVjNmE2ODFlLTNlYjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=0OaqorlaN5WBEwrwVjJdQGHwv1a5hZ5puEDYbH5SXeE=)

name: Pramila Jayapal
subject: I can't do this alone
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
It might be a new year, but we’re still stuck with the same chaotic GOP.
# [](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/892?refcode=em20240113-3388-footer&t=1&akid=3388%2E420207%2Exoq69R)
Peter,
It’s a new year, but we’re still stuck with the same chaotic, cruel GOP.
Congress needs to reach two fundraising deadlines to avert a government shutdown.
**Meanwhile, Republican legislators remain hell-bent on holding our economy hostage to pass a set of draconian immigration policies at the southern border.**
I’m not going to let this blatant display of brinkmanship and unbridled chaos from MAGA Republicans stand in the way of our ability to make real progress **— but I can't be in this fight alone.**
**It’s clear that we’re going to need a ton of resources to help stop another Congressional session from being hijacked by the GOP chaos caucus.**[**Can we count on you to chip in $3 or to ensure that our progressive movement can continue standing up and speaking out for our values and vision for the future?**](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240113.0pTgJ5&refcode=em20240113-3388&t=2&akid=3388%2E420207%2Exoq69R)
**[Donate ››](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/go/47393?c0=pj-email-20240113.0pTgJ5&refcode=em20240113-3388&t=21&akid=3388%2E420207%2Exoq69R)**
Onward,
Pramila Jayapal
**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20240113-3388-footer&t=22&refcode2=3388_420207_xoq69R&akid=3388%2E420207%2Exoq69R)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=23&akid=3388%2E420207%2Exoq69R)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=24&akid=3388%2E420207%2Exoq69R)

subject: Leaders Eat Last
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
If I win, it’s IMPOSSIBLE for Democrats to keep their Senate Majority
[Unsubscribe](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=8ca01ba9d8644a02a51cd5ff8d1216b4&_t=BrR1DHAwIXPAJW9XsK8nN_k869dStWriZnI0vqC4l3gE2m97D0ybuVVocxywos4D664wd0FhM_bSWNkp5WpDEqgOgSCZWEeEg9ulcM2ApeQ%3D) | [Mark as Junk](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_s=8ca01ba9d8644a02a51cd5ff8d1216b4&_t=BrR1DHAwIXPAJW9XsK8nN_k869dStWriZnI0vqC4l3gE2m97D0ybuVVocxywos4D664wd0FhM_bSWNkp5WpDEqgOgSCZWEeEg9ulcM2ApeQ%3D)

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=8ca01ba9d8644a02a51cd5ff8d1216b4&_e=HDXPpnrW3wtJRa9nKT637egZuxqJcmgmExQdvR6QhgP-vwp5XzkvJz0hRnlSs5tL-wXM39MR5v2K34HtJuPUxHrNlMuS_dEDYKOri7OXSrk8UJ5s8gcP9n6fjNawfrxiDVtbFyxYibMLWduVBciBmuR6HK5v1BNPSOUlFsZgc0yI71bHlsPxYlJBiD1tCAkIbDgmwyy4tjB7UrZ38QaRTOw7Wx133b9eySARhtmPN6Pi-fExpjjFj0vMjqHnuEMJNwzzvaWbdiunvbCSxJwbnX9GlXcQuGQSUM8BIuyztE9BFclXarcMOGJiZUX7JZgphtyA9CNKSQ4-ZqPn0am_IyjrxSL6uR1i7HIk5FPUXZo%3D)

Friend,

**There 's a saying in the military, "Leaders eat last." **

But if you were to say that to a DC politician, you might as well be speaking another language. **That 's because career politicians like the one I'm running to unseat ALWAYS eat first, leaving American families with NOTHING left on the table. **

I'm Dave McCormick, and I'm a West Point grad, combat vet who served in the 82nd Airborne Division, a Bronze Star recipient, 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, business leader and running in the _#1 battleground race that WILL decide the Senate Majority._

[](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=8ca01ba9d8644a02a51cd5ff8d1216b4&_e=HDXPpnrW3wtJRa9nKT637egZuxqJcmgmExQdvR6QhgP-vwp5XzkvJz0hRnlSs5tL-wXM39MR5v2K34HtJuPUxHrNlMuS_dEDYKOri7OXSrk8UJ5s8gcP9n6fjNawfrxiDVtbFyxYibMLWduVBciBmuR6HK5v1BNPSOUlFsZgc0yI71bHlsPxYlJBiD1tCAkIbDgmwyy4tjB7UrZ38QaRTP-_x0fuu6En8fxdwybJYvvdXGRgzWFk8dSKq-ea6HUCJ4NgP9nA8wly8LcVasm_OyLI2Boak27HKZizYbXlCN6xvAjpt_9vXptyBBUoDb6j5dtoNubMFsSWeBiRSe5FGe4wbWa3zVq7ZA83irpa4Bc%3D)

As a combat vet I've been on tough missions. But if I'm going to win my next mission to defeat a Democrat who's spent 16 years in DC & flip the Senate to GOP control, [I'm going to need your support.](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=8ca01ba9d8644a02a51cd5ff8d1216b4&_e=HDXPpnrW3wtJRa9nKT637egZuxqJcmgmExQdvR6QhgP-vwp5XzkvJz0hRnlSs5tL-wXM39MR5v2K34HtJuPUxHrNlMuS_dEDYKOri7OXSrk8UJ5s8gcP9n6fjNawfrxiDVtbFyxYibMLWduVBciBmuR6HK5v1BNPSOUlFsZgc0yI71bHlsPxYlJBiD1tCAkIbDgmwyy4tjB7UrZ38QaRTEkdBU-DLHZiKdOMM80_7R-aZKfuQtjt4CUvhnBwp3hcRog6WDRLy-3sn9XTpxk4CCyJnqhzzkBSf1jCRqalL2JOXmS83zoy3nc8nqsoYkf0kdpaGnbb_RidISyID8bIXPaMSISwfnKVSnqBvvCq9cg%3D)
[SEND A LEADER TO WASHINGTON](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=8ca01ba9d8644a02a51cd5ff8d1216b4&_e=HDXPpnrW3wtJRa9nKT637egZuxqJcmgmExQdvR6QhgP-vwp5XzkvJz0hRnlSs5tL-wXM39MR5v2K34HtJuPUxHrNlMuS_dEDYKOri7OXSrk8UJ5s8gcP9n6fjNawfrxiDVtbFyxYibMLWduVBciBmuR6HK5v1BNPSOUlFsZgc0yI71bHlsPxYlJBiD1tCAkIbDgmwyy4tjB7UrZ38QaRTGYkMWxmFDqSmZA1CUNThOYtb3w_pxVChtAuucrf2HWDnA4bwHuFXfZnnTMDmp98wypMFZF7_VLxYUZXwOmYp2cPkEnsux3qKwrIRL8h57og6t00I3kvHSvFCQZb-nEjsUUS6HAATjHbgQNbVtassk8%3D)
---
Schumer's allies have committed to spend whatever it takes to obliterate my campaign because if I win, it's IMPOSSIBLE for Democrats to keep their Senate Majority. That's why we need to close the fundraising gap FAST.

I hate asking for money, and I wouldn't ask if there weren't so much on the line. I'm hoping you can take a minute today to give $5 or $10 to send a REAL leader to DC. [Can I count on you, Friend?](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=8ca01ba9d8644a02a51cd5ff8d1216b4&_e=HDXPpnrW3wtJRa9nKT637egZuxqJcmgmExQdvR6QhgP-vwp5XzkvJz0hRnlSs5tL-wXM39MR5v2K34HtJuPUxHrNlMuS_dEDYKOri7OXSrk8UJ5s8gcP9n6fjNawfrxiDVtbFyxYibMLWduVBciBmuR6HK5v1BNPSOUlFsZgc0yI71bHlsPxYlJBiD1tCAkIbDgmwyy4tjB7UrZ38QaRTFvnbgDTBVI35RqsSdSgNn24F1njUmmmD72Up4eXDF5Rhrsl1XRWDtlbpAdA5k6y8iSao4WrCULFiWjmlP-uldtja14w-UmtFRdUXgKsjZ9sUrmrdigpoU3byWOuM4_SLGKSnsoV5QfVylnlwKFhfJo%3D)

_Democrats at every level are outraising their GOP opponents._ That's why we need to close the fundraising gap FAST.

[RUSH $5](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=8ca01ba9d8644a02a51cd5ff8d1216b4&_e=HDXPpnrW3wtJRa9nKT637egZuxqJcmgmExQdvR6QhgP-vwp5XzkvJz0hRnlSs5tL-wXM39MR5v2K34HtJuPUxHrNlMuS_dEDYKOri7OXSrk8UJ5s8gcP9n6fjNawfrxiDVtbFyxYibMLWduVBciBmuR6HK5v1BNPSOUlFsZgc0yI71bHlsPxYlJBiD1tCAkIbDgmwyy4tjB7UrZ38QaRTBCCCFO1gzM3h1ZdJ225QINrY5-VJTRiKAxd8YnrVBqSoEgJkQHykSINeGflZnfOIK6IpZKyut0tXaWtrPv6M8bjnuRYwNycdcVpHS9TKIEJpfIxRBueEKZtqBWcUFqxphMaQQIJpajIt2p0gWmJCNY%3D)
---
I've lived the American Dream, and I can't sit back and watch it slip away for our kids. To win this fight, I need every freedom-loving American to help me reach the finish line. I promise I won't let you down, Friend.

Dave McCormick
U.S. Army Veteran, USMA '87
Candidate, U.S. Senate-PA
[DONATE](http://links.americanlibertyalert.com/u/click?_t=3c9a9e018cb54768aae32f693c7987c9&_m=8ca01ba9d8644a02a51cd5ff8d1216b4&_e=HDXPpnrW3wtJRa9nKT637egZuxqJcmgmExQdvR6QhgP-vwp5XzkvJz0hRnlSs5tL-wXM39MR5v2K34HtJuPUxHrNlMuS_dEDYKOri7OXSrk8UJ5s8gcP9n6fjNawfrxiDVtbFyxYibMLWduVBciBmuR6HK5v1BNPSOUlFsZgc0yI71bHlsPxYlJBiD1tCAkIbDgmwyy4tjB7UrZ38QaRTNspnUIWIYjog-FzFsjPZV2I0P6K1_ZdYElWkLUSAd0shb0Fbb65T9tGycIqFDqGtZTdw4fsEt6QvvTona-j1aD2MXku9iQejGnh8KoiyTIJuGfw4t7Axeb2BBHZBeSKm1t8lMKnCi-njA7eCS9b1-4%3D)

If we don’t raise the resources we’ve planned on, we won’t be able to run the _strongest_ possible campaign against Marsha Blackburn. **_[Pitch in here>>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77039590/449173196/209297649?refcode=ea.edad80d4-41b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ms=ea.edad80d4-41b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84MDYxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJlZGFkODBkNC00MWIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1JHo9uRmnbjmpAfE25T4SCAwG6NuUYPO0XA_t04sd1w=)_** _We’ve told you the stakes of this race before._ **Our voting rights, abortion rights, the future of the fight against climate change, and more are on the line.** Marsha Blackburn has shown us just who she is. Team Gloria
| Gloria Johnson is running for the U.S. Senate because Tennesseans deserve leaders who care.

For too long, elected officials like Marsha Blackburn have done absolutely nothing to make Tennesseans’ lives better. The only interests they’ve cared about are special interests. The only people they’ve championed are their donors.

Gloria will advocate for real solutions to protect our communities from gun violence, make health care more affordable and accessible for all of us, secure access to the ballot box, and defend reproductive rights.

clean_body: Gloria needs you now. | Peter — sorry to bother you on a Saturday, but this is urgent. Gloria’s mid-month fundraising deadline is Monday, and we need to be halfway to this month’s online goal by then! We’re gearing up for a tough fight all the way to Election Day. If we don’t raise the resources we’ve planned on, we won’t be able to run the strongest possible campaign against Marsha Blackburn. = We’ve told you the stakes of this race before. Our voting rights, abortion rights, the future of the fight against climate change, and more are on the line. Marsha Blackburn has shown us just who she is. She’s a MAGA acolyte who would rather ignore her constituents than listen to what they need. Meanwhile, Gloria is a former educator and public servant who knows that achieving real results starts by reaching out to Tennessee’s communities and building a multi-party, multi-racial, multi-generational coalition for change. She’ll advocate for our rights while building bridges to progress. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | = | = ---|--- = | = = | = Let’s do this! name: Hoosier Democrats
subject: Making History
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Democratic Party, www
body:
|
---
Peter, At the start of this year, dozens of newly elected Hoosier Democrats took their oaths of office, marking a culmination of our historic 2023 election cycle. Michigan City, Lawrence, and Evansville all elected their first Black female mayors, and throughout Indiana, including in Terre Haute, Indianapolis, and South Bend, we elected new young Democratic leadership to mayors’ offices and city councils. **[We achieved so much in 2023. Stand together with us to start 2024 to bring back balanced leadership to our statehouse and stop MAGA extremism here in Indiana.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77039691/449173531/405560545?refcode=240113History&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDMvMS82NzYzNSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4NDlhODcxNy00MmIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogIkRQV0lMTElTNjdAR01BSUwuQ09NIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=SIeDXmZSNa0eloqk2qooVCbw6BY7rMZ2HwOYVbcrq5o=)** Next year, Indiana has elections for President, Governor, US Senate, Congress, every state house seat, and dozens of local offices. **[Getting our message out to the millions of Hoosiers who want a better future requires your help. body:
|
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77039708/449173552/1033648996?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTkvMS8xMDU2NTciLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMjc0ZjYyZjYtNDFiMi1lZTExLWJlYTEtMDAyMjQ4MjIzN2RhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=m8Kf1Np4iT6HnbFVEhCLUhIuTE6GoSnh2dxzqXtNPzA=)
Peter, can you believe there are less than 8 weeks until our must-win Primary Election Day?

The countdown is on in CA-47, and here at Team Joanna we are about to launch a critical piece of our winning strategy: **TV ads!**

Recent polling proved that once undecided voters learn about Joanna’s vision for Orange County, they are more likely to support our campaign compared to our opponents.

clean_body: As Attorney General, Keir will take on powerful special interests who treat vulnerable people unfairly, from corporate polluters, opioid manufacturers, to predatory lenders. Keir will always fight for fairness, opportunity and justice. If you’d like to unsubscribe, | | | = Keir understands that a lawyer who has the courage to stand up for what's right can make a powerful difference. She saw it firsthand when her mom was discriminated against at work, throwing her family into turmoil. Things might have been very different for her family if there hadn't been a lawyer who had the guts to stand up to powerful interests to fight for justice for her mom and co-workers. So she vowed that if she could figure out a way to be a lawyer, she'd use that power to do what's right for everyday people, even when the fight wasn't always the easiest or the most popular. = | | = * | = | | ---|---|--- PAID FOR BY KEIR FOR AG PO BOX 22321 | Philadelphia, PA 19110 If you need to you can unsubscribe here: You can also =.

name: Team Cori
subject: We couldn’t be prouder of St. Louis
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Cori Bush for Congress
body:
Build on the momentum: add your name to the ceasefire resolution today | |
---
Peter, **** **** We have some incredible news: **yesterday, St. Louis City’s Board of Aldermen’s unanimous passage of a resolution calling on President Joe Biden to work toward a ceasefire in Gaza.** [](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm0MvZGkJ0TeUlEPpD-vUxfVVXdd7aWN63EN23ffHhPgI_oGsDcfdqMXqfb4_khRd6bmqq6DdunkysRCsFwguDw4Nf94B9LZdM0nCBUGON_9qh3mBNiW9cWjji-8h4gItT_2NVVLfeXxbzSvlkfIxLRZa3PSbPU1wK8bmfDK8PBpM8wKLTDnuoN_WvXyXuiBSk-56hSr5ITwWHcrXR5MmzqgVsTOJMCcgkhU30m-D4riw3ShzDjSQgwipkIqpME3PIdPbBU8gyf0UWfkRstWOkMVzzgJssqnJyk2B-JoFPtZw/42y/_J6tNJe5R9elur89CqAD9g/h0/EH7Amq-jlIjZ5NT0iu5x6VEi59tHaKvqKLRE0s1GCVY) When Cori introduced the Ceasefire Now Resolution in the United States Congress, it was to take a stand to affirm that all human life is precious, regardless of faith, ethnicity, or nationality. Cori did this understanding that it was not only the right thing to do, but it is what the vast majority of her constituents and people all across our country support. And now, **we couldn’t be prouder of the City of St. Louis for unanimously passing a resolution calling on President Biden to stop the violence and bloodshed happening in Gaza and across the region by facilitating an immediate, lasting ceasefire** , the release of all hostages, and the entry of humanitarian aid. This is who we are. This is St. Louis. We are proudly pro-peace, we are proudly pro-humanity, and that is why we are proudly demanding a lasting ceasefire and an end to the violence. Let’s build on this momentum. **[Add your name to our petition demanding a ceasefire now so that we can continue to save lives and de-escalate.](https://click.actionnetwork.org/ss/c/P8Elou2Rvc0qoMPEUZrMXcOpy_XqN4R2ZGjoK-5zZnm0MvZGkJ0TeUlEPpD-vUxfVVXdd7aWN63EN23ffHhPgI_oGsDcfdqMXqfb4_khRd6qYKjRyW9W8PF2Dqacua6L-gJOO2I474YteIiKmYAqMvDPalDAUeC8w79Pt98DxUqAbEVhyI4PLW748_ocL-r27BoF6uFVv99DM9aZFDvoHYdt4-q_kKaAeX_5Q5zqOLrB20KMGRb8-jxaUuWgo_j200M8kQToyRPakFbo_gqLLhBczxBM1QwVMP0CF2IhcgRRgpI5AlM8gJ4ZGiEXJq02h_S3DQKaJgJaaKrV58ZRbQ/42y/_J6tNJe5R9elur89CqAD9g/h1/S7jQ1cr_ddRxxP8pL-ih-ehIlifbLPtHKK7ayVj36hg)**

name: Tony Evers
subject: stand with me against gerrymandering
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tony for Wisconsin
body:
| Derek,

For more than a decade, the Republican-controlled Legislature has used its power to gerrymander districts so egregiously that Republicans locked in their majority. Even when Democrats got over 50% of the vote statewide, Republicans nearly achieved a supermajority capable of overriding my vetoes.

Legislative maps should not be based on partisan political games, which is why I agree with the Supreme Court's recent determination that the current maps are unconstitutional.

[Add your name if you agree that Wisconsin deserves fair, non-partisan election maps that allow people to pick their own leaders!](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2223?source=EM_NBI_TE_20231207_PT_TrumpDemocracy.1.1_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_TrumpDemocracy&t=5&akid=6577%2E1827488%2E9464T3)

| ****[SUPPORT FAIR MAPS](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2223?source=EM_NBI_TE_20231207_PT_TrumpDemocracy.1.1_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_TrumpDemocracy&t=6&akid=6577%2E1827488%2E9464T3)****
---

Gerrymandering allows politicians, not voters, to determine who has the majority, and that's just wrong.

Voters need to be in charge, and I won't stop fighting until power is returned to the people.

[Sign here if you agree that Wisconsin deserves fair, non-partisan maps.](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/2223?source=EM_NBI_TE_20231207_PT_TrumpDemocracy.1.1_0_3MO_TeamEvers_NA_NA_TrumpDemocracy&t=7&akid=6577%2E1827488%2E9464T3)

Onward,

Tony
| [Support Tony](https://go.tonyevers.com/go/48?t=4&akid=6577%2E1827488%2E9464T3)

name: Georgia Dems
subject: Here's the truth about Brad Raffensperger
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Democratic Party of Georgia
body:
He put nearly 400,000 voter registrations in jeopardy

Peter,
In the heartbeat of our campaign lies a resonating echo of the trailblazing spirit of Delta Sigma Theta Sorority. ✨
And that’s why we’re honored and humbled to wish all the wonderful members of Delta Sigma Theta a happy Founders Day! ❤️
Delta Sigma Theta is more than a sorority; it's a groundbreaking movement. 🌟 Its members are educators, leaders, and activists who have consistently shattered barriers and defied norms.
Our own team looks to dynamic Deltas as we also seek to break our own barriers and bring much needed change to Michigan.
With our campaign, we're not just creating a ripple; we're sparking a wave, inspired by the powerful legacy of the Deltas.
**[But we still need your help. Can you support our campaign by chipping in $5 today as we build a campaign that honors the legacy of incredible leaders across the country — like those in the great Delta sorority?](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/hh-em-20240113?amount=5&refcode=em20240113-836&refcode2=836_62735_fINQY4&akid=836%2E62735%2EfINQY4) **

clean_body: Peter, In the heartbeat of our campaign lies a resonating echo of the trailblazing spirit of Delta Sigma Theta Sorority. ✨ And that’s why we’re honored and humbled to wish all the wonderful members of Delta Sigma Theta a happy Founders Day! ❤️ Delta Sigma Theta is more than a sorority; it's a groundbreaking movement. 🌟 Its members are educators, leaders, and activists who have consistently shattered barriers and defied norms. Our own team looks to dynamic Deltas as we also seek to break our own barriers and bring much needed change to Michigan. With our campaign, we're not just creating a ripple; we're sparking a wave, inspired by the powerful legacy of the Deltas. Together, Team Hill Harper

name: Jon Tester
subject: My name is Jon Tester
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY BOB CASEY FOR SENATE INC
body:
[](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240113-2?refcode=em20240113-2&refcode2=1687_552475_SuArIC&akid=1687%2E552475%2ESuArIC)
My name is Jon Tester.
I'm the Senate's only working dirt farmer. I lost three fingers in a meat grinding accident when I was younger. I get a $12 flattop haircut. Most of my shirts are stained with dirt.
**Montana values are in my bones. And I'm sure as hell going to win this race.**
But I’ll need your help to overcome the millions of dollars in attacks and win this toss-up race:
**[If you’re ready to get to work, split a grassroots donation today between my campaign and**Bob Casey and help us overcome the attacks heading my way:**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/casey-em-20240113-2?refcode=em20240113-2&refcode2=1687_552475_SuArIC&akid=1687%2E552475%2ESuArIC)**

Let’s get to work.
— Jon Tester

| | | **FROM USA TODAY:
Insulin $35 cap price now in effect, lowering costs for many Americans with diabetes**
---
Peter,

Since I first ran for Congress, I have focused on lowering prescription drug costs because across my district – and across our country – far too many people are forced to make tough decisions like choosing whether to buy their medicine or put food on the table.

Now, it has been one year since the Inflation Reduction Act, which I voted to pass, capped insulin copays at $35 per month for Medicare enrollees. This reform has been life-changing and life-saving for so many Virginians.

I will continue to work to make quality healthcare more affordable for Virginians, and I know with your support, I’ll do just that. [_**Your support powers this campaign. name: Dave McCormick
subject: I lift up my eyes to the mountains
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dave McCormick
body:
When I arrived at West Point as a new cadet, I had no idea how much it would transform my life. During my first plebe summer, after a long day of training, a sermon on Psalm 121 made an imprint on my soul, strengthened my faith, and sustained me through difficult times. _" I lift my eyes to the mountains- where does my help come from? My help comes from the Lord, the maker of heaven and earth." Psalm 121_

Friend,

When I arrived at West Point as a new cadet, I had no idea how much it would transform my life. During my first plebe summer, after a long day of training, a sermon on Psalm 121 made an imprint on my soul, strengthened my faith, and sustained me through difficult times.

I'm Dave McCormick. I'm a West Point grad, combat veteran who served in the 82nd Airborne, a 7th-generation Pennsylvanian, and running in the #1 battleground race that WILL decide the Senate majority.

I believe in the power of grassroots support from patriots like you. # [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77041977/449181684/18334046?refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240113_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxZDhlZTNiLTQ5YjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o-cB3GoCv-RpiDEzPp_c3461jKGyrjIY3BDMDexTi0M=)
The Electoral College is an outdated system that undermines the very essence of our democracy, giving disproportionate power to certain states and often silencing the true voice of the people. And honestly, Peter, Hillary Clinton couldn't have said it better:
[](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77041978/449181685/815532530?contactdata=nE88zzdlq1bNaro5MGSg83Xl+l5plbJk2W7zsNQyuNT/Yk6LL2oIffXTHlhqP4gZw5/eCIcd3WEksG/gBpucGnVKSPa1mVXm/BLalRFb5YZehXxJg38NRtU1rcxL8iW3Txh3Wl+4UnERsL8t02C5xPipTG4P9iOaLoqIbxbMoEU=&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240113_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxZDhlZTNiLTQ5YjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o-cB3GoCv-RpiDEzPp_c3461jKGyrjIY3BDMDexTi0M=&emci=8cb306c6-4faf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=71d8ee3b-49b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=24268976)
In every other election, the candidate with the most votes wins. So, why should the Presidency be any different? It's time for a change.
The Electoral College has affected numerous elections, including the contentious 2016 race. It's a system that can overturn the will of the majority, as seen when Donald Trump became President despite losing the popular vote by millions. This is about the integrity of our democratic process.
We need to rally together to ensure every American's vote counts equally, regardless of where they live. By abolishing the Electoral College, we can take a significant step towards a more equitable and representative democracy.
[_**Will you add your name to our petition and stand with us in demanding an end to the Electoral College?**_](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77041979/449181686/815532530?contactdata=nE88zzdlq1bNaro5MGSg83Xl+l5plbJk2W7zsNQyuNT/Yk6LL2oIffXTHlhqP4gZw5/eCIcd3WEksG/gBpucGnVKSPa1mVXm/BLalRFb5YZehXxJg38NRtU1rcxL8iW3Txh3Wl+4UnERsL8t02C5xPipTG4P9iOaLoqIbxbMoEU=&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240113_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxZDhlZTNiLTQ5YjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o-cB3GoCv-RpiDEzPp_c3461jKGyrjIY3BDMDexTi0M=&emci=8cb306c6-4faf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=71d8ee3b-49b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=24268976)
[Add Your Name »](https://click.everyaction.com/k/77041980/449181687/815532530?contactdata=nE88zzdlq1bNaro5MGSg83Xl+l5plbJk2W7zsNQyuNT/Yk6LL2oIffXTHlhqP4gZw5/eCIcd3WEksG/gBpucGnVKSPa1mVXm/BLalRFb5YZehXxJg38NRtU1rcxL8iW3Txh3Wl+4UnERsL8t02C5xPipTG4P9iOaLoqIbxbMoEU=&refcode=UTS_EN_90DO_240113_1_2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg5NDc2IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjcxZDhlZTNiLTQ5YjItZWUxMS1iZWExLTAwMjI0ODIyMzdkYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=o-cB3GoCv-RpiDEzPp_c3461jKGyrjIY3BDMDexTi0M=&emci=8cb306c6-4faf-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=71d8ee3b-49b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=24268976)

| 2024 Session Update Week 1
---
|
---
| The General Assembly was convened this week on January 10th. Governor Glenn Youngkin and fellow legislators are working hard to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Everything is more expensive. Can we convince Democrats in the House and the Senate to reduce taxes and give fellow Virginians a break?
Here is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to:

| McGuire Awarded Policy Maker of the Year!
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Friday, I was honored to receive the Virginia ACTE Policy of the Year Award. The Association for Career and Technical Education provides students the opportunity to learn trade skills such as agriculture science, and engineering, while still in high school. This award is a great recognition for a team effort. It really is amazing what we can achieve when we respect one another, put our differences aside, and work as a team.

| State of the Commonwealth
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| Governor Glenn Youngkin gave his annual State of the Commonwealth address. I look forward to continuing to work with him to deliver on his promise to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Although Democrats have a one seat majority in both chambers, the Governor struck an optimistic tone on his belief that we can deliver for Virginians in a bipartisan manner.

| Virginia Federation of Republican Women
---
|
---
|
---
|
---
| I was pleased to meet with the Virginia Federation of Republican Women at their annual breakfast. VFRW is a Republican volunteer organization consisting of over 45 local clubs of diverse women throughout the Commonwealth of Virginia. VFRW is a member of the [National Federation of Republican Women](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001-aCEG-a9qKA68uzW_lvTEwvz6mXllPp3XzohIOoOKa91YZXsh7OvmWLL5RPS61B4dEJo5RXevkEii-P8uS1Xwh1BMH9AGUlv7oApFa_9DCb81EqPg__E5kN82T9Ko7KegywRkHiJGMg=&c=fLTct5KLQceQbHN7gj3-s68reH8x11Aa8Dm5FPuRgPE7irPWqQGyhQ==&ch=wNa8maKoXxZtqATQLaP6lK-T9n0we-JM-afJeVOtNiJJyrblb-_frQ==), the largest grassroots organization of active Republican women in the country. A big thank you for everything these women, including Jean Gannon of Powhatan, do to promote conservative ideals.

clean_body: | | | | | | == | == | John McGuire I'm Running for Congress to "Save America!" Christian Conservative (Father - Navy SEAL - Business Owner) | Kari Lake for US Senate in Iowa Helping Trump! | | Unlike my Never Trumper Opponent Bob Good, Fellow Patriot Kari Lake and I are in Iowa working hard to make sure Trump wins the Iowa Caucus! | Iowa Caucus Trump All The Way! | | | | | | We are working hard to help Trump win. This weekend I am in Iowa helping Trump "Big Don" win the Iowa Caucus. We are making calls, putting together yard signs, and more. If you have Team Trump friends in Iowa, please send them to this website to get caucus details == | 2024 Session Update Week 1 | | The General Assembly was convened this week on January 10th. Governor Glenn Youngkin and fellow legislators are working hard to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Everything is more expensive. Can we convince Democrats in the House and the Senate to reduce taxes and give fellow Virginians a break? Here is some of what is on my mind and what we have been up to: | McGuire Awarded Policy Maker of the Year! | | | | Friday, I was honored to receive the Virginia ACTE Policy of the Year Award. The Association for Career and Technical Education provides students the opportunity to learn trade skills such as agriculture science, and engineering, while still in high school. This award is a great recognition for a team effort. It really is amazing what we can achieve when we respect one another, put our differences aside, and work as a team. | 2023 McGuire Legislative Agenda | Here is some of the legislation brought to me by constituents and sponsored by me to improve Virginia. Bills: | == == == == == == == == == == == == == == * == == for updates and other legislation we support | Annual Commonwealth Prayer Breakfast | | | | | | | | | | | Before the assembly started, I attended the annual Commonwealth prayer breakfast. I couldn't think of a more fitting way to usher in the session than by asking for God's guidance and wisdom for the Governor, for legislators, and for all those doing the people's work in Richmond. I especially ask for your prayers that God would use me to accomplish his will as I work for you in Richmond. | Swearing In State Senate | | | | | | | This week, I had the privilege of being sworn in to continue serving you in the State Senate! The three committees assigned to me in the Senate: Privileges and Elections, Transportation, and Local Government. | Congratulations to Our Newest State Senator Tammy Brankley Mulchi D9 | | Congratulations to our Newest Delegate Eric Phillips D48 | | State of the Commonwealth | | | | Governor Glenn Youngkin gave his annual State of the Commonwealth address. I look forward to continuing to work with him to deliver on his promise to make Virginia the best place to live, work, and raise a family. Although Democrats have a one seat majority in both chambers, the Governor struck an optimistic tone on his belief that we can deliver for Virginians in a bipartisan manner. | Virginia Federation of Republican Women | | | | I was pleased to meet with the Virginia Federation of Republican Women at their annual breakfast. VFRW is a Republican volunteer organization consisting of over 45 local clubs of diverse women throughout the Commonwealth of Virginia. VFRW is a member of the ==, the largest grassroots organization of active Republican women in the country. A big thank you for everything these women, including Jean Gannon of Powhatan, do to promote conservative ideals. | Annual Ag Dinner | | Tracy, my favorite Hokie, and I are seen here with the Virginia Tech President Timothy Sands and our Louisa County friend Jim Riddell. | | | | | | | Another event I was excited to attend was the annual dinner for agriculture. Our district, is the most impactful Agriculture, and Forest district in Virginia. Governor Youngkin spoke about the need to preserve and support the agriculture and forestry industries in Virginia. Virginia farmers and other Ag folks will always have 100% of my support. | Career & Technical Education (CTE) | | | I am excited to have introduced another bill this year that will promote CTE learning and diversify our workforce development in high school by making adjustments to the advanced diploma curricula. I presented this bill in the Senate Public Education Subcommittee yesterday. We will continue to debate this bill next week when we meet again. | Senate Republican Caucus Reception | | | | | | | I attended the 20th annual Senate Republican Caucus Reception at the Jefferson Hotel downtown Richmond. | Two Frogs! | | What is better than one Navy SEAL? Two Navy SEALs! | FYI: | William Penn | | We are Living in Clown World | | | I'm running for Congress because the enemy isn't at the gate -- the enemy is THROUGH the gate and in our communities. Open borders, fentanyl, lawlessness, out of control spending, and more. Our country is in big trouble. I am running to represent the people of the 5th Congressional District because I am a conservative with a record of building teams to solve problems. We can do better than Good. I've been all over the district and I can tell you the 5th Congressional District loves Trump and the America First Agenda! I invite you and your friends to join me in this cause. Take care, please spread the word and I look forward to seeing you around the district! | == | | | | | | | For God and Country, Delegate John McGuire Soli Deo Gloria Republican Jesus is my Savior Husband Father Navy SEAL == Pro-Life == Pro-Gun (==) Pro-Israel (==) American Legion Member VFW (Life Member) NRA (Life Member) Highest Award for Conservatism (ACU/ CPAC) Family Foundation 100 VCDL 100 (Life Member) == The Spirit of Virginia == our Facebook Page Twitter: @JohnMcGuire4VA Instagram: JohnMcGuire4VA == == john@mcguireva.com www.mcguireva.com | | == | == | == | == == == | Paid for and Authorized by McGuire for Virginia | | McGuire for Virginia | McGuire for Virginia, PO Box 242, Manakin Sabot, VA 23103 | | Sent by mailto:john@mcguireva.com powered by

name: Adam Schiff
subject: As a U.S. Senator…
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND AUTHORIZED BY SCHIFF FOR SENATE
body:
[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/62?t=1001&akid=5059%2E5257348%2EyOk8Ui ]Adam Schiff for Senate

Derek —

I have dedicated my career to safeguarding our democracy from the
influence of special interests and the threat of far-right extremism.

I’ve fought to strengthen campaign finance laws.

I’ve led the fight to hold a dangerous and out of control president
accountable.

I’ve introduced specific measures to clean up corruption and restore
balance to the Supreme Court.

As a United States Senator, I have big plans to continue this work to
address the clear threats to our democracy and strengthen it for
generations to come.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1004&akid=5059%2E5257348%2EyOk8Ui ]Please chip in to make these proposals a reality, and read on to learn
more about what I hope to accomplish in the Senate.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1005&akid=5059%2E5257348%2EyOk8Ui ]DONATE

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&t=1006&akid=5059%2E5257348%2EyOk8Ui ]Politico: Schiff would abolish filibuster, end the Electoral College in
his pro-democracy plan

RESTORING THE VOTE

As extreme Republicans attempt to subvert, undermine, and challenge our
democracy and voting rights, I will work to protect and strengthen them
by:

Ending Voter Suppression Across the Country
Republicans in state legislatures across the nation are engaged in an
all-out assault on our democracy, enacting highly restrictive voter
suppression and subversion laws designed to disenfranchise voters –
particularly Black, Hispanic, and Indigenous voters. That’s why we must
pass the John R. Lewis Voting Rights Advancement Act and strengthen our
commitment to ensuring voters are able to exercise their right to make
their voices heard.

Making Voting Easy
Voting is a right – and it shouldn’t be hard to exercise. For too long,
state legislatures and governors have sought to restrict not only who can
vote, but also how they can vote – weakening our democracy and reducing
citizen participation. We should make Election Day a national federal
holiday so everyone can vote, including hard-working families that may not
get time off. We should automatically register all voters through
government agencies like the DMV and create an online voter registration
system. We should guarantee the ability for everyone to vote by mail if
they choose, and require all states to offer same-day registration in
federal elections.

Eliminating the Gerrymander
Republicans have long abused the redistricting process to increase their
power, and then used that power to enact draconian policies that the
majority of people do not support. In some states, Democrats have also
abused the power to write the lines of their own districts. We need to end
this nefarious practice – just like California did – by passing the For
the People Act to empower voters and strengthen our democracy by banning
the practice of partisan gerrymandering so voters’ voices – not
politicians’ partisan interests – are heard at the ballot box.

Restoring the Vote to those Who Have Served Their Time
Laws restricting voting rights for those convicted of an offense are Jim
Crow-era relics that disproportionately restrict the rights of people of
color and other marginalized communities. And in recent years, they’ve
expanded in many states, not receded. It’s time to get rid of these laws
and restore the right to vote to those who have served their time and have
returned to society.

MAKING OUR GOVERNMENT WORK FOR US

Abolishing the Filibuster
The filibuster has a pernicious history of being used to perpetuate Jim
Crow laws and is being used once again to solidify a new generation of Jim
Crow meant to disenfranchise people. If we are to restore voting rights,
pass meaningful gun safety legislation, enact a national right to
abortion, protect workers and their right to organize, ensure clean air
and clean water, and create an economy that works for everyone, we must
abolish the filibuster.

Passing the Protect Our Democracy Act
I introduced a landmark package of reforms to prevent future presidential
abuses of power, restore our system of checks and balances,
accountability, and transparency, and protect our elections from foreign
interference. This package of legislative reforms — similar to the
post-Watergate reforms passed by Congress in the 1970’s — would restore
the guardrails protecting our democracy. Among other reforms, it would
expedite the enforcement of Congressional subpoenas, prevent presidents
from issuing self-pardons or pardons to their family members, increase
protections for whistleblowers, require presidential candidates to release
ten years of tax returns, and protect our elections from foreign
interference.

Prohibiting Members from Trading Stocks
Over the last several years, some members of Congress have used
information they gleaned from their work to trade stocks. This practice is
illegal, and to restore public confidence, all members should be banned
from trading individual stocks. The American people should never have to
worry that their representative in Congress is acting in their own
personal financial interests, rather than their constituents’ best
interests. That’s why I am an original cosponsor of the Transparent
Representation Upholding Service and Trust (TRUST) in Congress Act to ban
Members and their families from trading individual stocks.

Ending Citizens United
In its Citizens United decision, the Supreme Court unleashed a torrent of
dark, unaccountable money in our system and made it nearly impossible to
meaningfully regulate campaign finance. It’s time to return power to the
people, and overturn Citizens United once and for all. That’s why I
introduced a landmark constitutional amendment to overturn the Citizens
United decision and allow reasonable restrictions on political spending,
outlaw dark money, and allow public financing of campaigns.

Abolishing the Electoral College
Democratic candidates have won the popular vote in seven of the last eight
presidential elections, but in that time frame, we still had two
Republican Presidents who lost the popular vote. We should ensure that
presidents are chosen by the voters, rather than those who can cobble
together a strategy for certain battleground states. That’s why I support
abolishing the Electoral College — by expanding the multi-state compact in
which states agree that whoever wins the national popular vote will earn
all of their state’s electoral votes.

REFORMING THE SUPREME COURT

I am on the frontlines of the fight to reform the Supreme Court, which
Republicans have stacked with extreme, corrupt, partisan justices who have
restricted voting rights, weakened environmental standards, and taken away
reproductive freedoms. That’s why I’m calling for:

Expanding the Court
By blocking President Obama’s appointment of a Supreme Court justice
almost a year before the end of his term, and forcing through the
confirmation of a different justice during the last weeks of the Trump
Administration, Republicans succeeded in stacking the Supreme Court with
partisan justices determined to repeal reproductive freedom, restrict
voting rights, and weaken environmental standards. We need a court that is
fair, balanced, and represents the interests of the majority of Americans,
one that is committed to protecting our rights and freedoms, not taking
them away. That’s why I am a lead author of the Judiciary Act, a bill that
would increase the number of justices on the Supreme Court from 9 to 13,
so that new Justices can be appointed who would restore balance to the
Court.

Instituting Term Limits
Term limits on the Supreme Court will ensure that an entire generation of
Americans will not suffer a further erosion of their freedoms under the
current reactionary and partisan Supreme Court and that no future Senate
Leader can stack the Court the way Mitch McConnell did. That’s why I am
supporting the Supreme Court Tenure Establishment and Retirement
Modernization (TERM) Act to set reasonable term limits for Supreme Court
justices (18 years) while establishing a better process for Supreme Court
appointments.

Establishing an Enforceable Code of Ethics
Reforming the Supreme Court through an enforceable code of ethics is a
critical step towards restoring the nation’s faith in our justice system
and protecting Americans’ fundamental rights and freedoms. Recent actions
by Supreme Court Justices have seriously called into question the ethics
of the court, and we must take definitive action to restore the court’s
integrity by strengthening the ethics requirements for Justices, and
establishing an enforceable code of ethics for all Justices.

Banning Stock Trading for Judges
We desperately need to bring ethics back to the Supreme Court – and all
our nation’s courts. That’s why I introduced the Justice is BLIND Act – to
effectively stop the active trading of individual stocks by all judges –
and help ensure that federal judges and justices are making decisions
based on the law and not because of any financial interest.

[ https://act.adamschiff.com/go/1014?c0=jan2024_abs_em.zPsl9O&refcode=AU_ABS_FR_GEN_GEN_AC90_20240113_PM1_V1_S1&email=&amount=3&t=1007&akid=5059%2E5257348%2EyOk8Ui ]Derek, each
of these policy proposals will make a meaningful difference in defending
our democracy and strengthening our institutions. I’m proud to share these
policies with you, and I hope you will chip in to my Senate campaign so we
can make them a reality for our country.

clean_body: | | Peter, We looked around at recurring subscriptions to find a good value. Here’s what we found: It costs $13.99 a month for a premium Youtube subscription. It costs $15.49 a month for a standard Netflix subscription. But helping re-elect Eric so he can keep fighting for working families across Western Illinois and safeguard against greater attacks on our democracy? At $10/month, it’s a deal you can’t beat. Last year, Eric made history when he became the first openly LGBTQ+ member of Congress to represent Illinois, even after millions of Republican dark money was thrown into the race. Since then, national Republicans have been eyeing his seat and have vowed to spend big to turn it red. For $10 a month, you can ensure our campaign has the resources to build our grassroots team, spread the word about Eric’s vision to folks across our district, and plan ahead against an opponent funded by the NRCC and special interests. This grassroots movement powered Eric to victory last year, and by becoming a monthly donor, we can do it again. We’re grateful to have you with us in this fight. — Eric Sorensen HQ P.S. name: James Carville
subject: this guy is the worst
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gillibrand for Senate
body:
a huge opportunity [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] Friend , I need you to understand this: The path to defending our Senate majority runs directly through Florida. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
This is not an election year where we can afford to just play defense. Make no mistake, I'm not giving up on any of our Democratic seats. But after the news that Sen. Manchin is not seeking reelection, our chances of defending every single blue seat just got even slimmer.
That means flipping a red state to blue is the only option left if we want to guarantee a Democratic Senate majority in 2024. And now that polling data shows Debbie Mucarsel-Powell is already tied with Rick Scott in Florida, I need every Democrat who cares about defending our Senate majority to invest in Debbie's race right now. Please, will you donate $10 — split between Debbie and Kirsten Gillibrand — before Debbie's urgent end-of-quarter deadline to make sure that she has the resources she'll need to flip this seat blue in 2024? [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
If you've saved payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Debbie Mucarsel-Powell and Kirsten Gillibrand will go through immediately:
DONATE $5 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=5]
DONATE $25 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=25]
DONATE $50 [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250&express_lane=true&amount=50]
ANOTHER AMOUNT [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Debbie is giving us a huge opportunity here in Florida, and we cannot afford to waste it, friend.
Rick Scott is one of the most vulnerable senators in the entire country. And that's not just coming from me — the analysts at CNN, Roll Call , and FiveThirtyEight all agree. He only won this seat by 10,033 votes in 2018, and that's after he spent $64 MILLION of his own fortune.
Now, his approval ratings are underwater and Debbie's campaign is shaping up to be one of our best chances to save our majority in 2024. She has a strong record of results and a winning message that will speak to voters all across Florida. Recent polling data shows that her grassroots campaign has already made this race a statistical tie.
We've put Rick Scott on notice — but he's not going down without a fight. In the last few months alone, he's shelled out $3 million on attack ads smearing Democrats like Debbie with baseless lies. That's more than any other GOP Senate candidate so far.
This race will be one of the most expensive Senate races in the entire country. Debbie has what it takes to win, but only if she can build a grassroots warchest that's capable of taking on Scott's millions. That starts with hitting her critical $300,000 end-of-quarter goal — her FINAL goal before the election year officially begins . Time is running out to make sure that Debbie hits this goal, so please, friend, can I count on you to split a donation between her campaign and Kirsten Gillibrand? This $300,000 goal is Debbie's most important goal yet and she'll only hit it with your help. [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
DONATE NOW [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
Thank you,
Chuck Schumer
http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250 [http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/gfs_dmp?amounts=5,25,50,100,250]
[https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif] This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [https://als-totem.s3.amazonaws.com/core/spacer.gif]
Click here to unsubscribe: https://secure.ngpvan.com/p/46LjluwB30OIUfgIWihL4Q2?unsubscribedata=jsuPRtdgl5mYogE7fcNbq80RmsWJWC3ZgFOIueLkIVTgw9v9s28b14u%2FOufLIbjg6YFB%2B9SI4acjqcciqaLynSOeX6Zlu%2FyTpj%2BF0pb1Jk71L1DcDMplRuGK4bqj8sVjs%2FKYjYrEt%2FnOzbExG%2BMMUH8ISPK2dR6i3ni7JjimNnodZEOT7RsuzKRt0IN01OWhdKYSJj46JZR7ZfdnuhTahDWJRxZ10oth%2FtW4OlmtLYP1G0DjhqCfToOaQHtZc3NI0oT5%2FScqh7zgxT9tqdkMuCVdQXYX8OBkIBLjHiO7%2FRLxW69PdCPKz6VvauOETlfHRa77YjTZdujIf5vT0xG%2FgJnpp2Zpl%2BxRbhkM0TE2o1Sipj99LmnqjXrS9rIgUHB5L8YguHt9wTKO0u53oz%2BLij3Z10XBq4hADql%2BtTon1ow%3D .
By providing your cell phone number you consent to receive periodic text message updates from Gillibrand for Senate, including by automated text messages. Txt HELP for help, STOP to end. Msg&Data rates apply.

name: End Unconditional Aid via Our Revolution
subject: Add your name: Bernie's call to end funding for Israel's bombing campaigns
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Our Revolution click here to unsubscribe
body:
[ stdin# ][IMG]

Peter Willis,

Bernie has been calling for an end to unconditional aid to Israel for
weeks — after Netanyahu began the illegal, immoral, brutal, and grossly
disproportionate war against the Palestinian people.

With Congress working on a funding bill to send Israel another $10 billion
in unconditional aid, Bernie is saying NO — and calling on other members
of Congress to oppose more U.S. funding for the bombing of civilians in
Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13427?source=email-20240113&t=1011&akid=5184%2E5885482%2E64fiog ]Stand with Bernie: Add your name to urge members of Congress to oppose
$10 billion in funding for Israel's war in Gaza.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13427?source=email-20240113&t=1012&akid=5184%2E5885482%2E64fiog ]ADD YOUR NAME

Over 23,000 Palestinians have now been killed by Israel's war in Gaza, and
women and children have accounted for two-thirds of those killed. It would
be unconscionable for Congress to go ahead and send another $10 billion to
Netanyahu during this horrific war on the people of Gaza.

Bernie recently said, “We must understand that Israel’s war against the
Palestinian people has been significantly waged with U.S. bombs, artillery
shells, and other forms of weaponry. And the results have been
catastrophic.”

In an all-out effort to stop funding this war, Bernie is using all of the
legislative maneuvers he can. He’s even invoking section 502b of the
Foreign Assistance Act, which would force the Senate to vote on a State
Department investigation into Israeli human rights abuses, which would
then force a vote on finally conditioning any aid sent to Israel.

The lawmakers in Congress willing to speak out in support of a ceasefire
and call for peace has been slowly growing — with Progressive champions of
peace like Reps. Barbara Lee and Rashida Tlaib bravely taking a stand for
an end to violence at the beginning of the conflict.

Now is a critical time to join Bernie, Lee, Tlaib, and other peace
champions to urge Congress to stop supporting Netanyahu’s war.

[ https://act.ourrevolution.com/go/13427?source=email-20240113&t=1013&akid=5184%2E5885482%2E64fiog ]Add your name: The U.S. cannot keep sending billions to Israel as
Netanyahu continues the relentless bombing campaign in Gaza. Stand with
Bernie and demand Congress say NO to this $10 billion in aid to Israel.

When we organize, we win.

Our Revolution

--------------------------------------------------------------------------

**[ADD YOUR SIGNATURE](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77043852/449187730/-880501429?source=EM_NBI_AB_20240112_PT_1.3_1MO_hq_NA_NA_ira&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS85MDU3OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTEzZmU2OC01NGIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=R6OxLTaCijN28lUpsbD3ELmRZxG0JMfgMGY9y58zrYw=&emci=0613fe68-54b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=0e13fe68-54b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=32394541)**

The day before the anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous Dobbs decision, I woke up to Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacking my sister and my 81-year-old father.
[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77043880/449187845/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmNiZjQ1OC01NWIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ad9GP-uC4_Ow3YtnNUZ1TMn0EYny73X5EhZXCy-GFZQ=&emci=12633805-54b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=16cbf458-55b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=19445147)
[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77043881/449187846/872526041?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmNiZjQ1OC01NWIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ad9GP-uC4_Ow3YtnNUZ1TMn0EYny73X5EhZXCy-GFZQ=&emci=12633805-54b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=16cbf458-55b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=19445147)
Hello,
The day before the anniversary of the Supreme Court’s disastrous _Dobbs_ decision, I woke up to Fox News and Lauren Boebert attacking my sister and my 81-year-old father.
For decades, Dad was an OB-GYN. He delivered thousands of babies and wrote books on how to get pregnant and to navigate menopause. Dad provided women with full access to all kinds of reproductive health care, including abortions, in the years right after _Roe_ – and he has now had to watch as women’s reproductive rights are gutted in the aftermath of _Dobbs_.
Dad and his clinic faced many threats over the years. It’s no exaggeration to say that he put his own safety – and that of his family – at risk in order to protect the rights of women to make their own medical decisions.
But I’m not sure he ever expected to see a sitting member of Congress attacking him – or my sister who followed in his footsteps – in a national news outlet. **It’s disgusting. These kinds of personal attacks against my family have no place in our politics and do nothing to serve the people of Western and Southern Colorado.**
If extremists like Lauren Boebert want to have a conversation about reproductive rights in this country, I am more than happy to have that debate. We can talk about how I support _freedom_ and _liberty_ – and how they support big government intruding into the lives of women. We can talk about how they support a national ban on abortion – with no exceptions for rape, incest, or the life of the mother. And we can talk about how they are so extreme, they even want to ban the pill that’s been used by women for decades.
I am willing to talk all day about the fringe view that the government should be dictating women’s medical decisions. **But what I won’t accept is extremists like Lauren Boebert and Fox News attacking my father and my sister.**
I am _incredibly_ proud of my father. He provided health care to women when they needed it during some of the happiest – and most devastating – moments of their lives. Before retirement, he would drive two hours to Planned Parenthood and help teach the next generation of health care providers, like my sister. And no one – not Fox News, and especially not extremists like Lauren Boebert – is going to stop my family from continuing to stand up for a woman’s right to choose.
**They're scared. Last year, I came just 546 votes shy of defeating Boebert. I’m ready to finish the job and replace her in Congress in 2024, but these are the kinds of ugly attacks that I’m already up against.**
[**Please, if you can afford to, will you give $5 or more right now to my campaign to help me replace Lauren Boebert in Congress? Our race was the closest in the entire country in 2022. But I’m not taking money from corporate PACs, so I’m counting on grassroots donors like you if I’m going to win.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77043882/449187847/1610638071?refcode=em20240113pm-nd&amounts=5%2C10%2C25%2C35%2C50%2C100%2C250&refcode2=16cbf458-55b2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&recurring=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzMvMS85NjIxNiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxNmNiZjQ1OC01NWIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Ad9GP-uC4_Ow3YtnNUZ1TMn0EYny73X5EhZXCy-GFZQ=)

subject: Liz Cheney MADE our day
