**Liz Cheney just made our day!!!** Now that Trump has been removed from ballots in Colorado and Maine, _voters across the country are DEMANDING that he is removed from their state’s ballot._

**So we’re launching an urgent petition to show that local voters want Trump removed from their ballot!** [**We need you to make your voice heard! Add your name to demand Trump is disqualified from running for office »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/14th_amen_pet?source=FFR_20240113_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=7&akid=20643%2E4449941%2EC0Dy2N) | [600 LOCAL SIGNATURES NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND TRUMP IS DISQUALIFIED FROM RUNNING »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/14th_amen_pet?source=FFR_20240113_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=8&akid=20643%2E4449941%2EC0Dy2N)
---
**BAD NEWS:** Donald Trump might be facing 90+ indictments, but he’s SOARING in the polls against President Biden. **We might elect a CRIMINAL in 2024??**

**BUT THERE’S HOPE:** We can still kick Trump off the ballot in states across the country using the 14th Amendment! **_But we need a HUGE outpour of support to make it happen:_**
[**Add your name to demand Trump be disqualified from running for office in your state »**](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/14th_amen_pet?source=FFR_20240113_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=9&akid=20643%2E4449941%2EC0Dy2N)
[600 LOCAL SIGNATURES NEEDED: ADD YOUR NAME TO DEMAND TRUMP IS DISQUALIFIED FROM RUNNING »](https://act.fightforreform.org/survey/14th_amen_pet?source=FFR_20240113_EMPET_E3_T0_AC&t=10&akid=20643%2E4449941%2EC0Dy2N)
---
We need your voice now.

name: Mazi Pilip
subject: Breaking News: New York special election declared!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress
body:
My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election

| |
---
| | | | [](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bca4d766418c421693abdfdcb822a04d&_e=u0pI_0oO76qdo_NztUSf2xcNfY1klxaqNamP5MbN7xWKm4D4f58UzHtVHVmnkjvs8LbUMFXKrIXVxF9IeVPb7Ukz8iDdZcX6VtEt2iLAUvhS8NnGKIXiqrhsIUglBS23lrmD_MFObOa9LJMq7eoyBiYygH_gR0k5-WKRWrh5MGjrPeYcsabEP-Z9QQpEJuqlPjYmIY3OiYZpSuMMCClltQKmo5Sge10o6hN0mR713yU_rJVp571Z7FHNobxBapqHrUtfEF3fDkffX__59ib3M9vbjKkV2_icp2DKZ6h9xmGHeXOVZC7Z_dApicx2wcJKAGWeijki1MPts7h3EK1V_GsRETGTYmm5GMRumPUwOVjWM2lZDO1zIg5BUiAxo3BCruaVranFmsP0ETTjX3TtBfADI5x2phDMuHQWEjtCO9QxxZmrmu2QvTabhQTOSH6H)
---

Friend,

I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress.

My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short!

I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared.

If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority.

I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family.

Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed.

They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things.

And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials.

They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative.

And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them.

The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me.

---
| [](http://links.electionsupdates.com/u/click?_t=e3c9a4cac7f248a39c2a3d920479a441&_m=bca4d766418c421693abdfdcb822a04d&_e=u0pI_0oO76qdo_NztUSf2xcNfY1klxaqNamP5MbN7xWKm4D4f58UzHtVHVmnkjvs8LbUMFXKrIXVxF9IeVPb7Ukz8iDdZcX6VtEt2iLAUvhS8NnGKIXiqrhsIUglBS23lrmD_MFObOa9LJMq7eoyBiYygH_gR0k5-WKRWrh5MGjrPeYcsabEP-Z9QQpEJuqlPjYmIY3OiYZpSuMMCClltQKmo5Sge10o6hN0mR713yU_rJVp571Z7FHNobxBapqHrUtfEF3fDkffX__59ib3M9vbjKkV2_icp2DKZ6h9xmFtnTkYFuvvkigJRP00eZdhDdsoglbMJ8jIdA4GXeJQRIj1pLQFXzPYOukcCeROlB7UvaGGhPcckJhMpXVKq99cfQTA3X2ABIt5QzgNTLfgk0th0CrVvjVNe1nlJwUX3jtY6dp__qbRjpsYlqYapuZI)
---

I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line.

---

clean_body: My name is Mazi Pilip- I'm the GOP candidate in the NY special election | | | | | | Friend, I never thought I'd have running water, let alone be running for Congress. My name is Mazi Melesa Pilip, but you can call me Mazi for short! I'm the Republican nominee running in the New York special election that was just declared. If you don't already know- this is the one & only seat we absolutely have to win to defend the House Majority. I'm a black, Jewish woman & I'm not afraid to tell you that I am 100% Pro-Law Enforcement, Pro-Border security, and Pro-Family. Democrats & the liberal media have spent years saying the GOP will never support someone of my ethnicity & my creed. They say women like me don't exist & that we can't be any of those things. And now they're spending millions to bury me in negative headlines, hit pieces, and TV commercials. They take great pleasure in laying waste to minority women who don't fall in line with their sacred narrative. And without your help today- I'm afraid I'm going to be one of them. The only way to stop them is to come out of the gates strong with the full weight and might of the conservative movement behind me. | I've just launched my campaign to keep NY-03 red & so I'm humbly asking you to stand with me as we embark on this sprint to the finish line. | | Early voting begins in just a few weeks. Voters are already planning to head to the polls & that makes this the most important race in the nation right now. I hope you'll step up & stand with me today to defeat the Democrats & hold the House Majority. | | And if I can ever help you the way you've helped me, please just say the word. All the best, Mazi Melesa Pilip GOP Nominee Special Election NY-03 | | | Paid for by Mazi Pilip for Congress 228 S Washington St STE 115 Alexandria, VA 22314

name: Ruben Gallego
subject: An important anniversary
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Gallego for Arizona
body:
In just ten days we’re going to celebrate the one year anniversary of the launch of this campaign.
#

Hey, Peter. It’s Ruben.
In just ten days we’re going to celebrate the one year anniversary of the launch of this campaign.
Close to 150,000 people from all over the country have donated to this campaign. That means a lot to me, personally.
But today, right now, we’re at a crossroads. We haven’t started January off the way we needed to. We’re not on track to hit our goal this month, and we really need to start the year off strong.
We need that, because a number of polls in the past few months have shown us trailing Kari Lake, including one from this week. I don’t put much stock in these early polls, but anybody will tell you that you’d always rather be ahead than behind.
And whatever the polls say, we need to catch up. We need to defeat Kari Lake. And I need you.
I need you to make your first online donation to my campaign.
If we’re going to beat Kari Lake, take back Kyrsten Sinema’s seat, and defeat Trump in Arizona, I need a huge team with me.
[**And it would mean a lot if you could help me celebrate the anniversary of the launch of this campaign with your first contribution. So please, if you can, make that first donation today.**](https://act.gallegoforarizona.com/go/1000?c0=ruben-em-jan24.RCwesN&refcode=em240113-2-30&t=1&akid=1714%2E734936%2EgBn4Ve)

name: Harry Dunn
subject: Is this America?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
| [ ](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59706?t=6&akid=12446%2E878179%2EPFxb47) Hey there, Harry Dunn here.

This is a tough email to start – how do you talk about one of the darkest days of your life? Not to mention, an irreparable stain on this country's history.

So I guess I'll start with a question. Is this America?

Is attacking Capitol police officers – honest, good people dedicated to protecting and serving democracy – with baseball bats and spears, spraying them with WD-40, calling them hateful slurs – is that America?

Is a President of the United States emboldening a riot on the Capitol, encouraging people threatening to kill former Speaker Nancy Pelosi, former Vice President Mike Pence, who traveled to Washington ready to act on those threats – is that America?

**That's not American to me.** I believe in an America that protects its people, regardless of their political beliefs. An America that values democracy and those that are chosen to represent it. That's what I believed in while I served as a Capitol police officer during the January 6 insurrection.

[**If that's the American you believe in, I'm hoping you'll chip in a split donation of $10 or more to Voter Protection Project and my campaign for US Congress. I protected this democracy as a Capitol police officer on January 6th and I'm ready to protect it as the next Congressman from MD-03. Please, rush a donation to become a Founding Donor of this campaign:**](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59706?t=7&akid=12446%2E878179%2EPFxb47) If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your split donation between Harry Dunn and Voter Protection Project will go through immediately: | [CONTRIBUTE $10 »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59707?t=8&akid=12446%2E878179%2EPFxb47)
---

[Or a custom donation »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/59711?t=12&akid=12446%2E878179%2EPFxb47)
Together,

Harry
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=12446%2E878179%2EPFxb47). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=12446%2E878179%2EPFxb47).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=12446%2E878179%2EPFxb47) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=12446%2E878179%2EPFxb47). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=12446%2E878179%2EPFxb47)
---

body:
| | | [](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=f4c44051cf524a4c96a9da0a9a2c34e5&_e=rXTe1YYzIe0uHRdMTt8DRcudszf8-CD-gCrlo8W8i7iZ630vhsBrglrCztD1zkmnUkknppYEACZ1FrFRo2B3FyiOeuz2MEC3zu71S65fDMU2VlROQt64b46TG2M_tkruRmPdths_W6DPYOk7mReyFZsPPHTPkXkldED1O8WRFs7LVgZlSFCCy9Dlf51UmpEGPVuayR0kPgDlwRO03EbJkmy8XIf9Tw6tl4k7tIHdzvWylGYjVBqFJbHGunTkpN7PQQ4miiJIYsx4q8NWpYi2rEKYGn-fngz8hHLfoFoGycwPhgkXNyus7s5oPKm_nSUnXgOIr-42GuhgSaRHmnAUBo2RSo-1OR0uFfTnd1jRspFvA5uYk_bRt_mpVZXeFd52)

Fellow American, I’ll keep this simple: **I have just three priorities when I get to Washington D.C., and I want to share them with you today:**
1. **Protect our nation.** Secure the border, ensure energy independence, and enhance public safety.
2. **Unleash our economy.** Lower the national debt, stop wasteful government spending, fight for lower taxes, and prioritize small business.
3. **Restore government integrity.** Reduce government corruption, protect women’s sports, put parents in charge of education, and take care of veterans.

It seems like simple common sense, but with the radical Left determined to trample on you rights and defeat us, it’s going to take a super strong team to accomplish. **As a Green Beret, when I have my eye on the target, I never take it off. Now, I’m aiming to save our country, but I can’t do it alone.** **[Will you pitch in now to help me RESCUE our country’s integrity from the radical Left?](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=f4c44051cf524a4c96a9da0a9a2c34e5&_e=rXTe1YYzIe0uHRdMTt8DRcudszf8-CD-gCrlo8W8i7iZ630vhsBrglrCztD1zkmnUkknppYEACZ1FrFRo2B3FyiOeuz2MEC3zu71S65fDMU2VlROQt64b46TG2M_tkruRmPdths_W6DPYOk7mReyFZsPPHTPkXkldED1O8WRFs7LVgZlSFCCy9Dlf51UmpEGPVuayR0kPgDlwRO03EbJkmy8XIf9Tw6tl4k7tIHdzvWrZqaiN4VtCfUMGJcU_Yn2BlMp4d447_nPFmda2FoIoQyGbOSUfl2yFUBpc5Un0GsVe5VpswARC6mOmRRge785cBryMbn8xsoqwxAb3Th9LEH25dEiUj5O97jE88QhDYvB52IoRraxWaEO_i7-24ON)**
---
[**PITCH IN NOW **](http://links.patharriganforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d400fe4f8ca24360a0914af7db39ca7b&_m=f4c44051cf524a4c96a9da0a9a2c34e5&_e=rXTe1YYzIe0uHRdMTt8DRcudszf8-CD-gCrlo8W8i7iZ630vhsBrglrCztD1zkmnUkknppYEACZ1FrFRo2B3FyiOeuz2MEC3zu71S65fDMU2VlROQt64b46TG2M_tkruRmPdths_W6DPYOk7mReyFZsPPHTPkXkldED1O8WRFs7LVgZlSFCCy9Dlf51UmpEGPVuayR0kPgDlwRO03EbJkmy8XIf9Tw6tl4k7tIHdzvVXDBei4a6tbTT2ddQIwP70i28zwk0b9uVgCOnoWaP0JbjTrEEeSiTyqYQA7wJRAFmTyAUp_03qF02EAp3LaRGnosTCGbb7Pd0BaHni0rusrdRqKWTsuF1aQhCzAowVBfm2npw-fGaCmajLci2MUCLE)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Rep.=20Jake=20LaTurner?=
subject: Hunter Biden does not get special treatment (2 min update)
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
body:
The Biden family is not above the law. | |
---
| | | [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ec90287064&e=1050d051da)
---
| Patriot,

It's Jake LaTurner here.

Happy New Year! I hope you had a great Christmas with family, friends, and loved ones. House Republicans were back in Washington this week to hold Hunter Biden in contempt of Congress, start the impeachment of Secretary Mayorkas, and push back against the Chinese Communist Party.

Thank you for having my back during this crucial election year. I'm grateful to have you on Team LaTurner.

Yours in the fight,
Jake
---
|
---
| **HUNTER BIDEN IS NOT ABOVE THE LAW**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ac2290d2f5&e=1050d051da)
---
| **The Biden family is not above the law.**
Hunter was well aware of what he was doing when he blatantly defied a lawful Congressional subpoena and failed to show up to his Oversight Committee deposition with me, James Comer, and Jim Jordan.
_**Hunter broke the law. It's time for him to face the consequences. **_
I don't know about you but I am **SICK AND TIRED** of the Bidens thinking they deserve special treatment. That's why the Oversight Committee took action this week to hold Hunter Biden in contempt of Congress.

I refuse to let Joe and Hunter continue to use our weaponized Justice system to cover up their crimes. It's time for them to be held accountable for their shady business dealings.
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=9fe0a1fab1&e=1050d051da)
---
| Hunter even showed up to our Oversight committee hearing to disrupt the order and initiate chaos in a sheer political stunt.

This unfortunately has become the status quo in the time of the Biden Administration. The Biden crime family has laughed in the face of the law time and time again. It has to end.
---
|
---
| **STOPPING THE CHINESE COMMUNIST PARTY**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=ffb9af39ad&e=1050d051da)
---
| The Chinese Communist Party will stop at **NOTHING** to spy on Americans, steal our intellectual property, and gain access to our military bases.

When I found out about a CCP-backed business coming to Eastern Kansas, I had to do everything in my power to stop it. I will not stand by and let President Xi and his CCP proxies set up shop in Kansas.
**_I will do whatever it takes to stop America's greatest adversary from operating in our backyard. _**
That's why I urged the Biden administration this week to investigate Cnano USA - a CCP business with alarming ties to Chinese military and intelligence services coming to Johnson County, Kansas.

But we all know the Biden administration won't do anything to protect Kansans, so I called on Governor Kelly and the Kansas Legislature to pass bills to stop this infiltration of our state. [[READ MORE]](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=abbc3aef7f&e=1050d051da)
---
|
---
| **SENDING MAYORKAS HIS****PINK****SLIP**
---
| [ ](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=2be456c5d9&e=1050d051da)
---
| _**Secretary Mayorkas is a complete and utter failure.**_
Over 8 **MILLION** illegal immigrants have crossed our southern border since Biden took office—including 1.7 **MILLION** migrants who evaded law enforcement and entered America undetected.

This crisis is only getting worse. Over 300,000 migrants crossed the border in December—the highest monthly crossings in American history. Not to mention the hundreds of terrorists, thousands of Chinese nationals, and deadly fentanyl pouring over the border and into our communities.
**It's an easy decision: Mayorkas has got to go.** He has **FAILED** to enforce the laws of our country and has done everything in his power to fuel this influx of illegal immigration. I **FULLY SUPPORT** impeaching Mayorkas.
---
|
---
| **HOUSE REPUBLICAN LEGISLATIVE UPDATE**
---
| I am proud to have voted in favor of legislation on the House Floor that **REVERSES** Joe Biden's far-left policies and puts **AMERICA FIRST** :

✅ Defund Joe Biden’s IRS army
✅ Protect parents' rights
✅ Block gov't officials from colluding with Big Tech to censor speech
✅ Declassify all info relating to the COVID-19 lab leak
✅ Rein in Biden's reckless federal spending
✅ Strengthen penalties for violent crimes
✅ Protect women's sports
✅ Combat the fentanyl epidemic
✅ Create a committee to hold Communist China accountable
✅ Stop Joe Biden's student loan bailout
✅ Push back on Democrats' extreme pro-abortion agenda
✅ Unleash domestic energy production
✅ Officially end the COVID-19 national emergency

---
| [DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=4dbb535ae8&e=1050d051da "DONATE NOW TO DEFEND THE HOUSE GOP MAJORITY")
---
| | Paid for by Kansans for LaTurner
---
|
---
| | |
---

Want to change how you receive these emails?
You can [update your preferences](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/profile?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=0162032999) or [unsubscribe from this list](https://jakelaturner.us4.list-manage.com/unsubscribe?u=e36c5b1e49908a49477cee2b3&id=a58a1fbbbe&e=1050d051da&c=0162032999).
---

name: Nikki Budzinski
subject: I’m fighting to bring funding back to Central and Southern Illinois
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress**
body:
|
#
---
Friends, Securing resources to drive economic development across Central and Southern Illinois has been one of my top priorities since being sworn into office a year ago. That’s why I’m excited to share that out of 600 applicants, Decatur was selected as one of 22 finalists to receive funding from the Distressed Area Recompete Pilot Program from the US Department of Commerce and Economic Development Administration. This funding, which is targeted in areas where employment is significantly lower than the national average, will be a major step toward economic development in Decatur, which has been underrepresented and underserved for many years. But I know that there is more to be done. I will continue fighting in Congress to bring funding back to Central and Southern Illinois, so we can invest in our communities and build a brighter future for all. **[If you’re with me in the fight to improve communities across IL-13, please chip in any amount today to power my efforts>>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77044997/449191772/1042890097?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240113_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjE4MGI0Yi01ZmIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tbZ_5OjJi_KHoGfRmXGHKWlHj_LLtT_kr8EJd20k19U=)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77044998/449191774/1042890097?refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240113_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjE4MGI0Yi01ZmIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tbZ_5OjJi_KHoGfRmXGHKWlHj_LLtT_kr8EJd20k19U=) ** | | **[CHIP IN $5 NOW](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77044999/449191776/-1000696272?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=AU_NJB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240113_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MjQwNyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI2MjE4MGI0Yi01ZmIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=tbZ_5OjJi_KHoGfRmXGHKWlHj_LLtT_kr8EJd20k19U=)**

clean_body: | Friends, Securing resources to drive economic development across Central and Southern Illinois has been one of my top priorities since being sworn into office a year ago. That’s why I’m excited to share that out of 600 applicants, Decatur was selected as one of 22 finalists to receive funding from the Distressed Area Recompete Pilot Program from the US Department of Commerce and Economic Development Administration. This funding, which is targeted in areas where employment is significantly lower than the national average, will be a major step toward economic development in Decatur, which has been underrepresented and underserved for many years. But I know that there is more to be done. I will continue fighting in Congress to bring funding back to Central and Southern Illinois, so we can invest in our communities and build a brighter future for all. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = | | = ** = | = = | = = I’m grateful to have you standing with me. — Nikki = Nikki for Congress PO Box 5171 Springfield, IL 62705 United States | mailto:info@nikkiforcongress.com | Paid for by Nikki Budzinski for Congress

Dear Friend,

[](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxUj8uOnDAQRb-m2IHsMhh6wWISRFZZzmyjwjaNFT-QH2r130e0WpFmWece1a0ifzq7P2cYfwDiYXUGRBAfgFiL-KLPz9_p2X5svP01fOH9CvEnIJbnaf6b7yWd8WTdRcel0XOPxHfVmJmPbOBTf2OsOWZOkjaudyWEpts4oBm16NmkUZK8TVtjZ2TYM84FIk7s1g1SIR-Y0f2Acps49OxV1O3JmHLY8NckTdY9OxV94-ajlDO_DlsB12xUTaZ72JCMvgzANVCxMZBrVQy52FLfo6NHW4ONAXAtR6yZgs6tj8m0fmujB7HW4v_kWJMyIJbvDqC8Um-0rR7EclW9iCJ_kr0HEIvf3qyYdDl70RxQko81FBALDk2a9fmwztksR-jZ_fWqiv5fAAAA__9TuYf1) The U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia recently stood behind a podium and announced the DOJ planned to charge “thousands” more Americans who were present during the January 6th protests.

So far, more than 1,200 Americans have been arrested. Through my organization, the National Constitutional Law Union (NCLU), **I’m currently representing 30 of these defendants.**

My trial schedule is PACKED, and **[I need your continued support](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxUj8uOnDAQRb-m2IHsMhh6wWISRFZZzmyjwjaNFT-QH2r130e0WpFmWece1a0ifzq7P2cYfwDiYXUGRBAfgFiL-KLPz9_p2X5svP01fOH9CvEnIJbnaf6b7yWd8WTdRcel0XOPxHfVmJmPbOBTf2OsOWZOkjaudyWEpts4oBm16NmkUZK8TVtjZ2TYM84FIk7s1g1SIR-Y0f2Acps49OxV1O3JmHLY8NckTdY9OxV94-ajlDO_DlsB12xUTaZ72JCMvgzANVCxMZBrVQy52FLfo6NHW4ONAXAtR6yZgs6tj8m0fmujB7HW4v_kWJMyIJbvDqC8Um-0rR7EclW9iCJ_kr0HEIvf3qyYdDl70RxQko81FBALDk2a9fmwztksR-jZ_fWqiv5fAAAA__9TuYf1).**

My name is John Pierce. After my tour in the United States Army, I pursued a law degree at Harvard University. I was also one of the few conservative editors of the _Harvard Law Review_ (after Obama served in that role).

We need TOUGH and relentless warriors who defend the Constitution, and that's why I gave up my lucrative law practice to pursue Constitutional Law. I never expected this to happen.

In my wildest dreams, I could not have imagined our government rounding up and arresting Americans who attended a political protest.

**During the BLM riots, federal buildings were BURNED, police were assaulted _en masse,_ and God knows how many Americans were hurt. And what happened? The Department of Justice dropped all charges against anyone involved. **

But for the January 6th protesters, our government wants to send a clear message: **Stand up to your masters and pay the price!**

I just returned to D.C. for a hearing, and my funds are running low. The cost of airfare and hotels alone for myself, the defendants, and their families are burning through funds.

Criminal litigation is EXPENSIVE, and I’m pushing the limits of my Harvard Law degree to represent these Americans who need our help.

**[Will you help keep us going?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxUj8uOnDAQRb-m2IHsMhh6wWISRFZZzmyjwjaNFT-QH2r130e0WpFmWece1a0ifzq7P2cYfwDiYXUGRBAfgFiL-KLPz9_p2X5svP01fOH9CvEnIJbnaf6b7yWd8WTdRcel0XOPxHfVmJmPbOBTf2OsOWZOkjaudyWEpts4oBm16NmkUZK8TVtjZ2TYM84FIk7s1g1SIR-Y0f2Acps49OxV1O3JmHLY8NckTdY9OxV94-ajlDO_DlsB12xUTaZ72JCMvgzANVCxMZBrVQy52FLfo6NHW4ONAXAtR6yZgs6tj8m0fmujB7HW4v_kWJMyIJbvDqC8Um-0rR7EclW9iCJ_kr0HEIvf3qyYdDl70RxQko81FBALDk2a9fmwztksR-jZ_fWqiv5fAAAA__9TuYf1)**

I have spent countless hours with these defendants and their families. Jobs and homes have been lost. Families have been destroyed. **The DOJ's goal is to terrorize these people to set an example for us all.**

What we see today are the same tactics King George III used before the Revolutionary War started. The British Crown used "writs of assistance" to carry out wide-ranging searches and arrests of anyone for anything. The tactic inspired James Madison to write the Fourth Amendment to our Constitution to protect our privacy.

Today, our government uses high-tech methods to do the same, tracking down anyone who stepped foot on Capitol grounds on January 6th and then using "anonymous" tips to determine their crimes.

Just as King George III abused his power to quell a rebellion among the colonists, our government is abusing its power to do the same.

It's 1776 all over again, and the defendants I represent are the last, best hope that our nation can continue to trust in our Constitution to keep our government in check.

My fight for these men and women isn't just about keeping them out of jail; it's about preserving the framework of our Republic. **[Please help me keep fighting](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxUj8uOnDAQRb-m2IHsMhh6wWISRFZZzmyjwjaNFT-QH2r130e0WpFmWece1a0ifzq7P2cYfwDiYXUGRBAfgFiL-KLPz9_p2X5svP01fOH9CvEnIJbnaf6b7yWd8WTdRcel0XOPxHfVmJmPbOBTf2OsOWZOkjaudyWEpts4oBm16NmkUZK8TVtjZ2TYM84FIk7s1g1SIR-Y0f2Acps49OxV1O3JmHLY8NckTdY9OxV94-ajlDO_DlsB12xUTaZ72JCMvgzANVCxMZBrVQy52FLfo6NHW4ONAXAtR6yZgs6tj8m0fmujB7HW4v_kWJMyIJbvDqC8Um-0rR7EclW9iCJ_kr0HEIvf3qyYdDl70RxQko81FBALDk2a9fmwztksR-jZ_fWqiv5fAAAA__9TuYf1).**

Over the next three weeks, I must raise $58,000 to cover our expenses. Travel, hotels, paralegals, researchers, and assisting attorneys all need to be paid. My credit cards are MAXED out, and I'm relying on you and a handful of other patriots to help. **[Will you chip in today?](http://email.email.freethinkerdaily.com/c/eJxUj8uOnDAQRb-m2IHsMhh6wWISRFZZzmyjwjaNFT-QH2r130e0WpFmWece1a0ifzq7P2cYfwDiYXUGRBAfgFiL-KLPz9_p2X5svP01fOH9CvEnIJbnaf6b7yWd8WTdRcel0XOPxHfVmJmPbOBTf2OsOWZOkjaudyWEpts4oBm16NmkUZK8TVtjZ2TYM84FIk7s1g1SIR-Y0f2Acps49OxV1O3JmHLY8NckTdY9OxV94-ajlDO_DlsB12xUTaZ72JCMvgzANVCxMZBrVQy52FLfo6NHW4ONAXAtR6yZgs6tj8m0fmujB7HW4v_kWJMyIJbvDqC8Um-0rR7EclW9iCJ_kr0HEIvf3qyYdDl70RxQko81FBALDk2a9fmwztksR-jZ_fWqiv5fAAAA__9TuYf1)**

Every dollar helps and is greatly appreciated.

Thank you for your time, support, and prayers.

In Vigilance,

John M. Pierce
Chairman and Founder
National Constitutional Law Union

subject: Would you help me strike out this liberal lineup
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U
body:
| |
---
| | [](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=1f4a796889de42c3b90ca2fdd478a189&_e=wl5m8QPQuBI1K7IbCFoqUOMPe8lgz75g8azxpTtcr3dY3456Jt1cvGo0x_U_g13jI66fStetcdGFdmo9s20Cej_HmnVU4-xXhN_P0xgWieBqIdEzWSAT8qOqTzbXb_E0bWz5gw-wMcGQUTwmLC_7VhCTbQVD19bevxpBYO4DBydOIebYBehrQsZChsoiC58OUwB5cxreWlhhZa87dzRLckhIVL2ldlavuIqb9iSb_Y86NJIUbIzMdR5lZiGeHkELzAd6wIvKCwt_y6CMSzMZBY1Rqr7fPPQ02XxBMpV6-gpg4NDG4PSbz6mA2Uv1zvkzjoPbMjKcay6pSuKPq7vBG0m_dO9bmrHxvrGCl12-o5Bt_F8ZFQUTLdP_cTqtBVisLfJTi8gkxr8ehwFFfucpuQ%3D%3D)
---
| | Fellow American, **[**Will you help me strikeout the liberal lineup of Adam Schiff, Katie Porter, and Barbara Lee on March 5th?**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=1f4a796889de42c3b90ca2fdd478a189&_e=wl5m8QPQuBI1K7IbCFoqUOMPe8lgz75g8azxpTtcr3dY3456Jt1cvGo0x_U_g13jI66fStetcdGFdmo9s20Cej_HmnVU4-xXhN_P0xgWieBqIdEzWSAT8qOqTzbXb_E0bWz5gw-wMcGQUTwmLC_7VhCTbQVD19bevxpBYO4DBydOIebYBehrQsZChsoiC58OUwB5cxreWlhhZa87dzRLckhIVL2ldlavuIqb9iSb_Y_oZ9EyuCcl2Ml9D-wiq7PF8O_ecwu-XdmmPsQR7cFBbtVQnCXLOArFnO3gg4svLIvw4HySajmoxCMjbb1XBtSZKbGiAIrmGJiGd1Nd8vCvmtrcwXzxPoKjCT-RNLB71x4PEp5D58iQ5osQ6kHOL7g4UdPJc7mVE3zb874eWSyoig%3D%3D)** That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. **[Will you step up and help strike out this"lineup of liberals" through a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today?](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=1f4a796889de42c3b90ca2fdd478a189&_e=wl5m8QPQuBI1K7IbCFoqUOMPe8lgz75g8azxpTtcr3dY3456Jt1cvGo0x_U_g13jI66fStetcdGFdmo9s20Cej_HmnVU4-xXhN_P0xgWieBqIdEzWSAT8qOqTzbXb_E0bWz5gw-wMcGQUTwmLC_7VhCTbQVD19bevxpBYO4DBydOIebYBehrQsZChsoiC58OUwB5cxreWlhhZa87dzRLckhIVL2ldlavuIqb9iSb_Y9_IGQxd-wm5WYEjuRVof0EdOzKrVI375atHS2XOglLzCEorUukj6JZC8z-03xJ-G-gtnQPi7_ixcNX5gA7FIitH9Jjv4NIzA_WQ6QcymJxwmRGXVtZCOoDrW6Q9-PwJ5sK1W4CMJ8Be9xNDPaww88G17slVust65ymMQ0O8AU1AQ%3D%3D)** Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of:
---
• Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction.
---
If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, **[**then I need you to take immediate action and rush a contribution of $15, $25, $50, or more today.**](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=1f4a796889de42c3b90ca2fdd478a189&_e=wl5m8QPQuBI1K7IbCFoqUOMPe8lgz75g8azxpTtcr3dY3456Jt1cvGo0x_U_g13jI66fStetcdGFdmo9s20Cej_HmnVU4-xXhN_P0xgWieBqIdEzWSAT8qOqTzbXb_E0bWz5gw-wMcGQUTwmLC_7VhCTbQVD19bevxpBYO4DBydOIebYBehrQsZChsoiC58OUwB5cxreWlhhZa87dzRLckhIVL2ldlavuIqb9iSb_Y90pilAAFuH3iM3Ov53I1ooCT637rXWg1iJSxaoyclYBEYW1ywZRbjKDUCUEfbvyRHcrxRZ0K4XbLKC7T1Ut7vjBTQ-ofvU_L8YLCfM3qZYS54WtuKBvvd5JRcX-AmjvsxYS_5-zqgrRFwAFFN-NVXA6PI1Xg0KqJzoeKBJBiJ4Sg%3D%3D)** Winning this election requires a one-two punch:
---
1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day.
---
In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. **[But I need your help. I'd consider it a great honor to have you on my campaign team. I also consider your support a must have in order to win this race.](https://click.gopactionalert.com/u/click?_t=093aa899b2bd42648f5b5caa6c6024d8&_m=1f4a796889de42c3b90ca2fdd478a189&_e=wl5m8QPQuBI1K7IbCFoqUOMPe8lgz75g8azxpTtcr3dY3456Jt1cvGo0x_U_g13jI66fStetcdGFdmo9s20Cej_HmnVU4-xXhN_P0xgWieBqIdEzWSAT8qOqTzbXb_E0bWz5gw-wMcGQUTwmLC_7VhCTbQVD19bevxpBYO4DBydOIebYBehrQsZChsoiC58OUwB5cxreWlhhZa87dzRLckhIVL2ldlavuIqb9iSb_Y9KbmPI2WNdKlaXN7FXF31ZWqV9C4ZYdUTG220fUS43qFjBvS1_XQjY1atLJ_XWhhYqY63kvhqZI5D-QnKPBIeueWUoE_vw-uO2o6vTaVJvIQQjv9fWE-qlXInACbl-fFDjojZgGBkIbbY-olXnn4CYhjKqUpq0QyPkVcJni1OzeA%3D%3D)** With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again.
---
| | With deepest appreciation,
---
---
Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate

**MY VISION**
---
My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future.

clean_body: | | | | | | Fellow American, That's the day of the California primary. The top two go head-to-head in November. I can think of only one thing worse than a General Election ballot that forces Californians to "choose" between three dyed-in-the-wool leftists like Schiff, Porter, or Lee... ...and that's being forced to endure six years of Schiff, Porter, or Lee in the U.S. Senate. I need your help to go "three up...three down" against this lineup of liberal career politicians. That's a bit of baseball vernacular. No surprise, right? It means you record three outs against the first three batters in an inning. Then, it's your team's turn to go on offense. Well, that's very much the case in this election... ...you and I need to strike out this lineup of liberals so we can get to work saving our country. Liberals straight out of Congress where all three have spent a combined 51 years - most recently acting as rubberstamps for the Biden agenda that has done so much harm to our state and our nation. Which is why I'm reaching out to you today. Think about the crumbling quality of life in my once-great state of California. Think about the daily reality of: • Fear of walking down the street, taking their kids to school, or running a small business because of rampant crime, homelessness, and drug addiction. • The exploding cost of living (gas, food, shelter) which for the first time in our history is causing more people to leave California. • Failing public schools and plummeting test scores. The numbers don't lie... prolonged school closings not only robbed our kids of learning but of social interaction. If you believe, as I do, that voters deserve better than a "false choice" between Schiff, Porter, and Lee on November 5, 2024, Winning this election requires a one-two punch: 1\. Finish in the top two on March 5th (very doable as the Democrat vote will be split three ways). 2\. An eight-month grassroots and TV, radio, and online campaign "connecting the dots" between the policies pushed by Schiff/Porter/Lee and the brutal reality facing Californians every day. In my playing days, I would never be out-worked or out-hustled. That's my approach to this campaign. Door-knocks, phone-calls, rallies, townhalls, you name it. With you on our side, I'm confident we can not only give voters a real choice, but someone who remembers how great California was and knows how great it can be again. | | With deepest appreciation, Steve Garvey Republican for United States Senate | | | | | | | MY VISION My campaign is focused on quality-of-life issues, public safety, and education. As your U.S. Senator, I will serve with commonsense, compassion, and will work to build consensus to benefit all of the people of California. I've been fortunate to wear many hats in life - from professional athlete to businessman to philanthropist. But the one thing that has remained consistent is my love for this great state and my desire to make a difference. In baseball, it's not about the individual; it's about the team. I believe the same holds true for politics. It's time we come together, find common ground, and work towards a brighter future. | | | | PAID FOR BY STEVE GARVEY FOR U.S. SENATE 9070 Irvine Center Drive, Suite 150 Irvine, CA 92618 | | This Email was Sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com If you would like to stop recieving our emails ****_ |

Peter, with our very first fundraising deadline of the new year just around the corner, I have to ask: **[Is there _anything_ I can say to convince you to make a contribution to my reelection campaign?**](https://act.tammybaldwin.com/go/2155?c0=tbe-em-jan24.HgOSTk&refcode=AU_STB_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240113_PM1_V1_S1&t=4&akid=1851%2E35263%2EC19qQh) Would you be convinced to donate if you knew that Republicans only need to flip one more seat to win back the Senate majority and enact their far-right agenda? | | |
_**Get to Know Ron DeSantis**_
---
| | | [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4a1e8fd157084ffd84d215f11a861e2b&_e=D6-6bJpsKfm1yJXtzWue32v9mqqMzhhTtL8HBA6KsaUvmKXnoJieBPGp9AD5FalAl6b9sD3Drwsgh2-Lqav6FfurIjkAS_rcQ9RMT_Z7MR2yQkZSYXwSfkG6047q1rig7ADO13WaiS_1ePH2PmWcDMPWyvDKRDian1Gyj4a54w_nhqk8GHM1z9HhwVCT3iJ_JdpbE1QJf0UUxGHKr1gz135S-6vDMzWtMBS9QE3btPqaDyTjwwsk9cRrzkQvSoKYrNuxL0oi-MSjqCeVBN-CZwYrSSZCE7dDhZLFvxKAUWljls5gB68vKotT52CXWlfnH_EyeX1yKIzYq6CgJpb48kZ96qIlnp9Mgxt9xN9-uHFYHWgkwtVF290hZFLDEdy1r7hvuseuUUoqayjKXGlJrSFpG8e6mrXsFqRlbMDMrkOxuro-TSwm0Mm6UoB8AKH7)
---

Ron DeSantis comes from blue-collar roots in the state of Florida. Nothing was handed to him, he worked his way through college and led his team as the Yale Baseball captain. After earning his undergraduate degree, Ron DeSantis graduated from Harvard Law School, but was so moved by the events of September 11, 2001, that he volunteered to serve in the Navy to fight for our freedom. When he returned, he started a life of public service by serving Florida as both Congressman and now Governor. Despite all his years of fighting to ensure the American people enjoy the freedom we're promised in this country, he's watched the Left strip away freedoms at every turn and impose radical agendas on children, families, and consumers nationwide. In 2009, Ron met the love of his life Casey in Florida, and he's now the proud father of 6, 5, and 3-year-old children. Because of his kids, Ron DeSantis knows that this fight is _personal_ and understands the frustration parents face when teachers' unions and liberal groups shove a political agenda down the throats of children.

---
| [](http://links.newsletter.conservativedirect.com/u/click?_t=5b1853ae48754bee8f471363fe4933a9&_m=4a1e8fd157084ffd84d215f11a861e2b&_e=D6-6bJpsKfm1yJXtzWue32v9mqqMzhhTtL8HBA6KsaUvmKXnoJieBPGp9AD5FalAl6b9sD3Drwsgh2-Lqav6FfurIjkAS_rcQ9RMT_Z7MR2yQkZSYXwSfkG6047q1rig7ADO13WaiS_1ePH2PmWcDMPWyvDKRDian1Gyj4a54w_nhqk8GHM1z9HhwVCT3iJ_JdpbE1QJf0UUxGHKr1gz135S-6vDMzWtMBS9QE3btPqaDyTjwwsk9cRrzkQvSoKYrNuxL0oi-MSjqCeVBN-CZwYrSSZCE7dDhZLFvxKAUWn4ujEwwWb7pKhAZuoovCbo-ku37jZB6LCykP42JwLGz5a1DfF0oME5JoLu-MarKJ5oJkXZn5_N89C5hN1pWu1QQSNqiZDzBXB-7nvMsrlY8gSIGxPlUc6PNLwnziZAR7Mr7egXFbrfOk03LXpWZee9)
---

On Day One, Ron DeSantis has _promised_ that he will bring a RECKONING for what unelected bureaucrats like Anthony Fauci and DC elites have done to children. Ron DeSantis will ignite our Great American Comeback by _immediately getting to work_ stopping the invasion across our southern border, ensuring our military once again puts the mission first, declaring our economic independence, and restoring our American energy dominance so that our country gets back on track before it's too late. In Florida, Ron DeSantis' record speaks for itself. He's taken on the political establishment, politicized bureaucratic agencies, woke corporations, and the legacy media countless times and **_won every single time_**. Under his leadership, Florida has cultivated a thriving economy. It has stood as a citadel of freedom, and with him as our next President, America can once again be that shining City on a Hill for the rest of the world to look upon. _That's why he's running for President of the United States. Ron DeSantis knows that the decline of our country is a choice that cannot continue for another four years; the time to lead is now.... the time to act is now._

name: Team Kennedy
subject: Determination:
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY TEAM KENNEDY
body:
RFK Jr. knows we can all do better.

|
---
| | | **RFK Jr. knows we can all do better.
**
---
---
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=grit_1_13_24_email_1_1_nd&n=1)
|
---
Dear Peter,
Running for President requires determination and grit.
Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. has it in spades.
And he doesn't want to keep it to himself, _he wants all Americans to thrive and live healthier, happier, and longer_.
**In fact, he has spent a lifetime doing just that.**
RFK Jr.'s activism around toxic pollution led him to lobby successfully for the removal of mercury from most childhood vaccinations in the United States.
He went on to advocate for the restoration of standard product liability and placebo testing requirements for vaccine manufacturers.
The pharmaceutical mega-corporations are by far the most heavily fined and criminally prosecuted companies in America, yet also some of the most powerful.
His nonprofit, Children’s Health Defense, has long been a key crusader against the corruption of this industry and its influence in government.
| | **As President, RFK Jr. will fight for a healthier, less drug-dependent America.**
---
RFK Jr. knows we can all do better.
But it’s going to take a President who has a history of standing up for those who have no one doing so.
_It's going to take a President who has the strength, determination, and resolve_ to challenge the corrupt and failed Health Institutions — the WHO, HHS, NIH, CDC, and the FDA.
[](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=grit_1_13_24_email_1_1_nd&n=2)
---
They must be held accountable for their actions, and their inactions, and subject to fundamental reform.
RFK Jr. has spent a lifetime seeking justice and health freedom for all Americans, and he will continue to do so as your President.
**Please let Robert F. Kennedy, Jr. hear from you** [**with a gift of $24 a month for 2024; or $11, $35, $50, $120 or more today.**](https://www.kennedy24.com/donate?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=grit_1_13_24_email_1_1_nd&n=3)
America needs a President who has shown the resilience to fight for a healthier, stronger America — and one who will keep the health agencies in Washington and around the globe accountable.
Team Kennedy
[**TeamKennedy.com**](https://www.kennedy24.com/?e=d33e868971601c1c714cfe0555abd394&utm_source=joinkennedy&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=grit_1_13_24_email_1_1_nd&n=4)

Can we count on you to own a piece of this fight? | | | | | ---|--- Since securing a Democratic trifecta in the 2022 midterms, Michigan Gov. Gretchen Whitmer has been working alongside state Democrats to safeguard abortion rights and expand access to the ballot box. But now the Michigan House is TIED and our majority is at risk. In North Carolina, Democratic Gov. Roy Cooper is completely gridlocked – state Republicans are using their razor-thin supermajority to override Gov. Cooper’s veto, ban abortion, and limit voting rights... SO NOW → We’re working around the clock to power fundraise so we can expand Democratic power in state legislatures and break up Republican strongholds. | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will process immediately. | | | | | Electing state Democrats who will work alongside Democratic governors to secure fundamental freedoms in their states is our best path forward. | | My name is Jon Tester.

I'm the Senate's only working dirt farmer. I lost three fingers in a meat grinding accident when I was younger. I get a $12 flattop haircut. Most of my shirts are stained with dirt.

**Montana values are in my bones. And I'm sure as hell going to win this race.**

But I’ll need your help to overcome the millions of dollars in attacks and win this toss-up race:

body:
We can’t afford to let Trump’s lies take root in New Mexico. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/77046208/449195610/-272948131?refcode=AU_MTH_FR_GEN_MMG_AC_20240113_PM1_V1_S2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDYvMS84OTA0NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0Yjg0OTMwZi02ZWIyLWVlMTEtYmVhMS0wMDIyNDgyMjM3ZGEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=aFHOwnO9-as209tzwtB0YzhFmgPxrrSqGsKQ0b-hgdM=&emci=3bb5970a-6db2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&emdi=4b84930f-6eb2-ee11-bea1-0022482237da&ceid=252045)

We can’t afford four more years of Donald Trump in the White House. Earlier this week, he bragged about dismantling the constitutional right to an abortion, saying: “For 54 years, they were trying to get _Roe v. Wade_ terminated, and I did it, and I’m proud to have done it.” He also threatened “bedlam in the country” if his criminal charges stop him from winning the presidency, and his lawyers claimed a president has “absolute immunity” from criminal charges before impeachment and conviction, _even if he assassinates political rivals._ And he plans to ramp up his campaign in New Mexico soon, where he will undoubtedly spread more misinformation and try to justify his criminal charges and terrible record to voters. **One of his favorite MAGA allies in New Mexico even just launched a U.S. Senate campaign against me.** **[We can’t afford to let Trump’s lies take root in New Mexico.
